papers.title: CuTeGen: An LLM-Based Agentic Framework for Generation and Optimization of High-Performance GPU Kernels using CuTe
papers.abstract: High-performance GPU kernels are critical to modern machine learning systems, yet developing efficient implementations remains a challenging, expert-driven process due to the tight coupling between algorithmic structure, memory hierarchy usage, and hardware-specific optimizations. Recent work has explored using large language models (LLMs) to generate GPU kernels automatically, but generated implementations often struggle to maintain correctness and achieve competitive performance across iterative refinements. We present CuTeGen, an agentic framework for automated generation and optimization of GPU kernels that treats kernel development as a structured generate--test--refine workflow. Unlike approaches that rely on one-shot generation or large-scale search over candidate implementations, CuTeGen focuses on progressive refinement of a single evolving kernel through execution-based validation, structured debugging, and staged optimization. A key design choice is to generate kernels using the CuTe abstraction layer, which exposes performance-critical structures such as tiling and data movement while providing a more stable representation for iterative modification. To guide performance improvement, CuTeGen incorporates workload-aware optimization prompts and delayed integration of profiling feedback. Experimental results on matrix multiplication and activation workloads demonstrate that the framework produces functionally correct kernels and achieves competitive performance relative to optimized library implementations.

analysis.tldr: CuTeGen 是一个基于 LLM 的智能体框架，通过结构化生成-测试-优化流程自动生成和优化高性能 GPU 内核，在矩阵乘法和激活函数任务上达到与优化库相当的性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 高性能 GPU 内核是现代机器学习系统的关键，但其开发高度依赖专家经验，现有 LLM 方法生成的实现难以保证正确性和竞争性能。
analysis.problem: 如何利用 LLM 自动生成并逐步优化 GPU 内核，使其在保持正确性的同时达到接近专家优化的性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 CuTeGen 智能体框架，将内核开发视为结构化生成-测试-优化流程，使用 CuTe 抽象层生成内核，通过执行验证、结构化调试和分阶段优化进行渐进式改进，并引入工作负载感知的优化提示和延迟的性能反馈集成。
contributions: 提出基于 LLM 的智能体框架 CuTeGen，用于自动生成和优化 GPU 内核。
采用 CuTe 抽象层和渐进式细化策略，提高生成内核的正确性和性能。
analysis.experiments: 在矩阵乘法和激活函数任务上验证，框架能生成功能正确的内核，性能与优化库相当。
limitations: 可能仅适用于 CuTe 抽象层支持的内核类型。
性能提升可能依赖特定工作负载的优化提示设计。
analysis.primary_area_en: infrastructure, software libraries, hardware, systems, etc.
analysis.one_sentence_summary: CuTeGen 是一个基于 LLM 的智能体框架，通过结构化生成-测试-优化流程自动生成和优化高性能 GPU 内核，在矩阵乘法和激活函数任务上达到与优化库相当的性能。

papers.title: AgentSocialBench: Evaluating Privacy Risks in Human-Centered Agentic Social Networks
papers.abstract: With the rise of personalized, persistent LLM agent frameworks such as OpenClaw, human-centered agentic social networks in which teams of collaborative AI agents serve individual users in a social network across multiple domains are becoming a reality. This setting creates novel privacy challenges: agents must coordinate across domain boundaries, mediate between humans, and interact with other users' agents, all while protecting sensitive personal information. While prior work has evaluated multi-agent coordination and privacy preservation, the dynamics and privacy risks of human-centered agentic social networks remain unexplored. To this end, we introduce AgentSocialBench, the first benchmark to systematically evaluate privacy risk in this setting, comprising scenarios across seven categories spanning dyadic and multi-party interactions, grounded in realistic user profiles with hierarchical sensitivity labels and directed social graphs. Our experiments reveal that privacy in agentic social networks is fundamentally harder than in single-agent settings: (1) cross-domain and cross-user coordination creates persistent leakage pressure even when agents are explicitly instructed to protect information, (2) privacy instructions that teach agents how to abstract sensitive information paradoxically cause them to discuss it more (we call it abstraction paradox). These findings underscore that current LLM agents lack robust mechanisms for privacy preservation in human-centered agentic social networks, and that new approaches beyond prompt engineering are needed to make agent-mediated social coordination safe for real-world deployment.

analysis.tldr: 首个评估人类中心智能体社交网络隐私风险的基准，揭示跨域协调导致持续泄露及抽象悖论。
analysis.research_motivation: 随着个性化持久LLM智能体框架（如OpenClaw）兴起，人类中心智能体社交网络成为现实，但现有工作未探索其隐私风险，亟需系统评估。
analysis.problem: 评估人类中心智能体社交网络中跨域、跨用户协调带来的隐私泄露风险。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 实验发现两个现象：(1) 跨域和跨用户协调即使有隐私指令也会造成持续泄露压力；(2) 教导智能体抽象敏感信息的指令反而导致更多讨论（抽象悖论）。
analysis.method: 构建包含七类场景（二元/多方交互）的基准，基于具有分层敏感标签的真实用户画像和有向社交图。
contributions: 首个系统评估人类中心智能体社交网络隐私风险的基准AgentSocialBench
揭示隐私指令的抽象悖论现象
analysis.experiments: 在七类场景中测试LLM智能体，发现隐私泄露压力持续存在且抽象指令适得其反。
limitations: 基准场景可能未覆盖所有隐私风险类型
未提供具体缓解方法
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首个评估人类中心智能体社交网络隐私风险的基准，揭示跨域协调导致持续泄露及抽象悖论。

papers.title: Type-Checked Compliance: Deterministic Guardrails for Agentic Financial Systems Using Lean 4 Theorem Proving
papers.abstract: The rapid evolution of autonomous, agentic artificial intelligence within financial services has introduced an existential architectural crisis: large language models (LLMs) are probabilistic, non-deterministic systems operating in domains that demand absolute, mathematically verifiable compliance guarantees. Existing guardrail solutions -- including NVIDIA NeMo Guardrails and Guardrails AI -- rely on probabilistic classifiers and syntactic validators that are fundamentally inadequate for enforcing complex multi-variable regulatory constraints mandated by the SEC, FINRA, and OCC. This paper presents the Lean-Agent Protocol, a formal-verification-based AI guardrail platform that leverages the Aristotle neural-symbolic model developed by Harmonic AI to auto-formalize institutional policies into Lean 4 code. Every proposed agentic action is treated as a mathematical conjecture: execution is permitted if and only if the Lean 4 kernel proves that the action satisfies pre-compiled regulatory axioms. This architecture provides cryptographic-level compliance certainty at microsecond latency, directly satisfying SEC Rule 15c3-5, OCC Bulletin 2011-12, FINRA Rule 3110, and CFPB explainability mandates. A three-phase implementation roadmap from shadow verification through enterprise-scale deployment is provided.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于Lean 4定理证明的确定性金融AI护栏，将监管合规转化为数学证明。
analysis.research_motivation: 金融领域要求绝对合规，但现有LLM护栏依赖概率分类器，无法满足SEC/FINRA等复杂多变量监管约束。
analysis.problem: 如何为概率性的LLM提供确定性、可验证的合规保障。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: Lean-Agent协议：利用Harmonic AI的Aristotle神经符号模型将机构政策自动形式化为Lean 4代码，将每个Agent动作视为数学猜想，仅当Lean 4内核证明其满足监管公理时才允许执行。
contributions: 提出基于形式化验证的AI护栏架构，提供密码级合规确定性。
提供从影子验证到企业级部署的三阶段实施路线图。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 形式化验证的覆盖范围可能受限于政策形式化的完整性和准确性。
微秒级延迟可能在高频交易等极端场景下仍面临挑战。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于Lean 4定理证明的确定性金融AI护栏，将监管合规转化为数学证明。

papers.title: DISCO-TAB: A Hierarchical Reinforcement Learning Framework for Privacy-Preserving Synthesis of Complex Clinical Data
papers.abstract: The development of robust clinical decision support systems is frequently impeded by the scarcity of high-fidelity, privacy-preserving biomedical data. While Generative Large Language Models (LLMs) offer a promising avenue for synthetic data generation, they often struggle to capture the complex, non-linear dependencies and severe class imbalances inherent in Electronic Health Records (EHR), leading to statistically plausible but clinically invalid records. To bridge this gap, we introduce DISCO-TAB (DIScriminator-guided COntrol for TABular synthesis), a novel framework that orchestrates a fine-tuned LLM with a multi-objective discriminator system optimized via Reinforcement Learning. Unlike prior methods relying on scalar feedback, DISCO-TAB evaluates synthesis at four granularities, token, sentence, feature, and row, while integrating Automated Constraint Discovery and Inverse-Frequency Reward Shaping to autonomously preserve latent medical logic and resolve minority-class collapse. We rigorously validate our framework across diverse benchmarks, including high-dimensional, small-sample medical datasets (e.g., Heart Failure, Parkinson's). Our results demonstrate that hierarchical feedback yields state-of-the-art performance, achieving up to 38.2% improvement in downstream clinical classifier utility compared to GAN and Diffusion baselines, while ensuring exceptional statistical fidelity (JSD < 0.01) and robust resistance to membership inference attacks. This work establishes a new standard for generating trustworthy, utility-preserving synthetic tabular data for sensitive healthcare applications.

analysis.tldr: DISCO-TAB通过分层强化学习框架，结合微调LLM和多目标判别器，实现高保真、隐私保护的复杂临床表格数据合成。
analysis.research_motivation: 临床决策支持系统开发受限于高质量、隐私保护的生物医学数据稀缺，现有生成式LLM难以捕捉电子健康记录中的复杂非线性依赖和严重类别不平衡，导致生成的记录统计上合理但临床无效。
analysis.problem: 如何生成既保持高统计保真度、又保护隐私，同时保留临床有效性的复杂表格数据。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，现有方法（如GAN和扩散模型）在合成临床数据时，常出现类别崩溃和临床逻辑缺失的问题，导致下游分类器效用低下。
analysis.method: 提出DISCO-TAB框架，通过强化学习优化一个多目标判别器系统，在token、句子、特征和行四个粒度上评估合成质量，并集成自动约束发现和逆频率奖励塑造，以自主保留潜在医学逻辑并解决少数类崩溃。
contributions: 提出分层强化学习框架DISCO-TAB，结合微调LLM和多粒度判别器，用于隐私保护的复杂临床表格数据合成。
引入自动约束发现和逆频率奖励塑造，有效保留医学逻辑并缓解类别不平衡。
在多个高维小样本医疗数据集上实现SOTA性能，下游分类器效用提升高达38.2%，统计保真度优异（JSD<0.01），且对成员推断攻击具有鲁棒性。
analysis.experiments: 在Heart Failure、Parkinson等高维小样本医疗数据集上验证，与GAN和扩散基线相比，下游临床分类器效用提升高达38.2%，统计保真度JSD<0.01，并展示了抵抗成员推断攻击的能力。
limitations: 可能依赖特定LLM的微调，泛化性需进一步验证。
框架复杂度较高，训练成本可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: DISCO-TAB通过分层强化学习框架，结合微调LLM和多目标判别器，实现高保真、隐私保护的复杂临床表格数据合成。

papers.title: UniRecGen: Unifying Multi-View 3D Reconstruction and Generation
papers.abstract: Sparse-view 3D modeling represents a fundamental tension between reconstruction fidelity and generative plausibility. While feed-forward reconstruction excels in efficiency and input alignment, it often lacks the global priors needed for structural completeness. Conversely, diffusion-based generation provides rich geometric details but struggles with multi-view consistency. We present UniRecGen, a unified framework that integrates these two paradigms into a single cooperative system. To overcome inherent conflicts in coordinate spaces, 3D representations, and training objectives, we align both models within a shared canonical space. We employ disentangled cooperative learning, which maintains stable training while enabling seamless collaboration during inference. Specifically, the reconstruction module is adapted to provide canonical geometric anchors, while the diffusion generator leverages latent-augmented conditioning to refine and complete the geometric structure. Experimental results demonstrate that UniRecGen achieves superior fidelity and robustness, outperforming existing methods in creating complete and consistent 3D models from sparse observations. Code is available at https://github.com/zsh523/UniRecGen.

analysis.tldr: UniRecGen 统一了前馈重建与扩散生成，实现稀疏视图下的高质量 3D 建模。
analysis.research_motivation: 稀疏视图 3D 建模面临重建保真度与生成合理性之间的根本矛盾：前馈重建效率高但缺乏全局先验，扩散生成细节丰富但多视图一致性差。
analysis.problem: 如何将前馈重建与扩散生成两种范式融合到一个统一的框架中，同时解决它们在坐标空间、3D 表示和训练目标上的冲突。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 前馈重建缺乏全局先验导致结构不完整，扩散生成难以保证多视图一致性。
analysis.method: 提出 UniRecGen 统一框架，通过共享规范空间对齐两个模型，并采用解耦协作学习实现稳定训练与无缝推理；重建模块提供规范几何锚点，扩散生成器利用潜在增强条件细化并补全几何结构。
contributions: 提出统一前馈重建与扩散生成的框架 UniRecGen，解决两者在坐标空间、表示和训练目标上的冲突。
设计解耦协作学习策略，实现稳定训练与推理时的无缝协作。
在稀疏视图 3D 建模任务上取得更优的保真度和鲁棒性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但声称在创建完整一致的 3D 模型上优于现有方法。
limitations: 可能依赖特定稀疏视图设置，泛化性需进一步验证。
框架复杂度较高，推理效率可能受限。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: UniRecGen 统一了前馈重建与扩散生成，实现稀疏视图下的高质量 3D 建模。

papers.title: A Self-Evolving Agentic Framework for Metasurface Inverse Design
papers.abstract: Metasurface inverse design has become central to realizing complex optical functionality, yet translating target responses into executable, solver-compatible workflows still demands specialized expertise in computational electromagnetics and solver-specific software engineering. Recent large language models (LLMs) offer a complementary route to reducing this workflow-construction burden, but existing language-driven systems remain largely session-bounded and do not preserve reusable workflow knowledge across inverse-design tasks. We present an agentic framework for metasurface inverse design that addresses this limitation through context-level skill evolution. The framework couples a coding agent, evolving skill artifacts, and a deterministic evaluator grounded in physical simulation so that solver-specific strategies can be iteratively refined across tasks without modifying model weights or the underlying physics solver. We evaluate the framework on a benchmark spanning multiple metasurface inverse-design task types, with separate training-aligned and held-out task families. Evolved skills raise in-distribution task success from 38% to 74%, increase criteria pass fraction from 0.510 to 0.870, and reduce average attempts from 4.10 to 2.30. On held-out task families, binary success changes only marginally, but improvements in best margin together with shifts in error composition and agent behavior indicate partial transfer of workflow knowledge. These results suggest that the main value of skill evolution lies in accumulating reusable solver-specific expertise around reliable computational engines, thereby offering a practical path toward more autonomous and accessible metasurface inverse-design workflows.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种自进化智能体框架，通过技能演化提升超表面逆向设计的工作流自动化与可复用性。
analysis.research_motivation: 超表面逆向设计依赖计算电磁学专业知识和求解器软件工程，现有语言驱动系统缺乏跨任务的可复用工作流知识。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个能跨任务积累和复用求解器特定工作流知识的自动化逆向设计框架。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 结合编码智能体、演化技能工件和基于物理仿真的确定性评估器，通过上下文级技能演化迭代优化求解器策略，无需修改模型权重或物理求解器。
contributions: 提出一种自进化智能体框架，实现超表面逆向设计工作流的知识积累与复用。
在多个任务类型上验证技能演化显著提升分布内任务成功率（38%→74%）并减少尝试次数（4.10→2.30）。
analysis.experiments: 在涵盖多种超表面逆向设计任务类型的基准上评估，包括训练对齐和保留任务族。分布内任务成功率从38%提升至74%，标准通过分数从0.510升至0.870，平均尝试次数从4.10降至2.30。保留任务族上二进制成功率变化不大，但最佳余量改进和错误组成变化表明部分工作流知识迁移。
limitations: 保留任务族上二进制成功率提升有限，技能演化的泛化能力可能受限。
框架依赖物理仿真评估器，计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种自进化智能体框架，通过技能演化提升超表面逆向设计的工作流自动化与可复用性。

papers.title: Prime Once, then Reprogram Locally: An Efficient Alternative to Black-Box Service Model Adaptation
papers.abstract: Adapting closed-box service models (i.e., APIs) for target tasks typically relies on reprogramming via Zeroth-Order Optimization (ZOO). However, this standard strategy is known for extensive, costly API calls and often suffers from slow, unstable optimization. Furthermore, we observe that this paradigm faces new challenges with modern APIs (e.g., GPT-4o). These models can be less sensitive to the input perturbations ZOO relies on, thereby hindering performance gains. To address these limitations, we propose an Alternative efficient Reprogramming approach for Service models (AReS). Instead of direct, continuous closed-box optimization, AReS initiates a single-pass interaction with the service API to prime an amenable local pre-trained encoder. This priming stage trains only a lightweight layer on top of the local encoder, making it highly receptive to the subsequent glass-box (white-box) reprogramming stage performed directly on the local model. Consequently, all subsequent adaptation and inference rely solely on this local proxy, eliminating all further API costs. Experiments demonstrate AReS's effectiveness where prior ZOO-based methods struggle: on GPT-4o, AReS achieves a +27.8% gain over the zero-shot baseline, a task where ZOO-based methods provide little to no improvement. Broadly, across ten diverse datasets, AReS outperforms state-of-the-art methods (+2.5% for VLMs, +15.6% for standard VMs) while reducing API calls by over 99.99%. AReS thus provides a robust and practical solution for adapting modern closed-box models.

analysis.tldr: 提出AReS方法，通过一次API调用初始化本地编码器，再白盒重编程，实现高效黑盒模型适配，大幅减少API调用并提升性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有黑盒模型适配依赖零阶优化（ZOO），但该方法API调用成本高、优化不稳定，且现代API（如GPT-4o）对输入扰动不敏感，导致性能提升有限。
analysis.problem: 如何高效、低成本地适配闭源服务模型（API）到目标任务，避免ZOO的昂贵API调用和优化困难。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到现代API（如GPT-4o）对ZOO依赖的输入扰动不敏感，导致ZOO方法性能增益有限甚至无效。
analysis.method: AReS：先通过单次API交互训练本地预训练编码器上的轻量层（初始化阶段），使其对后续白盒重编程敏感；然后在本地模型上进行白盒重编程，后续适配和推理完全依赖本地代理，无需额外API调用。
contributions: 提出AReS方法，将黑盒重编程转化为一次API调用加本地白盒重编程，显著降低API成本。
在多个数据集上超越现有ZOO方法，尤其在GPT-4o上提升27.8%，API调用减少99.99%以上。
analysis.experiments: 在10个数据集上评估，涵盖VLM和标准视觉模型，与SOTA方法比较，AReS在VLM上平均提升2.5%，在标准视觉模型上提升15.6%，API调用减少99.99%以上。
limitations: 依赖本地预训练编码器的可用性，可能不适用于所有任务。
初始化阶段需要一次API调用，对于完全无法访问API的场景不适用。
analysis.primary_area_en: transfer learning, meta learning, and lifelong learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出AReS方法，通过一次API调用初始化本地编码器，再白盒重编程，实现高效黑盒模型适配，大幅减少API调用并提升性能。

papers.title: SelfGrader: Stable Jailbreak Detection for Large Language Models using Token-Level Logits
papers.abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) are powerful tools for answering user queries, yet they remain highly vulnerable to jailbreak attacks. Existing guardrail methods typically rely on internal features or textual responses to detect malicious queries, which either introduce substantial latency or suffer from the randomness in text generation. To overcome these limitations, we propose SelfGrader, a lightweight guardrail method that formulates jailbreak detection as a numerical grading problem using token-level logits. Specifically, SelfGrader evaluates the safety of a user query within a compact set of numerical tokens (NTs) (e.g., 0-9) and interprets their logit distribution as an internal safety signal. To align these signals with human intuition of maliciousness, SelfGrader introduces a dual-perspective scoring rule that considers both the maliciousness and benignness of the query, yielding a stable and interpretable score that reflects harmfulness and reduces the false positive rate simultaneously. Extensive experiments across diverse jailbreak benchmarks, multiple LLMs, and state-of-the-art guardrail baselines demonstrate that SelfGrader achieves up to a 22.66% reduction in ASR on LLaMA-3-8B, while maintaining significantly lower memory overhead (up to 173x) and latency (up to 26x).

analysis.tldr: SelfGrader 利用 token 级 logits 将越狱检测转化为数值评分，实现轻量、稳定且低延迟的防护。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有越狱检测方法要么依赖内部特征导致高延迟，要么受文本生成随机性影响，缺乏稳定高效的轻量方案。
analysis.problem: 如何在不引入大量延迟和内存开销的前提下，稳定且准确地检测 LLM 的越狱攻击。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将越狱检测建模为数值评分问题，使用 token 级 logits 在紧凑数值集（如 0-9）上评估查询安全性，并通过双视角评分规则（同时考虑恶意性和良性）生成稳定可解释的分数。
contributions: 提出 SelfGrader，一种基于 token 级 logits 的轻量越狱检测方法，将检测转化为数值评分。
引入双视角评分规则，降低误报率并提高分数稳定性。
在多个基准和模型上验证，ASR 降低 22.66%，内存开销降低 173 倍，延迟降低 26 倍。
analysis.experiments: 在多种越狱基准、多个 LLM 和先进防护基线上进行实验，结果显示在 LLaMA-3-8B 上 ASR 降低 22.66%，内存开销降低 173 倍，延迟降低 26 倍。
limitations: 可能仅适用于基于 logits 的模型，对 API 级模型不适用。
数值评分规则可能对某些复杂越狱模式不敏感。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SelfGrader 利用 token 级 logits 将越狱检测转化为数值评分，实现轻量、稳定且低延迟的防护。

papers.title: The Newton-Muon Optimizer
papers.abstract: The Muon optimizer has received considerable attention for its strong performance in training large language models, yet the design principle behind its matrix-gradient orthogonalization remains largely elusive. In this paper, we introduce a surrogate model that not only sheds new light on the design of Muon, but more importantly leads to a new optimizer. In the same spirit as the derivation of Newton's method, the surrogate approximates the loss as a quadratic function of the perturbation to a weight matrix $W$ using only three matrices: the gradient $G$, an output-space curvature matrix $H$, and the data matrix $Z$ that stacks the layer inputs. By minimizing this surrogate in one step and adopting a certain isotropic assumption on the weights, we obtain the closed-form update rule (up to momentum and weight decay) $W \leftarrow W - η\cdot \mathrm{msgn}(G(ZZ^\top)^{-1})$, where $η$ is the learning rate and $\mathrm{msgn}(X)=UV^\top$ if $X=USV^\top$ is a compact singular value decomposition. This new optimization method, which we refer to as Newton-Muon, shows that standard Muon can be interpreted as an implicit Newton-type method that neglects the right preconditioning induced by the input second moment. Empirically, on a reproduction of the earliest publicly released Modded-NanoGPT speedrun configuration using Muon for GPT-2 pretraining, Newton-Muon reaches the target validation loss in 6\% fewer iteration steps and reduces wall-clock training time by about 4\%.

analysis.tldr: Newton-Muon 优化器通过牛顿法视角改进 Muon，在 GPT-2 预训练中减少 6% 迭代步数和 4% 时间。
analysis.research_motivation: Muon 优化器在 LLM 训练中表现优异，但其矩阵梯度正交化的设计原理尚不清晰，缺乏理论指导。
analysis.problem: 揭示 Muon 优化器的设计原理，并基于此提出更高效的优化方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 通过构建损失函数的二次型代理模型，推导出包含输入二阶矩预处理的闭式更新规则，得到 Newton-Muon 优化器。
contributions: 提出一个代理模型，揭示了 Muon 优化器与牛顿法之间的联系。
推导出 Newton-Muon 优化器，在 GPT-2 预训练中实现更快的收敛。
analysis.experiments: 在 Modded-NanoGPT 配置下进行 GPT-2 预训练，Newton-Muon 达到目标验证损失所需迭代步数减少 6%，训练时间减少约 4%。
limitations: 实验仅在单一模型和任务上进行，泛化性未知。
假设权重各向同性，可能限制适用性。
analysis.primary_area_en: optimization
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Newton-Muon 优化器通过牛顿法视角改进 Muon，在 GPT-2 预训练中减少 6% 迭代步数和 4% 时间。

papers.title: A Dynamic Atlas of Persian Poetic Symbolism: Families, Fields, and the Historical Rewiring of Meaning
papers.abstract: Persian poetry is often remembered through recurrent symbols before it is remembered through plot. Wine vessels, gardens, flames, sacred titles, bodily beauty, and courtly names return across centuries, yet computational work still tends to flatten this material into isolated words or broad document semantics. That misses a practical unit of organization in Persian poetics: related forms travel as families and gain force through recurring relations. Using a corpus of 129,451 poems, we consolidate recurrent forms into traceable families, separate imagistic material from sacred and courtly reference, and map their relations in a multi-layer graph. The symbolic core is relatively sparse, the referential component much denser, and the attachment zone between them selective rather than diffuse. Across 11 Hijri-century bins, some families remain widely distributed, especially Shab (Night), Ruz (Day), and Khaak (Earth). Wine vessels, garden space, flame, and lyric sound strengthen later, while prestige-coded and heroic-courtly vocabulary is weighted earlier. Century-specific graphs show change in arrangement as well as membership. Modularity rises, cross-scope linkage declines, courtly bridges weaken, and sacred bridges strengthen. Hub positions shift too: Kherqe (Sufi Robe) gains late prominence, Farkhondeh {Blessed} and Banafsheh (Violet) recede, and Saaghar (Wine Cup) stays central across the chronology. In this corpus, Persian symbolism appears less as a fixed repertory than as a long-lived system whose internal weights and connections change over time.

analysis.tldr: 通过大规模语料库和动态图分析，揭示波斯诗歌象征体系的历史演变规律。
analysis.research_motivation: 波斯诗歌常通过反复出现的象征符号被记忆，但现有计算研究往往将这些符号简化为孤立词汇或文档语义，忽略了相关形式以家族形式组织并通过关系获得力量的实践单元。
analysis.problem: 如何建模波斯诗歌中象征符号的家族结构、关系网络及其历史动态变化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到：象征核心相对稀疏，指涉成分更密集，两者之间的连接区域具有选择性而非弥散性；不同世纪中，某些象征家族（如夜、日、土）广泛分布，而酒器、花园等后期增强，英雄词汇前期更重；模块性上升，跨范围连接下降，宫廷桥梁减弱，神圣桥梁增强；枢纽位置随时间变化。
analysis.method: 构建包含129,451首诗歌的语料库，将反复出现的符号整合为可追踪的家族，分离意象材料与神圣/宫廷指涉，并在多层图中映射其关系。
contributions: 提出了一个动态的波斯诗歌象征图谱，将符号组织为家族并建模其历史演变。
揭示了象征系统的核心稀疏性、指涉密集性以及连接的选择性，并量化了跨世纪的模块性、枢纽位置等变化。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 语料库可能未覆盖所有波斯诗歌传统，存在代表性偏差。
家族划分和关系映射的自动化方法可能引入主观性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过大规模语料库和动态图分析，揭示波斯诗歌象征体系的历史演变规律。

papers.title: Efficient Equivariant Transformer for Self-Driving Agent Modeling
papers.abstract: Accurately modeling agent behaviors is an important task in self-driving. It is also a task with many symmetries, such as equivariance to the order of agents and objects in the scene or equivariance to arbitrary roto-translations of the entire scene as a whole; i.e., SE(2)-equivariance. The transformer architecture is a ubiquitous tool for modeling these symmetries. While standard self-attention is inherently permutation equivariant, explicit pairwise relative positional encodings have been the standard for introducing SE(2)-equivariance. However, this approach introduces an additional cost that is quadratic in the number of agents, limiting its scalability to larger scenes and batch sizes. In this work, we propose DriveGATr, a novel transformer-based architecture for agent modeling that achieves SE(2)-equivariance without the computational cost of existing methods. Inspired by recent advances in geometric deep learning, DriveGATr encodes scene elements as multivectors in the 2D projective geometric algebra $\mathbb{R}^*_{2,0,1}$ and processes them with a stack of equivariant transformer blocks. Crucially, DriveGATr models geometric relationships using standard attention between multivectors, eliminating the need for costly explicit pairwise relative positional encodings. Experiments on the Waymo Open Motion Dataset demonstrate that DriveGATr is comparable to the state-of-the-art in traffic simulation and establishes a superior Pareto front for performance vs computational cost.

analysis.tldr: 提出DriveGATr，一种无需二次代价的SE(2)-等变Transformer，用于自动驾驶智能体建模。
analysis.research_motivation: 自动驾驶中智能体行为建模具有对称性（如排列等变和SE(2)-等变），现有方法通过显式成对相对位置编码引入等变性，但计算成本随智能体数量二次增长，限制了可扩展性。
analysis.problem: 如何在不引入二次计算代价的前提下，实现Transformer架构对自动驾驶场景的SE(2)-等变性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 标准自注意力天然具有排列等变性，但引入SE(2)-等变性通常需要显式成对相对位置编码，导致计算复杂度为O(n^2)，难以扩展到大规模场景。
analysis.method: DriveGATr将场景元素编码为2D投影几何代数ℝ*_{2,0,1}中的多向量，并通过等变Transformer块处理，利用多向量之间的标准注意力建模几何关系，避免显式成对编码。
contributions: 提出DriveGATr，首个无需二次计算代价的SE(2)-等变Transformer用于自动驾驶智能体建模。
在Waymo开放运动数据集上，DriveGATr在性能与计算成本的帕累托前沿上达到最优。
analysis.experiments: 在Waymo Open Motion Dataset上进行交通仿真实验，与现有方法对比性能与计算成本。
limitations: 可能仅适用于2D场景，未扩展到3D。
几何代数编码可能增加实现复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出DriveGATr，一种无需二次代价的SE(2)-等变Transformer，用于自动驾驶智能体建模。

papers.title: Low-Burden LLM-Based Preference Learning: Personalizing Assistive Robots from Natural Language Feedback for Users with Paralysis
papers.abstract: Physically Assistive Robots (PARs) require personalized behaviors to ensure user safety and comfort. However, traditional preference learning methods, like exhaustive pairwise comparisons, cause severe physical and cognitive fatigue for users with profound motor impairments. To solve this, we propose a low-burden, offline framework that translates unstructured natural language feedback directly into deterministic robotic control policies. To safely bridge the gap between ambiguous human speech and robotic code, our pipeline uses Large Language Models (LLMs) grounded in the Occupational Therapy Practice Framework (OTPF). This clinical reasoning decodes subjective user reactions into explicit physical and psychological needs, which are then mapped into transparent decision trees. Before deployment, an automated "LLM-as-a-Judge" verifies the code's structural safety. We validated this system in a simulated meal preparation study with 10 adults with paralysis. Results show our natural language approach significantly reduces user workload compared to traditional baselines. Additionally, independent clinical experts confirmed the generated policies are safe and accurately reflect user preferences.

analysis.tldr: 提出低负担的LLM偏好学习框架，通过自然语言反馈为瘫痪用户个性化辅助机器人策略。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统偏好学习方法（如成对比较）对严重运动障碍用户造成巨大的身体和认知疲劳，亟需低负担的个性化方法。
analysis.problem: 如何将非结构化的自然语言反馈转化为安全、个性化的机器人控制策略，同时降低用户负担。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于LLM的离线框架，结合职业治疗实践框架（OTPF）将模糊语言解码为物理和心理需求，映射为决策树，并通过LLM-as-a-Judge自动验证代码结构安全。
contributions: 提出低负担的离线偏好学习框架，直接利用自然语言反馈生成机器人策略。
引入OTPF临床推理和LLM-as-a-Judge安全验证，确保策略安全且反映用户偏好。
analysis.experiments: 在模拟备餐研究中，对10名瘫痪成人进行验证，自然语言方法显著降低用户工作负荷，且临床专家确认策略安全准确。
limitations: 仅在模拟环境中验证，真实场景效果未知。
依赖LLM的推理能力，可能受限于模型幻觉。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出低负担的LLM偏好学习框架，通过自然语言反馈为瘫痪用户个性化辅助机器人策略。

papers.title: Reducing Hallucinations in LLM-based Scientific Literature Analysis Using Peer Context Outlier Detection
papers.abstract: Reducing hallucinations in Large Language Models (LLMs) is essential for improving the accuracy of data extraction from large text corpora. Current methods, like prompt engineering and chain-of-thought prompting, focus on individual documents but fail to consider relationships across a corpus. This paper introduces Peer Context Outlier Detection (P-COD), a novel approach that uses the relationships between documents to improve extraction accuracy. Our application domain is in scientific literature summarization, where papers with similar experiment settings should draw similar conclusions. By comparing extracted data to validated peer information within the corpus, we adjust confidence scores and flag low-confidence results for expert review. High-confidence results, supported by peer validation, are considered reliable. Our experiments demonstrate up to 98% precision in outlier detection across 6 domains of science, demonstrating that our design reduces hallucinations, enhances trust in automated systems, and allows researchers to focus on ambiguous cases, streamlining the data extraction workflows.

analysis.tldr: 利用文档间关系进行异常值检测，减少LLM在科学文献分析中的幻觉。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM在科学文献数据提取中常产生幻觉，现有方法仅关注单文档，未利用语料库内文档间关系，导致准确性不足。
analysis.problem: 如何利用文档间关系减少LLM在科学文献摘要生成中的幻觉，提高数据提取准确性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Peer Context Outlier Detection (P-COD)，通过比较提取数据与语料库中已验证的同行信息，调整置信度分数，标记低置信度结果供专家审查。
contributions: 提出P-COD方法，利用文档间关系减少LLM幻觉。
在6个科学领域实现高达98%的异常检测精确率。
analysis.experiments: 在6个科学领域进行实验，异常检测精确率达98%。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量已验证的同行信息。
仅适用于科学文献摘要领域。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用文档间关系进行异常值检测，减少LLM在科学文献分析中的幻觉。

papers.title: Reinforcing Consistency in Video MLLMs with Structured Rewards
papers.abstract: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have achieved remarkable progress in video understanding. However, seemingly plausible outputs often suffer from poor visual and temporal grounding: a model may fabricate object existence, assign incorrect attributes, or collapse repeated events while still producing a globally reasonable caption or answer. We study this failure mode through a compositional consistency audit that decomposes a caption into supporting factual and temporal claims, investigating whether a correct high-level prediction is actually backed by valid lower-level evidence. Our top-down audit reveals that even correct root relational claims often lack reliable attribute and existence support. This indicates that standard sentence-level supervision is a weak proxy for faithful video understanding. Furthermore, when turning to reinforcement learning (RL) for better alignment, standard sentence-level rewards often prove too coarse to accurately localize specific grounding failures. To address this, we replace generic sentence-level rewards with a structured reward built from factual and temporal units. Our training objective integrates three complementary components: (1) an instance-aware scene-graph reward for factual objects, attributes, and relations; (2) a temporal reward for event ordering and repetition; and (3) a video-grounded VQA reward for hierarchical self-verification. Across temporal, general video understanding, and hallucination-oriented benchmarks, this objective yields consistent gains on open-source backbones. These results suggest that structured reward shaping is a practical route to more faithful video understanding.

analysis.tldr: 通过结构化奖励替代句子级奖励，提升视频MLLM的视觉与时间一致性。
analysis.research_motivation: 视频MLLM虽在理解上取得进展，但输出常存在视觉和时间定位错误，如虚构物体、属性错误或事件重复，而句子级监督无法有效检测这些细粒度问题。
analysis.problem: 标准句子级奖励过于粗糙，无法准确识别和纠正视频MLLM中的具体定位失败。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 即使高层预测正确，底层事实和时间主张（如属性、存在性）也常缺乏可靠支持，表明句子级监督是忠实视频理解的弱代理。
analysis.method: 提出结构化奖励，包含实例感知场景图奖励（事实对象、属性、关系）、时间奖励（事件顺序和重复）和视频基础VQA奖励（层次化自验证）。
contributions: 揭示了视频MLLM中高层正确预测与底层证据缺失的不一致性。
设计了结构化奖励替代句子级奖励，显著提升视频理解忠实度。
analysis.experiments: 在时间理解、通用视频理解和幻觉导向基准上，开源骨干模型取得一致改进。
limitations: 可能依赖场景图构建质量。
未在闭源或更大规模模型上验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过结构化奖励替代句子级奖励，提升视频MLLM的视觉与时间一致性。

papers.title: Infeasibility Aware Large Language Models for Combinatorial Optimization
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly explored for NP-hard combinatorial optimization problems, but most existing methods emphasize feasible-instance solution generation and do not explicitly address infeasibility detection. We propose an infeasibility-aware framework that combines certifiable dataset construction, supervised fine-tuning, and LLM-assisted downstream search. For the minor-embedding problem, we introduce a new mathematical programming formulation together with provable zero-phase infeasibility screening, which enables scalable construction of training instances labeled either as feasible with structured certificates or as certifiably infeasible. Using training data generated through this exact optimization pipeline, we show that an 8B-parameter LLM can be fine-tuned to jointly perform solution generation and infeasibility detection. We further utilize LLM outputs as warm starts for downstream local search, providing a practical way to accelerate optimization even when the LLM outputs are imperfect. Experiments show that our fine-tuned model improves overall accuracy by up to 30\% over GPT-5.2; meanwhile LLM-guided warm starts provide up to $2\times$ speedup compared with starting from scratch in downstream local search.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种不可行感知的LLM框架，用于组合优化中的不可行性检测与求解加速。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM方法主要关注可行实例的求解，缺乏对不可行性检测的显式处理，限制了其在组合优化中的实用性。
analysis.problem: 如何让LLM同时具备组合优化问题的求解与不可行性检测能力，并加速下游搜索。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 结合可证明数据集构建、监督微调和LLM辅助下游搜索的不可行感知框架，针对minor-embedding问题提出新的数学规划公式和零阶段不可行性筛选。
contributions: 提出不可行感知的LLM框架，联合进行解生成和不可行性检测。
引入可证明的零阶段不可行性筛选方法，实现可扩展的训练数据构建。
利用LLM输出作为下游局部搜索的热启动，加速优化过程。
analysis.experiments: 在minor-embedding问题上，微调后的8B参数LLM相比GPT-5.2准确率提升高达30%，LLM引导的热启动相比从头搜索加速2倍。
limitations: 方法仅在minor-embedding问题上验证，泛化性未知。
依赖精确优化管道生成训练数据，可能限制扩展性。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种不可行感知的LLM框架，用于组合优化中的不可行性检测与求解加速。

papers.title: Nonlinear Methods for Analyzing Pose in Behavioral Research
papers.abstract: Advances in markerless pose estimation have made it possible to capture detailed human movement in naturalistic settings using standard video, enabling new forms of behavioral analysis at scale. However, the high dimensionality, noise, and temporal complexity of pose data raise significant challenges for extracting meaningful patterns of coordination and behavioral change. This paper presents a general-purpose analysis pipeline for human pose data, designed to support both linear and nonlinear characterizations of movement across diverse experimental contexts. The pipeline combines principled preprocessing, dimensionality reduction, and recurrence-based time series analysis to quantify the temporal structure of movement dynamics. To illustrate the pipeline's flexibility, we present three case studies spanning facial and full-body movement, 2D and 3D data, and individual versus multi-agent behavior. Together, these examples demonstrate how the same analytic workflow can be adapted to extract theoretically meaningful insights from complex pose time series.

analysis.tldr: 提出一个结合线性和非线性方法的通用人体姿态分析流程，用于从复杂姿态时间序列中提取行为模式。
analysis.research_motivation: 无标记姿态估计技术的进步使得在自然场景中捕捉详细人体运动成为可能，但姿态数据的高维性、噪声和时间复杂性给提取有意义的协调和行为变化模式带来了挑战。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个通用分析流程，能够处理姿态数据的高维、噪声和时间复杂性，并支持线性和非线性特征提取。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出一个通用分析流程，结合了原则性预处理、降维和基于递归的时间序列分析，以量化运动动力学的时间结构。
contributions: 提出了一个适用于多种实验场景的通用姿态数据分析流程。
通过三个案例研究展示了流程在面部和全身运动、2D和3D数据、个体与多智能体行为中的灵活性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能对特定类型的数据或场景需要额外调整。
未提供定量评估或与现有方法的比较。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一个结合线性和非线性方法的通用人体姿态分析流程，用于从复杂姿态时间序列中提取行为模式。

papers.title: A Multi-Agent Human-LLM Collaborative Framework for Closed-Loop Scientific Literature Summarization
papers.abstract: Scientific discovery is slowed by fragmented literature that requires excessive human effort to gather, analyze, and understand. AI tools, including autonomous summarization and question answering, have been developed to aid in understanding scientific literature. However, these tools lack the structured, multi-step approach necessary for extracting deep insights from scientific literature. Large Language Models (LLMs) offer new possibilities for literature analysis, but remain unreliable due to hallucinations and incomplete extraction. We introduce Elhuyar, a multi-agent, human-in-the-loop system that integrates LLMs, structured AI, and human scientists to extract, analyze, and iteratively refine insights from scientific literature. The framework distributes tasks among specialized agents for filtering papers, extracting data, fitting models, and summarizing findings, with human oversight ensuring reliability. The system generates structured reports with extracted data, visualizations, model equations, and text summaries, enabling deeper inquiry through iterative refinement. Deployed in materials science, it analyzed literature on tungsten under helium-ion irradiation, showing experimentally correlated exponential helium bubble growth with irradiation dose and temperature, offering insight for plasma-facing materials (PFMs) in fusion reactors. This demonstrates how AI-assisted literature review can uncover scientific patterns and accelerate discovery.

analysis.tldr: 提出多智能体人机协作框架Elhuyar，通过结构化流程和人类监督提升科学文献摘要的可靠性与深度。
analysis.research_motivation: 科学文献碎片化导致人工分析耗时费力，现有AI工具缺乏结构化多步骤方法，LLM存在幻觉和不完整提取问题。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个可靠、结构化且可迭代精炼的科学文献摘要系统，以从大量文献中提取深层洞察。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: Elhuyar框架：多智能体（过滤、提取、建模、总结）协作，结合人类循环监督，生成结构化报告（含数据、可视化、模型方程、文本摘要），支持迭代精炼。
contributions: 提出多智能体人机协作框架，整合LLM、结构化AI和人类科学家进行文献分析。
在材料科学中验证框架，发现氦气泡生长与辐照剂量和温度的指数相关关系。
analysis.experiments: 在材料科学领域，分析钨在氦离子辐照下的文献，发现实验相关的指数氦气泡生长规律。摘要未提供具体实验指标。
limitations: 可能依赖特定领域知识，泛化性待验证。
人类监督可能成为瓶颈，影响效率。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出多智能体人机协作框架Elhuyar，通过结构化流程和人类监督提升科学文献摘要的可靠性与深度。

papers.title: When AI Gets it Wrong: Reliability and Risk in AI-Assisted Medication Decision Systems
papers.abstract: Artificial intelligence (AI) systems are increasingly integrated into healthcare and pharmacy workflows, supporting tasks such as medication recommendations, dosage determination, and drug interaction detection. While these systems often demonstrate strong performance under standard evaluation metrics, their reliability in real-world decision-making remains insufficiently understood. In high-risk domains such as medication management, even a single incorrect recommendation can result in severe patient harm. This paper examines the reliability of AI-assisted medication systems by focusing on system failures and their potential clinical consequences. Rather than evaluating performance solely through aggregate metrics, this work shifts attention towards how errors occur and what happens when AI systems produce incorrect outputs. Through a series of controlled, simulated scenarios involving drug interactions and dosage decisions, we analyse different types of system failures, including missed interactions, incorrect risk flagging, and inappropriate dosage recommendations. The findings highlight that AI errors in medication-related contexts can lead to adverse drug reactions, ineffective treatment, or delayed care, particularly when systems are used without sufficient human oversight. Furthermore, the paper discusses the risks of over-reliance on AI recommendations and the challenges posed by limited transparency in decision-making processes. This work contributes a reliability-focused perspective on AI evaluation in healthcare, emphasising the importance of understanding failure behavior and real-world impact. It highlights the need to complement traditional performance metrics with risk-aware evaluation approaches, particularly in safety-critical domains such as pharmacy practice.

analysis.tldr: 研究AI辅助用药决策系统的可靠性，聚焦错误类型及其临床后果。
analysis.research_motivation: AI在医疗用药决策中广泛应用，但标准评估指标无法反映真实世界中的可靠性，尤其在高风险领域，一次错误可能导致严重患者伤害。
analysis.problem: AI辅助用药系统在真实决策中的可靠性不足，错误类型和临床后果未被充分理解。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 通过模拟场景分析，发现AI错误包括遗漏交互、错误风险标记和不适当剂量建议，可能导致不良反应、无效治疗或延误护理。
analysis.method: 通过一系列受控模拟场景（涉及药物交互和剂量决策）分析系统故障类型。
contributions: 提出以可靠性为中心的AI评估视角，强调理解失败行为及其真实世界影响。
揭示过度依赖AI推荐的风险和决策过程透明度不足的挑战。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅基于模拟场景，未在真实临床环境中验证。
未提供量化错误率或与人类决策的对比。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 研究AI辅助用药决策系统的可靠性，聚焦错误类型及其临床后果。

papers.title: Better Rigs, Not Bigger Networks: A Body Model Ablation for Gaussian Avatars
papers.abstract: Recent 3D Gaussian splatting methods built atop SMPL achieve remarkable visual fidelity while continually increasing the complexity of the overall training architecture. We demonstrate that much of this complexity is unnecessary: by replacing SMPL with the Momentum Human Rig (MHR), estimated via SAM-3D-Body, a minimal pipeline with no learned deformations or pose-dependent corrections achieves the highest reported PSNR and competitive or superior LPIPS and SSIM on PeopleSnapshot and ZJU-MoCap. To disentangle pose estimation quality from body model representational capacity, we perform two controlled ablations: translating SAM-3D-Body meshes to SMPL-X, and translating the original dataset's SMPL poses into MHR both retrained under identical conditions. These ablations confirm that body model expressiveness has been a primary bottleneck in avatar reconstruction, with both mesh representational capacity and pose estimation quality contributing meaningfully to the full pipeline's gains.

analysis.tldr: 用更优的人体模型MHR替代SMPL，无需复杂变形网络即可在3D高斯泼溅人体重建中达到SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于SMPL的3D高斯泼溅方法不断堆叠网络复杂度，但可能忽略了人体模型本身表达能力这一瓶颈。
analysis.problem: 验证人体模型表达能力（而非网络复杂度）是3D人体重建的主要瓶颈。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 通过控制消融实验发现，替换为MHR后，即使没有学习变形或姿态相关校正，也能取得更高PSNR和相当或更优的LPIPS/SSIM。
analysis.method: 使用SAM-3D-Body估计的Momentum Human Rig (MHR)替代SMPL，配合最小化流水线（无学习变形或姿态校正）。
contributions: 证明人体模型表达能力是3D高斯泼溅人体重建的主要瓶颈
提出使用MHR替代SMPL的简单方法，在多个基准上达到SOTA
analysis.experiments: 在PeopleSnapshot和ZJU-MoCap上评估PSNR、LPIPS、SSIM，并进行了两项控制消融实验。
limitations: 仅针对人体重建，未验证在其他物体或场景上的泛化性
依赖SAM-3D-Body的估计质量
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 用更优的人体模型MHR替代SMPL，无需复杂变形网络即可在3D高斯泼溅人体重建中达到SOTA。

papers.title: All Substitution Is Local
papers.abstract: When does consulting one information source raise the value of another, and when does it diminish it? We study this question for Bayesian decision-makers facing finite actions. The interaction decomposes into two opposing forces: a complement force, measuring how one source moves beliefs to where the other becomes more useful, and a substitute force, measuring how much the current decision is resolved. Their balance obeys a localization principle: substitution requires an observation to cross a decision boundary, though crossing alone does not guarantee it. Whenever posteriors remain inside the current decision region, the substitute force vanishes, and sources are guaranteed to complement each other, even when one source cannot, on its own, change the decision. The results hold for arbitrarily correlated sources and are formalized in Lean 4. Substitution is confined to the thin boundaries where decisions change. Everywhere else, information cooperates. Code and proofs: https://github.com/nidhishs/all-substitution-is-local.

analysis.tldr: 贝叶斯决策中，信息源之间的替代效应仅发生在决策边界附近，否则信息源总是互补的。
analysis.research_motivation: 理解多信息源在决策中的相互作用（互补或替代）对于信息融合、主动学习等应用至关重要，但现有理论缺乏对何时发生替代的精确刻画。
analysis.problem: 研究贝叶斯决策者在有限行动空间中，咨询一个信息源如何影响另一个信息源的价值，即信息源之间互补与替代的条件。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到信息源之间的相互作用可分解为互补力和替代力，并发现替代力仅在观测跨越决策边界时出现，但跨越本身并不保证替代；当后验保持在当前决策区域内时，替代力消失，信息源必然互补。
analysis.method: 通过理论分析将信息源相互作用分解为互补力和替代力，提出局部化原理，并在Lean 4中形式化证明。
contributions: 揭示了贝叶斯决策中信息源互补与替代的局部化原理：替代仅发生在决策边界附近。
在Lean 4中形式化证明了该原理，适用于任意相关信源。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 理论结果限于有限行动空间的贝叶斯决策者。
未讨论连续行动或更一般决策规则下的推广。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 贝叶斯决策中，信息源之间的替代效应仅发生在决策边界附近，否则信息源总是互补的。

papers.title: ClawSafety: "Safe" LLMs, Unsafe Agents
papers.abstract: Personal AI agents like OpenClaw run with elevated privileges on users' local machines, where a single successful prompt injection can leak credentials, redirect financial transactions, or destroy files. This threat goes well beyond conventional text-level jailbreaks, yet existing safety evaluations fall short: most test models in isolated chat settings, rely on synthetic environments, and do not account for how the agent framework itself shapes safety outcomes. We introduce CLAWSAFETY, a benchmark of 120 adversarial test scenarios organized along three dimensions (harm domain, attack vector, and harmful action type) and grounded in realistic, high-privilege professional workspaces spanning software engineering, finance, healthcare, law, and DevOps. Each test case embeds adversarial content in one of three channels the agent encounters during normal work: workspace skill files, emails from trusted senders, and web pages. We evaluate five frontier LLMs as agent backbones, running 2,520 sandboxed trials across all configurations. Attack success rates (ASR) range from 40\% to 75\% across models and vary sharply by injection vector, with skill instructions (highest trust) consistently more dangerous than email or web content. Action-trace analysis reveals that the strongest model maintains hard boundaries against credential forwarding and destructive actions, while weaker models permit both. Cross-scaffold experiments on three agent frameworks further demonstrate that safety is not determined by the backbone model alone but depends on the full deployment stack, calling for safety evaluation that treats model and framework as joint variables. Code and data will be available at: https://weibowen555.github.io/ClawSafety/.

analysis.tldr: 提出ClawSafety基准，揭示LLM作为智能体时面临的高权限提示注入威胁，并发现安全不仅取决于模型本身，还依赖于整个部署框架。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有安全评估大多在隔离聊天环境中测试模型，忽略了智能体框架对安全结果的影响，而实际中个人AI智能体拥有高权限，一次成功的提示注入即可造成严重危害。
analysis.problem: 缺乏针对高权限智能体场景下提示注入攻击的全面安全评估基准，且未考虑智能体框架对安全性的影响。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 攻击成功率在40%到75%之间，且因注入向量而异；技能指令（最高信任）比电子邮件或网页内容更危险；最强模型能抵御凭证转发和破坏性操作，而较弱模型则不能；跨框架实验表明安全由模型和框架共同决定。
analysis.method: 构建包含120个对抗性测试场景的基准ClawSafety，沿三个维度（危害领域、攻击向量、有害动作类型）组织，并嵌入三种渠道（技能文件、电子邮件、网页），在沙盒环境中评估五个前沿LLM作为智能体骨干。
contributions: 提出了ClawSafety基准，覆盖高权限专业工作空间的120个对抗性测试场景。
通过2520次沙盒实验揭示了不同模型和注入向量的攻击成功率差异，并发现智能体框架显著影响安全性。
analysis.experiments: 在五个前沿LLM上进行了2520次沙盒实验，评估了三种注入向量和三个智能体框架，报告了攻击成功率和动作轨迹分析。
limitations: 基准场景可能未覆盖所有现实威胁。
实验仅在沙盒环境中进行，真实世界效果可能不同。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出ClawSafety基准，揭示LLM作为智能体时面临的高权限提示注入威胁，并发现安全不仅取决于模型本身，还依赖于整个部署框架。

papers.title: Reproducible, Explainable, and Effective Evaluations of Agentic AI for Software Engineering
papers.abstract: With the advancement of Agentic AI, researchers are increasingly leveraging autonomous agents to address challenges in software engineering (SE). However, the large language models (LLMs) that underpin these agents often function as black boxes, making it difficult to justify the superiority of Agentic AI approaches over baselines. Furthermore, missing information in the evaluation design description frequently renders the reproduction of results infeasible. To synthesize current evaluation practices for Agentic AI in SE, this study analyzes 18 papers on the topic, published or accepted by ICSE 2026, ICSE 2025, FSE 2025, ASE 2025, and ISSTA 2025. The analysis identifies prevailing approaches and their limitations in evaluating Agentic AI for SE, both in current research and potential future studies. To address these shortcomings, this position paper proposes a set of guidelines and recommendations designed to empower reproducible, explainable, and effective evaluations of Agentic AI in software engineering. In particular, we recommend that Agentic AI researchers make their Thought-Action-Result (TAR) trajectories and LLM interaction data, or summarized versions of these artifacts, publicly accessible. Doing so will enable subsequent studies to more effectively analyze the strengths and weaknesses of different Agentic AI approaches. To demonstrate the feasibility of such comparisons, we present a proof-of-concept case study that illustrates how TAR trajectories can support systematic analysis across approaches.

analysis.tldr: 提出一套指南，旨在提升软件工程中Agentic AI评估的可复现性、可解释性和有效性。
analysis.research_motivation: Agentic AI在软件工程中应用广泛，但底层LLM的黑箱特性导致难以证明其优越性，且评估设计描述信息缺失使得结果复现困难。
analysis.problem: 当前Agentic AI在软件工程中的评估实践缺乏可复现性、可解释性和有效性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 分析了18篇论文，识别出当前评估方法的普遍做法和局限性。
analysis.method: 提出一套指南与建议，核心是公开Thought-Action-Result (TAR)轨迹和LLM交互数据，并通过案例研究展示其可行性。
contributions: 系统分析了Agentic AI在SE中的评估现状，识别了主要做法和局限。
提出了一套提升评估可复现性、可解释性和有效性的指南与建议。
通过案例研究证明了TAR轨迹在跨方法系统分析中的可行性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅提及一个概念验证案例研究。
limitations: 指南和建议尚未在大规模实证中验证其效果。
案例研究仅为概念验证，可能无法覆盖所有场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一套指南，旨在提升软件工程中Agentic AI评估的可复现性、可解释性和有效性。

papers.title: Leveraging the Value of Information in POMDP Planning
papers.abstract: Partially observable Markov decision processes (POMDPs) offer a principled formalism for planning under state and transition uncertainty. Despite advances made towards solving large POMDPs, obtaining performant policies under limited planning time remains a major challenge due to the curse of dimensionality and the curse of history. For many POMDP problems, the value of information (VOI) - the expected performance gain from reasoning about observations - varies over the belief space. We introduce a dynamic programming framework that exploits this structure by conditionally processing observations based on the value of information at each belief. Building on this framework, we propose Value of Information Monte Carlo planning (VOIMCP), a Monte Carlo Tree Search algorithm that allocates computational effort more efficiently by selectively disregarding observation information when the VOI is low, avoiding unnecessary branching of observations. We provide theoretical guarantees on the near-optimality of our VOI reasoning framework and derive non-asymptotic convergence bounds for VOIMCP. Simulation evaluations demonstrate that VOIMCP outperforms baselines on several POMDP benchmarks.

analysis.tldr: 提出利用信息价值（VOI）的POMDP规划框架，通过条件性处理观测来提升计算效率。
analysis.research_motivation: POMDP规划面临维度灾难和历史灾难，有限规划时间内难以获得高性能策略，而信息价值在信念空间上变化，可被利用来优化计算分配。
analysis.problem: 如何在有限规划时间内高效求解POMDP，避免不必要的观测分支爆炸。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出信息价值（VOI）在信念空间上变化，低VOI时忽略观测信息不会显著影响性能，可减少计算开销。
analysis.method: 提出动态规划框架，基于每个信念点的信息价值条件性处理观测；并实现VOIMCP算法，在MCTS中根据VOI选择性忽略低价值观测分支。
contributions: 提出基于信息价值的动态规划框架，理论保证近最优性。
设计VOIMCP算法，推导非渐近收敛界，并在多个POMDP基准上超越基线。
analysis.experiments: 在多个POMDP基准上进行仿真评估，VOIMCP优于基线方法。
limitations: 可能依赖VOI估计的准确性，估计误差会影响性能。
理论分析假设特定条件，实际应用可能偏离。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出利用信息价值（VOI）的POMDP规划框架，通过条件性处理观测来提升计算效率。

papers.title: Semantically Annotated Multimodal Dataset for RF Interpretation and Prediction
papers.abstract: Current limitations in wireless modeling and radio frequency (RF)-based AI are primarily driven by a lack of high-quality, measurement-based datasets that connect RF signals to their physical environments. RF heatmaps, the typical form of such data, are high-dimensional and complex but lack the geometric and semantic context needed for interpretation, constraining the development of supervised machine learning models. To address this bottleneck, we propose a new class of multimodal datasets that combines RF measurements with auxiliary modalities like high-resolution cameras and lidar to bridge the gap between RF signals and their physical causes. The proposed data collection will span diverse indoor and outdoor environments, featuring both static and dynamic scenarios, including human activities ranging from walking to subtle gestures. By achieving precise spatial and temporal co-registration and creating digital replicas for voxel-level annotation, this dataset will enable transformative AI research. Key tasks include the forward problem of predicting RF heatmaps from visual data to revolutionize wireless system design, and the inverse problem of inferring scene semantics from RF signals, creating a new form of RF-based perception.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种结合RF测量与视觉/激光雷达的多模态数据集，用于RF热图预测和场景语义推断。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前无线建模和RF AI受限于缺乏高质量、基于测量的数据集，无法将RF信号与物理环境关联，阻碍了监督学习模型的发展。
analysis.problem: 缺乏同时包含RF测量与几何/语义上下文的多模态数据集，导致RF热图难以解释且无法用于前向预测和逆向推断任务。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建多模态数据集，融合RF测量、高分辨率相机和激光雷达数据，覆盖多样室内外静态和动态场景，实现精确时空配准并创建数字副本进行体素级标注。
contributions: 提出一种新型多模态数据集，连接RF信号与物理环境。
定义前向问题（从视觉数据预测RF热图）和逆向问题（从RF信号推断场景语义）。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 数据集构建成本高，覆盖场景有限。
体素级标注可能引入标注噪声。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种结合RF测量与视觉/激光雷达的多模态数据集，用于RF热图预测和场景语义推断。

papers.title: EgoFlow: Gradient-Guided Flow Matching for Egocentric 6DoF Object Motion Generation
papers.abstract: Understanding and predicting object motion from egocentric video is fundamental to embodied perception and interaction. However, generating physically consistent 6DoF trajectories remains challenging due to occlusions, fast motion, and the lack of explicit physical reasoning in existing generative models. We present EgoFlow, a flow-matching framework that synthesizes realistic and physically plausible trajectories conditioned on multimodal egocentric observations. EgoFlow employs a hybrid Mamba-Transformer-Perceiver architecture to jointly model temporal dynamics, scene geometry, and semantic intent, while a gradient-guided inference process enforces differentiable physical constraints such as collision avoidance and motion smoothness. This combination yields coherent and controllable motion generation without post-hoc filtering or additional supervision. Experiments on real-world datasets HD-EPIC, EgoExo4D, and HOT3D show that EgoFlow outperforms diffusion-based and transformer baselines in accuracy, generalization, and physical realism, reducing collision rates by up to 79%, and strong generalization to unseen scenes. Our results highlight the promise of flow-based generative modeling for scalable and physically grounded egocentric motion understanding.

analysis.tldr: EgoFlow利用流匹配和梯度引导生成物理合理的6DoF物体轨迹，在多个数据集上显著降低碰撞率。
analysis.research_motivation: 从第一人称视频中理解和预测物体运动对于具身感知和交互至关重要，但现有生成模型因遮挡、快速运动和缺乏物理推理而难以生成物理一致的6DoF轨迹。
analysis.problem: 生成物理一致且可控的6DoF物体运动轨迹，同时处理遮挡、快速运动等挑战。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出EgoFlow框架，采用混合Mamba-Transformer-Perceiver架构联合建模时间动态、场景几何和语义意图，并通过梯度引导推理过程施加可微物理约束（如碰撞避免和运动平滑）。
contributions: 提出基于流匹配的框架，用于从第一人称视频生成物理合理的6DoF物体运动。
设计混合Mamba-Transformer-Perceiver架构和梯度引导推理，无需后处理或额外监督即可实现可控生成。
analysis.experiments: 在HD-EPIC、EgoExo4D和HOT3D数据集上，EgoFlow在准确性、泛化性和物理真实性方面优于扩散和Transformer基线，碰撞率降低高达79%，且对未见场景泛化能力强。
limitations: 可能对极端遮挡或快速运动场景的鲁棒性有限。
梯度引导推理可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: EgoFlow利用流匹配和梯度引导生成物理合理的6DoF物体轨迹，在多个数据集上显著降低碰撞率。

papers.title: Adaptive Stopping for Multi-Turn LLM Reasoning
papers.abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) increasingly rely on multi-turn reasoning and interaction, such as adaptive retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) and ReAct-style agents, to answer difficult questions. These methods improve accuracy by iteratively retrieving information, reasoning, or acting, but introduce a key challenge: \textbf{When should the model stop?} Existing approaches rely on heuristic stopping rules or fixed turn budgets and provide no formal guarantees that the final prediction still contains the correct answer. This limitation is particularly problematic in high-stakes domains such as finance and healthcare, where unnecessary turns increase cost and latency, while stopping too early risks incorrect decisions. Conformal prediction (CP) provides formal coverage guarantees, but existing LLM-CP methods only apply to a single model output and cannot handle multi-turn pipelines with adaptive stopping. To address this gap, we propose Multi-Turn Language Models with Conformal Prediction (MiCP), the first CP framework for multi-turn reasoning. MiCP allocates different error budgets across turns, enabling the model to stop early while maintaining an overall coverage guarantee. We demonstrate MiCP on adaptive RAG and ReAct, where it achieves the target coverage on both single-hop and multi-hop question answering benchmarks while reducing the number of turns, inference cost, and prediction set size. We further introduce a new metric that jointly evaluates coverage validity and answering efficiency.

analysis.tldr: 提出首个适用于多轮推理LLM的自适应停止框架MiCP，利用保形预测在保证覆盖率的条件下减少推理轮次和成本。
analysis.research_motivation: 多轮推理LLM（如自适应RAG、ReAct）在金融、医疗等高风险场景中面临何时停止的挑战：过早停止导致错误决策，过多轮次增加成本和延迟，而现有方法缺乏形式化保证。
analysis.problem: 如何为多轮推理LLM设计一种自适应停止策略，在保证最终预测包含正确答案的覆盖率的同时，最小化推理轮次和成本。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有启发式停止规则或固定轮次预算无法提供形式化覆盖率保证，且保形预测（CP）仅适用于单次模型输出，无法处理多轮自适应停止场景。
analysis.method: 提出MiCP框架，将保形预测扩展到多轮推理，通过在不同轮次分配不同的误差预算，实现早期停止并维持整体覆盖率保证。
contributions: 首个针对多轮推理LLM的保形预测框架MiCP，提供形式化覆盖率保证。
在自适应RAG和ReAct任务上验证，MiCP达到目标覆盖率的同时减少推理轮次、成本和预测集大小。
提出联合评估覆盖率有效性和回答效率的新指标。
analysis.experiments: 在单跳和多跳问答基准上对自适应RAG和ReAct进行实验，MiCP达到目标覆盖率并减少轮次、推理成本和预测集大小。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定类型的多轮推理（如RAG和ReAct），对其他多轮交互的泛化性未知。
保形预测的误差分配策略可能依赖任务特性，需要进一步调参。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出首个适用于多轮推理LLM的自适应停止框架MiCP，利用保形预测在保证覆盖率的条件下减少推理轮次和成本。

papers.title: Friends and Grandmothers in Silico: Localizing Entity Cells in Language Models
papers.abstract: Language models can answer many entity-centric factual questions, but it remains unclear which internal mechanisms are involved in this process. We study this question across multiple language models. We localize entity-selective MLP neurons using templated prompts about each entity, and then validate them with causal interventions on PopQA-based QA examples. On a curated set of 200 entities drawn from PopQA, localized neurons concentrate in early layers. Negative ablation produces entity-specific amnesia, while controlled injection at a placeholder token improves answer retrieval relative to mean-entity and wrong-cell controls. For many entities, activating a single localized neuron is sufficient to recover entity-consistent predictions once the context is initialized, consistent with compact entity retrieval rather than purely gradual enrichment across depth. Robustness to aliases, acronyms, misspellings, and multilingual forms supports a canonicalization interpretation. The effect is strong but not universal: not every entity admits a reliable single-neuron handle, and coverage is higher for popular entities. Overall, these results identify sparse, causally actionable access points for analyzing and modulating entity-conditioned factual behavior.

analysis.tldr: 在语言模型中定位实体选择性神经元，发现早期层稀疏神经元可因果控制实体事实检索。
analysis.research_motivation: 语言模型能回答实体事实问题，但内部机制不明确，理解这些机制有助于分析和调控模型行为。
analysis.problem: 定位并验证语言模型中负责实体事实检索的特定神经元。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 实体选择性神经元集中在早期层；单个神经元激活足以恢复实体一致预测；效果对别名、拼写错误等鲁棒；但并非所有实体都有可靠单神经元。
analysis.method: 使用模板提示定位实体选择性MLP神经元，通过PopQA因果干预验证。
contributions: 发现实体选择性神经元集中在早期层，且单个神经元可因果控制实体检索。
揭示了实体事实检索的稀疏、可干预机制，支持规范化解释。
analysis.experiments: 在200个PopQA实体上，通过负消融、受控注入等因果干预验证，并与均值实体和错误细胞对照。
limitations: 并非所有实体都有可靠单神经元，覆盖率受实体流行度影响。
仅针对MLP神经元，可能忽略其他机制。
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 在语言模型中定位实体选择性神经元，发现早期层稀疏神经元可因果控制实体事实检索。

papers.title: LESV: Language Embedded Sparse Voxel Fusion for Open-Vocabulary 3D Scene Understanding
papers.abstract: Recent advancements in open-vocabulary 3D scene understanding heavily rely on 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) to register vision-language features into 3D space. However, we identify two critical limitations in these approaches: the spatial ambiguity arising from unstructured, overlapping Gaussians which necessitates probabilistic feature registration, and the multi-level semantic ambiguity caused by pooling features over object-level masks, which dilutes fine-grained details. To address these challenges, we present a novel framework that leverages Sparse Voxel Rasterization (SVRaster) as a structured, disjoint geometry representation. By regularizing SVRaster with monocular depth and normal priors, we establish a stable geometric foundation. This enables a deterministic, confidence-aware feature registration process and suppresses the semantic bleeding artifact common in 3DGS. Furthermore, we resolve multi-level ambiguity by exploiting the emerging dense alignment properties of foundation model AM-RADIO, avoiding the computational overhead of hierarchical training methods. Our approach achieves state-of-the-art performance on Open Vocabulary 3D Object Retrieval and Point Cloud Understanding benchmarks, particularly excelling on fine-grained queries where registration methods typically fail.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于稀疏体素光栅化的开放词汇3D场景理解框架，解决3D高斯泼溅中的空间与语义模糊问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有开放词汇3D场景理解方法依赖3D高斯泼溅，但其非结构化重叠高斯导致空间模糊，且对象级掩码池化造成多级语义模糊，限制了细粒度理解能力。
analysis.problem: 如何克服3D高斯泼溅在开放词汇3D场景理解中的空间歧义和语义歧义，实现结构化、确定性特征注册。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到3D高斯泼溅中非结构化重叠高斯导致空间模糊，需要概率特征注册；对象级掩码池化稀释细粒度细节，造成多级语义模糊。
analysis.method: 提出LESV框架，使用稀疏体素光栅化作为结构化几何表示，结合单目深度和法线先验进行正则化，实现确定性置信感知特征注册；利用AM-RADIO基础模型的密集对齐属性解决多级语义模糊。
contributions: 识别并分析了3DGS在开放词汇3D场景理解中的空间和语义模糊问题。
提出基于稀疏体素光栅化的结构化几何表示，实现确定性特征注册并抑制语义渗漏。
利用AM-RADIO基础模型的密集对齐属性，无需分层训练即可解决多级语义模糊。
在开放词汇3D对象检索和点云理解基准上达到最先进性能，尤其在细粒度查询上表现优异。
analysis.experiments: 在开放词汇3D对象检索和点云理解基准上评估，达到最先进性能，细粒度查询上表现突出。
limitations: 可能依赖AM-RADIO基础模型的质量和泛化能力。
稀疏体素表示在大规模场景中的内存效率有待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于稀疏体素光栅化的开放词汇3D场景理解框架，解决3D高斯泼溅中的空间与语义模糊问题。

papers.title: GRAZE: Grounded Refinement and Motion-Aware Zero-Shot Event Localization
papers.abstract: American football practice generates video at scale, yet the interaction of interest occupies only a brief window of each long, untrimmed clip. Reliable biomechanical analysis, therefore, depends on spatiotemporal localization that identifies both the interacting entities and the onset of contact. We study First Point of Contact (FPOC), defined as the first frame in which a player physically touches a tackle dummy, in unconstrained practice footage with camera motion, clutter, multiple similarly equipped athletes, and rapid pose changes around impact. We present GRAZE, a training-free pipeline for FPOC localization that requires no labeled tackle-contact examples. GRAZE uses Grounding DINO to discover candidate player-dummy interactions, refines them with motion-aware temporal reasoning, and uses SAM2 as an explicit pixel-level verifier of contact rather than relying on detection confidence alone. This separation between candidate discovery and contact confirmation makes the approach robust to cluttered scenes and unstable grounding near impact. On 738 tackle-practice videos, GRAZE produces valid outputs for 97.4% of clips and localizes FPOC within $\pm$ 10 frames on 77.5% of all clips and within $\pm$ 20 frames on 82.7% of all clips. These results show that frame-accurate contact onset localization in real-world practice footage is feasible without task-specific training.

analysis.tldr: 无需训练的零样本事件定位方法，利用基础模型实现美式足球训练视频中首次接触点的时空定位。
analysis.research_motivation: 美式足球训练视频规模大，但关键交互仅占很短时间，现有方法依赖标注数据且难以应对相机运动、遮挡和快速姿态变化。
analysis.problem: 在无标注、未修剪的长视频中，准确定位首次接触点（FPOC）的时空位置。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: GRAZE：使用Grounding DINO发现候选交互，结合运动感知时间推理进行精炼，并利用SAM2作为像素级接触验证器，将候选发现与接触确认分离。
contributions: 提出无需训练的零样本FPOC定位方法GRAZE。
将候选发现与接触确认分离，提升对杂乱场景和检测不稳定的鲁棒性。
在738个视频上验证，97.4%的片段产生有效输出，77.5%的片段定位误差在±10帧内。
analysis.experiments: 在738个美式足球训练视频上评估，GRAZE在97.4%的片段中产生有效输出，77.5%的片段FPOC定位误差在±10帧内，82.7%在±20帧内。
limitations: 依赖基础模型（Grounding DINO、SAM2）的性能，可能受限于其泛化能力。
仅针对美式足球训练场景，未验证在其他运动或交互类型上的适用性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 无需训练的零样本事件定位方法，利用基础模型实现美式足球训练视频中首次接触点的时空定位。

papers.title: Can LLMs Predict Academic Collaboration? Topology Heuristics vs. LLM-Based Link Prediction on Real Co-authorship Networks
papers.abstract: Can large language models (LLMs) predict which researchers will collaborate? We study this question through link prediction on real-world co-authorship networks from OpenAlex (9.96M authors, 108.7M edges), evaluating whether LLMs can predict future scientific collaborations using only author profiles, without access to graph structure. Using Qwen2.5-72B-Instruct across three historical eras of AI research, we find that LLMs and topology heuristics capture distinct signals and are strongest in complementary settings. On new-edge prediction under natural class imbalance, the LLM achieves AUROC 0.714--0.789, outperforming Common Neighbors, Jaccard, and Preferential Attachment, with recall up to 92.9\%; under balanced evaluation, the LLM outperforms \emph{all} topology heuristics in every era (AUROC 0.601--0.658 vs.\ best-heuristic 0.525--0.538); on continued edges, the LLM (0.687) is competitive with Adamic-Adar (0.684). Critically, 78.6--82.7\% of new collaborations occur between authors with no common neighbor -- a blind spot where all topology heuristics score zero but the LLM still achieves AUROC 0.652 by reasoning from author metadata alone. A temporal metadata ablation reveals that research concepts are the dominant signal (removing concepts drops AUROC by 0.047--0.084). Providing pre-computed graph features to the LLM \emph{degrades} performance due to anchoring effects, confirming that LLMs and topology methods should operate as separate, complementary channels. A socio-cultural ablation finds that name-inferred ethnicity and institutional country do not predict collaboration beyond topology, reflecting the demographic homogeneity of AI research. A node2vec baseline achieves AUROC comparable to Adamic-Adar, establishing that LLMs access a fundamentally different information channel -- author metadata -- rather than encoding the same structural signal differently.

analysis.tldr: LLM仅凭作者元数据即可预测学术合作，在无共同邻居场景下显著优于拓扑启发式方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 预测学术合作对理解科学发展和资助决策至关重要，但传统链路预测依赖图结构，而LLM能否利用作者元数据预测合作尚不清楚。
analysis.problem: 评估LLM在真实合著网络上仅使用作者档案（无图结构）进行链路预测的能力，并与拓扑启发式方法对比。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 78.6-82.7%的新合作发生在无共同邻居的作者之间，这是所有拓扑启发式方法的盲点；LLM在此场景下仍能通过作者元数据推理达到AUROC 0.652。
analysis.method: 使用Qwen2.5-72B-Instruct，基于作者元数据（研究概念、机构等）预测未来合作，并与Common Neighbors、Jaccard、Preferential Attachment、Adamic-Adar及node2vec对比。
contributions: 首次在百万级真实合著网络上系统评估LLM的链路预测能力，发现LLM与拓扑方法捕获互补信号。
揭示LLM在无共同邻居场景下的独特优势，并证明提供图特征会因锚定效应降低性能。
analysis.experiments: 在OpenAlex数据集（9.96M作者，108.7M边）上，跨越AI研究的三个历史时期，使用AUROC和召回率评估。
limitations: 仅使用单一LLM（Qwen2.5-72B-Instruct），泛化性未知。
未探索更复杂的LLM推理策略或微调。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LLM仅凭作者元数据即可预测学术合作，在无共同邻居场景下显著优于拓扑启发式方法。

papers.title: RIFT: A RubrIc Failure Mode Taxonomy and Automated Diagnostics
papers.abstract: Rubric-based evaluation is widely used in LLM benchmarks and training pipelines for open-ended, less verifiable tasks. While prior work has demonstrated the effectiveness of rubrics using downstream signals such as reinforcement learning outcomes, there remains no principled way to diagnose how a rubric itself fails from such aggregated or downstream signals alone. To address this gap, we introduce RIFT: RubrIc Failure mode Taxonomy, a taxonomy for systematically characterizing failure modes in rubric composition and design. RIFT consists of eight failure modes organized into three high-level categories: Reliability Failures, Content Validity Failures, and Consequential Validity Failures. RIFT is developed using grounded theory by iteratively annotating rubrics drawn from five diverse data sources spanning general instruction following, code generation, creative writing, and expert-level deep research, until no new failure modes are identified. We evaluate the consistency of the taxonomy by measuring agreement among independent human annotators, observing fair agreement overall (87% pairwise agreement and 0.64 average Cohen's kappa). Finally, to support scalable diagnosis, we propose automated rubric quality metrics and show that they align with human failure-mode annotations, achieving up to 0.925 F1.

analysis.tldr: 提出RIFT分类法系统诊断LLM评估中评分标准（rubric）的失效模式，并实现自动化诊断。
analysis.research_motivation: 基于评分标准的评估在LLM基准和训练流程中广泛使用，但缺乏从聚合或下游信号中诊断评分标准本身失效的系统方法。
analysis.problem: 如何系统性地分类和自动检测评分标准设计中的失效模式。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 通过扎根理论迭代标注来自五个数据源的评分标准，构建包含八种失效模式的RIFT分类法，并设计自动化质量指标。
contributions: 提出RIFT分类法，系统分类评分标准的失效模式。
开发自动化诊断指标，与人工标注高度一致（F1达0.925）。
analysis.experiments: 在五个数据源上评估分类法一致性（87%成对一致，Cohen's kappa 0.64），自动化指标F1达0.925。
limitations: 分类法可能未覆盖所有可能的失效模式。
自动化指标依赖特定任务类型，泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出RIFT分类法系统诊断LLM评估中评分标准（rubric）的失效模式，并实现自动化诊断。

papers.title: AffordTissue: Dense Affordance Prediction for Tool-Action Specific Tissue Interaction
papers.abstract: Surgical action automation has progressed rapidly toward achieving surgeon-like dexterous control, driven primarily by advances in learning from demonstration and vision-language-action models. While these have demonstrated success in table-top experiments, translating them to clinical deployment remains challenging: current methods offer limited predictability on where instruments will interact on tissue surfaces and lack explicit conditioning inputs to enforce tool-action-specific safe interaction regions. Addressing this gap, we introduce AffordTissue, a multimodal framework for predicting tool-action specific tissue affordance regions as dense heatmaps during cholecystectomy. Our approach combines a temporal vision encoder capturing tool motion and tissue dynamics across multiple viewpoints, language conditioning enabling generalization across diverse instrument-action pairs, and a DiT-style decoder for dense affordance prediction. We establish the first tissue affordance benchmark by curating and annotating 15,638 video clips across 103 cholecystectomy procedures, covering six unique tool-action pairs involving four instruments (hook, grasper, scissors, clipper) and their associated tasks: dissection, grasping, clipping, and cutting. Experiments demonstrate substantial improvement over vision-language model baselines (20.6 px ASSD vs. 60.2 px for Molmo-VLM), showing that our task-specific architecture outperforms large-scale foundation models for dense surgical affordance prediction. By predicting tool-action specific tissue affordance regions, AffordTissue provides explicit spatial reasoning for safe surgical automation, potentially unlocking explicit policy guidance toward appropriate tissue regions and early safe stop when instruments deviate outside predicted safe zones.

analysis.tldr: 提出AffordTissue框架，预测手术中工具-动作特定的组织可操作区域，提升手术自动化安全性。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前手术动作自动化方法在临床部署中缺乏对工具与组织交互位置的预测能力，且缺少显式条件输入来强制执行安全交互区域，导致可预测性有限。
analysis.problem: 预测胆囊切除术中特定工具-动作组合的密集组织可操作区域（以热图形式表示）。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 多模态框架，包含时间视觉编码器（捕捉多视角工具运动和组织动态）、语言条件模块（实现跨工具-动作泛化）和DiT风格解码器（生成密集可操作热图）。
contributions: 首次建立组织可操作区域基准，包含103例胆囊切除术的15,638个视频片段，覆盖6种工具-动作对。
提出AffordTissue框架，在密集可操作预测任务上显著优于视觉-语言基础模型（ASSD 20.6 px vs 60.2 px）。
analysis.experiments: 在自建基准上评估，与Molmo-VLM等基线对比，AffordTissue在平均对称表面距离（ASSD）上从60.2 px降至20.6 px。
limitations: 仅针对胆囊切除术，泛化到其他手术类型需验证。
依赖多视角视频输入，实际部署中可能受限于视角可用性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出AffordTissue框架，预测手术中工具-动作特定的组织可操作区域，提升手术自动化安全性。

papers.title: Ambig-IaC: Multi-level Disambiguation for Interactive Cloud Infrastructure-as-Code Synthesis
papers.abstract: The scale and complexity of modern cloud infrastructure have made Infrastructure-as-Code (IaC) essential for managing deployments. While large Language models (LLMs) are increasingly being used to generate IaC configurations from natural language, user requests are often underspecified. Unlike traditional code generation, IaC configurations cannot be executed cheaply or iteratively repaired, forcing the LLMs into an almost one-shot regime. We observe that ambiguity in IaC exhibits a tractable compositional structure: configurations decompose into three hierarchical axes (resources, topology, attributes) where higher-level decisions constrain lower-level ones. We propose a training-free, disagreement-driven framework that generates diverse candidate specifications, identifies structural disagreements across these axes, ranks them by informativeness, and produces targeted clarification questions that progressively narrow the configuration space. We introduce \textsc{Ambig-IaC}, a benchmark of 300 validated IaC tasks with ambiguous prompts, and an evaluation framework based on graph edit distance and embedding similarity. Our method outperforms the strongest baseline, achieving relative improvements of +18.4\% and +25.4\% on structure and attribute evaluations, respectively.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种无需训练的歧义消解框架，通过结构化分歧检测生成针对性澄清问题，提升云基础设施即代码合成的准确性。
analysis.research_motivation: 用户自然语言请求常存在歧义，而IaC配置无法像传统代码那样低成本迭代修复，导致LLM几乎只能单次生成，亟需高效的歧义消解方法。
analysis.problem: 如何从歧义的自然语言请求中生成准确的IaC配置，通过交互式澄清逐步缩小配置空间。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到IaC中的歧义具有可分解的组合结构：配置沿资源、拓扑、属性三个层次轴分解，高层决策约束低层选择。
analysis.method: 无需训练的、基于分歧驱动的框架：生成多样候选规格，识别三个层次轴上的结构分歧，按信息量排序，产生针对性澄清问题，逐步缩小配置空间。
contributions: 提出一种无需训练的、基于分歧检测的交互式歧义消解框架，用于IaC合成。
构建Ambig-IaC基准，包含300个带歧义提示的验证任务，并提供基于图编辑距离和嵌入相似度的评估框架。
analysis.experiments: 在Ambig-IaC基准上评估，方法在结构和属性评估上分别比最强基线相对提升18.4%和25.4%。
limitations: 基准规模有限（300个任务），可能未覆盖所有歧义类型。
方法依赖LLM生成多样候选，质量受LLM能力影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种无需训练的歧义消解框架，通过结构化分歧检测生成针对性澄清问题，提升云基础设施即代码合成的准确性。

papers.title: CogBias: Measuring and Mitigating Cognitive Bias in Large Language Models
papers.abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed in high-stakes decision-making contexts. While prior work has shown that LLMs exhibit cognitive biases behaviorally, whether these biases correspond to identifiable internal representations and can be mitigated through targeted intervention remains an open question. We define LLM cognitive bias as systematic, reproducible deviations from correct answers in tasks with computable ground-truth baselines, and introduce LLM CogBias, a benchmark organized around four families of cognitive biases: Judgment, Information Processing, Social, and Response. We evaluate three LLMs and find that cognitive biases emerge systematically across all four families, with magnitudes and debiasing responses that are strongly family-dependent: prompt-level debiasing substantially reduces Response biases but backfires for Judgment biases. Using linear probes under a contrastive design, we show that these biases are encoded as linearly separable directions in model activation space. Finally, we apply activation steering to modulate biased behavior, achieving 26--32\% reduction in bias score (fraction of biased responses) while preserving downstream capability on 25 benchmarks (Llama: negligible degradation; Qwen: up to $-$19.0pp for Judgment biases). Despite near-orthogonal bias representations across models (mean cosine similarity 0.01), steering reduces bias at similar rates across architectures ($r(246)$=.621, $p$<.001), suggesting shared functional organization.

analysis.tldr: 提出认知偏见基准CogBias，发现LLM偏见具有家族依赖性，并通过激活干预实现偏见缓解。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM在高风险决策中应用广泛，但现有研究仅从行为层面发现认知偏见，缺乏对内部表征和针对性干预的探索。
analysis.problem: 如何系统测量LLM中的认知偏见，并验证其是否具有可识别的内部表征以及能否通过定向干预缓解。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 偏见在四个家族中系统性出现，且家族依赖性显著：提示级去偏对Response偏见有效，但对Judgment偏见适得其反；偏见在激活空间中编码为线性可分离方向；不同模型间偏见表征近似正交，但干预效果高度相关。
analysis.method: 构建CogBias基准（四类偏见家族），使用线性探针验证偏见表征，并应用激活干预（activation steering）进行偏见缓解。
contributions: 提出LLM认知偏见的定义和系统基准CogBias，覆盖四类偏见家族。
通过线性探针证明偏见在模型激活空间中具有线性可分离的内部表征。
应用激活干预实现偏见缓解，在保持下游能力的同时降低偏见分数26-32%。
analysis.experiments: 在三个LLM上评估，使用25个基准测试下游能力，偏见缓解效果显著且跨模型一致。
limitations: 仅针对特定偏见家族和模型，泛化性需进一步验证。
激活干预可能对某些偏见家族（如Judgment）效果有限或产生反效果。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出认知偏见基准CogBias，发现LLM偏见具有家族依赖性，并通过激活干预实现偏见缓解。

papers.title: From Automation to Augmentation: A Framework for Designing Human-Centric Work Environments in Society 5.0
papers.abstract: Society 5.0 and Industry 5.0 call for human-centric technology integration, yet the concept lacks an operational definition that can be measured, optimized, or evaluated at the firm level. This paper addresses three gaps. First, existing models of human-AI complementarity treat the augmentation function phi(D) as exogenous -- dependent only on the stock of AI deployed -- ignoring that two firms with identical technology investments achieve radically different augmentation outcomes depending on how the workplace is organized around the human-AI interaction. Second, no multi-dimensional instrument exists linking workplace design choices to augmentation productivity. Third, the Society 5.0 literature proposes human-centricity as a normative aspiration but provides no formal criterion for when it is economically optimal. We make four contributions.
