(1) We endogenize the augmentation function as phi(D, W), where W is a five-dimensional workplace design vector -- AI interface design, decision authority allocation, task orchestration, learning loop architecture, and psychosocial work environment -- and prove that human-centric design is profit-maximizing when the workforce's augmentable cognitive capital exceeds a critical threshold. (2) We conduct a PRISMA-guided systematic review of 120 papers (screened from 6,096 records) to map the evidence base for each dimension. (3) We provide secondary empirical evidence from Colombia's EDIT manufacturing survey (N=6,799 firms) showing that management practice quality amplifies the return to technology investment (interaction coefficient 0.304, p<0.01). (4) We propose the Workplace Augmentation Design Index (WADI), a 36-item theory-grounded instrument for diagnosing human-centricity at the firm level. Decision authority allocation emerges as the binding constraint for Society 5.0 transitions, and task orchestration as the most under-researched dimension

analysis.tldr: 提出一个将AI增强函数内生化的工作场所设计框架，并开发WADI指数衡量企业级人本中心性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有Society 5.0概念缺乏可操作定义，人机互补模型将增强函数视为外生，忽略了工作场所设计对AI投资回报的影响。
analysis.problem: 如何将增强函数内生化，并构建可测量、可优化的企业级人本工作场所设计框架。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体实验现象，但指出决策权分配是Society 5.0转型的约束瓶颈，任务编排是最未被充分研究的维度。
analysis.method: 通过理论建模将增强函数定义为phi(D, W)，其中W为五维工作场所设计向量；结合PRISMA系统综述和哥伦比亚制造业调查数据，提出WADI指数。
contributions: 将增强函数内生化，证明人本设计在认知资本超过临界阈值时利润最大化。
开发WADI指数，一个36项理论驱动的企业级人本中心性诊断工具。
analysis.experiments: 基于哥伦比亚EDIT制造业调查（N=6,799家企业）的二次实证证据，显示管理实践质量放大技术投资回报（交互系数0.304，p<0.01）。
limitations: 实证数据仅来自单一国家（哥伦比亚），可能限制泛化性。
WADI指数尚未经过大规模验证性因子分析。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一个将AI增强函数内生化的工作场所设计框架，并开发WADI指数衡量企业级人本中心性。

papers.title: Crashing Waves vs. Rising Tides: Preliminary Findings on AI Automation from Thousands of Worker Evaluations of Labor Market Tasks
papers.abstract: We propose that AI automation is a continuum between: (i) crashing waves where AI capabilities surge abruptly over small sets of tasks, and (ii) rising tides where the increase in AI capabilities is more continuous and broad-based. We test for these effects in preliminary evidence from an ongoing evaluation of AI capabilities across over 3,000 broad-based tasks derived from the U.S. Department of Labor O*NET categorization that are text-based and thus LLM-addressable. Based on more than 17,000 evaluations by workers from these jobs, we find little evidence of crashing waves (in contrast to recent work by METR), but substantial evidence that rising tides are the primary form of AI automation. AI performance is high and improving rapidly across a wide range of tasks. We estimate that, in 2024-Q2, AI models successfully complete tasks that take humans approximately 3-4 hours with about a 50% success rate, increasing to about 65% by 2025-Q3. If recent trends in AI capability growth persist, this pace of AI improvement implies that LLMs will be able to complete most text-related tasks with success rates of, on average, 80%-95% by 2029 at a minimally sufficient quality level. Achieving near-perfect success rates at this quality level or comparable success rates at superior quality would require several additional years. These AI capability improvements would impact the economy and labor market as organizations adopt AI, which could have a substantially longer timeline.

analysis.tldr: 基于工人评估数据，发现AI自动化主要表现为持续广泛的“涨潮”而非突发的“碎浪”，并预测LLM到2029年可完成80%-95%的文本任务。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有研究对AI自动化的形态（突发式vs渐进式）缺乏大规模实证，且对劳动力市场影响的时间线估计不足。
analysis.problem: 量化AI自动化在劳动力市场任务中的表现形态（碎浪vs涨潮）及其随时间的变化趋势。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 基于超过17,000份工人评估，发现AI能力在广泛任务中持续提升（涨潮），而非仅在少数任务上突变（碎浪）；2024年Q2模型以约50%成功率完成3-4小时任务，2025年Q3升至约65%。
analysis.method: 利用美国劳工部O*NET分类中的3000+文本任务，收集工人对AI完成能力的评估数据，分析能力增长曲线并外推未来表现。
contributions: 提出AI自动化的碎浪与涨潮二分框架
基于大规模工人评估数据，实证发现涨潮是主要形式
预测LLM到2029年可完成80%-95%文本任务的时间线
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅描述了数据来源（O*NET任务、工人评估）和统计发现（成功率随时间提升）。
limitations: 仅基于文本任务，未涵盖非文本领域
工人评估可能存在主观偏差
外推假设当前趋势持续，未考虑技术瓶颈或政策干预
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 基于工人评估数据，发现AI自动化主要表现为持续广泛的“涨潮”而非突发的“碎浪”，并预测LLM到2029年可完成80%-95%的文本任务。

papers.title: IGLOSS: Image Generation for Lidar Open-vocabulary Semantic Segmentation
papers.abstract: This paper presents a new method for the zero-shot open-vocabulary semantic segmentation (OVSS) of 3D automotive lidar data. To circumvent the recognized image-text modality gap that is intrinsic to approaches based on Vision Language Models (VLMs) such as CLIP, our method relies instead on image generation from text, to create prototype images. Given a 3D network distilled from a 2D Vision Foundation Model (VFM), we then label a point cloud by matching 3D point features with 2D image features of these prototypes. Our method is state-of-the-art for OVSS on nuScenes and SemanticKITTI. Code, pre-trained models, and generated images are available at https://github.com/valeoai/IGLOSS.

analysis.tldr: 利用文本生成图像作为原型，实现3D激光雷达点云零样本开放词汇语义分割。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于VLM的3D开放词汇分割方法受限于图像-文本模态差距，性能不佳。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖VLM图像-文本对齐的情况下，实现3D激光雷达点云的零样本开放词汇语义分割。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 通过文本生成图像作为原型，利用2D视觉基础模型蒸馏的3D网络，将3D点特征与原型图像特征匹配进行分割。
contributions: 提出一种基于图像生成的原型方法，规避了VLM的模态差距问题。
在nuScenes和SemanticKITTI上达到开放词汇语义分割的最优性能。
analysis.experiments: 在nuScenes和SemanticKITTI数据集上评估，达到SOTA。
limitations: 依赖文本生成图像的质量。
可能对未见类别泛化能力有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用文本生成图像作为原型，实现3D激光雷达点云零样本开放词汇语义分割。

papers.title: Semantic Modeling for World-Centered Architectures
papers.abstract: We introduce world-centered multi-agent systems (WMAS) as an alternative to traditional agent-centered architectures, arguing that structured domains such as enterprises and institutional systems require a shared, explicit world representation to ensure semantic consistency, explainability, and long-term stability. We classify worlds along dimensions including ontological explicitness, normativity, etc. In WMAS, learning and coordination operate over a shared world model rather than isolated agent-local representations, enabling global consistency and verifiable system behavior. We propose semantic models as a mathematical formalism for representing such worlds. Finally, we present the Ontobox platform as a realization of WMAS.

analysis.tldr: 提出以共享世界模型为中心的多智能体架构，替代传统以智能体为中心的架构，确保语义一致性和可解释性。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统以智能体为中心的架构在结构化领域（如企业、制度系统）中缺乏共享的显式世界表示，导致语义不一致、可解释性差和长期稳定性不足。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种以世界为中心的多智能体系统架构，通过共享世界模型实现全局语义一致性和可验证的系统行为。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出世界中心多智能体系统（WMAS），将学习与协调建立在共享世界模型上，并引入语义模型作为数学形式化表示，最后通过Ontobox平台实现。
contributions: 提出世界中心多智能体系统（WMAS）作为传统智能体中心架构的替代方案
分类世界的维度（如本体显式性、规范性等）并给出语义模型形式化表示
实现Ontobox平台作为WMAS的实例化
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能缺乏大规模实证验证
语义模型的构建和维护可能复杂
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出以共享世界模型为中心的多智能体架构，替代传统以智能体为中心的架构，确保语义一致性和可解释性。

papers.title: No Attacker Needed: Unintentional Cross-User Contamination in Shared-State LLM Agents
papers.abstract: LLM-based agents increasingly operate across repeated sessions, maintaining task states to ensure continuity. In many deployments, a single agent serves multiple users within a team or organization, reusing a shared knowledge layer across user identities. This shared persistence expands the failure surface: information that is locally valid for one user can silently degrade another user's outcome when the agent reapplies it without regard for scope. We refer to this failure mode as unintentional cross-user contamination (UCC). Unlike adversarial memory poisoning, UCC requires no attacker; it arises from benign interactions whose scope-bound artifacts persist and are later misapplied. We formalize UCC through a controlled evaluation protocol, introduce a taxonomy of three contamination types, and evaluate the problem in two shared-state mechanisms. Under raw shared state, benign interactions alone produce contamination rates of 57--71%. A write-time sanitization is effective when shared state is conversational, but leaves substantial residual risk when shared state includes executable artifacts, with contamination often manifesting as silent wrong answers. These results indicate that shared-state agents need artifact-level defenses beyond text-level sanitization to prevent silent cross-user failures.

analysis.tldr: 共享状态LLM Agent中，良性交互也会导致跨用户信息污染，污染率高达57-71%。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM Agent在多用户共享状态下，信息可能无意识地在用户间传播，导致错误结果，而现有研究主要关注对抗性攻击，忽略了这种无意的污染。
analysis.problem: 共享状态LLM Agent中，良性交互产生的局部有效信息被错误地应用于其他用户，导致跨用户污染（UCC）。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，在原始共享状态下，仅良性交互即可产生57-71%的污染率；写时清理在对话式共享状态下有效，但在包含可执行工件时仍有显著残留风险，且污染常表现为无声的错误答案。
analysis.method: 形式化定义了UCC，提出了三种污染类型的分类法，并在两种共享状态机制下进行了评估。
contributions: 首次识别并形式化了共享状态LLM Agent中的无意识跨用户污染（UCC）问题。
提出了UCC的分类法，并通过实验揭示了不同共享状态机制下的污染率及现有防御的局限性。
analysis.experiments: 在两种共享状态机制下评估了UCC，原始共享状态下污染率为57-71%，写时清理在对话状态下有效但在可执行工件下仍有残留风险。
limitations: 实验可能仅在特定类型的共享状态机制上进行，泛化性有待验证。
未提出完整的防御方案，仅指出了现有防御的不足。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 共享状态LLM Agent中，良性交互也会导致跨用户信息污染，污染率高达57-71%。

papers.title: Safety, Security, and Cognitive Risks in World Models
papers.abstract: World models - learned internal simulators of environment dynamics - are rapidly becoming foundational to autonomous decision-making in robotics, autonomous vehicles, and agentic AI. By predicting future states in compressed latent spaces, they enable sample-efficient planning and long-horizon imagination without direct environment interaction. Yet this predictive power introduces a distinctive set of safety, security, and cognitive risks. Adversaries can corrupt training data, poison latent representations, and exploit compounding rollout errors to cause significant degradation in safety-critical deployments. At the alignment layer, world model-equipped agents are more capable of goal misgeneralisation, deceptive alignment, and reward hacking. At the human layer, authoritative world model predictions foster automation bias, miscalibrated trust, and planning hallucination. This paper surveys the world model landscape; introduces formal definitions of trajectory persistence and representational risk; presents a five-profile attacker taxonomy; and develops a unified threat model drawing on MITRE ATLAS and the OWASP LLM Top 10. We provide an empirical proof-of-concept demonstrating trajectory-persistent adversarial attacks on a GRU-based RSSM ($\mathcal{A}_1 = 2.26\times$ amplification, $-59.5\%$ reward reduction under adversarial fine-tuning), validate architecture-dependence via a stochastic RSSM proxy ($\mathcal{A}_1 = 0.65\times$), and probe a real DreamerV3 checkpoint (non-zero action drift confirmed). We propose interdisciplinary mitigations spanning adversarial hardening, alignment engineering, NIST AI RMF and EU AI Act governance, and human-factors design, arguing that world models require the same rigour as flight-control software or medical devices.

analysis.tldr: 世界模型在安全、安全和认知方面存在独特风险，本文系统梳理并提出了统一威胁模型。
analysis.research_motivation: 世界模型在机器人、自动驾驶等安全关键领域应用日益广泛，但其预测能力引入了新的安全、安全和认知风险，现有研究缺乏系统性分析。
analysis.problem: 世界模型面临的安全、安全和认知风险缺乏统一的威胁模型和缓解框架。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出世界模型存在对抗攻击（如数据投毒、潜在表示污染、复合误差放大）、对齐问题（目标泛化错误、欺骗性对齐、奖励黑客）以及人类认知风险（自动化偏见、信任校准错误、规划幻觉）。
analysis.method: 通过综述世界模型现状，引入轨迹持久性和表示风险的形式化定义，提出五类攻击者分类法，并基于MITRE ATLAS和OWASP LLM Top 10构建统一威胁模型。
contributions: 首次系统梳理世界模型的安全、安全和认知风险，并提出形式化定义。
提出五类攻击者分类法和统一威胁模型。
通过实验验证了轨迹持久性对抗攻击的有效性及架构依赖性。
analysis.experiments: 在GRU-based RSSM上验证了轨迹持久性对抗攻击（放大2.26倍，奖励降低59.5%），在随机RSSM代理上显示架构依赖性（放大0.65倍），并在真实DreamerV3检查点上确认了非零动作漂移。
limitations: 实验仅针对特定架构（RSSM）和攻击类型，泛化性有待验证。
提出的缓解措施多为跨学科建议，缺乏具体实现和评估。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 世界模型在安全、安全和认知方面存在独特风险，本文系统梳理并提出了统一威胁模型。

papers.title: IDEA2: Expert-in-the-loop competency question elicitation for collaborative ontology engineering
papers.abstract: Competency question (CQ) elicitation represents a critical but resource-intensive bottleneck in ontology engineering. This foundational phase is often hampered by the communication gap between domain experts, who possess the necessary knowledge, and ontology engineers, who formalise it. This paper introduces IDEA2, a novel, semi-automated workflow that integrates Large Language Models (LLMs) within a collaborative, expert-in-the-loop process to address this challenge. The methodology is characterised by a core iterative loop: an initial LLM-based extraction of CQs from requirement documents, a co-creational review and feedback phase by domain experts on an accessible collaborative platform, and an iterative, feedback-driven reformulation of rejected CQs by an LLM until consensus is achieved. To ensure transparency and reproducibility, the entire lifecycle of each CQ is tracked using a provenance model that captures the full lineage of edits, anonymised feedback, and generation parameters. The workflow was validated in 2 real-world scenarios (scientific data, cultural heritage), demonstrating that IDEA2 can accelerate the requirements engineering process, improve the acceptance and relevance of the resulting CQs, and exhibit high usability and effectiveness among domain experts. We release all code and experiments at https://github.com/KE-UniLiv/IDEA2

analysis.tldr: 提出一种结合LLM与领域专家协作的半自动化本体工程需求获取工作流IDEA2。
analysis.research_motivation: 本体工程中需求获取（CQ）是关键瓶颈，领域专家与本体工程师之间的沟通鸿沟导致效率低下。
analysis.problem: 解决本体工程中需求获取阶段效率低、专家参与度不足的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: IDEA2工作流：LLM从需求文档提取CQ，领域专家在协作平台上评审反馈，LLM根据反馈迭代修改直至达成共识，并使用溯源模型记录全生命周期。
contributions: 提出专家在环的LLM驱动半自动化CQ获取工作流
在科学数据和文化遗产两个真实场景验证了方法的有效性
analysis.experiments: 在科学数据和文化遗产两个真实场景中验证，显示加速需求工程、提高CQ接受度和相关性，且领域专家认为可用性高。
limitations: 依赖LLM初始提取质量
专家反馈可能引入主观偏差
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种结合LLM与领域专家协作的半自动化本体工程需求获取工作流IDEA2。

papers.title: Perceptual misalignment of texture representations in convolutional neural networks
papers.abstract: Mathematical modeling of visual textures traces back to Julesz's intuition that texture perception in humans is based on local correlations between image features. An influential approach for texture analysis and generation generalizes this notion to linear correlations between the nonlinear features computed by convolutional neural networks (CNNs), compiled into Gram matrices. Given that CNNs are often used as models for the visual system, it is natural to ask whether such "texture representations" spontaneously align with the textures' perceptual content, and in particular whether those CNNs that are regarded as better models for the visual system also possess more human-like texture representations. Here we compare the perceptual content captured by feature correlations computed for a diverse pool of CNNs, and we compare it to the models' perceptual alignment with the mammalian visual system as measured by Brain-Score. Surprisingly, we find that there is no connection between conventional measures of CNN quality as a model of the visual system and its alignment with human texture perception. We conclude that texture perception involves mechanisms that are distinct from those that are commonly modeled using approaches based on CNNs trained on object recognition, possibly depending on the integration of contextual information.

analysis.tldr: CNN的纹理表示与人类感知存在错位，且与视觉系统建模质量无关。
analysis.research_motivation: 纹理感知是视觉研究的基础问题，CNN常被用作视觉系统模型，但其纹理表示是否与人类感知对齐尚不清楚，且更好的视觉模型是否意味着更类人的纹理表示有待验证。
analysis.problem: 评估CNN的纹理表示（基于Gram矩阵的特征相关性）与人类纹理感知的一致性，并探究其与视觉系统建模质量（Brain-Score）的关系。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要发现CNN的视觉系统建模质量（Brain-Score）与其纹理感知对齐程度无关联，表明纹理感知涉及不同于基于物体识别的CNN建模的机制，可能依赖于上下文信息整合。
analysis.method: 比较多种CNN的特征相关性（Gram矩阵）所捕获的感知内容，并与Brain-Score（衡量与哺乳动物视觉系统对齐程度）进行对比分析。
contributions: 揭示CNN的纹理表示与人类纹理感知存在系统性错位
发现CNN作为视觉系统模型的质量与其纹理感知对齐程度无关
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅基于Gram矩阵的纹理表示，未考虑其他纹理建模方法
Brain-Score可能不完全代表视觉系统建模质量
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: CNN的纹理表示与人类感知存在错位，且与视觉系统建模质量无关。

papers.title: Regularizing Attention Scores with Bootstrapping
papers.abstract: Vision transformers (ViT) rely on attention mechanism to weigh input features, and therefore attention scores have naturally been considered as explanations for its decision-making process. However, attention scores are almost always non-zero, resulting in noisy and diffused attention maps and limiting interpretability. Can we quantify uncertainty measures of attention scores and obtain regularized attention scores? To this end, we consider attention scores of ViT in a statistical framework where independent noise would lead to insignificant yet non-zero scores. Leveraging statistical learning techniques, we introduce the bootstrapping for attention scores which generates a baseline distribution of attention scores by resampling input features. Such a bootstrap distribution is then used to estimate significances and posterior probabilities of attention scores. In natural and medical images, the proposed \emph{Attention Regularization} approach demonstrates a straightforward removal of spurious attention arising from noise, drastically improving shrinkage and sparsity. Quantitative evaluations are conducted using both simulation and real-world datasets. Our study highlights bootstrapping as a practical regularization tool when using attention scores as explanations for ViT. Code available: https://github.com/ncchung/AttentionRegularization

analysis.tldr: 通过重采样输入特征生成注意力分数的基线分布，利用统计显著性去除噪声注意力，提升ViT可解释性。
analysis.research_motivation: Vision Transformer的注意力分数几乎总是非零，导致注意力图嘈杂、弥散，限制了其作为解释工具的可信度；现有方法缺乏对注意力分数不确定性的量化。
analysis.problem: 如何量化注意力分数的不确定性并去除由噪声引起的虚假注意力，从而获得正则化、稀疏且可解释的注意力图。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 注意力分数几乎总是非零，独立噪声会导致不显著但非零的分数，产生嘈杂和弥散的注意力图。
analysis.method: 提出Attention Regularization方法：对输入特征进行重采样（bootstrap），生成注意力分数的基线分布，然后利用该分布估计显著性（p值）和后验概率，从而剔除不显著的注意力。
contributions: 首次将bootstrap引入ViT注意力分数的不确定性量化与正则化。
在自然图像和医学图像上展示了该方法能有效去除虚假注意力，提升稀疏性和收缩性。
analysis.experiments: 在仿真和真实数据集上进行了定量评估，包括自然图像和医学图像。
limitations: bootstrap重采样可能增加计算开销。
方法依赖于注意力分数作为解释的有效性假设。
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过重采样输入特征生成注意力分数的基线分布，利用统计显著性去除噪声注意力，提升ViT可解释性。

papers.title: SECURE: Stable Early Collision Understanding via Robust Embeddings in Autonomous Driving
papers.abstract: While deep learning has significantly advanced accident anticipation, the robustness of these safety-critical systems against real-world perturbations remains a major challenge. We reveal that state-of-the-art models like CRASH, despite their high performance, exhibit significant instability in predictions and latent representations when faced with minor input perturbations, posing serious reliability risks. To address this, we introduce SECURE - Stable Early Collision Understanding Robust Embeddings, a framework that formally defines and enforces model robustness. SECURE is founded on four key attributes: consistency and stability in both prediction space and latent feature space. We propose a principled training methodology that fine-tunes a baseline model using a multi-objective loss, which minimizes divergence from a reference model and penalizes sensitivity to adversarial perturbations. Experiments on DAD and CCD datasets demonstrate that our approach not only significantly enhances robustness against various perturbations but also improves performance on clean data, achieving new state-of-the-art results.

analysis.tldr: 提出SECURE框架，通过多目标损失微调基线模型，增强自动驾驶碰撞预测的鲁棒性并提升干净数据性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 深度学习在事故预测中取得进展，但安全关键系统对现实扰动的鲁棒性不足，现有模型如CRASH在微小输入扰动下预测和潜在表示不稳定，存在严重可靠性风险。
analysis.problem: 解决自动驾驶碰撞预测模型对输入扰动的不稳定性问题，同时保持或提升干净数据上的性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要揭示CRASH等模型在微小扰动下预测和潜在表示显著不稳定，表明现有方法缺乏鲁棒性。
analysis.method: SECURE框架，基于预测空间和潜在特征空间的一致性与稳定性四个属性，通过多目标损失微调基线模型，最小化与参考模型的差异并惩罚对对抗扰动的敏感性。
contributions: 形式化定义并强制执行模型鲁棒性，提出四个关键属性。
提出多目标损失训练方法，在DAD和CCD数据集上实现新SOTA，同时增强鲁棒性并提升干净数据性能。
analysis.experiments: 在DAD和CCD数据集上实验，表明方法显著增强对各种扰动的鲁棒性，并在干净数据上取得新SOTA。
limitations: 可能仅针对特定碰撞预测架构，泛化性未验证。
多目标损失调参可能复杂，实际部署需进一步优化。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出SECURE框架，通过多目标损失微调基线模型，增强自动驾驶碰撞预测的鲁棒性并提升干净数据性能。

papers.title: Evolutionary Multi-Objective Fusion of Deepfake Speech Detectors
papers.abstract: While deepfake speech detectors built on large self-supervised learning (SSL) models achieve high accuracy, employing standard ensemble fusion to further enhance robustness often results in oversized systems with diminishing returns. To address this, we propose an evolutionary multi-objective score fusion framework that jointly minimizes detection error and system complexity. We explore two encodings optimized by NSGA-II: binary-coded detector selection for score averaging and a real-valued scheme that optimizes detector weights for a weighted sum. Experiments on the ASVspoof 5 dataset with 36 SSL-based detectors show that the obtained Pareto fronts outperform simple averaging and logistic regression baselines. The real-valued variant achieves 2.37% EER (0.0684 minDCF) and identifies configurations that match state-of-the-art performance while significantly reducing system complexity, requiring only half the parameters. Our method also provides a diverse set of trade-off solutions, enabling deployment choices that balance accuracy and computational cost.

analysis.tldr: 提出进化多目标融合框架，在保持高检测精度的同时大幅降低深度伪造语音检测系统的复杂度。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有深度伪造语音检测器基于大型自监督学习模型，标准集成融合虽能提升鲁棒性但导致系统过大且收益递减，需要一种能同时优化检测误差和系统复杂度的方法。
analysis.problem: 如何通过多目标优化在深度伪造语音检测中平衡检测性能与系统复杂度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 标准集成融合导致系统过大且性能提升有限，存在收益递减现象。
analysis.method: 提出进化多目标分数融合框架，使用NSGA-II优化两种编码：二进制编码的检测器选择（分数平均）和实值编码的权重优化（加权和），在ASVspoof 5数据集上基于36个SSL检测器进行优化。
contributions: 提出首个进化多目标融合框架用于深度伪造语音检测，同时最小化检测误差和系统复杂度。
在ASVspoof 5数据集上验证了框架有效性，实值变体以一半参数达到2.37% EER，匹配SOTA性能。
提供多样化的帕累托前沿解集，支持部署时根据精度和计算成本进行权衡选择。
analysis.experiments: 在ASVspoof 5数据集上使用36个基于SSL的检测器进行实验，与简单平均和逻辑回归基线对比，展示了帕累托前沿的优越性。
limitations: 仅在一个数据集上验证，泛化性需进一步测试。
进化优化计算成本可能较高，未与更高效的优化方法对比。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出进化多目标融合框架，在保持高检测精度的同时大幅降低深度伪造语音检测系统的复杂度。

papers.title: The Digital Twin Counterfactual Framework: A Validation Architecture for Simulated Potential Outcomes
papers.abstract: The fundamental problem of causal inference - that the counterfactual outcome for any individual is never observed - has shaped the entire methodology of the field. Every existing approach substitutes assumptions for missing data: ignorability, parallel trends, exclusion restrictions. None produces the counterfactual itself. This paper proposes the Digital Twin Counterfactual Framework (DTCF): rather than estimating the counterfactual statistically, we simulate it using a digital twin and subject the simulation to a hierarchical validation regime. We formalize the digital twin simulator as a stochastic mapping within the potential outcomes framework and introduce a hierarchy of twin fidelity assumptions - from marginal fidelity through joint fidelity to structural fidelity - each unlocking a progressively richer class of estimands. The central contribution is threefold. First, a five-level validation architecture converts the unfalsifiable claim that the simulator produces correct counterfactuals into falsifiable tests against observable data. Second, a formal decomposition separates causal quantities into those that are marginally validated (ATE, CATE, QTE - testable through observable-arm comparison) and those that are copula-dependent (the ITE distribution, probability of benefit/harm, variance of treatment effects - permanently reliant on the unobservable within-individual dependence structure). Third, bounding, sensitivity, and uncertainty quantification tools make the copula dependence explicit. The DTCF does not resolve the fundamental problem of causal inference. What it provides is a framework in which marginal causal claims become increasingly testable, joint causal claims become explicitly assumption-indexed, and the gap between the two is formally characterized.

analysis.tldr: 提出数字孪生反事实框架（DTCF），通过模拟和分层验证架构使因果推断中的反事实假设可检验。
analysis.research_motivation: 因果推断的根本问题是反事实结果永远无法观测，现有方法依赖不可验证的假设（如可忽略性、平行趋势），缺乏直接验证手段。
analysis.problem: 如何使反事实模拟的假设可检验，并区分可验证与不可验证的因果量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出数字孪生反事实框架（DTCF），包含五级验证架构、双胞胎保真度假设层次（边际/联合/结构），以及形式化分解将因果量分为边际可验证（ATE等）和依赖联合分布（ITE分布等），并提供边界、敏感性和不确定性量化工具。
contributions: 提出五级验证架构，将不可证伪的反事实模拟转化为可检验的测试。
形式化分解因果量，明确区分边际可验证与依赖联合分布的因果量。
提供边界、敏感性和不确定性量化工具，显式处理联合分布依赖。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 框架不解决因果推断的根本问题，仅使假设更透明。
依赖数字孪生模拟器的质量，实际构建可能复杂。
analysis.primary_area_en: causal reasoning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出数字孪生反事实框架（DTCF），通过模拟和分层验证架构使因果推断中的反事实假设可检验。

papers.title: Human Pose Estimation in Trampoline Gymnastics: Improving Performance Using a New Synthetic Dataset
papers.abstract: Trampoline gymnastics involves extreme human poses and uncommon viewpoints, on which state-of-the art pose estimation models tend to under-perform. We demonstrate that this problem can be addressed by fine-tuning a pose estimation model on a dataset of synthetic trampoline poses (STP). STP is generated from motion capture recordings of trampoline routines. We develop a pipeline to fit noisy motion capture data to a parametric human model, then generate multiview realistic images. We use this data to fine-tune a ViTPose model, and test it on real multi-view trampoline images. The resulting model exhibits accuracy improvements in 2D which translates to improved 3D triangulation. In 2D, we obtain state-of-the-art results on such challenging data, bridging the performance gap between common and extreme poses. In 3D, we reduce the MPJPE by 12.5 mm with our best model, which represents an improvement of 19.6% compared to the pretrained ViTPose model.

analysis.tldr: 通过合成数据集微调ViTPose，显著提升蹦床体操中极端姿态的2D/3D估计精度。
analysis.research_motivation: 蹦床体操包含极端人体姿态和不常见视角，现有姿态估计模型在此场景下性能不佳，缺乏标注真实数据。
analysis.problem: 解决蹦床体操中极端姿态和罕见视角下的人体姿态估计精度低的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 从运动捕捉数据生成合成蹦床姿态数据集STP，拟合噪声数据到参数化人体模型并生成多视角逼真图像，用于微调ViTPose模型。
contributions: 提出合成蹦床姿态数据集STP及生成流程
通过微调ViTPose在2D和3D姿态估计上取得SOTA结果，3D MPJPE降低12.5mm（19.6%提升）
analysis.experiments: 在真实多视角蹦床图像上测试，2D达到SOTA，3D MPJPE降低12.5mm（19.6%）。
limitations: 依赖运动捕捉数据，可能无法覆盖所有真实场景
仅针对蹦床体操，泛化性未验证
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过合成数据集微调ViTPose，显著提升蹦床体操中极端姿态的2D/3D估计精度。

papers.title: ViTs for Action Classification in Videos: An Approach to Risky Tackle Detection in American Football Practice Videos
papers.abstract: Early identification of hazardous actions in contact sports enables timely intervention and improves player safety. We present a method for detecting risky tackles in American football practice videos and introduce a substantially expanded dataset for this task. Our work contains 733 single-athlete-dummy tackle clips, each temporally localized around first point contact and labeled with a strike zone component of the standardized Assessment for Tackling Technique (SATT-3), extending prior work that reported 178 annotated videos. Using a Vision transformer-based model with imbalance-aware training, we obtain risky recall of 0.67 and Risky F1 of 0.59 under crossvalidation. Relative to the previous baseline in a smaller subset (risky recall of 0.58; Risky F1 0.56 ), our approach improves risky recall by more than 8% points on a much larger dataset. These results indicate that the vision transformer-based video analysis, coupled with careful handling of class imbalance, can reliably detect rare but safety-critical tackling patterns, offering a practical pathway toward coach-centered injury prevention tools.

analysis.tldr: 用ViT检测美式橄榄球训练视频中的危险擒抱动作，在扩大数据集上提升召回率8%以上。
analysis.research_motivation: 接触性运动中危险动作的早期识别能及时干预、提升运动员安全，但现有数据集小、检测方法有限。
analysis.problem: 从美式橄榄球训练视频中自动检测危险擒抱动作，并处理类别不平衡问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 危险擒抱动作在数据集中属于少数类，存在严重类别不平衡。
analysis.method: 基于Vision Transformer的模型，结合不平衡感知训练（如重加权或采样策略）。
contributions: 构建了包含733个单运动员-假人擒抱片段的扩展数据集，每个片段以首次接触点为中心并标注SATT-3打击区成分。
提出基于ViT的检测方法，在更大数据集上危险召回率达0.67、危险F1达0.59，相比先前基线（召回0.58、F1 0.56）提升显著。
analysis.experiments: 在733个片段的数据集上进行交叉验证，得到危险召回率0.67、危险F1 0.59；与先前178个视频的基线对比，召回率提升8个百分点以上。
limitations: 仅针对美式橄榄球训练场景，泛化性未知。
未报告精确率或整体准确率，可能漏报或误报较多。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 用ViT检测美式橄榄球训练视频中的危险擒抱动作，在扩大数据集上提升召回率8%以上。

papers.title: Preference learning in shades of gray: Interpretable and bias-aware reward modeling for human preferences
papers.abstract: Learning human preferences in language models remains fundamentally challenging, as reward modeling relies on subtle, subjective comparisons or shades of gray rather than clear-cut labels. This study investigates the limits of current approaches and proposes a feature-augmented framework to better capture the multidimensional nature of human judgment. Using the Anthropic HHRLHF dataset, we evaluate ten diverse large language models LLMs under a standard pairwise preference setting, where baseline performance remains below 0.74 ROC AUC, highlighting the difficulty of the task. To address this, we enrich textual representations with interpretable signals: response length, refusal indicators, toxicity scores and prompt response semantic similarity, enabling models to explicitly capture key aspects of helpfulness, safety and relevance. The proposed hybrid approach yields consistent improvements across all models, achieving up to 0.84 ROC AUC and significantly higher pairwise accuracy, with DeBERTav3Large demonstrating the best performance. Beyond accuracy, we integrate SHAP and LIME to provide fine-grained interpretability, revealing that model decisions depend on contextualized safety and supportive framing rather than isolated keywords. We further analyze bias amplification, showing that while individual features have weak marginal effects, their interactions influence preference learning.

analysis.tldr: 提出特征增强的奖励建模框架，通过可解释信号提升人类偏好学习性能，并分析偏差放大现象。
analysis.research_motivation: 人类偏好具有主观性和多维性，现有奖励建模方法难以捕捉这种细微差异，导致性能瓶颈。
analysis.problem: 如何提升语言模型在人类偏好学习中的准确性和可解释性，同时分析特征交互导致的偏差放大。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 基线模型在标准成对偏好设置下ROC AUC低于0.74，表明任务难度高；特征交互对偏好学习有显著影响，而单个特征边际效应较弱。
analysis.method: 在文本表示中注入可解释信号（响应长度、拒绝指示、毒性分数、提示-响应语义相似度），结合SHAP和LIME提供细粒度可解释性。
contributions: 提出特征增强的混合框架，在多个LLM上一致提升偏好预测性能（最高0.84 ROC AUC）。
通过SHAP和LIME揭示模型决策依赖于上下文安全性和支持性框架，而非孤立关键词。
分析偏差放大现象，表明特征交互影响偏好学习。
analysis.experiments: 在Anthropic HHRLHF数据集上评估10种LLM，使用ROC AUC和成对准确率作为指标，DeBERTav3Large表现最佳。
limitations: 仅基于单一数据集（HHRLHF），泛化性需进一步验证。
特征选择可能未覆盖所有相关维度，如文化背景或个性化偏好。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出特征增强的奖励建模框架，通过可解释信号提升人类偏好学习性能，并分析偏差放大现象。

papers.title: Sparse Spectral LoRA: Routed Experts for Medical VLMs
papers.abstract: Large vision-language models (VLMs) excel on general benchmarks but often lack robustness in medical imaging, where heterogeneous supervision induces cross-dataset interference and sensitivity to data regime (i.e., how the supervisory signals are mixed). In realistic clinical workflows, data and tasks arrive sequentially, so naive continual training further leads to catastrophic forgetting. To address these challenges, we propose MedQwen, a parameter-efficient medical VLM that couples a spectrally routed Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) with a theoretically grounded scaling rule that aligns low-rank updates with a full-rank, fully fine-tuned MoE, without changing the base architecture. Concretely, we initialize each expert from non-overlapping singular value decomposition (SVD) segments of the pretrained weight and introduce a residual compensation and scaling scheme to enable stable expert specialization and consistent routing under distribution shift. Across 23 medical datasets covering visual question answering, report generation, radiology classification, and hallucination mitigation, MedQwen achieves strong, reliable performance: it approaches full fine-tuning on zero-shot classification with 339$\times$ fewer trainable parameters, and reduces sequential forgetting to $\sim$5\% where strong baselines degrade by $>$20-50\%.

analysis.tldr: 提出MedQwen，通过谱路由MoE和缩放规则实现参数高效的医学VLM，缓解跨数据集干扰和灾难性遗忘。
analysis.research_motivation: 医学VLM在通用基准上表现优异，但在医学影像中因异构监督导致跨数据集干扰和灾难性遗忘，现有方法缺乏鲁棒性。
analysis.problem: 医学VLM在异构监督和顺序任务下的跨数据集干扰与灾难性遗忘问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出异构监督导致跨数据集干扰，顺序训练导致灾难性遗忘，强基线遗忘率>20-50%。
analysis.method: 提出MedQwen，包含谱路由MoE（从预训练权重的非重叠SVD段初始化专家）和理论缩放规则（对齐低秩更新与全秩全微调MoE），并引入残差补偿和缩放方案实现专家稳定特化与一致路由。
contributions: 提出谱路由MoE，利用SVD段初始化专家，实现参数高效且稳定的专家特化。
提出理论缩放规则，使低秩更新逼近全秩全微调MoE性能，无需改变基础架构。
在23个医学数据集上验证，零样本分类接近全微调性能，参数减少339倍，顺序遗忘降至~5%。
analysis.experiments: 在23个医学数据集上评估，涵盖视觉问答、报告生成、放射学分类和幻觉缓解，零样本分类接近全微调，参数减少339倍，顺序遗忘降至~5%。
limitations: 可能仅适用于医学领域，通用性未验证。
SVD初始化依赖预训练权重，对随机初始化模型不适用。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出MedQwen，通过谱路由MoE和缩放规则实现参数高效的医学VLM，缓解跨数据集干扰和灾难性遗忘。

papers.title: From Data to Theory: Autonomous Large Language Model Agents for Materials Science
papers.abstract: We present an autonomous large language model (LLM) agent for end-to-end, data-driven materials theory development. The model can choose an equation form, generate and run its own code, and test how well the theory matches the data without human intervention. The framework combines step-by-step reasoning with expert-supplied tools, allowing the agent to adjust its approach as needed while keeping a clear record of its decisions. For well-established materials relationships such as the Hall-Petch equation and Paris law, the agent correctly identifies the governing equation and makes reliable predictions on new datasets. For more specialized relationships, such as Kuhn's equation for the HOMO-LUMO gap of conjugated molecules as a function of length, performance depends more strongly on the underlying model, with GPT-5 showing better recovery of the correct equation. Beyond known theories, the agent can also suggest new predictive relationships, illustrated here by a strain-dependent law for changes in the HOMO-LUMO gap. At the same time, the results show that careful validation remains essential, because the agent can still return incorrect, incomplete, or inconsistent equations even when the numerical fit appears strong. Overall, these results highlight both the promise and the current limitations of autonomous LLM agents for AI-assisted scientific modeling and discovery.

analysis.tldr: 提出自主LLM智能体用于材料科学端到端理论发现，能自动选择方程、生成代码并验证，在已知定律上表现良好，但需谨慎验证。
analysis.research_motivation: 材料科学中理论发现依赖人工推导和验证，效率低且难以自动化，LLM智能体有望加速这一过程。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个能自主完成数据驱动材料理论发现（方程选择、代码生成、验证）的LLM智能体。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 智能体在已知关系（如Hall-Petch方程）上表现可靠，但在专业关系（如Kuhn方程）上依赖底层模型能力；即使数值拟合良好，仍可能返回错误或不完整的方程。
analysis.method: 结合逐步推理与专家提供的工具，智能体自主选择方程形式、生成并运行代码、测试理论与数据匹配度，并记录决策过程。
contributions: 提出首个端到端自主LLM智能体用于材料科学理论发现。
在已知和未知材料关系上验证了方法的有效性，并揭示了当前局限。
analysis.experiments: 在Hall-Petch方程、Paris定律、Kuhn方程等已知关系以及HOMO-LUMO间隙应变依赖关系上测试，GPT-5在专业关系上表现更好。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 智能体可能返回错误或不完整的方程，即使数值拟合良好。
性能高度依赖底层LLM模型能力。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出自主LLM智能体用于材料科学端到端理论发现，能自动选择方程、生成代码并验证，在已知定律上表现良好，但需谨慎验证。

papers.title: Look Twice: Training-Free Evidence Highlighting in Multimodal Large Language Models
papers.abstract: Answering questions about images often requires combining visual understanding with external knowledge. Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) provide a natural framework for this setting, but they often struggle to identify the most relevant visual and textual evidence when answering knowledge-intensive queries. In such scenarios, models must integrate visual cues with retrieved textual evidence that is often noisy or only partially relevant, while also localizing fine-grained visual information in the image. In this work, we introduce Look Twice (LoT), a training-free inference-time framework that improves how pretrained MLLMs utilize multimodal evidence. Specifically, we exploit the model attention patterns to estimate which visual regions and retrieved textual elements are relevant to a query, and then generate the answer conditioned on this highlighted evidence. The selected cues are highlighted through lightweight prompt-level markers that encourage the model to re-attend to the relevant evidence during generation. Experiments across multiple knowledge-based VQA benchmarks show consistent improvements over zero-shot MLLMs. Additional evaluations on vision-centric and hallucination-oriented benchmarks further demonstrate that visual evidence highlighting alone improves model performance in settings without textual context, all without additional training or architectural modifications. Source code will be publicly released.

analysis.tldr: 无需训练的推理时框架，通过注意力模式高亮多模态证据，提升MLLM在知识密集型VQA中的表现。
analysis.research_motivation: MLLM在回答知识密集型图像问题时，难以整合视觉线索与检索到的文本证据，且文本证据常含噪声或部分相关，同时需定位细粒度视觉信息。
analysis.problem: 如何在不额外训练的情况下，让预训练MLLM更好地利用多模态证据（视觉区域和检索文本）来生成答案。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: MLLM在知识密集型查询中常无法识别最相关的视觉和文本证据，检索文本噪声大、部分相关，视觉定位不精细。
analysis.method: 利用模型注意力模式估计与查询相关的视觉区域和检索文本元素，通过轻量级提示标记高亮证据，引导模型在生成时重新关注这些证据。
contributions: 提出LoT，一个无需训练、推理时的高亮多模态证据框架，提升MLLM对视觉和文本证据的利用。
在多个知识型VQA基准上取得一致改进，并在视觉中心和幻觉基准上仅通过视觉高亮也提升性能。
analysis.experiments: 在多个知识型VQA基准上评估，显示一致改进；额外在视觉中心和幻觉基准上评估，仅视觉高亮也提升性能。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能依赖模型注意力模式的准确性，若注意力不准确则高亮效果有限。
仅适用于有检索文本的场景，纯视觉任务中高亮效果可能较弱。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 无需训练的推理时框架，通过注意力模式高亮多模态证据，提升MLLM在知识密集型VQA中的表现。

papers.title: Sven: Singular Value Descent as a Computationally Efficient Natural Gradient Method
papers.abstract: We introduce Sven (Singular Value dEsceNt), a new optimization algorithm for neural networks that exploits the natural decomposition of loss functions into a sum over individual data points, rather than reducing the full loss to a single scalar before computing a parameter update. Sven treats each data point's residual as a separate condition to be satisfied simultaneously, using the Moore-Penrose pseudoinverse of the loss Jacobian to find the minimum-norm parameter update that best satisfies all conditions at once. In practice, this pseudoinverse is approximated via a truncated singular value decomposition, retaining only the $k$ most significant directions and incurring a computational overhead of only a factor of $k$ relative to stochastic gradient descent. This is in comparison to traditional natural gradient methods, which scale as the square of the number of parameters. We show that Sven can be understood as a natural gradient method generalized to the over-parametrized regime, recovering natural gradient descent in the under-parametrized limit. On regression tasks, Sven significantly outperforms standard first-order methods including Adam, converging faster and to a lower final loss, while remaining competitive with LBFGS at a fraction of the wall-time cost. We discuss the primary challenge to scaling, namely memory overhead, and propose mitigation strategies. Beyond standard machine learning benchmarks, we anticipate that Sven will find natural application in scientific computing settings where custom loss functions decompose into several conditions.

analysis.tldr: Sven 是一种利用奇异值分解近似伪逆的高效自然梯度优化算法，在回归任务上收敛更快、损失更低。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统自然梯度方法计算开销随参数数量平方增长，而一阶方法（如 Adam）收敛速度慢，需要一种计算高效且收敛性能好的优化算法。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种计算开销低、收敛速度快且最终损失低的神经网络优化算法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: Sven 将损失函数分解为每个数据点的残差，利用损失雅可比矩阵的 Moore-Penrose 伪逆求解最小范数参数更新，并通过截断奇异值分解近似伪逆，仅保留 k 个最显著方向，计算开销为 SGD 的 k 倍。
contributions: 提出 Sven 算法，一种计算高效的自然梯度方法，适用于过参数化场景。
在回归任务上，Sven 显著优于 Adam 等一阶方法，收敛更快且最终损失更低，同时与 LBFGS 性能相当但耗时更少。
analysis.experiments: 在回归任务上，Sven 与 Adam、LBFGS 等基线对比，收敛速度和最终损失均优于 Adam，与 LBFGS 性能相当但计算时间更短。
limitations: 主要挑战是内存开销，需要进一步缓解。
当前主要在回归任务上验证，其他任务（如分类）效果未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: optimization
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Sven 是一种利用奇异值分解近似伪逆的高效自然梯度优化算法，在回归任务上收敛更快、损失更低。

papers.title: Non-Rigid 3D Shape Correspondences: From Foundations to Open Challenges and Opportunities
papers.abstract: Estimating correspondences between deformed shape instances is a long-standing problem in computer graphics; numerous applications, from texture transfer to statistical modelling, rely on recovering an accurate correspondence map. Many methods have thus been proposed to tackle this challenging problem from varying perspectives, depending on the downstream application. This state-of-the-art report is geared towards researchers, practitioners, and students seeking to understand recent trends and advances in the field. We categorise developments into three paradigms: spectral methods based on functional maps, combinatorial formulations that impose discrete constraints, and deformation-based methods that directly recover a global alignment. Each school of thought offers different advantages and disadvantages, which we discuss throughout the report. Meanwhile, we highlight the latest developments in each area and suggest new potential research directions. Finally, we provide an overview of emerging challenges and opportunities in this growing field, including the recent use of vision foundation models for zero-shot correspondence and the particularly challenging task of matching partial shapes.

analysis.tldr: 综述非刚性3D形状对应方法，分类为谱方法、组合优化和变形方法，并讨论开放挑战与机遇。
analysis.research_motivation: 非刚性3D形状对应是计算机图形学中的长期问题，广泛应用于纹理迁移和统计建模，但现有方法各有优劣，需要系统梳理以指导未来研究。
analysis.problem: 如何系统分类和总结非刚性3D形状对应方法，并指出当前开放挑战和未来方向。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体实验现象或失败模式，仅指出不同范式（谱方法、组合优化、变形方法）各有优缺点。
analysis.method: 对现有方法进行综述性分类：谱方法（基于函数映射）、组合公式（离散约束）、变形方法（全局对齐），并讨论最新进展（如视觉基础模型的零样本对应）和挑战（如部分形状匹配）。
contributions: 将非刚性3D形状对应方法系统分类为三种范式并分析其优缺点。
总结最新进展（如视觉基础模型的应用）和开放挑战（如部分形状匹配）。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 作为综述，未提出新方法或实验验证。
可能未覆盖所有新兴方法或特定应用场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 综述非刚性3D形状对应方法，分类为谱方法、组合优化和变形方法，并讨论开放挑战与机遇。

papers.title: HippoCamp: Benchmarking Contextual Agents on Personal Computers
papers.abstract: We present HippoCamp, a new benchmark designed to evaluate agents' capabilities on multimodal file management. Unlike existing agent benchmarks that focus on tasks like web interaction, tool use, or software automation in generic settings, HippoCamp evaluates agents in user-centric environments to model individual user profiles and search massive personal files for context-aware reasoning. Our benchmark instantiates device-scale file systems over real-world profiles spanning diverse modalities, comprising 42.4 GB of data across over 2K real-world files. Building upon the raw files, we construct 581 QA pairs to assess agents' capabilities in search, evidence perception, and multi-step reasoning. To facilitate fine-grained analysis, we provide 46.1K densely annotated structured trajectories for step-wise failure diagnosis. We evaluate a wide range of state-of-the-art multimodal large language models (MLLMs) and agentic methods on HippoCamp. Our comprehensive experiments reveal a significant performance gap: even the most advanced commercial models achieve only 48.3% accuracy in user profiling, struggling particularly with long-horizon retrieval and cross-modal reasoning within dense personal file systems. Furthermore, our step-wise failure diagnosis identifies multimodal perception and evidence grounding as the primary bottlenecks. Ultimately, HippoCamp exposes the critical limitations of current agents in realistic, user-centric environments and provides a robust foundation for developing next-generation personal AI assistants.

analysis.tldr: HippoCamp 是一个评估多模态文件管理智能体的新基准，揭示现有模型在用户个性化环境中的显著性能差距。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有智能体基准主要关注网页交互、工具使用或通用软件自动化，缺乏对用户中心环境中多模态文件管理能力的评估，而个人AI助手需要理解用户画像并在海量个人文件中进行上下文感知推理。
analysis.problem: 评估多模态大语言模型在用户个性化文件系统中的搜索、证据感知和多步推理能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 最先进的商业模型在用户画像任务上仅达到48.3%的准确率，尤其在长程检索和跨模态推理方面表现不佳；多模态感知和证据定位是主要瓶颈。
analysis.method: 构建包含42.4 GB真实文件（超2000个文件）的设备级文件系统，并基于此生成581个问答对和46.1K个密集标注的结构化轨迹用于逐步失败诊断。
contributions: 提出了HippoCamp基准，用于评估智能体在多模态文件管理中的用户中心能力。
通过大规模实验揭示了现有MLLM和智能体方法在用户画像、长程检索和跨模态推理上的显著不足。
analysis.experiments: 评估了多种最先进的多模态大语言模型和智能体方法，商业模型在用户画像上准确率仅48.3%，摘要未提供其他具体实验结果。
limitations: 基准仅覆盖文件管理场景，可能不适用于其他类型的个人AI任务。
真实世界文件分布可能存在偏差，影响泛化性。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: HippoCamp 是一个评估多模态文件管理智能体的新基准，揭示现有模型在用户个性化环境中的显著性能差距。

papers.title: LAtent Phase Inference from Short time sequences using SHallow REcurrent Decoders (LAPIS-SHRED)
papers.abstract: Reconstructing full spatio-temporal dynamics from sparse observations in both space and time remains a central challenge in complex systems, as measurements can be spatially incomplete and can be also limited to narrow temporal windows. Yet approximating the complete spatio-temporal trajectory is essential for mechanistic insight and understanding, model calibration, and operational decision-making. We introduce LAPIS-SHRED (LAtent Phase Inference from Short time sequence using SHallow REcurrent Decoders), a modular architecture that reconstructs and/or forecasts complete spatiotemporal dynamics from sparse sensor observations confined to short temporal windows. LAPIS-SHRED operates through a three-stage pipeline: (i) a SHRED model is pre-trained entirely on simulation data to map sensor time-histories into a structured latent space, (ii) a temporal sequence model, trained on simulation-derived latent trajectories, learns to propagate latent states forward or backward in time to span unobserved temporal regions from short observational time windows, and (iii) at deployment, only a short observation window of hyper-sparse sensor measurements from the true system is provided, from which the frozen SHRED model and the temporal model jointly reconstruct or forecast the complete spatiotemporal trajectory. The framework supports bidirectional inference, inherits data assimilation and multiscale reconstruction capabilities from its modular structure, and accommodates extreme observational constraints including single-frame terminal inputs. We evaluate LAPIS-SHRED on six experiments spanning complex spatio-temporal physics: turbulent flows, multiscale propulsion physics, volatile combustion transients, and satellite-derived environmental fields, highlighting a lightweight, modular architecture suited for operational settings where observation is constrained by physical or logistical limitations.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种模块化架构LAPIS-SHRED，从短时稀疏观测中重建完整时空动力学。
analysis.research_motivation: 复杂系统中观测在空间和时间上常不完整，但完整时空轨迹对机理理解、模型校准和决策至关重要，现有方法难以从短时窗口的稀疏观测中有效重建。
analysis.problem: 如何从空间稀疏且时间窗口极短的传感器观测中重建或预测完整的时空动力学。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 三阶段流水线：1) 用模拟数据预训练SHRED模型将传感器时间序列映射到结构化潜空间；2) 训练时序模型在潜空间中进行时间前向/后向传播以覆盖未观测时段；3) 部署时仅用真实系统的短时稀疏观测，冻结的SHRED和时序模型联合重建完整轨迹。
contributions: 提出LAPIS-SHRED模块化架构，支持双向推理和数据同化。
在湍流、多尺度推进物理、燃烧瞬态和卫星环境场等六个复杂物理实验中验证有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在六个复杂时空物理实验上评估，包括湍流、多尺度推进物理、挥发性燃烧瞬态和卫星环境场。
limitations: 依赖模拟数据预训练，模拟与真实系统间可能存在分布偏移。
未讨论对极高维系统或噪声观测的鲁棒性。
analysis.primary_area_en: learning on time series and dynamical systems
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种模块化架构LAPIS-SHRED，从短时稀疏观测中重建完整时空动力学。

papers.title: The Recipe Matters More Than the Kitchen:Mathematical Foundations of the AI Weather Prediction Pipeline
papers.abstract: AI weather prediction has advanced rapidly, yet no unified mathematical framework explains what determines forecast skill. Existing theory addresses specific architectural choices rather than the learning pipeline as a whole, while operational evidence from 2023-2026 demonstrates that training methodology, loss function design, and data diversity matter at least as much as architecture selection. This paper makes two interleaved contributions. Theoretically, we construct a framework rooted in approximation theory on the sphere, dynamical systems theory, information theory, and statistical learning theory that treats the complete learning pipeline (architecture, loss function, training strategy, data distribution) rather than architecture alone. We establish a Learning Pipeline Error Decomposition showing that estimation error (loss- and data-dependent) dominates approximation error (architecture-dependent) at current scales. We develop a Loss Function Spectral Theory formalizing MSE-induced spectral blurring in spherical harmonic coordinates, and derive Out-of-Distribution Extrapolation Bounds proving that data-driven models systematically underestimate record-breaking extremes with bias growing linearly in record exceedance. Empirically, we validate these predictions via inference across ten architecturally diverse AI weather models using NVIDIA Earth2Studio with ERA5 initial conditions, evaluating six metrics across 30 initialization dates spanning all seasons. Results confirm universal spectral energy loss at high wavenumbers for MSE-trained models, rising Error Consensus Ratios showing that the majority of forecast error is shared across architectures, and linear negative bias during extreme events. A Holistic Model Assessment Score provides unified multi-dimensional evaluation, and a prescriptive framework enables mathematical evaluation of proposed pipelines before training.

analysis.tldr: AI天气预报中，训练方法比架构更重要，论文构建了统一数学框架并验证了误差分解与极端事件偏差。
analysis.research_motivation: AI天气预报快速发展，但缺乏统一数学框架解释预报技能的决定因素，现有理论仅关注架构选择，而实际经验表明训练方法、损失函数和数据多样性同样关键。
analysis.problem: 缺乏一个完整的数学框架来统一分析AI天气预报学习流水线（架构、损失函数、训练策略、数据分布）对预报技能的影响。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析，但理论部分指出估计误差（依赖损失和数据）主导近似误差（依赖架构），MSE训练导致谱模糊，数据驱动模型对极端事件存在线性负偏差。
analysis.method: 构建基于球面逼近理论、动力系统、信息论和统计学习理论的统一框架，提出学习流水线误差分解、损失函数谱理论和分布外外推界，并通过10个架构多样的AI天气模型进行实证验证。
contributions: 提出学习流水线误差分解，证明估计误差主导近似误差。
发展损失函数谱理论，形式化MSE导致的谱模糊。
推导分布外外推界，证明极端事件偏差线性增长。
通过10个模型、6个指标、30个初始化日期的实证验证理论预测。
analysis.experiments: 使用NVIDIA Earth2Studio和ERA5初始条件，对10个架构多样的AI天气模型进行推理，评估6个指标，覆盖30个初始化日期（所有季节）。结果证实MSE训练模型在高波数存在谱能量损失，误差共识比高，极端事件线性负偏差。
limitations: 理论框架可能未涵盖所有实际因素（如数值稳定性）。
实证验证限于特定数据集和模型，泛化性需进一步检验。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: AI天气预报中，训练方法比架构更重要，论文构建了统一数学框架并验证了误差分解与极端事件偏差。

papers.title: $\texttt{YC-Bench}$: Benchmarking AI Agents for Long-Term Planning and Consistent Execution
papers.abstract: As LLM agents tackle increasingly complex tasks, a critical question is whether they can maintain strategic coherence over long horizons: planning under uncertainty, learning from delayed feedback, and adapting when early mistakes compound. We introduce $\texttt{YC-Bench}$, a benchmark that evaluates these capabilities by tasking an agent with running a simulated startup over a one-year horizon spanning hundreds of turns. The agent must manage employees, select task contracts, and maintain profitability in a partially observable environment where adversarial clients and growing payroll create compounding consequences for poor decisions. We evaluate 12 models, both proprietary and open source, across 3 seeds each. Only three models consistently surpass the starting capital of \$200K, with Claude Opus 4.6 achieving the highest average final funds at \$1.27 M, followed by GLM-5 at \$1.21 M at 11$\times$ lower inference cost. Scratchpad usage, the sole mechanism for persisting information across context truncation, is the strongest predictor of success, and adversarial client detection is the primary failure mode, accounting for $47\%$ of bankruptcies. Our analysis reveals that frontier models still fail through distinct failure modes such as over-parallelization, demonstrating the capability gaps for long-horizon performance. $\texttt{YC-Bench}$ is open-source, reproducible, and configurable.

analysis.tldr: YC-Bench 是一个评估 AI Agent 长期规划与一致执行能力的模拟创业基准，发现前沿模型在长周期任务中仍存在显著能力差距。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基准难以评估 AI Agent 在长周期、部分可观测环境中的战略连贯性、延迟反馈适应和错误累积应对能力，而实际复杂任务（如创业管理）要求这些能力。
analysis.problem: 如何系统评估 LLM Agent 在数百轮交互中维持长期规划、从延迟反馈学习、并在早期错误累积时调整策略的能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到：1) 仅少数模型能持续盈利；2) 对抗性客户检测是主要失败模式（占破产的47%）；3) Scratchpad 使用是成功的最强预测因子；4) 前沿模型存在特定失败模式如过度并行化。
analysis.method: 构建 YC-Bench 基准，模拟创业公司一年运营（数百轮），要求 Agent 管理员工、选择合同、维持盈利，环境部分可观测且存在对抗性客户和工资压力。
contributions: 提出 YC-Bench，一个评估 AI Agent 长期规划与一致执行能力的开源、可复现基准。
系统评估12个模型，揭示前沿模型在长周期任务中的能力差距和主要失败模式。
analysis.experiments: 评估12个模型（含闭源和开源），每个3个种子，记录最终资金、破产率等指标。摘要未提供完整实验细节。
limitations: 基准仅模拟创业场景，可能不直接泛化到其他长期规划任务。
评估模型数量有限，且种子数较少（3个），统计显著性可能受限。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: YC-Bench 是一个评估 AI Agent 长期规划与一致执行能力的模拟创业基准，发现前沿模型在长周期任务中仍存在显著能力差距。

papers.title: CliffSearch: Structured Agentic Co-Evolution over Theory and Code for Scientific Algorithm Discovery
papers.abstract: Scientific algorithm discovery is iterative: hypotheses are proposed, implemented, stress-tested, and revised. Current LLM-guided search systems accelerate proposal generation, but often under-represent scientific structure by optimizing code-only artifacts with weak correctness/originality gating. We present CliffSearch, an agentic evolutionary framework in which the core evolution operators (pair selection, crossover, mutation, and review) are implemented as LLM agents, and the loop is designed around three principles: (1) each node is a structured scientific artifact, instantiated in either theory+code or code_only mode, (2) reviewer judgments of correctness and originality are first-class selection gates alongside optimization of the benchmark metric of interest, and (3) mutation is split into exploration and correction pathways with distinct objectives. Exploration mutation imports ideas from adjacent scientific domains to increase novelty, while correction mutation performs targeted evidence-guided repair using reviewer signals over theory, code, benchmark results, and runtime errors. We illustrate the framework on three benchmark-grounded studies: transformer hyper-connection evolution, optimizer discovery on a fixed nanoGPT stack, and a smaller native-optimizer ablation. Across these settings, the same loop supports explicit metric direction, reproducible persistence, and reviewer-gated comparison of discoveries under controlled search conditions. The result is a discovery workflow that prioritizes scientific interpretability and correctness while optimizing task metrics under controlled novelty constraints, rather than maximizing candidate throughput alone. Full run artifacts, interactive visualizations, and exported best nodes for the reported studies are available at https://cliffsearch.ai .

analysis.tldr: 提出CliffSearch，一种将理论+代码作为结构化工件、通过LLM智能体执行进化操作并引入正确性/新颖性评审的科学算法发现框架。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM引导的搜索系统在科学算法发现中往往只优化代码工件，缺乏对正确性和原创性的有效约束，导致生成结果科学结构不足。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个既能优化基准指标、又能保证科学可解释性和正确性的算法发现流程。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: CliffSearch：将进化算子（选择、交叉、变异、评审）实现为LLM智能体；节点分为理论+代码或仅代码模式；评审判断正确性和原创性作为选择门；变异分为探索（跨领域引入新想法）和修正（基于评审信号修复）两条路径。
contributions: 提出结构化科学工件（理论+代码）的进化框架，将正确性和原创性评审作为一等选择门。
设计探索与修正双路径变异机制，平衡新颖性与正确性。
在三个基准研究（Transformer超连接进化、优化器发现、消融实验）上展示框架有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在三个基准研究上验证：transformer超连接进化、固定nanoGPT堆栈上的优化器发现、以及更小的原生优化器消融实验。摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖LLM评审的可靠性，评审偏差可能影响进化方向。
框架复杂度较高，需要多个LLM智能体协作，计算成本可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出CliffSearch，一种将理论+代码作为结构化工件、通过LLM智能体执行进化操作并引入正确性/新颖性评审的科学算法发现框架。

papers.title: TRACE: High-Fidelity 3D Scene Editing via Tangible Reconstruction and Geometry-Aligned Contextual Video Masking
papers.abstract: We present TRACE, a mesh-guided 3DGS editing framework that achieves automated, high-fidelity scene transformation. By anchoring video diffusion with explicit 3D geometry, TRACE uniquely enables fine-grained, part-level manipulatio--such as local pose shifting or component replacemen--while preserving the structural integrity of the central subject, a capability largely absent in existing editing methods. Our approach comprises three key stages: (1) Multi-view 3D-Anchor Synthesis, which leverages a sparse-view editor trained on our MV-TRACE datase--the first multi-view consistent dataset dedicated to scene-coherent object addition and modificatio--to generate spatially consistent 3D-anchors; (2) Tangible Geometry Anchoring (TGA), which ensures precise spatial synchronization between inserted meshes and the 3DGS scene via two-phase registration; and (3) Contextual Video Masking (CVM), which integrates 3D projections into an autoregressive video pipeline to achieve temporally stable, physically-grounded rendering. Extensive experiments demonstrate that TRACE consistently outperforms existing methods especially in editing versatility and structural integrity.

analysis.tldr: TRACE 通过网格引导的 3DGS 编辑框架，结合多视图合成与几何对齐视频掩码，实现高保真、细粒度的 3D 场景编辑。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有 3D 场景编辑方法难以实现细粒度、局部可控的编辑（如姿态调整或部件替换），且常破坏主体结构完整性，亟需一种能保持几何一致性的自动化编辑方法。
analysis.problem: 如何实现高保真、细粒度且保持结构完整的 3D 场景编辑，特别是局部姿态调整和部件替换。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出三阶段框架：1) 多视图 3D-Anchor 合成（利用稀疏视角编辑器在 MV-TRACE 数据集上训练生成空间一致的 3D 锚点）；2) 有形几何锚定（TGA，通过两阶段配准实现插入网格与 3DGS 场景的精确空间同步）；3) 上下文视频掩码（CVM，将 3D 投影集成到自回归视频管线中实现时间稳定、物理基础的渲染）。
contributions: 提出 TRACE 框架，首次实现网格引导的 3DGS 细粒度编辑，支持局部姿态调整和部件替换。
构建 MV-TRACE 数据集，首个多视图一致、面向场景级物体添加与修改的数据集。
设计 TGA 和 CVM 模块，分别保证几何对齐和时间稳定性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量网格输入，对复杂场景的泛化性有待验证。
多视图合成阶段的计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: TRACE 通过网格引导的 3DGS 编辑框架，结合多视图合成与几何对齐视频掩码，实现高保真、细粒度的 3D 场景编辑。

papers.title: Neural Harmonic Textures for High-Quality Primitive Based Neural Reconstruction
papers.abstract: Primitive-based methods such as 3D Gaussian Splatting have recently become the state-of-the-art for novel-view synthesis and related reconstruction tasks. Compared to neural fields, these representations are more flexible, adaptive, and scale better to large scenes. However, the limited expressivity of individual primitives makes modeling high-frequency detail challenging. We introduce Neural Harmonic Textures, a neural representation approach that anchors latent feature vectors on a virtual scaffold surrounding each primitive. These features are interpolated within the primitive at ray intersection points. Inspired by Fourier analysis, we apply periodic activations to the interpolated features, turning alpha blending into a weighted sum of harmonic components. The resulting signal is then decoded in a single deferred pass using a small neural network, significantly reducing computational cost. Neural Harmonic Textures yield state-of-the-art results in real-time novel view synthesis while bridging the gap between primitive- and neural-field-based reconstruction. Our method integrates seamlessly into existing primitive-based pipelines such as 3DGUT, Triangle Splatting, and 2DGS. We further demonstrate its generality with applications to 2D image fitting and semantic reconstruction.

analysis.tldr: 提出神经谐波纹理，通过锚定潜在特征并应用周期激活，提升基于基元的神经重建的高频细节质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 基于基元的方法（如3D高斯泼溅）在新型视图合成中表现出色，但单个基元的表达能力有限，难以建模高频细节。
analysis.problem: 如何在不牺牲实时性能的前提下，增强基元表示对高频细节的建模能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 在每个基元周围锚定潜在特征向量，在射线交点处插值，并应用周期激活将alpha混合转化为谐波分量的加权和，最后通过小型神经网络解码。
contributions: 提出神经谐波纹理，显著提升基元方法的高频细节建模能力。
方法可无缝集成到现有基元管线中，并在实时新视图合成中达到SOTA。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能对基元数量或场景规模敏感。
周期激活的引入可能带来额外的调参需求。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出神经谐波纹理，通过锚定潜在特征并应用周期激活，提升基于基元的神经重建的高频细节质量。

papers.title: Therefore I am. I Think
papers.abstract: We consider the question: when a large language reasoning model makes a choice, did it think first and then decide to, or decide first and then think? In this paper, we present evidence that detectable, early-encoded decisions shape chain-of-thought in reasoning models. Specifically, we show that a simple linear probe successfully decodes tool-calling decisions from pre-generation activations with very high confidence, and in some cases, even before a single reasoning token is produced. Activation steering supports this causally: perturbing the decision direction leads to inflated deliberation, and flips behavior in many examples (between 7 - 79% depending on model and benchmark). We also show through behavioral analysis that, when steering changes the decision, the chain-of-thought process often rationalizes the flip rather than resisting it. Together, these results suggest that reasoning models can encode action choices before they begin to deliberate in text.

analysis.tldr: 推理模型在生成推理链之前就已编码决策，思维链常事后合理化而非引导决策。
analysis.research_motivation: 理解大型语言推理模型的决策机制，探究思维链是否真正驱动决策，还是仅为事后解释。
analysis.problem: 推理模型是否在生成推理链之前就已做出决策，以及思维链在决策过程中的实际作用。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 线性探针可从预生成激活中高置信度解码工具调用决策，有时甚至早于第一个推理token；激活干预可改变决策并导致思维链合理化翻转。
analysis.method: 使用线性探针解码决策、激活干预因果验证、行为分析观察思维链变化。
contributions: 发现推理模型在生成推理链前已编码决策，思维链常事后合理化。
通过线性探针和激活干预提供因果证据，证明早期决策影响后续推理。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅针对工具调用决策，可能不适用于其他推理类型。
线性探针和激活干预的泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 推理模型在生成推理链之前就已编码决策，思维链常事后合理化而非引导决策。

papers.title: ORBIT: Scalable and Verifiable Data Generation for Search Agents on a Tight Budget
papers.abstract: Search agents, which integrate language models (LMs) with web search, are becoming crucial for answering complex user queries. Constructing training datasets for deep research tasks, involving multi-step retrieval and reasoning, remains challenging due to expensive human annotation, or cumbersome prerequisites. In this work, we introduce ORBIT, a training dataset with 20K reasoning-intensive queries with short verifiable answers, generated using a frugal framework without relying on paid API services. The modular framework relies on four stages: seed creation, question-answer pair generation, and two stages of verification: self and external. ORBIT spans 15 domains and each training pair requires 4-5 reasoning steps, with external search verification required from the complete web. We train Qwen3-4B as the base model on ORBIT using GRPO and evaluate it on Wikipedia question answering tasks. Extensive experiment results demonstrate that ORBIT-4B achieves strong performance among sub-4B LLMs as search agents, proving the utility of synthetic datasets. Our framework, code and datasets are open-sourced and available publicly.

analysis.tldr: 提出ORBIT，一个低成本、可扩展的合成数据集生成框架，用于训练搜索Agent，在20K推理密集型查询上训练的小模型达到强性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 构建深度研究任务的训练数据集成本高昂（人工标注）或需要繁琐前提条件（如依赖付费API），限制了搜索Agent的发展。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖付费API服务的情况下，低成本、可扩展地生成高质量、可验证的训练数据，以提升搜索Agent的多步检索与推理能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出ORBIT框架，包含四个阶段：种子创建、问答对生成、自我验证和外部验证，生成20K推理密集型查询及短可验证答案，并基于GRPO训练Qwen3-4B模型。
contributions: 提出ORBIT，一个无需付费API的模块化合成数据生成框架，生成20K高质量、可验证的搜索Agent训练数据。
训练ORBIT-4B模型，在子4B参数规模搜索Agent中达到强性能，验证了合成数据的实用性。
analysis.experiments: 在Wikipedia问答任务上评估，ORBIT-4B在子4B参数规模LLM搜索Agent中表现优异。
limitations: 仅基于Wikipedia问答任务评估，未在更广泛或真实搜索场景中验证。
数据集规模20K，可能不足以覆盖所有复杂查询类型。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出ORBIT，一个低成本、可扩展的合成数据集生成框架，用于训练搜索Agent，在20K推理密集型查询上训练的小模型达到强性能。

papers.title: True (VIS) Lies: Analyzing How Generative AI Recognizes Intentionality, Rhetoric, and Misleadingness in Visualization Lies
papers.abstract: This study investigates the ability of multimodal Large Language Models (LLMs) to identify and interpret misleading visualizations, and recognize these observations along with their underlying causes and potential intentionality. Our analysis leverages concepts from visualization rhetoric and a newly developed taxonomy of authorial intents as explanatory lenses. We formulated three research questions and addressed them experimentally using a dataset of 2,336 COVID-19-related tweets, half of which contain misleading visualizations, and supplemented it with real-world examples of perceptual, cognitive, and conceptual errors drawn from VisLies, the IEEE VIS community event dedicated to showcasing deceptive and misleading visualizations. To ensure broad coverage of the current LLM landscape, we evaluated 16 state-of-the-art models. Among them, 15 are open-weight models, spanning a wide range of model sizes, architectural families, and reasoning capabilities. The selection comprises small models, namely Nemotron-Nano-V2-VL (12B parameters), Mistral-Small-3.2 (24B), DeepSeek-VL2 (27B), Gemma3 (27B), and GTA1 (32B); medium-sized models, namely Qianfan-VL (70B), Molmo (72B), GLM-4.5V (108B), LLaVA-NeXT (110B), and Pixtral-Large (124B); and large models, namely Qwen3-VL (235B), InternVL3.5 (241B), Step3 (321B), Llama-4-Maverick (400B), and Kimi-K2.5 (1000B). In addition, we employed OpenAI GPT-5.4, a frontier proprietary model. To establish a human perspective on these tasks, we also conducted a user study with visualization experts to assess how people perceive rhetorical techniques and the authorial intentions behind the same misleading visualizations. This allows comparison between model and expert behavior, revealing similarities and differences that provide insights into where LLMs align with human judgment and where they diverge.

analysis.tldr: 评估多模态大模型识别误导性可视化中意图、修辞和欺骗性的能力，并与人类专家对比。
analysis.research_motivation: 误导性可视化在社交媒体中广泛传播，但多模态大模型对其识别能力尚不明确，需要系统评估。
analysis.problem: 多模态大模型能否准确识别可视化中的误导性、修辞手法和作者意图？
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建包含2336条COVID-19相关推文的数据集（一半含误导性可视化），结合VisLies真实案例，评估16个开源和1个闭源多模态大模型，并开展人类专家用户研究进行对比。
contributions: 提出基于可视化修辞和作者意图的分类体系作为分析框架。
系统评估16个多模态大模型在误导性可视化识别任务上的表现。
通过人类专家用户研究揭示模型与人类判断的异同。
analysis.experiments: 使用2336条COVID-19推文数据集和VisLies案例，评估16个开源模型（12B-1000B参数）和GPT-5.4，并开展人类专家用户研究。摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 数据集仅聚焦COVID-19领域，可能限制泛化性。
未涉及模型对误导性可视化生成能力的评估。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 评估多模态大模型识别误导性可视化中意图、修辞和欺骗性的能力，并与人类专家对比。

papers.title: A ROS 2 Wrapper for Florence-2: Multi-Mode Local Vision-Language Inference for Robotic Systems
papers.abstract: Foundation vision-language models are becoming increasingly relevant to robotics because they can provide richer semantic perception than narrow task-specific pipelines. However, their practical adoption in robot software stacks still depends on reproducible middleware integrations rather than on model quality alone. Florence-2 is especially attractive in this regard because it unifies captioning, optical character recognition, open-vocabulary detection, grounding and related vision-language tasks within a comparatively manageable model size. This article presents a ROS 2 wrapper for Florence-2 that exposes the model through three complementary interaction modes: continuous topic-driven processing, synchronous service calls and asynchronous actions. The wrapper is designed for local execution and supports both native installation and Docker container deployment. It also combines generic JSON outputs with standard ROS 2 message bindings for detection-oriented tasks. A functional validation is reported together with a throughput study on several GPUs, showing that local deployment is feasible with consumer grade hardware. The repository is publicly available here: https://github.com/JEDominguezVidal/florence2_ros2_wrapper

analysis.tldr: 为Florence-2模型开发ROS 2封装器，支持三种交互模式，实现机器人系统中本地多模态视觉-语言推理。
analysis.research_motivation: 基础视觉-语言模型在机器人领域具有潜力，但实际部署需要可复现的中间件集成，而非仅依赖模型质量。
analysis.problem: 如何将Florence-2模型集成到机器人软件栈中，提供多种交互模式并支持本地执行。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 开发ROS 2封装器，提供三种交互模式（连续话题驱动、同步服务调用、异步动作），支持本地执行和Docker部署，结合通用JSON输出和标准ROS 2消息绑定。
contributions: 提出Florence-2的ROS 2封装器，支持三种互补交互模式。
验证了在消费级GPU上本地部署的可行性，并公开代码仓库。
analysis.experiments: 进行了功能验证和吞吐量研究，在多个GPU上测试，表明消费级硬件上本地部署可行。
limitations: 可能未涉及复杂场景下的鲁棒性评估。
吞吐量研究可能仅限于特定硬件配置。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 为Florence-2模型开发ROS 2封装器，支持三种交互模式，实现机器人系统中本地多模态视觉-语言推理。

papers.title: Screening Is Enough
papers.abstract: A core limitation of standard softmax attention is that it does not provide an independently interpretable measure of query--key relevance: attention scores are unbounded, while attention weights are defined only relative to competing keys. Consequently, irrelevant keys cannot be explicitly rejected, and some attention mass is assigned even when no key is genuinely relevant. We introduce Multiscreen, a language-model architecture built around a mechanism we call screening, which enables absolute query--key relevance. Instead of redistributing attention across all keys, screening computes bounded query--key similarities and applies an explicit threshold, discarding irrelevant keys and aggregating the remaining keys without global competition. Across experiments, Multiscreen achieves comparable validation loss with roughly 30\% fewer parameters than a Transformer baseline and remains stable at substantially larger learning rates. It maintains stable long-context perplexity beyond the training context and shows little degradation in retrieval performance as context length increases. Finally, Multiscreen achieves lower full-context forward-pass latency at long context lengths.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种名为Multiscreen的语言模型架构，通过筛选机制实现绝对查询-键相关性，在减少参数的同时保持性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 标准softmax注意力机制无法提供独立可解释的查询-键相关性度量，导致无关键无法被明确拒绝，即使没有真正相关的键也会分配注意力权重。
analysis.problem: 解决标准注意力机制中注意力权重仅相对定义、无法绝对判断查询-键相关性的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 标准softmax注意力的注意力分数无界，注意力权重仅相对于竞争键定义，导致无关键无法被显式拒绝。
analysis.method: 提出Multiscreen架构，使用筛选机制计算有界的查询-键相似度，并应用显式阈值丢弃无关键，聚合剩余键而不进行全局竞争。
contributions: 提出筛选机制，实现绝对查询-键相关性判断
Multiscreen架构在减少约30%参数的情况下达到与Transformer相当的验证损失，且支持更大学习率
analysis.experiments: 在语言模型任务上进行了实验，包括验证损失、长上下文困惑度和检索性能评估，以及长上下文下的前向传播延迟测试。
limitations: 可能仅在特定架构或任务上有效
筛选阈值的选择可能需要调参
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种名为Multiscreen的语言模型架构，通过筛选机制实现绝对查询-键相关性，在减少参数的同时保持性能。

papers.title: Open-Set Supervised 3D Anomaly Detection: An Industrial Dataset and a Generalisable Framework for Unknown Defects
papers.abstract: Although self-supervised 3D anomaly detection assumes that acquiring high-precision point clouds is computationally expensive, in real manufacturing scenarios it is often feasible to collect a limited number of anomalous samples. Therefore, we study open-set supervised 3D anomaly detection, where the model is trained with only normal samples and a small number of known anomalous samples, aiming to identify unknown anomalies at test time. We present Open-Industry, a high-quality industrial dataset containing 15 categories, each with five real anomaly types collected from production lines. We first adapt general open-set anomaly detection methods to accommodate 3D point cloud inputs better. Building upon this, we propose Open3D-AD, a point-cloud-oriented approach that leverages normal samples, simulated anomalies, and partially observed real anomalies to model the probability density distributions of normal and anomalous data. Then, we introduce a simple Correspondence Distributions Subsampling to reduce the overlap between normal and non-normal distributions, enabling stronger dual distributions modeling. Based on these contributions, we establish a comprehensive benchmark and evaluate the proposed method extensively on Open-Industry as well as established datasets including Real3D-AD and Anomaly-ShapeNet. Benchmark results and ablation studies demonstrate the effectiveness of Open3D-AD and further reveal the potential of open-set supervised 3D anomaly detection.

analysis.tldr: 提出开放集监督3D异常检测框架Open3D-AD和工业数据集Open-Industry，利用少量已知异常样本和模拟异常建模双分布，实现未知缺陷检测。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有3D异常检测多采用自监督方法，假设获取高精度点云计算成本高，但实际制造中可收集少量异常样本，如何利用这些样本提升未知异常检测能力是研究痛点。
analysis.problem: 解决开放集监督3D异常检测问题，即仅用正常样本和少量已知异常样本训练，检测测试时的未知异常。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Open3D-AD方法，利用正常样本、模拟异常和部分真实异常建模正常与异常数据的概率密度分布，并通过对应分布子采样减少分布重叠，增强双分布建模能力。
contributions: 构建Open-Industry高质量工业3D异常检测数据集，包含15类、每类5种真实异常类型。
提出Open3D-AD框架，结合模拟异常和真实异常进行双分布建模，并引入对应分布子采样减少分布重叠。
在Open-Industry及Real3D-AD、Anomaly-ShapeNet上建立基准，验证方法有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在Open-Industry、Real3D-AD和Anomaly-ShapeNet数据集上进行基准测试和消融实验，结果表明Open3D-AD有效。
limitations: 可能依赖模拟异常的质量和多样性。
双分布建模在极端类别不平衡下可能不稳定。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出开放集监督3D异常检测框架Open3D-AD和工业数据集Open-Industry，利用少量已知异常样本和模拟异常建模双分布，实现未知缺陷检测。

papers.title: Online Reasoning Calibration: Test-Time Training Enables Generalizable Conformal LLM Reasoning
papers.abstract: While test-time scaling has enabled large language models to solve highly difficult tasks, state-of-the-art results come at exorbitant compute costs. These inefficiencies can be attributed to the miscalibration of post-trained language models, and the lack of calibration in popular sampling techniques. Here, we present Online Reasoning Calibration (ORCA), a framework for calibrating the sampling process that draws upon conformal prediction and test-time training. Specifically, we introduce a meta-learning procedure that updates the calibration module for each input. This allows us to provide valid confidence estimates under distributional shift, e.g. in thought patterns that occur across different stages of reasoning, or in prompt distributions between model development and deployment. ORCA not only provides theoretical guarantees on conformal risks, but also empirically shows higher efficiency and generalization across different reasoning tasks. At risk level $δ=0.1$, ORCA improves Qwen2.5-32B efficiency on in-distribution tasks with savings up to 47.5% with supervised labels and 40.7% with self-consistency labels. Under zero-shot out-of-domain settings, it improves MATH-500 savings from 24.8% of the static calibration baseline to 67.0% while maintaining a low empirical error rate, and the same trend holds across model families and downstream benchmarks. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/wzekai99/ORCA.

analysis.tldr: ORCA通过测试时训练和共形预测校准LLM推理采样过程，提升效率与泛化性。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM在测试时扩展中计算成本高昂，源于后训练模型校准不足及采样技术缺乏校准，亟需高效校准方法。
analysis.problem: 解决LLM推理中采样过程校准不足导致的低效和分布偏移下置信估计不准确问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出后训练语言模型校准不足，以及流行采样技术缺乏校准，导致计算浪费。
analysis.method: 提出ORCA框架，结合共形预测和测试时训练，通过元学习为每个输入更新校准模块，提供分布偏移下的有效置信估计。
contributions: 提出ORCA框架，将共形预测与测试时训练结合用于LLM推理校准。
提供共形风险的理论保证，并在多个推理任务上实证提升效率和泛化性。
analysis.experiments: 在Qwen2.5-32B上，风险水平δ=0.1时，分布内任务效率提升高达47.5%（监督标签）和40.7%（自一致性标签）；零样本域外设置下，MATH-500节省从静态基线的24.8%提升至67.0%，且低错误率。
limitations: 可能依赖特定模型架构或任务类型。
测试时训练可能引入额外计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: ORCA通过测试时训练和共形预测校准LLM推理采样过程，提升效率与泛化性。

papers.title: Human-like Working Memory Interference in Large Language Models
papers.abstract: Intelligent systems must maintain and manipulate task-relevant information online to adapt to dynamic environments and changing goals. This capacity, known as working memory, is fundamental to human reasoning and intelligence. Despite having on the order of 100 billion neurons, both biological and artificial systems exhibit limitations in working memory. This raises a key question: why do large language models (LLMs) show such limitations, given that transformers have full access to prior context through attention? We find that although a two-layer transformer can be trained to solve working memory tasks perfectly, a diverse set of pretrained LLMs continues to show working memory limitations. Notably, LLMs reproduce interference signatures observed in humans: performance degrades with increasing memory load and is biased by recency and stimulus statistics. Across models, stronger working memory capacity correlates with broader competence on standard benchmarks, mirroring its link to general intelligence in humans. Yet despite substantial variability in working memory performance, LLMs surprisingly converge on a common computational mechanism. Rather than directly copying the relevant memory item from context, models encode multiple memory items in entangled representations, such that successful recall depends on interference control -- actively suppressing task-irrelevant content to isolate the target for readout. Moreover, a targeted intervention that suppresses stimulus content information improves performance, providing causal support for representational interference. Together, these findings identify representational interference as a core constraint on working memory in pretrained LLMs, suggesting that working-memory limits in biological and artificial systems may reflect a shared computational challenge: selecting task-relevant information under interference.

analysis.tldr: LLMs表现出与人类相似的工作记忆干扰模式，其限制源于表征纠缠而非注意力机制缺陷。
analysis.research_motivation: 理解LLMs为何在拥有完整上下文访问权限的情况下仍存在工作记忆限制，以及这种限制是否与人类认知机制相似。
analysis.problem: 探究LLMs工作记忆限制的计算机制，特别是干扰模式及其与人类认知的对应关系。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: LLMs在记忆任务中表现出与人类相似的干扰特征：性能随记忆负载增加而下降，并受近因效应和刺激统计偏差影响。
analysis.method: 通过分析预训练LLMs在经典工作记忆任务上的表现，结合表征分析和因果干预实验，揭示其内部计算机制。
contributions: 发现LLMs的工作记忆限制源于表征纠缠而非注意力机制缺陷，与人类共享干扰控制挑战。
通过因果干预实验证实抑制刺激内容信息可提升工作记忆性能，为表征干扰假说提供支持。
analysis.experiments: 在多种预训练LLMs上测试工作记忆任务，并与人类行为数据对比；通过表征分析和因果干预验证机制。
limitations: 仅测试了有限规模的LLMs，更大模型可能表现出不同特性。
工作记忆任务较为简单，复杂推理场景下的干扰机制有待探索。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LLMs表现出与人类相似的工作记忆干扰模式，其限制源于表征纠缠而非注意力机制缺陷。

papers.title: AdaLoRA-QAT: Adaptive Low-Rank and Quantization-Aware Segmentation
papers.abstract: Chest X-ray (CXR) segmentation is an important step in computer-aided diagnosis, yet deploying large foundation models in clinical settings remains challenging due to computational constraints. We propose AdaLoRA-QAT, a two-stage fine-tuning framework that combines adaptive low-rank encoder adaptation with full quantization-aware training. Adaptive rank allocation improves parameter efficiency, while selective mixed-precision INT8 quantization preserves structural fidelity crucial for clinical reliability.
