Evaluated across large-scale CXR datasets, AdaLoRA-QAT achieves 95.6% Dice, matching full-precision SAM decoder fine-tuning while reducing trainable parameters by 16.6\times and yielding 2.24\times model compression. A Wilcoxon signed-rank test confirms that quantization does not significantly degrade segmentation accuracy. These results demonstrate that AdaLoRA-QAT effectively balances accuracy, efficiency, and structural trust-worthiness, enabling compact and deployable foundation models for medical image segmentation. Code and pretrained models are available at: https://prantik-pdeb.github.io/adaloraqat.github.io/

analysis.tldr: 提出 AdaLoRA-QAT 两阶段微调框架，结合自适应低秩编码器适配与全量化感知训练，在 CXR 分割中实现 95.6% Dice 且参数减少 16.6 倍。
analysis.research_motivation: 胸部 X 光分割是计算机辅助诊断的关键步骤，但大型基础模型因计算资源限制难以在临床部署，需要兼顾精度与效率的方法。
analysis.problem: 如何在保持高分割精度的同时，显著降低模型参数量和计算开销，实现医学图像分割基础模型的高效部署。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 两阶段微调框架：第一阶段自适应低秩编码器适配（动态分配秩以优化参数效率），第二阶段全量化感知训练（选择性混合精度 INT8 量化以保持结构保真度）。
contributions: 提出 AdaLoRA-QAT 框架，结合自适应低秩适配与量化感知训练，实现参数高效且结构保真的医学图像分割。
在大规模 CXR 数据集上达到 95.6% Dice，与全精度 SAM 解码器微调性能相当，同时参数减少 16.6 倍、模型压缩 2.24 倍。
analysis.experiments: 在大规模 CXR 数据集上评估，Dice 达 95.6%，Wilcoxon 符号秩检验确认量化未显著降低精度。
limitations: 可能仅针对 CXR 分割验证，泛化到其他医学模态需进一步测试。
量化策略的混合精度选择可能依赖经验，缺乏自动化调优。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出 AdaLoRA-QAT 两阶段微调框架，结合自适应低秩编码器适配与全量化感知训练，在 CXR 分割中实现 95.6% Dice 且参数减少 16.6 倍。

papers.title: Digital hybridity and relics in cultural heritage: using corpus linguistics to inform design in emerging technologies from AI to VR
papers.abstract: Hybrid technologies enable the blending of physical and digital elements, creating new ways to experience and interact with the world. Such technologies can transform engagement with relics, both secular and sacred but they present challenges for capturing faith, belief, and representation responsibly. Given the complexities of digital representation and the ethical challenges inherent in digitising culturally significant objects, a transdisciplinary understanding of these issues is needed. To inform this discussion from a linguistic perspective, we examined the representation of relics in historical and contemporary texts. Using a corpus linguistic approach to extract modifiers of the word relic in corpora of Early Modern English books and contemporary web sourced texts from 2021, we examined the multifaceted ways in which relics have been perceived and evaluated over time. Early texts consider relics as both objects of moral and spiritual significance, and tools of religious and political control, while they are more often framed as heritage symbols, reflecting past events, places, and traditions in contemporary texts. We discuss how hybrid, sometimes AI based technologies can enhance accessibility and engagement, whilst also challenging traditional sensitivities around authenticity and sensory experience, which are integral to the meaning and significance of relics.

analysis.tldr: 通过语料库语言学分析历史与当代文本中“relic”的修饰语，揭示数字混合技术（如AI、VR）在文化遗产应用中面临的真实性与感官体验挑战。
analysis.research_motivation: 数字混合技术（如AI、VR）为文化遗产中的圣物/遗物带来新的互动方式，但如何负责任地捕捉信仰、信念和表征存在伦理挑战，需要跨学科理解。
analysis.problem: 数字混合技术在文化遗产应用中如何平衡增强可访问性与尊重传统真实性、感官体验等敏感问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 历史文本中relic被视为道德/精神对象及宗教/政治控制工具，当代文本中则更多作为遗产符号，反映过去事件、地点和传统。
analysis.method: 采用语料库语言学方法，从早期现代英语书籍和2021年当代网络文本语料库中提取“relic”的修饰语，分析其历史与当代表征差异。
contributions: 通过语料库语言学揭示relic在历史与当代文本中的语义演变，为数字文化遗产设计提供语言学视角。
讨论AI/VR等混合技术在增强可访问性的同时，如何挑战传统真实性与感官体验的敏感性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 语料库仅覆盖早期现代英语和2021年网络文本，可能遗漏其他时期或文化背景。
分析仅聚焦于“relic”一词，未涉及其他相关术语或非英语语境。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过语料库语言学分析历史与当代文本中“relic”的修饰语，揭示数字混合技术（如AI、VR）在文化遗产应用中面临的真实性与感官体验挑战。

papers.title: QualiaNet: An Experience-Before-Inference Network
papers.abstract: Human 3D vision involves two distinct stages: an Experience Module, where stereo depth is extracted relative to fixation, and an Inference Module, where this experience is interpreted to estimate 3D scene properties. Paradoxically, although our experience of stereo vision does not provide us with distance information, it does affect our inferences about visual scale. We propose the Inference Module exploits a natural scene statistic: near scenes produce vivid disparity gradients, while far scenes appear comparatively flat. QualiaNet implements this two-stage architecture computationally: disparity maps simulating human stereo experience are passed to a CNN trained to estimate distance. The network can recover distance from disparity gradients alone, validating this approach.

analysis.tldr: 受人类立体视觉启发，提出一种先体验后推理的两阶段网络架构，仅从视差梯度恢复距离。
analysis.research_motivation: 人类立体视觉中体验与推理分离，但体验影响推理；现有方法未利用这一自然场景统计特性。
analysis.problem: 如何从模拟人类立体体验的视差图中仅利用视差梯度估计场景距离。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 近场景产生鲜明视差梯度，远场景相对平坦；这一自然场景统计特性可被推理模块利用。
analysis.method: 两阶段架构：体验模块生成模拟人类立体体验的视差图，推理模块使用CNN从视差梯度估计距离。
contributions: 提出受人类立体视觉启发的体验-推理两阶段网络架构
验证仅从视差梯度即可恢复距离，利用自然场景统计特性
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定场景或视差梯度分布
未与现有深度估计方法进行定量比较
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 受人类立体视觉启发，提出一种先体验后推理的两阶段网络架构，仅从视差梯度恢复距离。

papers.title: Brainstacks: Cross-Domain Cognitive Capabilities via Frozen MoE-LoRA Stacks for Continual LLM Learning
papers.abstract: We present Brainstacks, a modular architecture for continual multi-domain fine-tuning of large language models that packages domain expertise as frozen adapter stacks composing additively on a shared frozen base at inference. Five interlocking components: (1) MoE-LoRA with Shazeer-style noisy top-2 routing across all seven transformer projections under QLoRA 4-bit quantization with rsLoRA scaling; (2) an inner loop performing residual boosting by freezing trained stacks and adding new ones; (3) an outer loop training sequential domain-specific stacks with curriculum-ordered dependencies; (4) null-space projection via randomized SVD constraining new stacks to subspaces orthogonal to prior directions, achieving zero forgetting in isolation; (5) an outcome-based sigmoid meta-router trained on empirically discovered domain-combination targets that selectively weights stacks, enabling cross-domain composition. Two boundary experiments: (6) PSN pretraining on a randomly initialized model; (7) per-domain RL (DPO/GRPO) validating compatibility with post-SFT alignment. Validated on TinyLlama-1.1B (4 domains, 9 stacks) and Gemma 3 12B IT (5 domains, 10 stacks), MoE-LoRA achieves 2.5x faster convergence than parameter-matched single LoRA, residual boosting breaks through the single-stack ceiling, and the routed system recovers generation quality destroyed by ungated stack accumulation. The central finding: the outcome-based router discovers that domain stacks encode transferable cognitive primitives (instruction-following clarity, numerical reasoning, procedural logic, chain-of-thought structure) rather than domain-specific knowledge, with medical prompts routing to chat+math stacks in 97% of cases despite zero medical data in those stacks.

analysis.tldr: 提出Brainstacks架构，通过冻结的MoE-LoRA适配器堆栈实现LLM的持续多领域微调与跨域组合，发现域堆栈编码可迁移的认知基元。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM在持续多领域微调中面临灾难性遗忘和跨域组合能力不足的问题，现有方法难以在保持零遗忘的同时实现高效的跨域知识迁移。
analysis.problem: 如何设计模块化架构，使LLM在持续学习多个领域时既能避免遗忘，又能通过组合已有知识实现跨域推理。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要发现：基于结果的元路由器发现域堆栈编码的是可迁移的认知基元（如指令遵循清晰度、数值推理、程序逻辑、思维链结构），而非领域特定知识；例如医疗提示在97%的情况下路由到聊天+数学堆栈，尽管这些堆栈中没有任何医疗数据。
analysis.method: Brainstacks架构包含五个核心组件：(1) MoE-LoRA，在QLoRA 4-bit量化下对所有七个Transformer投影使用Shazeer式带噪top-2路由；(2) 内循环通过冻结已训练堆栈并添加新堆栈实现残差增强；(3) 外循环按课程顺序训练领域特定堆栈；(4) 通过随机SVD的零空间投影约束新堆栈与先前方向正交，实现零遗忘；(5) 基于结果的sigmoid元路由器，在经验发现的域组合目标上训练，选择性加权堆栈实现跨域组合。
contributions: 提出Brainstacks模块化架构，实现LLM的持续多领域微调与零遗忘。
发现域堆栈编码可迁移的认知基元而非领域知识，并通过元路由器实现跨域组合。
在TinyLlama-1.1B和Gemma 3 12B IT上验证，MoE-LoRA收敛速度比参数匹配的单LoRA快2.5倍，残差增强突破单堆栈上限。
analysis.experiments: 在TinyLlama-1.1B（4个领域，9个堆栈）和Gemma 3 12B IT（5个领域，10个堆栈）上验证，MoE-LoRA实现2.5倍更快收敛，残差增强突破单堆栈上限，路由系统恢复了无门控堆栈累积破坏的生成质量。
limitations: 仅在小规模模型（1.1B和12B）上验证，更大模型上的效果未知。
元路由器的训练依赖经验发现的域组合目标，可能难以扩展到更多领域。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Brainstacks架构，通过冻结的MoE-LoRA适配器堆栈实现LLM的持续多领域微调与跨域组合，发现域堆栈编码可迁移的认知基元。

papers.title: Detecting Multi-Agent Collusion Through Multi-Agent Interpretability
papers.abstract: As LLM agents are increasingly deployed in multi-agent systems, they introduce risks of covert coordination that may evade standard forms of human oversight. While linear probes on model activations have shown promise for detecting deception in single-agent settings, collusion is inherently a multi-agent phenomenon, and the use of internal representations for detecting collusion between agents remains unexplored. We introduce NARCBench, a benchmark for evaluating collusion detection under environment distribution shift, and propose five probing techniques that aggregate per-agent deception scores to classify scenarios at the group level, evaluated across four open-weight models (Qwen3-32B, Llama-3.1-70B, DeepSeek-R1 32B, GPT-OSS-20B) and six probe architectures. We frame this as a distributed anomaly detection problem, identifying three collusion signatures that map onto distinct anomaly types and detection paradigms. Every model reaches 1.00 AUROC in-distribution; on our strongest model (Llama-3.1-70B), our five probing techniques achieve 0.73 to 0.93 AUROC when transferred zero-shot to structurally different multi-agent scenarios and 0.99 to 1.00 on a steganographic blackjack card-counting task, with detection performance scaling with model capability. We find that no single probing technique dominates across all collusion types, consistent with the framework's prediction that different anomaly types require different detection paradigms. This work takes a step toward multi-agent interpretability: extending white-box inspection from single models to multi-agent contexts, where detection requires aggregating signals across agents. These results suggest that model internals provide a complementary signal to text-level monitoring for detecting multi-agent collusion. Code and data available at https://github.com/aaronrose227/narcbench.

analysis.tldr: 提出多智能体可解释性方法，通过聚合单智能体欺骗分数检测多智能体合谋，并构建NARCBench基准。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM智能体在多智能体系统中可能进行隐蔽协调，现有线性探针仅适用于单智能体欺骗检测，缺乏针对多智能体合谋的检测方法。
analysis.problem: 如何利用模型内部表征检测多智能体系统中的合谋行为。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 不同合谋类型需要不同的检测范式，单一探针技术无法在所有合谋类型上占优。
analysis.method: 提出五种探针技术，将每个智能体的欺骗分数聚合为群体级分类，并构建NARCBench基准评估环境分布偏移下的检测性能。
contributions: 提出NARCBench基准，用于评估环境分布偏移下的多智能体合谋检测。
提出五种聚合探针技术，将单智能体欺骗检测扩展到多智能体场景。
实验表明模型内部表征可补充文本级监控，检测性能随模型能力提升。
analysis.experiments: 在四个开源模型（Qwen3-32B, Llama-3.1-70B, DeepSeek-R1 32B, GPT-OSS-20B）和六种探针架构上评估，所有模型在分布内AUROC达1.00；最强模型零样本迁移到结构不同的多智能体场景时AUROC为0.73-0.93，在隐写二十一点任务上为0.99-1.00。
limitations: 未讨论探针技术对模型架构的依赖性。
基准仅覆盖有限合谋类型，可能无法泛化到更复杂场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出多智能体可解释性方法，通过聚合单智能体欺骗分数检测多智能体合谋，并构建NARCBench基准。

papers.title: Looking into a Pixel by Nonlinear Unmixing -- A Generative Approach
papers.abstract: Due to the large footprint of pixels in remote sensing imagery, hyperspectral unmixing (HU) has become an important and necessary procedure in hyperspectral image analysis. Traditional HU methods rely on a prior spectral mixing model, especially for nonlinear mixtures, which has largely limited the performance and generalization capacity of the unmixing approach. In this paper, we address the challenging problem of hyperspectral nonlinear unmixing (HNU) without explicit knowledge of the mixing model. Inspired by the principle of generative models, where images of the same distribution can be generated as that of the training images without knowing the exact probability distribution function of the image, we develop an invertible mixing-unmixing process via a bi-directional GAN framework, constrained by both the cycle consistency and the linkage between linear and nonlinear mixtures. The combination of cycle consistency and linear linkage provides powerful constraints without requiring an explicit mixing model. We refer to the proposed approach as the linearly-constrained CycleGAN unmixing net, or LCGU net. Experimental results indicate that the proposed LCGU net exhibits stable and competitive performance across different datasets compared with other state-of-the-art model-based HNU methods.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种无需显式混合模型的高光谱非线性解混方法，利用双向GAN和循环一致性约束实现像素级解混。
analysis.research_motivation: 遥感图像中像素覆盖范围大，高光谱解混是关键步骤，但传统方法依赖先验光谱混合模型，尤其对非线性混合泛化能力有限。
analysis.problem: 解决无显式混合模型知识下的高光谱非线性解混问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于双向GAN框架构建可逆的混合-解混过程，通过循环一致性约束和线性-非线性混合的关联约束实现解混，无需显式混合模型。
contributions: 提出一种无需显式混合模型的高光谱非线性解混方法（LCGU net）。
将循环一致性与线性关联结合作为约束，提升解混性能。
analysis.experiments: 实验结果表明，所提方法在不同数据集上相比其他基于模型的方法表现稳定且具有竞争力。
limitations: 可能依赖GAN训练的稳定性。
对极端非线性混合场景的泛化能力未明确说明。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种无需显式混合模型的高光谱非线性解混方法，利用双向GAN和循环一致性约束实现像素级解混。

papers.title: The Overlooked Repetitive Lengthening Form in Sentiment Analysis
papers.abstract: Individuals engaging in online communication frequently express personal opinions with informal styles (e.g., memes and emojis). While Language Models (LMs) with informal communications have been widely discussed, a unique and emphatic style, the Repetitive Lengthening Form (RLF), has been overlooked for years. In this paper, we explore answers to two research questions: 1) Is RLF important for sentiment analysis (SA)? 2) Can LMs understand RLF? Inspired by previous linguistic research, we curate \textbf{Lengthening}, the first multi-domain dataset with 850k samples focused on RLF for SA. Moreover, we introduce \textbf{Exp}lainable \textbf{Instruct}ion Tuning (\textbf{ExpInstruct}), a two-stage instruction tuning framework aimed to improve both performance and explainability of LLMs for RLF. We further propose a novel unified approach to quantify LMs' understanding of informal expressions. We show that RLF sentences are expressive expressions and can serve as signatures of document-level sentiment. Additionally, RLF has potential value for online content analysis. Our results show that fine-tuned Pre-trained Language Models (PLMs) can surpass zero-shot GPT-4 in performance but not in explanation for RLF. Finally, we show ExpInstruct can improve the open-sourced LLMs to match zero-shot GPT-4 in performance and explainability for RLF with limited samples. Code and sample data are available at https://github.com/Tom-Owl/OverlookedRLF

analysis.tldr: 提出首个面向重复延长形式(RLF)的情感分析数据集Lengthening和可解释指令微调框架ExpInstruct，发现RLF是文档级情感信号，且ExpInstruct使开源LLM在RLF上匹配GPT-4。
analysis.research_motivation: 在线交流中用户常使用非正式风格（如表情包、表情符号），但一种独特的强调风格——重复延长形式(RLF)长期被忽视，其对情感分析的重要性及语言模型的理解能力尚不清楚。
analysis.problem: 探索RLF在情感分析中的重要性以及语言模型能否理解RLF，并提升模型对RLF的理解与可解释性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: RLF句子具有表现力，可作为文档级情感的特征；微调后的预训练语言模型在RLF性能上可超越零样本GPT-4，但在解释性上不及；ExpInstruct能用有限样本使开源LLM在性能和可解释性上匹配GPT-4。
analysis.method: 构建首个多领域RLF情感分析数据集Lengthening（85万样本）；提出两阶段可解释指令微调框架ExpInstruct，提升LLM对RLF的性能和可解释性；提出量化语言模型理解非正式表达的统一方法。
contributions: 构建首个多领域RLF情感分析数据集Lengthening，含85万样本。
提出ExpInstruct框架，提升LLM在RLF上的性能和可解释性。
提出量化语言模型理解非正式表达的统一方法，并揭示RLF作为文档级情感信号的价值。
analysis.experiments: 在Lengthening数据集上评估多种PLM和LLM（含GPT-4），对比微调PLM与零样本GPT-4的性能与解释性，并验证ExpInstruct的效果。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 数据集仅覆盖RLF，未涉及其他非正式风格。
ExpInstruct的泛化性可能受限于RLF领域。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出首个面向重复延长形式(RLF)的情感分析数据集Lengthening和可解释指令微调框架ExpInstruct，发现RLF是文档级情感信号，且ExpInstruct使开源LLM在RLF上匹配GPT-4。

papers.title: Toward Personalized Darts Training: A Data-Driven Framework Based on Skeleton-Based Biomechanical Analysis and Motion Modeling
papers.abstract: As sports training becomes more data-driven, traditional dart coaching based mainly on experience and visual observation is increasingly inadequate for high-precision, goal-oriented movements. Although prior studies have highlighted the importance of release parameters, joint motion, and coordination in dart throwing, most quantitative methods still focus on local variables, single-release metrics, or static template matching. These approaches offer limited support for personalized training and often overlook useful movement variability. This paper presents a data-driven dart training assistance system. The system creates a closed-loop framework spanning motion capture, feature modeling, and personalized feedback. Dart-throwing data were collected in markerless conditions using a Kinect 2.0 depth sensor and an optical camera. Eighteen kinematic features were extracted from four biomechanical dimensions: three-link coordination, release velocity, multi-joint angular configuration, and postural stability. Two modules were developed: a personalized optimal throwing trajectory model that combines historical high-quality samples with the minimum jerk criterion, and a motion deviation diagnosis and recommendation model based on z-scores and hierarchical logic. A total of 2,396 throwing samples from professional and non-professional athletes were collected. Results show that the system generates smooth personalized reference trajectories consistent with natural human movement. Case studies indicate that it can detect poor trunk stability, abnormal elbow displacement, and imbalanced velocity control, then provide targeted recommendations. The framework shifts dart evaluation from deviation from a uniform standard to deviation from an individual's optimal control range, improving personalization and interpretability for darts training and other high-precision target sports.

analysis.tldr: 提出数据驱动的飞镖训练框架，基于骨架运动分析生成个性化最优轨迹与诊断建议。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统飞镖训练依赖经验和视觉观察，缺乏对高精度动作的量化指导，现有方法多关注局部变量或静态模板，难以支持个性化训练。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个从运动捕捉到个性化反馈的闭环系统，以提升飞镖训练的精准性和可解释性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 使用Kinect 2.0和光学相机采集无标记飞镖投掷数据，提取18个运动学特征（三连杆协调、释放速度、多关节角度、姿势稳定性），构建个性化最优投掷轨迹模型（结合历史高质量样本与最小加加速度准则）和基于z分数与层次逻辑的运动偏差诊断推荐模型。
contributions: 提出数据驱动的飞镖训练闭环框架，涵盖运动捕捉、特征建模和个性化反馈。
开发个性化最优投掷轨迹模型和运动偏差诊断推荐模型，实现从统一标准到个体最优控制范围的评估转变。
analysis.experiments: 收集了2396个专业和非专业运动员的投掷样本，系统生成平滑的个性化参考轨迹，案例研究显示能检测躯干稳定性差、肘部异常位移和速度控制不平衡并提供针对性建议。
limitations: 可能仅针对飞镖运动，泛化到其他高精度目标运动需验证。
依赖Kinect 2.0传感器，精度可能受环境光照和遮挡影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出数据驱动的飞镖训练框架，基于骨架运动分析生成个性化最优轨迹与诊断建议。

papers.title: ReinDriveGen: Reinforcement Post-Training for Out-of-Distribution Driving Scene Generation
papers.abstract: We present ReinDriveGen, a framework that enables full controllability over dynamic driving scenes, allowing users to freely edit actor trajectories to simulate safety-critical corner cases such as front-vehicle collisions, drifting cars, vehicles spinning out of control, pedestrians jaywalking, and cyclists cutting across lanes. Our approach constructs a dynamic 3D point cloud scene from multi-frame LiDAR data, introduces a vehicle completion module to reconstruct full 360° geometry from partial observations, and renders the edited scene into 2D condition images that guide a video diffusion model to synthesize realistic driving videos. Since such edited scenarios inevitably fall outside the training distribution, we further propose an RL-based post-training strategy with a pairwise preference model and a pairwise reward mechanism, enabling robust quality improvement under out-of-distribution conditions without ground-truth supervision. Extensive experiments demonstrate that ReinDriveGen outperforms existing approaches on edited driving scenarios and achieves state-of-the-art results on novel ego viewpoint synthesis.

analysis.tldr: 通过强化学习后训练提升驾驶场景生成模型在分布外场景下的鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有驾驶场景生成方法难以编辑动态场景中的车辆轨迹以模拟安全关键边缘案例，且编辑后的场景往往偏离训练分布，导致生成质量下降。
analysis.problem: 如何实现可控的动态驾驶场景编辑，并提升生成模型在分布外场景下的鲁棒性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 编辑后的场景（如碰撞、漂移）会偏离训练数据分布，导致现有生成模型质量下降。
analysis.method: 构建动态3D点云场景，引入车辆补全模块，渲染2D条件图像引导视频扩散模型；提出基于RL的后训练策略，使用成对偏好模型和成对奖励机制，无需真值监督即可提升分布外场景的生成质量。
contributions: 提出ReinDriveGen框架，实现动态驾驶场景的完全可控编辑，支持多种安全关键边缘案例模拟。
提出基于RL的后训练策略，利用成对偏好模型和奖励机制，在无真值监督下提升分布外场景的生成鲁棒性。
analysis.experiments: 在编辑驾驶场景上优于现有方法，并在新颖自车视角合成上达到最先进结果。
limitations: 可能依赖LiDAR数据，对纯视觉场景适应性未知。
RL后训练的计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过强化学习后训练提升驾驶场景生成模型在分布外场景下的鲁棒性。

papers.title: Paper Reconstruction Evaluation: Evaluating Presentation and Hallucination in AI-written Papers
papers.abstract: This paper introduces the first systematic evaluation framework for quantifying the quality and risks of papers written by modern coding agents. While AI-driven paper writing has become a growing concern, rigorous evaluation of the quality and potential risks of AI-written papers remains limited, and a unified understanding of their reliability is still lacking. We introduce Paper Reconstruction Evaluation (PaperRecon), an evaluation framework in which an overview (overview.md) is created from an existing paper, after which an agent generates a full paper based on the overview and minimal additional resources, and the result is subsequently compared against the original paper. PaperRecon disentangles the evaluation of the AI-written papers into two orthogonal dimensions, Presentation and Hallucination, where Presentation is evaluated using a rubric and Hallucination is assessed via agentic evaluation grounded in the original paper source. For evaluation, we introduce PaperWrite-Bench, a benchmark of 51 papers from top-tier venues across diverse domains published after 2025. Our experiments reveal a clear trade-off: while both ClaudeCode and Codex improve with model advances, ClaudeCode achieves higher presentation quality at the cost of more than 10 hallucinations per paper on average, whereas Codex produces fewer hallucinations but lower presentation quality. This work takes a first step toward establishing evaluation frameworks for AI-driven paper writing and improving the understanding of its risks within the research community.

analysis.tldr: 提出首个AI撰写论文质量与风险的评估框架PaperRecon，并构建PaperWrite-Bench基准，揭示表现力与幻觉之间的权衡。
analysis.research_motivation: AI驱动的论文写作日益普遍，但缺乏系统评估其质量和风险的方法，对AI生成论文的可靠性缺乏统一理解。
analysis.problem: 如何量化评估AI撰写论文的表现质量与幻觉风险。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 实验发现表现力与幻觉之间存在明显权衡：ClaudeCode表现质量更高但每篇平均产生超过10个幻觉，Codex幻觉较少但表现质量较低。
analysis.method: 提出PaperRecon评估框架，从现有论文创建概述，让智能体基于概述和最少额外资源生成完整论文，再与原论文比较；将评估解耦为表现力（基于评分标准）和幻觉（基于原论文的智能体评估）两个正交维度。
contributions: 首次提出系统评估AI撰写论文质量与风险的框架PaperRecon。
构建包含51篇2025年后顶级会议论文的基准PaperWrite-Bench。
揭示当前AI写作智能体在表现力与幻觉之间的权衡关系。
analysis.experiments: 在PaperWrite-Bench上评估ClaudeCode和Codex两种智能体，发现表现力与幻觉的权衡。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 基准规模有限（51篇论文），可能无法覆盖所有领域。
评估框架依赖原论文作为ground truth，可能无法完全反映论文的实际价值。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出首个AI撰写论文质量与风险的评估框架PaperRecon，并构建PaperWrite-Bench基准，揭示表现力与幻觉之间的权衡。

papers.title: Lightweight Prompt-Guided CLIP Adaptation for Monocular Depth Estimation
papers.abstract: Leveraging the rich semantic features of vision-language models (VLMs) like CLIP for monocular depth estimation tasks is a promising direction, yet often requires extensive fine-tuning or lacks geometric precision. We present a parameter-efficient framework, named MoA-DepthCLIP, that adapts pretrained CLIP representations for monocular depth estimation with minimal supervision. Our method integrates a lightweight Mixture-of-Adapters (MoA) module into the pretrained Vision Transformer (ViT-B/32) backbone combined with selective fine-tuning of the final layers. This design enables spatially-aware adaptation, guided by a global semantic context vector and a hybrid prediction architecture that synergizes depth bin classification with direct regression. To enhance structural accuracy, we employ a composite loss function that enforces geometric constraints. On the NYU Depth V2 benchmark, MoA-DepthCLIP achieves competitive results, significantly outperforming the DepthCLIP baseline by improving the $δ_1$ accuracy from 0.390 to 0.745 and reducing the RMSE from 1.176 to 0.520. These results are achieved while requiring substantially few trainable parameters, demonstrating that lightweight, prompt-guided MoA is a highly effective strategy for transferring VLM knowledge to fine-grained monocular depth estimation tasks.

analysis.tldr: 提出轻量级MoA-DepthCLIP框架，通过混合适配器模块高效适配CLIP进行单目深度估计，在NYU Depth V2上显著提升精度。
analysis.research_motivation: 利用视觉语言模型（如CLIP）的丰富语义特征进行单目深度估计有前景，但现有方法通常需要大量微调或缺乏几何精度。
analysis.problem: 如何以参数高效的方式将预训练CLIP表示适配到单目深度估计任务，同时保持几何精度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出MoA-DepthCLIP，包含轻量级混合适配器模块（MoA）集成到ViT-B/32骨干中，结合选择性微调最后层；使用全局语义上下文向量引导空间感知适配，采用深度箱分类与直接回归的混合预测架构，并设计复合损失函数增强结构精度。
contributions: 提出参数高效的MoA-DepthCLIP框架，通过轻量级混合适配器适配CLIP进行单目深度估计。
在NYU Depth V2上显著超越DepthCLIP基线，δ1精度从0.390提升至0.745，RMSE从1.176降至0.520，且可训练参数极少。
analysis.experiments: 在NYU Depth V2基准上评估，与DepthCLIP基线对比，报告了δ1精度和RMSE指标。
limitations: 仅在单一数据集NYU Depth V2上验证，泛化性未知。
可能对复杂场景或极端深度范围表现有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出轻量级MoA-DepthCLIP框架，通过混合适配器模块高效适配CLIP进行单目深度估计，在NYU Depth V2上显著提升精度。

papers.title: ProTPS: Prototype-Guided Text Prompt Selection for Continual Learning
papers.abstract: For continual learning, text-prompt-based methods leverage text encoders and learnable prompts to encode semantic features for sequentially arrived classes over time. A common challenge encountered by existing works is how to learn unique text prompts, which implicitly carry semantic information of new classes, so that the semantic features of newly arrived classes do not overlap with those of trained classes, thereby mitigating the catastrophic forgetting problem. To address this challenge, we propose a novel approach Prototype-guided Text Prompt Selection (ProTPS)'' to intentionally increase the training flexibility thus encouraging the learning of unique text prompts. Specifically, our ProTPS learns class-specific vision prototypes and text prompts. Vision prototypes guide the selection and learning of text prompts for each class. We first evaluate our ProTPS in both class incremental (CI) setting and cross-datasets continual (CDC) learning setting. Because our ProTPS achieves performance close to the upper bounds, we further collect a real-world dataset with 112 marine species collected over a span of six years, named Marine112, to bring new challenges to the community. Marine112 is authentically suited for the class and domain incremental (CDI) learning setting and is under natural long-tail distribution. The results under three settings show that our ProTPS performs favorably against the recent state-of-the-art methods. The implementation code and Marine112 dataset will be released upon the acceptance of our paper.

analysis.tldr: 提出原型引导的文本提示选择方法，通过视觉原型指导文本提示学习，缓解持续学习中的灾难性遗忘。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于文本提示的持续学习方法难以学习到独特的文本提示，导致新类语义特征与旧类重叠，引发灾难性遗忘。
analysis.problem: 如何学习独特的文本提示，使新类的语义特征不与已训练类重叠，从而缓解灾难性遗忘。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 学习类别特定的视觉原型和文本提示，视觉原型指导每个类别的文本提示选择和更新。
contributions: 提出ProTPS方法，利用视觉原型引导文本提示选择，增强训练灵活性，学习独特文本提示。
收集并发布Marine112数据集，包含112种海洋物种，适用于类域增量学习，具有自然长尾分布。
analysis.experiments: 在类增量、跨数据集持续学习和类域增量三种设置下评估，ProTPS性能优于近期最先进方法，接近上限。
limitations: 可能依赖视觉原型的质量，在复杂场景下原型可能不准确。
Marine112数据集仅针对海洋物种，泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: transfer learning, meta learning, and lifelong learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出原型引导的文本提示选择方法，通过视觉原型指导文本提示学习，缓解持续学习中的灾难性遗忘。

papers.title: Trust and Reliance on AI in Education: AI Literacy and Need for Cognition as Moderators
papers.abstract: As generative AI systems are integrated into educational settings, students often encounter AI-generated output while working through learning tasks, either by requesting help or through integrated tools. Trust in AI can influence how students interpret and use that output, including whether they evaluate it critically or exhibit overreliance. We investigate how students' trust relates to their appropriate reliance on an AI assistant during programming problem-solving tasks, and whether this relationship differs by learner characteristics. With 432 undergraduate participants, students' completed Python output-prediction problems while receiving recommendations and explanations from an AI chatbot, including accurate and intentionally misleading suggestions. We operationalize reliance behaviorally as the extent to which students' responses reflected appropriate use of the AI assistant's suggestions, accepting them when they were correct and rejecting them when they were incorrect. Pre- and post-task surveys assessed trust in the assistant, AI literacy, need for cognition, programming self-efficacy, and programming literacy. Results showed a non-linear relationship in which higher trust was associated with lower appropriate reliance, suggesting weaker discrimination between correct and incorrect recommendations. This relationship was significantly moderated by students' AI literacy and need for cognition. These findings highlight the need for future work on instructional and system supports that encourage more reflective evaluation of AI assistance during problem-solving.

analysis.tldr: 在教育场景中，学生对AI的信任与适当依赖呈非线性关系，AI素养和认知需求显著调节这一关系。
analysis.research_motivation: 生成式AI融入教育后，学生可能过度依赖AI输出而缺乏批判性评估，理解信任与依赖的关系对设计有效教学支持至关重要。
analysis.problem: 探究学生对AI助手的信任如何影响其在编程问题解决中的适当依赖行为，以及AI素养和认知需求等学习者特征如何调节这一关系。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析，但指出信任与适当依赖呈非线性关系，高信任伴随较低适当依赖，表明学生难以区分正确与错误建议。
analysis.method: 通过432名本科生参与编程输出预测任务，AI聊天机器人提供准确和故意误导的建议，行为化测量适当依赖（接受正确建议、拒绝错误建议），并使用前后测问卷评估信任、AI素养、认知需求等变量，采用回归分析检验调节效应。
contributions: 揭示了信任与适当依赖之间的非线性关系，高信任导致更弱的建议辨别能力。
发现AI素养和认知需求显著调节信任与依赖的关系，为个性化干预提供依据。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅描述研究设计和主要发现。
limitations: 可能未考虑其他调节变量如任务难度或学生先验知识。
依赖行为测量可能受任务类型限制，推广性需验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 在教育场景中，学生对AI的信任与适当依赖呈非线性关系，AI素养和认知需求显著调节这一关系。

papers.title: Adversarial Moral Stress Testing of Large Language Models
papers.abstract: Evaluating the ethical robustness of large language models (LLMs) deployed in software systems remains challenging, particularly under sustained adversarial user interaction. Existing safety benchmarks typically rely on single-round evaluations and aggregate metrics, such as toxicity scores and refusal rates, which offer limited visibility into behavioral instability that may arise during realistic multi-turn interactions. As a result, rare but high-impact ethical failures and progressive degradation effects may remain undetected prior to deployment. This paper introduces Adversarial Moral Stress Testing (AMST), a stress-based evaluation framework for assessing ethical robustness under adversarial multi-round interactions. AMST applies structured stress transformations to prompts and evaluates model behavior through distribution-aware robustness metrics that capture variance, tail risk, and temporal behavioral drift across interaction rounds. We evaluate AMST on several state-of-the-art LLMs, including LLaMA-3-8B, GPT-4o, and DeepSeek-v3, using a large set of adversarial scenarios generated under controlled stress conditions. The results demonstrate substantial differences in robustness profiles across models and expose degradation patterns that are not observable under conventional single-round evaluation protocols. In particular, robustness has been shown to depend on distributional stability and tail behavior rather than on average performance alone. Additionally, AMST provides a scalable and model-agnostic stress-testing methodology that enables robustness-aware evaluation and monitoring of LLM-enabled software systems operating in adversarial environments.

analysis.tldr: 提出对抗性道德压力测试（AMST），通过多轮对抗交互评估LLM的伦理鲁棒性，揭示单轮评估无法发现的退化模式。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有安全基准多依赖单轮评估和聚合指标（如毒性分数、拒绝率），无法捕捉多轮交互中出现的罕见但高影响的伦理失败和渐进退化，导致部署前风险未被充分检测。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种压力测试框架，在对抗性多轮交互下评估LLM的伦理鲁棒性，并量化行为不稳定性（方差、尾部风险、时间漂移）。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出：不同模型鲁棒性差异显著，退化模式在单轮评估中不可见；鲁棒性更依赖于分布稳定性和尾部行为而非平均性能。
analysis.method: AMST框架：对提示应用结构化压力变换，通过分布感知的鲁棒性指标（方差、尾部风险、时间漂移）评估模型在多轮对抗交互中的行为。
contributions: 提出AMST，一种基于压力的多轮对抗伦理鲁棒性评估框架
引入分布感知的鲁棒性指标，量化方差、尾部风险和行为漂移
在多个SOTA LLM上实验，揭示单轮评估无法观察的退化模式
analysis.experiments: 在LLaMA-3-8B、GPT-4o、DeepSeek-v3上使用大量对抗场景评估，结果显示模型鲁棒性差异显著，退化模式依赖分布稳定性。
limitations: 未提及跨领域泛化性
压力变换的覆盖范围可能有限
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出对抗性道德压力测试（AMST），通过多轮对抗交互评估LLM的伦理鲁棒性，揭示单轮评估无法发现的退化模式。

papers.title: Approximating Pareto Frontiers in Stochastic Multi-Objective Optimization via Hashing and Randomization
papers.abstract: Stochastic Multi-Objective Optimization (SMOO) is critical for decision-making trading off multiple potentially conflicting objectives in uncertain environments. SMOO aims at identifying the Pareto frontier, which contains all mutually non-dominating decisions. The problem is highly intractable due to the embedded probabilistic inference, such as computing the marginal, posterior probabilities, or expectations. Existing methods, such as scalarization, sample average approximation, and evolutionary algorithms, either offer arbitrarily loose approximations or may incur prohibitive computational costs. We propose XOR-SMOO, a novel algorithm that with probability $1-δ$, obtains $γ$-approximate Pareto frontiers ($γ>1$) for SMOO by querying an SAT oracle poly-log times in $γ$ and $δ$. A $γ$-approximate Pareto frontier is only below the true frontier by a fixed, multiplicative factor $γ$. Thus, XOR-SMOO solves highly intractable SMOO problems (\#P-hard) with only queries to SAT oracles while obtaining tight, constant factor approximation guarantees. Experiments on real-world road network strengthening and supply chain design problems demonstrate that XOR-SMOO outperforms several baselines in identifying Pareto frontiers that have higher objective values, better coverage of the optimal solutions, and the solutions found are more evenly distributed. Overall, XOR-SMOO significantly enhanced the practicality and reliability of SMOO solvers.

analysis.tldr: 提出XOR-SMOO算法，通过哈希和随机化以SAT oracle查询实现随机多目标优化的帕累托前沿近似。
analysis.research_motivation: 随机多目标优化（SMOO）在不确定环境中权衡多个冲突目标至关重要，但现有方法如标量化、样本平均近似和进化算法要么近似松散，要么计算成本高昂。
analysis.problem: 如何高效且保证近似质量地求解SMOO问题，识别帕累托前沿。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出XOR-SMOO算法，利用哈希和随机化技术，通过查询SAT oracle（多对数次数）以高概率获得γ-近似帕累托前沿。
contributions: 提出XOR-SMOO算法，首次以SAT oracle查询实现SMOO的常数因子近似保证。
理论证明算法以概率1-δ获得γ-近似帕累托前沿，且查询次数为poly-log(γ, δ)。
在真实道路网络加固和供应链设计问题上验证了算法优于多个基线。
analysis.experiments: 在真实道路网络加固和供应链设计问题上进行实验，XOR-SMOO在帕累托前沿的目标值、覆盖度和均匀性上优于多个基线。
limitations: 依赖SAT oracle，实际中SAT求解可能成为瓶颈。
近似因子γ>1，可能无法精确恢复真实前沿。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出XOR-SMOO算法，通过哈希和随机化以SAT oracle查询实现随机多目标优化的帕累托前沿近似。

papers.title: Temporal Dependencies in In-Context Learning: The Role of Induction Heads
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) exhibit strong in-context learning capabilities, but how they track and retrieve information from context remains underexplored. Drawing on the free recall paradigm in cognitive science (where participants recall list items in any order), we show that several open-source LLMs consistently display a serial-recall-like pattern, assigning peak probability to tokens that immediately follow a repeated token in the input sequence. Through systematic ablation experiments, we show that induction heads, specialized attention heads that attend to the token following a previous occurrence of the current token, play an important role in this phenomenon. Removing heads with a high induction score substantially reduces the +1 lag bias, whereas ablating random heads does not reproduce the same reduction. We also show that removing heads with high induction scores impairs the performance of models prompted to do serial recall using few-shot learning to a larger extent than removing random heads. Our findings highlight a mechanistically specific connection between induction heads and temporal context processing in transformers, suggesting that these heads are especially important for ordered retrieval and serial-recall-like behavior during in-context learning.

analysis.tldr: LLM在上下文学习中表现出序列回忆模式，归纳头在其中起关键作用。
analysis.research_motivation: 尽管LLM具备强大的上下文学习能力，但其如何从上下文中追踪和检索信息仍未被充分探索，理解这一机制有助于改进模型设计。
analysis.problem: 探究LLM在上下文学习中如何处理时间依赖关系，特别是归纳头在序列回忆模式中的作用。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 多个开源LLM在自由回忆任务中表现出序列回忆模式，即对输入序列中重复标记后紧跟的标记赋予最高概率。
analysis.method: 通过系统消融实验，移除高归纳分数的注意力头，观察对+1滞后偏差和序列回忆性能的影响。
contributions: 发现LLM在上下文学习中表现出类似序列回忆的模式，并量化了+1滞后偏差。
通过消融实验证明归纳头是产生该现象的关键组件，且对有序检索任务至关重要。
analysis.experiments: 在多个开源LLM上进行自由回忆范式实验，并通过消融归纳头与随机头进行对比，验证归纳头的作用。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 仅研究了特定类型的归纳头，可能未涵盖所有相关机制。
实验限于开源LLM，结论可能不适用于闭源模型。
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LLM在上下文学习中表现出序列回忆模式，归纳头在其中起关键作用。

papers.title: TRACE: Training-Free Partial Audio Deepfake Detection via Embedding Trajectory Analysis of Speech Foundation Models
papers.abstract: Partial audio deepfakes, where synthesized segments are spliced into genuine recordings, are particularly deceptive because most of the audio remains authentic. Existing detectors are supervised: they require frame-level annotations, overfit to specific synthesis pipelines, and must be retrained as new generative models emerge. We argue that this supervision is unnecessary. We hypothesize that speech foundation models implicitly encode a forensic signal: genuine speech forms smooth, slowly varying embedding trajectories, while splice boundaries introduce abrupt disruptions in frame-level transitions. Building on this, we propose TRACE (Training-free Representation-based Audio Countermeasure via Embedding dynamics), a training-free framework that detects partial audio deepfakes by analyzing the first-order dynamics of frozen speech foundation model representations without any training, labeled data, or architectural modification. We evaluate TRACE on four benchmarks that span two languages using six speech foundation models. In PartialSpoof, TRACE achieves 8.08% EER, competitive with fine-tuned supervised baselines. In LlamaPartialSpoof, the most challenging benchmark featuring LLM-driven commercial synthesis, TRACE surpasses a supervised baseline outright (24.12% vs. 24.49% EER) without any target-domain data. These results show that temporal dynamics in speech foundation models provide an effective, generalize signal for training-free audio forensics.

analysis.tldr: 提出无需训练的音频深度伪造检测方法TRACE，通过分析语音基础模型的嵌入轨迹一阶动力学检测局部伪造片段。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有局部音频深度伪造检测方法依赖帧级标注、易过拟合特定合成流程，且需随新生成模型出现而重新训练，缺乏泛化性和实用性。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖训练数据、标注或模型微调的情况下，检测真实录音中拼接的合成音频片段。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 语音基础模型隐式编码了法医信号：真实语音的嵌入轨迹平滑且缓慢变化，而拼接边界会导致帧级过渡的突然中断。
analysis.method: TRACE：基于冻结语音基础模型表征的一阶动力学分析，无需训练、标注或架构修改，通过检测嵌入轨迹的突变来定位伪造片段。
contributions: 提出首个无需训练的局部音频深度伪造检测框架TRACE，利用语音基础模型的嵌入轨迹动力学。
在多个基准上达到与有监督基线相当或更优的性能，尤其在LLM驱动的合成场景中超越有监督方法。
analysis.experiments: 在PartialSpoof和LlamaPartialSpoof等四个基准上使用六种语音基础模型进行评估，PartialSpoof上EER为8.08%，LlamaPartialSpoof上EER为24.12% vs 有监督基线24.49%。
limitations: 可能对极短拼接片段或高度逼真的合成音频检测效果有限。
依赖语音基础模型的质量，不同模型表现可能有差异。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出无需训练的音频深度伪造检测方法TRACE，通过分析语音基础模型的嵌入轨迹一阶动力学检测局部伪造片段。

papers.title: ReMoGen: Real-time Human Interaction-to-Reaction Generation via Modular Learning from Diverse Data
papers.abstract: Human behaviors in real-world environments are inherently interactive, with an individual's motion shaped by surrounding agents and the scene. Such capabilities are essential for applications in virtual avatars, interactive animation, and human-robot collaboration. We target real-time human interaction-to-reaction generation, which generates the ego's future motion from dynamic multi-source cues, including others' actions, scene geometry, and optional high-level semantic inputs. This task is fundamentally challenging due to (i) limited and fragmented interaction data distributed across heterogeneous single-person, human-human, and human-scene domains, and (ii) the need to produce low-latency yet high-fidelity motion responses during continuous online interaction. To address these challenges, we propose ReMoGen (Reaction Motion Generation), a modular learning framework for real-time interaction-to-reaction generation. ReMoGen leverages a universal motion prior learned from large-scale single-person motion datasets and adapts it to target interaction domains through independently trained Meta-Interaction modules, enabling robust generalization under data-scarce and heterogeneous supervision. To support responsive online interaction, ReMoGen performs segment-level generation together with a lightweight Frame-wise Segment Refinement module that incorporates newly observed cues at the frame level, improving both responsiveness and temporal coherence without expensive full-sequence inference. Extensive experiments across human-human, human-scene, and mixed-modality interaction settings show that ReMoGen produces high-quality, coherent, and responsive reactions, while generalizing effectively across diverse interaction scenarios.

analysis.tldr: 提出模块化学习框架ReMoGen，利用大规模单人运动先验和元交互模块实现实时人机交互反应生成。
analysis.research_motivation: 真实环境中人类行为具有交互性，现有方法受限于异构且碎片化的交互数据，且难以在低延迟下生成高保真运动反应。
analysis.problem: 从动态多源线索（他人动作、场景几何、高层语义）实时生成自我未来运动。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 交互数据分布在单人、人人、人-场景等异构领域，且数据稀缺；在线交互需要低延迟但高保真的运动响应。
analysis.method: 模块化学习框架，包含通用运动先验（从大规模单人数据学习）和独立训练的元交互模块，以及帧级片段细化模块实现实时响应。
contributions: 提出ReMoGen模块化框架，利用大规模单人运动先验适应交互领域，缓解数据稀缺问题。
设计帧级片段细化模块，实现低延迟在线交互生成，兼顾响应性和时间连贯性。
analysis.experiments: 在人人、人-场景及混合模态交互设置下进行实验，表明ReMoGen生成高质量、连贯且响应迅速的反应，并有效泛化。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量的单人运动先验数据。
元交互模块的独立训练可能忽略跨模态交互的协同效应。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出模块化学习框架ReMoGen，利用大规模单人运动先验和元交互模块实现实时人机交互反应生成。

papers.title: ProOOD: Prototype-Guided Out-of-Distribution 3D Occupancy Prediction
papers.abstract: 3D semantic occupancy prediction is central to autonomous driving, yet current methods are vulnerable to long-tailed class bias and out-of-distribution (OOD) inputs, often overconfidently assigning anomalies to rare classes. We present ProOOD, a lightweight, plug-and-play method that couples prototype-guided refinement with training-free OOD scoring. ProOOD comprises (i) prototype-guided semantic imputation that fills occluded regions with class-consistent features, (ii) prototype-guided tail mining that strengthens rare-class representations to curb OOD absorption, and (iii) EchoOOD, which fuses local logit coherence with local and global prototype matching to produce reliable voxel-level OOD scores. Extensive experiments on five datasets demonstrate that ProOOD achieves state-of-the-art performance on both in-distribution 3D occupancy prediction and OOD detection. On SemanticKITTI, it surpasses baselines by +3.57% mIoU overall and +24.80% tail-class mIoU; on VAA-KITTI, it improves AuPRCr by +19.34 points, with consistent gains across benchmarks. These improvements yield more calibrated occupancy estimates and more reliable OOD detection in safety-critical urban driving. The source code is publicly available at https://github.com/7uHeng/ProOOD.

analysis.tldr: ProOOD 通过原型引导的语义填充、尾部挖掘和无需训练的 OOD 评分，显著提升了 3D 占用预测的分布外检测性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有 3D 语义占用预测方法对长尾类别和分布外输入脆弱，常将异常样本过度自信地预测为稀有类别，威胁自动驾驶安全。
analysis.problem: 如何在不增加训练负担的前提下，提升 3D 占用预测模型对分布外输入的检测能力并缓解长尾类别偏差。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 当前方法对长尾类别存在偏见，易将分布外样本错误地分类为稀有类别（OOD 吸收现象）。
analysis.method: ProOOD 包含三个组件：原型引导语义填充（用类一致特征填补遮挡区域）、原型引导尾部挖掘（增强稀有类别表征）、EchoOOD（融合局部 logit 一致性与局部/全局原型匹配进行 OOD 评分）。
contributions: 提出 ProOOD，一种轻量级即插即用方法，同时提升分布内 3D 占用预测和 OOD 检测性能。
设计原型引导语义填充和尾部挖掘模块，缓解长尾类别偏差。
提出 EchoOOD 评分机制，无需训练即可获得可靠的体素级 OOD 分数。
analysis.experiments: 在五个数据集上进行了实验，包括 SemanticKITTI 和 VAA-KITTI。在 SemanticKITTI 上，总体 mIoU 提升 +3.57%，尾部类别 mIoU 提升 +24.80%；在 VAA-KITTI 上，AuPRCr 提升 +19.34 个百分点。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量的原型初始化，对噪声数据敏感。
未在极端分布偏移场景下验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: ProOOD 通过原型引导的语义填充、尾部挖掘和无需训练的 OOD 评分，显著提升了 3D 占用预测的分布外检测性能。

papers.title: PHASOR: Anatomy- and Phase-Consistent Volumetric Diffusion for CT Virtual Contrast Enhancement
papers.abstract: Contrast-enhanced computed tomography (CECT) is pivotal for highlighting tissue perfusion and vascularity, yet its clinical ubiquity is impeded by the invasive nature of contrast agents and radiation risks. While virtual contrast enhancement (VCE) offers an alternative to synthesizing CECT from non-contrast CT (NCCT), existing methods struggle with anatomical heterogeneity and spatial misalignment, leading to inconsistent enhancement patterns and incorrect details. This paper introduces PHASOR, a volumetric diffusion framework for high-fidelity CT VCE. By treating CT volumes as coherent sequences, we leverage a video diffusion model to enhance structural coherence and volumetric accuracy. To ensure anatomy-phase consistent synthesis, we introduce two complementary modules. First, anatomy-routed mixture-of-experts (AR-MoE) anchors distinct enhancement patterns to anatomical semantics, with organ-specific memory to capture salient details. Second, intensity-phase aware representation alignment (IP-REPA) highlights intricate contrast signals while mitigating the impact of imperfect spatial alignment. Extensive experiments across three datasets demonstrate that PHASOR significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods in both synthesis quality and enhancement accuracy.

analysis.tldr: PHASOR 利用视频扩散模型和两个专用模块（AR-MoE 和 IP-REPA）实现高保真 CT 虚拟对比增强。
analysis.research_motivation: 对比增强 CT 在临床中广泛使用，但存在造影剂侵入性和辐射风险，虚拟对比增强（VCE）作为替代方案，现有方法难以处理解剖异质性和空间错位，导致增强模式不一致和细节错误。
analysis.problem: 从非对比 CT 合成高保真对比增强 CT 时，如何解决解剖异质性和空间错位问题，实现解剖和相位一致的体积合成。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有 VCE 方法在解剖异质性和空间错位下产生不一致的增强模式和错误细节。
analysis.method: 提出 PHASOR 框架，将 CT 体积视为连贯序列，利用视频扩散模型增强结构连贯性和体积精度；引入解剖路由混合专家（AR-MoE）将增强模式锚定到解剖语义，并利用器官特定记忆捕捉细节；引入强度相位感知表示对齐（IP-REPA）突出对比信号并减轻空间错位影响。
contributions: 提出 PHASOR，首个将视频扩散模型用于 CT 虚拟对比增强的框架。
设计 AR-MoE 和 IP-REPA 模块，分别解决解剖异质性和空间错位问题。
在三个数据集上显著优于现有方法，合成质量和增强精度均有提升。
analysis.experiments: 在三个数据集上进行实验，PHASOR 在合成质量和增强精度上显著优于现有方法。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量的非对比 CT 输入。
计算成本可能较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: PHASOR 利用视频扩散模型和两个专用模块（AR-MoE 和 IP-REPA）实现高保真 CT 虚拟对比增强。

papers.title: VibeGuard: A Security Gate Framework for AI-Generated Code
papers.abstract: "Vibe coding," in which developers delegate code generation to AI assistants and accept the output with little manual review, has gained rapid adoption in production settings. On March 31, 2026, Anthropic's Claude Code CLI shipped a 59.8 MB source map file in its npm package, exposing roughly 512,000 lines of proprietary TypeScript. The tool had itself been largely vibe-coded, and the leak traced to a misconfigured packaging rule rather than a logic bug. Existing static-analysis and secret-scanning tools did not cover this failure mode, pointing to a gap between the vulnerabilities AI tends to introduce and the vulnerabilities current tooling is built to find. We present VibeGuard, a pre-publish security gate that targets five such blind spots: artifact hygiene, packaging-configuration drift, source-map exposure, hardcoded secrets, and supply-chain risk. In controlled experiments on eight synthetic projects (seven vulnerable, one clean control), VibeGuard achieved 100% recall, 89.47% precision (F1 = 94.44%), and correct pass/fail gate decisions on all eight projects across three policy levels. We discuss how these results inform a defense-in-depth workflow for teams that rely on AI code generation.

analysis.tldr: VibeGuard 是一个针对 AI 生成代码安全漏洞的预发布安全门框架，在实验中实现了 100% 召回率和 89.47% 精确率。
analysis.research_motivation: 随着开发者广泛采用 AI 辅助编码（vibe coding），AI 生成代码引入了传统工具无法检测的新型安全漏洞（如源映射文件泄露），亟需针对性的安全防护。
analysis.problem: 现有静态分析和秘密扫描工具无法覆盖 AI 生成代码特有的失败模式（如工件卫生、打包配置漂移、源映射暴露等），导致安全盲区。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: Anthropic 的 Claude Code CLI 因 vibe coding 导致 59.8 MB 源映射文件泄露，暴露约 512,000 行专有 TypeScript 代码，传统工具未能检测此故障模式。
analysis.method: VibeGuard 是一个预发布安全门，针对五个盲点（工件卫生、打包配置漂移、源映射暴露、硬编码秘密、供应链风险）进行检测，并支持三种策略级别。
contributions: 识别了 AI 生成代码特有的五类安全盲点
提出了 VibeGuard 预发布安全门框架，在合成项目上达到 100% 召回率和 89.47% 精确率
analysis.experiments: 在八个合成项目（七个有漏洞，一个干净对照）上测试，VibeGuard 在所有三个策略级别上对所有项目做出正确的通过/失败门决策，召回率 100%，精确率 89.47%（F1=94.44%）。
limitations: 仅在合成项目上验证，真实场景效果未知
可能无法覆盖所有 AI 生成代码的漏洞类型
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: VibeGuard 是一个针对 AI 生成代码安全漏洞的预发布安全门框架，在实验中实现了 100% 召回率和 89.47% 精确率。

papers.title: Adversarial Attacks in AI-Driven RAN Slicing: SLA Violations and Recovery
papers.abstract: Next-generation (NextG) cellular networks are designed to support emerging applications with diverse data rate and latency requirements, such as immersive multimedia services and large-scale Internet of Things deployments. A key enabling mechanism is radio access network (RAN) slicing, which dynamically partitions radio resources into virtual resource blocks to efficiently serve heterogeneous traffic classes, including enhanced mobile broadband (eMBB), massive machine-type communications (mMTC), and ultra-reliable low-latency communications (URLLC). In this paper, we study the impact of adversarial attacks on AI-driven RAN slicing decisions, where a budget-constrained adversary selectively jams slice transmissions to bias deep reinforcement learning (DRL)-based resource allocation, and quantify the resulting service level agreement (SLA) violations and post-attack recovery behavior. Our results indicate that budget-constrained adversarial jamming can induce severe and slice-dependent steady-state SLA violations. Moreover, the DRL agent's reward converges toward the clean baseline only after a non-negligible recovery period.

analysis.tldr: 预算受限的对抗性干扰可导致AI驱动的RAN切片中严重且切片依赖的SLA违规，且DRL代理需要较长的恢复期。
analysis.research_motivation: 下一代蜂窝网络通过RAN切片支持多样化应用，但AI驱动的资源分配易受对抗性攻击威胁，现有研究缺乏对攻击后SLA违规和恢复行为的量化分析。
analysis.problem: 研究预算受限的对抗性干扰对基于深度强化学习的RAN切片决策的影响，量化SLA违规和攻击后恢复行为。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 预算受限的对抗性干扰可导致严重且切片依赖的稳态SLA违规；DRL代理的奖励需经过非可忽略的恢复期才能收敛到干净基线。
analysis.method: 构建预算受限的对抗性干扰模型，选择性干扰切片传输以偏置DRL资源分配，并通过实验量化SLA违规和恢复动态。
contributions: 首次量化了预算受限对抗性干扰对AI驱动RAN切片中SLA违规的影响
揭示了DRL代理在攻击后需要显著恢复期的现象
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅提及结果指示了SLA违规和恢复行为。
limitations: 可能仅考虑特定类型的对抗性攻击（选择性干扰）
恢复行为分析可能依赖于特定DRL算法和网络配置
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 预算受限的对抗性干扰可导致AI驱动的RAN切片中严重且切片依赖的SLA违规，且DRL代理需要较长的恢复期。

papers.title: A global dataset of continuous urban dashcam driving
papers.abstract: We introduce CROWD (City Road Observations With Dashcams), a manually curated dataset of ordinary, minute scale, temporally contiguous, unedited, front facing urban dashcam segments screened and segmented from publicly available YouTube videos. CROWD is designed to support cross-domain robustness and interaction analysis by prioritising routine driving and explicitly excluding crashes, crash aftermath, and other edited or incident-focused content. The release contains 51,753 segment records spanning 20,275.56 hours (42,032 videos), covering 7,103 named inhabited places in 238 countries and territories across all six inhabited continents (Africa, Asia, Europe, North America, South America and Oceania), with segment level manual labels for time of day (day or night) and vehicle type. To lower the barrier for benchmarking, we provide per-segment CSV files of machine-generated detections for all 80 MS-COCO classes produced with YOLOv11x, together with segment-local multi-object tracks (BoT-SORT); e.g. person, bicycle, motorcycle, car, bus, truck, traffic light, stop sign, etc. CROWD is distributed as video identifiers with segment boundaries and derived annotations, enabling reproducible research without redistributing the underlying videos.

analysis.tldr: CROWD是一个大规模、全球覆盖的连续城市行车记录仪视频数据集，专注于日常驾驶场景，支持跨域鲁棒性和交互分析。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有驾驶视频数据集多聚焦于事故或编辑内容，缺乏大规模、连续、日常驾驶场景的数据，限制了跨域鲁棒性和交互分析的研究。
analysis.problem: 构建一个大规模、全球覆盖、连续且无编辑的城市行车记录仪视频数据集，以支持日常驾驶场景下的跨域鲁棒性和交互分析。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 从YouTube公开视频中人工筛选和分割出连续、未编辑的前向行车记录仪片段，并标注时间段和车辆类型，同时提供YOLOv11x的MS-COCO检测结果和BoT-SORT多目标跟踪数据。
contributions: 发布了CROWD数据集，包含51,753个片段，覆盖20,275.56小时，来自238个国家和地区的7,103个地点。
提供了人工标注的时间段和车辆类型标签，以及机器生成的检测和跟踪注释，便于基准测试。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 数据仅来自YouTube，可能存在选择偏差。
标注仅包含时间段和车辆类型，缺乏更细粒度的场景或行为标签。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: CROWD是一个大规模、全球覆盖的连续城市行车记录仪视频数据集，专注于日常驾驶场景，支持跨域鲁棒性和交互分析。

papers.title: ONE-SHOT: Compositional Human-Environment Video Synthesis via Spatial-Decoupled Motion Injection and Hybrid Context Integration
papers.abstract: Recent advances in Video Foundation Models (VFMs) have revolutionized human-centric video synthesis, yet fine-grained and independent editing of subjects and scenes remains a critical challenge. Recent attempts to incorporate richer environment control through rigid 3D geometric compositions often encounter a stark trade-off between precise control and generative flexibility. Furthermore, the heavy 3D pre-processing still limits practical scalability. In this paper, we propose ONE-SHOT, a parameter-efficient framework for compositional human-environment video generation. Our key insight is to factorize the generative process into disentangled signals. Specifically, we introduce a canonical-space injection mechanism that decouples human dynamics from environmental cues via cross-attention. We also propose Dynamic-Grounded-RoPE, a novel positional embedding strategy that establishes spatial correspondences between disparate spatial domains without any heuristic 3D alignments. To support long-horizon synthesis, we introduce a Hybrid Context Integration mechanism to maintain subject and scene consistency across minute-level generations. Experiments demonstrate that our method significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods, offering superior structural control and creative diversity for video synthesis. Our project has been available on: https://martayang.github.io/ONE-SHOT/.

analysis.tldr: 提出ONE-SHOT框架，通过空间解耦运动注入和混合上下文集成实现组合式人-环境视频生成。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视频基础模型在细粒度、独立编辑主体和场景方面存在挑战，刚性3D几何组合方法在精确控制与生成灵活性之间难以平衡，且3D预处理限制了实际可扩展性。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖繁重3D预处理的前提下，实现主体与场景的独立控制与长时程一致性视频生成。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出ONE-SHOT框架，包括：1）规范空间注入机制，通过交叉注意力解耦人体动态与环境线索；2）Dynamic-Grounded-RoPE位置嵌入策略，无需启发式3D对齐即可建立不同空间域之间的空间对应；3）混合上下文集成机制，维持分钟级生成中主体和场景的一致性。
contributions: 提出参数高效的ONE-SHOT框架，实现组合式人-环境视频生成。
引入规范空间注入和Dynamic-Grounded-RoPE，实现空间解耦的运动注入。
提出混合上下文集成机制，支持长时程视频合成中的一致性维护。
analysis.experiments: 实验表明方法显著优于现有技术，在结构控制和创作多样性上表现更佳。摘要未提供具体实验细节。
limitations: 可能对复杂动态场景的泛化能力有限。
长时程一致性机制在极端长时间生成中可能仍存在漂移。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出ONE-SHOT框架，通过空间解耦运动注入和混合上下文集成实现组合式人-环境视频生成。

papers.title: Automated Framework to Evaluate and Harden LLM System Instructions against Encoding Attacks
papers.abstract: System Instructions in Large Language Models (LLMs) are commonly used to enforce safety policies, define agent behavior, and protect sensitive operational context in agentic AI applications. These instructions may contain sensitive information such as API credentials, internal policies, and privileged workflow definitions, making system instruction leakage a critical security risk highlighted in the OWASP Top 10 for LLM Applications. Without incurring the overhead costs of reasoning models, many LLM applications rely on refusal-based instructions that block direct requests for system instructions, implicitly assuming that prohibited information can only be extracted through explicit queries. We introduce an automated evaluation framework that tests whether system instructions remain confidential when extraction requests are re-framed as encoding or structured output tasks. Across four common models and 46 verified system instructions, we observe high attack success rates (> 0.7) for structured serialization where models refuse direct extraction requests but disclose protected content in the requested serialization formats. We further demonstrate a mitigation strategy based on one-shot instruction reshaping using a Chain-of-Thought reasoning model, indicating that even subtle changes in wording and structure of system instructions can significantly reduce attack success rate without requiring model retraining.

analysis.tldr: 提出自动化框架评估和加固LLM系统指令对抗编码攻击，发现结构化序列化攻击成功率>0.7，并通过单次指令重塑降低风险。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM系统指令常包含敏感信息，但现有安全措施主要防御直接查询，忽略了编码或结构化输出形式的间接提取攻击，存在重大安全隐患。
analysis.problem: 系统指令在编码攻击下的保密性不足，缺乏自动化评估和加固方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 模型拒绝直接提取请求，但将请求重构为结构化序列化格式时，攻击成功率超过0.7，表明安全指令存在语义漏洞。
analysis.method: 自动化评估框架：将提取请求重构为编码或结构化输出任务；加固策略：基于思维链推理模型的单次指令重塑。
contributions: 提出首个自动化评估框架，系统测试LLM系统指令在编码攻击下的保密性。
发现结构化序列化攻击的高成功率，并验证单次指令重塑可显著降低攻击成功率。
analysis.experiments: 在4种常见模型和46个系统指令上评估，攻击成功率>0.7；加固策略有效降低成功率。
limitations: 仅测试了有限模型和指令集，泛化性待验证。
加固策略依赖推理模型，可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出自动化框架评估和加固LLM系统指令对抗编码攻击，发现结构化序列化攻击成功率>0.7，并通过单次指令重塑降低风险。

papers.title: Foundation Model-guided Iteratively Prompting and Pseudo-Labeling for Partially Labeled Medical Image Segmentation
papers.abstract: Automated medical image segmentation has achieved remarkable progress with fully labeled data. However, site-specific clinical priorities and the high cost of manual annotation often yield scans with only a subset of organs labeled, leading to the partially labeled problem that degrades performance. To address this issue, we propose IPnP, an Iteratively Prompting and Pseudo-labeling framework, for partially labeled medical image segmentation. IPnP iteratively generates and refines pseudo-labels for unlabeled organs through collaboration between a trainable segmentation network (specialist) and a frozen foundation model (generalist), progressively recovering full-organ supervision. On the public dataset AMOS with the simulated partial-label setting, IPnP consistently improves segmentation performance over prior methods and approaches the performance of the fully labeled reference. We further evaluate on a private, partially labeled dataset of 210 head-and-neck cancer patients and demonstrate our effectiveness in real-world clinical settings.

analysis.tldr: 提出IPnP框架，利用基础模型迭代生成伪标签解决部分标注医学图像分割问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 医学图像分割依赖全标注数据，但临床中常因标注成本高或优先级不同导致只有部分器官被标注，这种部分标注问题会降低分割性能。
analysis.problem: 解决部分标注医学图像分割中，因缺少部分器官标注导致模型性能下降的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出IPnP框架，通过可训练的分割网络（专家）与冻结的基础模型（通才）协作，迭代生成并细化未标注器官的伪标签，逐步恢复全器官监督。
contributions: 提出IPnP框架，有效利用基础模型处理部分标注医学图像分割问题。
在公开数据集AMOS和私有头颈癌数据集上验证了方法的有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在公开数据集AMOS（模拟部分标注设置）上，IPnP持续优于先前方法，并接近全标注参考性能；在包含210例头颈癌患者的私有部分标注数据集上验证了真实临床有效性。
limitations: 依赖基础模型的质量和泛化能力。
迭代过程可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出IPnP框架，利用基础模型迭代生成伪标签解决部分标注医学图像分割问题。

papers.title: Aligning Recommendations with User Popularity Preferences
papers.abstract: Popularity bias is a pervasive problem in recommender systems, where recommendations disproportionately favor popular items. This not only results in "rich-get-richer" dynamics and a homogenization of visible content, but can also lead to misalignment of recommendations with individual users' preferences for popular or niche content. This work studies popularity bias through the lens of user-recommender alignment. To this end, we introduce Popularity Quantile Calibration, a measurement framework that quantifies misalignment between a user's historical popularity preference and the popularity of their recommendations. Building on this notion of popularity alignment, we propose SPREE, an inference-time mitigation method for sequential recommenders based on activation steering. SPREE identifies a popularity direction in representation space and adaptively steers model activations based on an estimate of each user's personal popularity bias, allowing both the direction and magnitude of steering to vary across users. Unlike global debiasing approaches, SPREE explicitly targets alignment rather than uniformly reducing popularity. Experiments across multiple datasets show that SPREE consistently improves user-level popularity alignment while preserving recommendation quality.

analysis.tldr: 提出流行度分位数校准框架和SPREE推理时干预方法，通过激活引导提升推荐系统与用户流行度偏好的对齐。
analysis.research_motivation: 推荐系统中的流行度偏差导致内容同质化和‘富者愈富’动态，且忽视用户对流行或小众内容的个性化偏好，需要更精细的对齐方法。
analysis.problem: 现有去偏方法全局降低流行度，无法针对每个用户的流行度偏好进行个性化对齐。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 流行度偏差普遍存在，导致推荐与用户历史偏好不一致。
analysis.method: 提出流行度分位数校准框架量化对齐程度，并设计SPREE方法，通过识别表示空间中的流行度方向并基于用户个人流行度偏差自适应引导模型激活。
contributions: 提出流行度分位数校准框架，用于量化用户历史流行度偏好与推荐流行度之间的对齐程度。
提出SPREE，一种基于激活引导的推理时干预方法，可自适应地调整每个用户的推荐流行度以提升对齐。
analysis.experiments: 在多个数据集上实验，SPREE一致提升用户级流行度对齐，同时保持推荐质量。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量的用户历史数据来估计个人流行度偏差。
激活引导的泛化性可能受限于模型架构。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出流行度分位数校准框架和SPREE推理时干预方法，通过激活引导提升推荐系统与用户流行度偏好的对齐。

papers.title: Sub-metre Lunar DEM Generation and Validation from Chandrayaan-2 OHRC Multi-View Imagery Using an Open-Source Pipeline
papers.abstract: High-resolution digital elevation models (DEMs) of the lunar surface are essential for surface mobility planning, landing site characterization, and planetary science. The Orbiter High Resolution Camera (OHRC) on board Chandrayaan-2 has the best ground sampling capabilities of any lunar orbital imaging currently in use by acquiring panchromatic imagery at a resolution of roughly 20-30 cm per pixel. This work presents, for the first time, the generation of sub-metre DEMs from OHRC multi-view imagery using an exclusively open-source pipeline. Candidate stereo pairs are identified from non-paired OHRC archives through geometric analysis of image metadata, employing baseline-to-height (B/H) ratio computation and convergence angle estimation. Dense stereo correspondence and ray triangulation are then applied to generate point clouds, which are gridded into DEMs at effective spatial resolutions between approximately 24 and 54 cm across five geographically distributed lunar sites. Absolute elevation consistency is established through Iterative Closest Point (ICP) alignment against Lunar Reconnaissance Orbiter Narrow Angle Camera (NAC) Digital Terrain Models, followed by constant-bias offset correction. Validation against NAC reference terrain yields a vertical RMSE of 5.85 m (at native OHRC resolution), and a horizontal accuracy of within a pixel (approximately 30 cm) assessed by planimetric feature matching.

analysis.tldr: 利用开源流程从月船二号多视角影像生成亚米级月球DEM并验证。
analysis.research_motivation: 高分辨率月球DEM对表面移动规划、着陆点选择和行星科学至关重要，现有方法多依赖商业软件或特定传感器，缺乏开源且高精度的解决方案。
analysis.problem: 如何利用月船二号OHRC多视角影像，通过开源流程生成亚米级月球DEM并验证其精度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 通过几何分析识别候选立体像对，应用密集立体匹配和射线三角测量生成点云，再网格化为DEM，最后通过ICP对齐和常数偏差校正实现绝对高程一致性。
contributions: 首次使用完全开源流程从OHRC多视角影像生成亚米级DEM。
在五个月球站点生成有效分辨率约24-54厘米的DEM，并通过与NAC参考地形对比验证，垂直RMSE为5.85米，水平精度约30厘米。
analysis.experiments: 在五个地理分布月球站点生成DEM，与LRO NAC DTM对比验证，垂直RMSE 5.85米，水平精度约30厘米。
limitations: 仅基于OHRC影像，可能不适用于其他传感器。
验证仅针对五个站点，泛化性需进一步评估。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用开源流程从月船二号多视角影像生成亚米级月球DEM并验证。

papers.title: Diff3R: Feed-forward 3D Gaussian Splatting with Uncertainty-aware Differentiable Optimization
papers.abstract: Recent advances in 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) present two main directions: feed-forward models offer fast inference in sparse-view settings, while per-scene optimization yields high-quality renderings but is computationally expensive. To combine the benefits of both, we introduce Diff3R, a novel framework that explicitly bridges feed-forward prediction and test-time optimization. By incorporating a differentiable 3DGS optimization layer directly into the training loop, our network learns to predict an optimal initialization for test-time optimization rather than a conventional zero-shot result. To overcome the computational cost of backpropagating through the optimization steps, we propose computing gradients via the Implicit Function Theorem and a scalable, matrix-free PCG solver tailored for 3DGS optimization. Additionally, we incorporate a data-driven uncertainty model into the optimization process by adaptively controlling how much the parameters are allowed to change during optimization. This approach effectively mitigates overfitting in under-constrained regions and increases robustness against input outliers. Since our proposed optimization layer is model-agnostic, we show that it can be seamlessly integrated into existing feed-forward 3DGS architectures for both pose-given and pose-free methods, providing improvements for test-time optimization.

analysis.tldr: Diff3R 通过可微优化层桥接前馈预测与测试时优化，提升 3DGS 在新视角合成中的质量与效率。
analysis.research_motivation: 前馈 3DGS 模型推理快但质量有限，逐场景优化效果好但计算成本高，如何结合两者优势是当前瓶颈。
analysis.problem: 如何让前馈网络预测出更适合测试时优化的初始参数，同时避免反向传播优化步骤的高计算开销。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 在训练循环中嵌入可微 3DGS 优化层，利用隐函数定理和矩阵自由 PCG 求解器计算梯度，并引入数据驱动的不确定性模型自适应控制参数变化幅度。
contributions: 提出 Diff3R 框架，将可微优化层集成到前馈 3DGS 训练中，实现端到端学习优化初始化。
设计基于隐函数定理和 PCG 的高效梯度计算方法，避免显式反向传播优化步骤。
引入不确定性感知的优化过程，缓解欠约束区域过拟合并提升对输入离群点的鲁棒性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖特定前馈架构，泛化性需进一步验证。
PCG 求解器在大规模场景下的计算效率可能成为瓶颈。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Diff3R 通过可微优化层桥接前馈预测与测试时优化，提升 3DGS 在新视角合成中的质量与效率。

papers.title: Revision or Re-Solving? Decomposing Second-Pass Gains in Multi-LLM Pipelines
papers.abstract: Multi-LLM revision pipelines, in which a second model reviews and improves a draft produced by a first, are widely assumed to derive their gains from genuine error correction. We question this assumption with a controlled decomposition experiment that uses four matched conditions to separate second-pass gains into three additive components: re-solving, scaffold, and content. We evaluate this design across two model pairs on three benchmarks spanning knowledge-intensive MCQ and competitive programming. Our results show that the gains of multi-LLM revision are not monolithic, but depend on task structure, draft quality, and the type of draft information. On MCQ tasks, where the answer space is constrained and drafts provide little structural guidance, most gains are consistent with stronger-model re-solving, and directly routing queries to the stronger model can be more effective than revising a weak draft. On code generation tasks, however, two-stage prompting remains useful because even semantically null drafts can provide substantial structural scaffolding, while weak draft content can be harmful. Finally, role-reversed experiments show that strong drafts clearly benefit weak reviewers. Ultimately, our findings demonstrate that the utility of multi-LLM revision is dynamically bottlenecked by task structure and draft quality, necessitating more targeted pipeline designs rather than blanket revision strategies.

analysis.tldr: 多LLM修订管道的收益并非来自真正的纠错，而是由重新求解、脚手架和内容三个成分组成，其效用取决于任务结构和草稿质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 多LLM修订管道被广泛使用，但其收益来源（是否真正纠错）未被充分理解，可能导致资源浪费或次优设计。
analysis.problem: 分解多LLM修订管道中第二遍处理的收益来源，并分析其在不同任务和草稿质量下的表现。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 在MCQ任务中，收益主要来自更强模型的重新求解，直接路由更有效；在代码生成中，空草稿也能提供结构脚手架，但弱草稿内容有害；强草稿有益于弱评审者。
analysis.method: 设计四种匹配条件（完整修订、仅重新求解、仅脚手架、仅内容）的受控分解实验，将第二遍收益分解为重新求解、脚手架和内容三个加性成分。
contributions: 首次通过受控实验分解多LLM修订管道的收益来源，揭示其非单一性。
发现任务结构（MCQ vs 代码生成）和草稿质量动态影响各成分的贡献，提出针对性管道设计建议。
analysis.experiments: 在两个模型对上，使用三个基准（知识密集型MCQ和竞争性编程）进行评估。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 仅测试了两个模型对和三个基准，泛化性有限。
分解方法可能依赖于特定条件设置，未考虑更复杂的交互效应。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 多LLM修订管道的收益并非来自真正的纠错，而是由重新求解、脚手架和内容三个成分组成，其效用取决于任务结构和草稿质量。

papers.title: Fast and Accurate Probing of In-Training LLMs' Downstream Performances
papers.abstract: The paradigm of scaling Large Language Models (LLMs) in both parameter size and test time has pushed the boundaries of AI capabilities, but at the cost of making the traditional generative evaluation paradigm prohibitively expensive, therefore making the latency of LLM's in-training downstream performance evaluation unbearable. However, simple metrics like training loss (perplexity) are not always correlated with downstream performance, as sometimes their trends diverge from the actual task outcomes. This dilemma calls for a method that is computationally efficient and sufficiently accurate in measuring model capabilities. To address this challenge, we introduce a new in-training evaluation paradigm that uses a lightweight probe for monitoring downstream performance. The probes take the internal representations of LLM checkpoints (during training) as input and directly predict the checkpoint's performance on downstream tasks measured by success probability (i.e., pass@1). We design several probe architectures, validating their effectiveness using the OLMo3-7B's checkpoints across a diverse set of downstream tasks. The probes can accurately predict a checkpoint's performance (with avg. AUROC$>$0.75), have decent generalizability across checkpoints (earlier predicts later), and reduce the computation latency from $\sim$1 hr (using conventional generative evaluation method) to $\sim$3 min. In sum, this work presents a practical and scalable in-training downstream evaluation paradigm, enabling a more agile, informed, and efficient LLM development process.

analysis.tldr: 提出轻量级探针，利用LLM训练中的内部表征快速准确预测下游任务性能，将评估延迟从1小时降至3分钟。
analysis.research_motivation: 大规模LLM的传统生成式评估成本高昂，训练中下游性能评估延迟难以忍受，而简单指标如训练损失与下游性能相关性不足。
analysis.problem: 如何高效且准确地评估训练中LLM的下游任务性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 训练损失（困惑度）与下游性能有时趋势不一致，不能可靠反映模型能力。
analysis.method: 设计轻量级探针，以LLM检查点的内部表征为输入，直接预测下游任务的成功概率（pass@1）。
contributions: 提出一种新的训练中评估范式，使用轻量级探针监测下游性能。
设计多种探针架构，在OLMo3-7B检查点上验证有效性，平均AUROC>0.75，计算延迟从~1小时降至~3分钟。
analysis.experiments: 在OLMo3-7B检查点上进行实验，覆盖多种下游任务，验证探针的准确性和泛化性。
limitations: 探针可能依赖特定模型架构（OLMo3-7B），泛化性需进一步验证。
摘要未提及探针在不同训练阶段或不同规模模型上的表现。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出轻量级探针，利用LLM训练中的内部表征快速准确预测下游任务性能，将评估延迟从1小时降至3分钟。

papers.title: EgoMind: Activating Spatial Cognition through Linguistic Reasoning in MLLMs
papers.abstract: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) are increasingly being applied to spatial cognition tasks, where they are expected to understand and interact with complex environments. Most existing works improve spatial reasoning by introducing 3D priors or geometric supervision, which enhances performance but incurs substantial data preparation and alignment costs. In contrast, purely 2D approaches often struggle with multi-frame spatial reasoning due to their limited ability to capture cross-frame spatial relationships. To address these limitations, we propose EgoMind, a Chain-of-Thought framework that enables geometry-free spatial reasoning through Role-Play Caption, which jointly constructs a coherent linguistic scene graph across frames, and Progressive Spatial Analysis, which progressively reasons toward task-specific questions. With only 5K auto-generated SFT samples and 20K RL samples, EgoMind achieves competitive results on VSI-Bench, SPAR-Bench, SITE-Bench, and SPBench, demonstrating its effectiveness in strengthening the spatial reasoning capabilities of MLLMs and highlighting the potential of linguistic reasoning for spatial cognition. Code and data are released at https://github.com/Hyggge/EgoMind.

analysis.tldr: EgoMind通过角色扮演描述和渐进空间分析，仅用少量数据即可提升MLLM的空间推理能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有MLLM空间推理方法依赖3D先验或几何监督，数据准备和对齐成本高；纯2D方法难以捕捉跨帧空间关系。
analysis.problem: 如何在不引入几何先验的情况下，提升MLLM在多帧空间推理任务中的表现。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出EgoMind框架，包含Role-Play Caption（构建跨帧语言场景图）和Progressive Spatial Analysis（逐步推理回答任务问题），结合Chain-of-Thought。
contributions: 提出无需几何先验的EgoMind框架，通过语言推理增强MLLM空间认知。
仅用5K SFT和20K RL样本即可在多个基准上取得竞争性结果。
analysis.experiments: 在VSI-Bench、SPAR-Bench、SITE-Bench和SPBench上评估，达到竞争性结果。
limitations: 可能对复杂3D场景的泛化能力有限。
依赖自动生成数据，质量可能影响性能。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: EgoMind通过角色扮演描述和渐进空间分析，仅用少量数据即可提升MLLM的空间推理能力。

papers.title: Transfer learning for nonparametric Bayesian networks
papers.abstract: This paper introduces two transfer learning methodologies for estimating nonparametric Bayesian networks under scarce data. We propose two algorithms, a constraint-based structure learning method, called PC-stable-transfer learning (PCS-TL), and a score-based method, called hill climbing transfer learning (HC-TL). We also define particular metrics to tackle the negative transfer problem in each of them, a situation in which transfer learning has a negative impact on the model's performance. Then, for the parameters, we propose a log-linear pooling approach. For the evaluation, we learn kernel density estimation Bayesian networks, a type of nonparametric Bayesian network, and compare their transfer learning performance with the models alone. To do so, we sample data from small, medium and large-sized synthetic networks and datasets from the UCI Machine Learning repository. Then, we add noise and modifications to these datasets to test their ability to avoid negative transfer. To conclude, we perform a Friedman test with a Bergmann-Hommel post-hoc analysis to show statistical proof of the enhanced experimental behavior of our methods. Thus, PCS-TL and HC-TL demonstrate to be reliable algorithms for improving the learning performance of a nonparametric Bayesian network with scarce data, which in real industrial environments implies a reduction in the required time to deploy the network.

analysis.tldr: 提出两种迁移学习方法（PCS-TL和HC-TL）用于非参数贝叶斯网络的结构学习，并定义负迁移度量，在合成和UCI数据集上验证了有效性。
analysis.research_motivation: 在工业环境中，非参数贝叶斯网络常面临数据稀缺问题，导致学习性能下降；现有迁移学习方法可能引入负迁移，缺乏针对非参数贝叶斯网络的专门方法。
analysis.problem: 如何在数据稀缺条件下，通过迁移学习提升非参数贝叶斯网络的结构和参数学习性能，同时避免负迁移。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出两种迁移学习算法：基于约束的PC-stable-transfer learning (PCS-TL)和基于评分的hill climbing transfer learning (HC-TL)，分别用于结构学习；参数学习采用log-linear pooling方法；并定义特定度量来应对负迁移问题。
contributions: 提出两种针对非参数贝叶斯网络的迁移学习结构学习方法（PCS-TL和HC-TL）。
定义负迁移度量，并设计机制避免负迁移。
在合成和UCI数据集上通过统计检验验证了方法的有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在小型、中型和大型合成网络以及UCI数据集上采样数据，添加噪声和修改以测试避免负迁移的能力，并使用Friedman检验和Bergmann-Hommel事后分析进行统计验证。
limitations: 方法可能对源域和目标域的相似性敏感。
实验仅涉及合成和UCI数据集，真实工业场景的验证有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: transfer learning, meta learning, and lifelong learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出两种迁移学习方法（PCS-TL和HC-TL）用于非参数贝叶斯网络的结构学习，并定义负迁移度量，在合成和UCI数据集上验证了有效性。

papers.title: OrgAgent: Organize Your Multi-Agent System like a Company
papers.abstract: While large language model-based multi-agent systems have shown strong potential for complex reasoning, how to effectively organize multiple agents remains an open question. In this paper, we introduce OrgAgent, a company-style hierarchical multi-agent framework that separates collaboration into governance, execution, and compliance layers. OrgAgent decomposes multi-agent reasoning into three layers: a governance layer for planning and resource allocation, an execution layer for task solving and review, and a compliance layer for final answer control. By evaluating the framework across reasoning tasks, LLMs, execution modes, and execution policies, we find that multi-agent systems organized in a company-style hierarchy generally outperform other organizational structures. Besides, hierarchical coordination also reduces token consumption relative to flat collaboration in most settings. For example, for GPT-OSS-120B, the hierarchical setting improves performance over flat multi-agent system by 102.73% while reducing token usage by 74.52% on SQuAD 2.0. Further analysis shows that hierarchy helps most when tasks benefit from stable skill assignment, controlled information flow, and layered verification. Overall, our findings highlight organizational structure as an important factor in multi-agent reasoning, shaping not only effectiveness and cost, but also coordination behavior.

analysis.tldr: 提出公司式层级多智能体框架OrgAgent，在推理任务中优于扁平结构并显著降低token消耗。
analysis.research_motivation: 基于LLM的多智能体系统在复杂推理中潜力巨大，但如何有效组织多个智能体仍是一个开放问题，现有方法缺乏系统化的组织结构设计。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种高效的多智能体组织架构，以提升推理性能并降低通信成本。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 公司式层级结构在多数设置下优于其他组织方式；层级协调相比扁平协作能减少token消耗；层级在任务需要稳定技能分配、受控信息流和分层验证时帮助最大。
analysis.method: 提出OrgAgent，一种公司式层级多智能体框架，包含治理层（规划与资源分配）、执行层（任务求解与审查）和合规层（最终答案控制）。
contributions: 提出公司式层级多智能体框架OrgAgent，将多智能体推理分解为三层。
通过实验证明层级结构在推理性能和token效率上优于扁平结构，并分析了层级优势的条件。
analysis.experiments: 在推理任务、不同LLM、执行模式和策略上评估，例如在SQuAD 2.0上使用GPT-OSS-120B，层级设置相比扁平多智能体系统性能提升102.73%，token使用减少74.52%。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定类型的推理任务，通用性有待验证。
层级结构的层数和角色分配可能需要人工设计，缺乏自适应机制。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出公司式层级多智能体框架OrgAgent，在推理任务中优于扁平结构并显著降低token消耗。

papers.title: Forecasting Motion in the Wild
papers.abstract: Visual intelligence requires anticipating the future behavior of agents, yet vision systems lack a general representation for motion and behavior. We propose dense point trajectories as visual tokens for behavior, a structured mid-level representation that disentangles motion from appearance and generalizes across diverse non-rigid agents, such as animals in-the-wild. Building on this abstraction, we design a diffusion transformer that models unordered sets of trajectories and explicitly reasons about occlusion, enabling coherent forecasts of complex motion patterns. To evaluate at scale, we curate 300 hours of unconstrained animal video with robust shot detection and camera-motion compensation. Experiments show that forecasting trajectory tokens achieves category-agnostic, data-efficient prediction, outperforms state-of-the-art baselines, and generalizes to rare species and morphologies, providing a foundation for predictive visual intelligence in the wild.

analysis.tldr: 提出密集点轨迹作为行为视觉令牌，用扩散Transformer预测非刚体运动，在动物视频上超越基线。
analysis.research_motivation: 视觉系统缺乏通用的运动和行为表示，现有方法难以泛化到非刚体代理（如野生动物），且受外观干扰。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个与外观解耦、跨类别通用的运动表示，并实现长期运动预测。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将密集点轨迹作为行为视觉令牌，设计扩散Transformer对无序轨迹集合建模，并显式处理遮挡，实现运动预测。
contributions: 提出密集点轨迹作为行为的中层表示，解耦运动与外观，泛化到多种非刚体代理。
设计扩散Transformer模型，处理无序轨迹集合和遮挡，实现连贯运动预测。
