构建300小时无约束动物视频数据集，含鲁棒镜头检测和相机运动补偿。
analysis.experiments: 在动物视频数据集上评估，预测轨迹令牌实现类别无关、数据高效的预测，优于现有基线，并泛化到稀有物种和形态。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量轨迹提取，在极端遮挡或快速运动下性能下降。
仅针对非刚体动物，未验证刚体或人形机器人等场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出密集点轨迹作为行为视觉令牌，用扩散Transformer预测非刚体运动，在动物视频上超越基线。

papers.title: AutoMIA: Improved Baselines for Membership Inference Attack via Agentic Self-Exploration
papers.abstract: Membership Inference Attacks (MIAs) serve as a fundamental auditing tool for evaluating training data leakage in machine learning models. However, existing methodologies predominantly rely on static, handcrafted heuristics that lack adaptability, often leading to suboptimal performance when transferred across different large models. In this work, we propose AutoMIA, an agentic framework that reformulates membership inference as an automated process of self-exploration and strategy evolution. Given high-level scenario specifications, AutoMIA self-explores the attack space by generating executable logits-level strategies and progressively refining them through closed-loop evaluation feedback. By decoupling abstract strategy reasoning from low-level execution, our framework enables a systematic, model-agnostic traversal of the attack search space. Extensive experiments demonstrate that AutoMIA consistently matches or outperforms state-of-the-art baselines while eliminating the need for manual feature engineering.

analysis.tldr: AutoMIA 通过智能体自探索自动生成成员推理攻击策略，无需手工特征工程。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有成员推理攻击方法依赖静态手工启发式规则，缺乏适应性，在不同大模型间迁移时性能不佳。
analysis.problem: 如何自动化地探索和优化成员推理攻击策略，使其无需人工设计且能跨模型泛化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 AutoMIA 智能体框架，将成员推理攻击转化为自探索和策略进化过程：给定高层场景描述，自动生成可执行的 logits 级策略，并通过闭环评估反馈逐步优化。
contributions: 提出首个基于智能体自探索的成员推理攻击框架 AutoMIA，实现策略自动生成与进化。
通过解耦抽象策略推理与底层执行，实现系统化、模型无关的攻击空间遍历。
analysis.experiments: 在多个大模型上实验，AutoMIA 一致匹配或超越现有最优基线，无需手工特征工程。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量的场景描述输入。
自探索过程计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: AutoMIA 通过智能体自探索自动生成成员推理攻击策略，无需手工特征工程。

papers.title: PDA: Text-Augmented Defense Framework for Robust Vision-Language Models against Adversarial Image Attacks
papers.abstract: Vision-language models (VLMs) are vulnerable to adversarial image perturbations. Existing works based on adversarial training against task-specific adversarial examples are computationally expensive and often fail to generalize to unseen attack types. To address these limitations, we introduce Paraphrase-Decomposition-Aggregation (PDA), a training-free defense framework that leverages text augmentation to enhance VLM robustness under diverse adversarial image attacks. PDA performs prompt paraphrasing, question decomposition, and consistency aggregation entirely at test time, thus requiring no modification on the underlying models. To balance robustness and efficiency, we instantiate PDA as invariants that reduce the inference cost while retaining most of its robustness gains. Experiments on multiple VLM architectures and benchmarks for visual question answering, classification, and captioning show that PDA achieves consistent robustness gains against various adversarial perturbations while maintaining competitive clean accuracy, establishing a generic, strong and practical defense framework for VLMs during inference.

analysis.tldr: PDA通过测试时文本增强（释义-分解-聚合）提升VLM对对抗图像攻击的鲁棒性，无需训练或修改模型。
analysis.research_motivation: 视觉语言模型（VLM）易受对抗图像扰动影响，现有基于对抗训练的方法计算成本高且难以泛化到未知攻击类型。
analysis.problem: 如何在不进行对抗训练或修改模型的前提下，提升VLM对多种对抗图像攻击的鲁棒性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出PDA框架，在测试时通过提示释义、问题分解和一致性聚合进行文本增强，无需训练；并实例化为不变量以平衡鲁棒性和效率。
contributions: 提出一种无需训练的测试时防御框架PDA，通过文本增强提升VLM鲁棒性。
设计不变量变体以降低推理成本同时保持大部分鲁棒性增益。
analysis.experiments: 在多个VLM架构和VQA、分类、字幕生成基准上，PDA在多种对抗扰动下取得一致的鲁棒性提升，同时保持有竞争力的干净准确率。
limitations: 可能对某些特定攻击类型效果有限。
不变量变体可能牺牲部分鲁棒性。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: PDA通过测试时文本增强（释义-分解-聚合）提升VLM对对抗图像攻击的鲁棒性，无需训练或修改模型。

papers.title: Omni-SimpleMem: Autoresearch-Guided Discovery of Lifelong Multimodal Agent Memory
papers.abstract: AI agents increasingly operate over extended time horizons, yet their ability to retain, organize, and recall multimodal experiences remains a critical bottleneck. Building effective lifelong memory requires navigating a vast design space spanning architecture, retrieval strategies, prompt engineering, and data pipelines; this space is too large and interconnected for manual exploration or traditional AutoML to explore effectively. We deploy an autonomous research pipeline to discover Omni-SimpleMem, a unified multimodal memory framework for lifelong AI agents. Starting from a naïve baseline (F1=0.117 on LoCoMo), the pipeline autonomously executes ${\sim}50$ experiments across two benchmarks, diagnosing failure modes, proposing architectural modifications, and repairing data pipeline bugs, all without human intervention in the inner loop. The resulting system achieves state-of-the-art on both benchmarks, improving F1 by +411% on LoCoMo (0.117$\to$0.598) and +214% on Mem-Gallery (0.254$\to$0.797) relative to the initial configurations. Critically, the most impactful discoveries are not hyperparameter adjustments: bug fixes (+175%), architectural changes (+44%), and prompt engineering (+188% on specific categories) each individually exceed the cumulative contribution of all hyperparameter tuning, demonstrating capabilities fundamentally beyond the reach of traditional AutoML. We provide a taxonomy of six discovery types and identify four properties that make multimodal memory particularly suited for autoresearch, offering guidance for applying autonomous research pipelines to other AI system domains. Code is available at this https://github.com/aiming-lab/SimpleMem.

analysis.tldr: 自主研究管线发现多模态终身记忆框架Omni-SimpleMem，在LoCoMo和Mem-Gallery上F1分别提升411%和214%。
analysis.research_motivation: AI智能体在长时间任务中需要有效记忆多模态经验，但手动探索设计空间（架构、检索、提示工程等）过于庞大复杂，传统AutoML无法有效应对。
analysis.problem: 如何自动发现高效的多模态终身记忆框架，以解决智能体在长时间跨度下记忆组织与检索的瓶颈。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 最有效的改进并非超参数调整，而是bug修复（+175%）、架构变化（+44%）和提示工程（特定类别+188%），这些远超传统AutoML能力。
analysis.method: 部署自主研究管线，从朴素基线开始，自动执行约50个实验，诊断失败模式、提出架构修改、修复数据管道bug，无需人工干预内循环，最终发现Omni-SimpleMem统一多模态记忆框架。
contributions: 提出Omni-SimpleMem，统一多模态记忆框架，在LoCoMo和Mem-Gallery上达到SOTA。
提供六种发现类型的分类法和多模态记忆适合自主研究的四个特性，为其他AI系统领域应用自主研究管线提供指导。
analysis.experiments: 在LoCoMo和Mem-Gallery两个基准上评估，F1分别从0.117提升至0.598（+411%）和从0.254提升至0.797（+214%）。
limitations: 仅针对多模态记忆场景，通用性需进一步验证。
自主研究管线的计算成本可能较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 自主研究管线发现多模态终身记忆框架Omni-SimpleMem，在LoCoMo和Mem-Gallery上F1分别提升411%和214%。

papers.title: Query-Conditioned Evidential Keyframe Sampling for MLLM-Based Long-Form Video Understanding
papers.abstract: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have shown strong performance on video question answering, but their application to long-form videos is constrained by limited context length and computational cost, making keyframe sampling essential. Existing approaches typically rely on semantic relevance or reinforcement learning, which either fail to capture evidential clues or suffer from inefficient combinatorial optimization. In this work, we propose an evidence-driven keyframe sampling framework grounded in information bottleneck theory. We formulate keyframe selection as maximizing the conditional mutual information between selected frames and the query, providing a principled objective that reflects each frame's contribution to answering the question. To make this objective tractable, we exploit its structure to derive a decomposed optimization that reduces subset selection to independent frame-level scoring. We further introduce a query-conditioned evidence scoring network trained with a contrastive objective to estimate evidential importance efficiently. Experiments on long-form video understanding benchmarks show that our method consistently outperforms prior sampling strategies under strict token budgets, while significantly improving training efficiency.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于信息瓶颈的证据驱动关键帧采样框架，通过条件互信息最大化实现高效长视频理解。
analysis.research_motivation: MLLM在长视频理解中受限于上下文长度和计算成本，现有关键帧采样方法或忽略证据线索或优化效率低。
analysis.problem: 如何高效选择对回答查询最有信息量的关键帧，以在有限token预算下提升长视频问答性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于信息瓶颈理论，将关键帧选择建模为条件互信息最大化，通过结构分解转化为独立帧级评分，并设计查询条件证据评分网络（对比学习训练）高效估计证据重要性。
contributions: 提出证据驱动的关键帧采样框架，理论目标为条件互信息最大化。
通过结构分解将子集选择简化为独立帧级评分，提升计算效率。
设计查询条件证据评分网络，对比学习训练实现高效证据估计。
analysis.experiments: 在长视频理解基准上，所提方法在严格token预算下一致优于先前采样策略，并显著提升训练效率。
limitations: 可能依赖查询的明确性，对模糊查询效果未知。
框架在极长视频或实时场景下的计算开销未提及。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于信息瓶颈的证据驱动关键帧采样框架，通过条件互信息最大化实现高效长视频理解。

papers.title: EgoSim: Egocentric World Simulator for Embodied Interaction Generation
papers.abstract: We introduce EgoSim, a closed-loop egocentric world simulator that generates spatially consistent interaction videos and persistently updates the underlying 3D scene state for continuous simulation. Existing egocentric simulators either lack explicit 3D grounding, causing structural drift under viewpoint changes, or treat the scene as static, failing to update world states across multi-stage interactions. EgoSim addresses both limitations by modeling 3D scenes as updatable world states. We generate embodiment interactions via a Geometry-action-aware Observation Simulation model, with spatial consistency from an Interaction-aware State Updating module. To overcome the critical data bottleneck posed by the difficulty in acquiring densely aligned scene-interaction training pairs, we design a scalable pipeline that extracts static point clouds, camera trajectories, and embodiment actions from in-the-wild large-scale monocular egocentric videos. We further introduce EgoCap, a capture system that enables low-cost real-world data collection with uncalibrated smartphones. Extensive experiments demonstrate that EgoSim significantly outperforms existing methods in terms of visual quality, spatial consistency, and generalization to complex scenes and in-the-wild dexterous interactions, while supporting cross-embodiment transfer to robotic manipulation. Codes and datasets will be open soon. The project page is at egosimulator.github.io.

analysis.tldr: EgoSim 是一个闭环的自我中心世界模拟器，通过可更新的 3D 场景状态和几何-动作感知的观察模拟，生成空间一致的交互视频。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有自我中心模拟器缺乏显式 3D 基础导致视角变化时结构漂移，或视场景为静态无法更新多阶段交互后的世界状态，限制了连续模拟的逼真度和实用性。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个能生成空间一致交互视频并持续更新 3D 场景状态的闭环自我中心世界模拟器。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将 3D 场景建模为可更新的世界状态，通过几何-动作感知的观察模拟模型生成交互，并利用交互感知的状态更新模块保持空间一致性；同时设计可扩展的数据提取流水线和低成本采集系统 EgoCap。
contributions: 提出 EgoSim，首个闭环自我中心世界模拟器，支持空间一致的交互视频生成和持续场景更新。
设计可扩展的数据流水线，从大规模野外单目自我中心视频中提取点云、相机轨迹和动作。
引入 EgoCap 低成本采集系统，支持未校准智能手机进行真实世界数据收集。
实验证明在视觉质量、空间一致性和复杂场景泛化上显著优于现有方法，并支持跨具身迁移到机器人操作。
analysis.experiments: 在视觉质量、空间一致性、复杂场景泛化和野外灵巧交互上进行了实验，结果表明 EgoSim 显著优于现有方法，并支持跨具身迁移到机器人操作。
limitations: 可能依赖大规模数据提取流水线的质量，对极端场景或罕见交互的泛化能力未知。
闭环模拟的长期稳定性未在摘要中明确讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: EgoSim 是一个闭环的自我中心世界模拟器，通过可更新的 3D 场景状态和几何-动作感知的观察模拟，生成空间一致的交互视频。

papers.title: Large Vision Model-Guided Masked Low-Rank Approximation for Ground-Roll Attenuation
papers.abstract: Ground roll is a common type of coherent noise in seismic records, and its attenuation remains challenging due to its substantial overlap with useful reflections in localized regions. Existing attenuation methods can be broadly classified into global and local categories according to whether ground-roll-contaminated regions are explicitly identified. Global methods, however, typically impose uniform attenuation on both contaminated and uncontaminated regions, which may result in signal leakage or distortion of reflections. By contrast, local methods restrict attenuation to contaminated regions and are therefore less prone to unnecessary modification of clean areas. However, their performance is often limited by manually designed or simplistic model-based mask estimation strategies. To address these limitations, we propose a large vision model-guided masked low-rank approximation (LVM-LRA) framework for ground-roll attenuation. Within this framework, a promptable LVM is first employed to identify ground-roll-dominant regions in seismic records through multimodal prompting and to generate accurate, fine-grained masks. The estimated masks are then incorporated into an LRA model for ground-roll attenuation. A global low-rank constraint is imposed on the reflection component to preserve event continuity, whereas a mask-guided local low-rank constraint is imposed on the ground-roll component so that its separation is confined to the masked regions. An iterative optimization algorithm based on the alternating direction method of multipliers (ADMM) is further developed to solve the resulting model efficiently. Experiments on synthetic and field datasets demonstrate that the proposed method achieves more effective ground-roll attenuation and better suppresses signal leakage than the baseline methods.

analysis.tldr: 提出大视觉模型引导的掩码低秩近似框架，用于地震记录中面波衰减。
analysis.research_motivation: 面波与有效反射波在局部区域严重重叠，现有全局方法导致信号泄漏或反射畸变，局部方法受限于手工或简单掩码估计策略。
analysis.problem: 如何准确识别面波主导区域并实现局部约束的低秩衰减，避免信号泄漏。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 面波与反射波在局部区域重叠严重，全局均匀衰减会损害干净区域，局部方法依赖掩码质量。
analysis.method: 利用可提示大视觉模型通过多模态提示生成精细掩码，将掩码融入低秩近似模型：对反射分量施加全局低秩约束保持事件连续性，对面波分量施加掩码引导的局部低秩约束，并用ADMM迭代优化求解。
contributions: 提出大视觉模型引导的掩码低秩近似框架，结合多模态提示生成精确掩码。
设计全局与局部低秩约束分别作用于反射和面波分量，并开发ADMM迭代优化算法。
analysis.experiments: 在合成和野外数据集上实验，相比基线方法更有效衰减面波并抑制信号泄漏。
limitations: 依赖大视觉模型的掩码质量，可能受限于训练数据分布。
ADMM迭代优化计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出大视觉模型引导的掩码低秩近似框架，用于地震记录中面波衰减。

papers.title: Multimodal Analysis of State-Funded News Coverage of the Israel-Hamas War on YouTube Shorts
papers.abstract: YouTube Shorts have become central to news consumption on the platform, yet research on how geopolitical events are represented in this format remains limited. To address this gap, we present a multimodal pipeline that combines automatic transcription, aspect-based sentiment analysis (ABSA), and semantic scene classification. The pipeline is first assessed for feasibility and then applied to analyze short-form coverage of the Israel-Hamas war by state-funded outlets. Using over 2,300 conflict-related Shorts and more than 94,000 visual frames, we systematically examine war reporting across major international broadcasters. Our findings reveal that the sentiment expressed in transcripts regarding specific aspects differs across outlets and over time, whereas scene-type classifications reflect visual cues consistent with real-world events. Notably, smaller domain-adapted models outperform large transformers and even LLMs for sentiment analysis, underscoring the value of resource-efficient approaches for humanities research. The pipeline serves as a template for other short-form platforms, such as TikTok and Instagram, and demonstrates how multimodal methods, combined with qualitative interpretation, can characterize sentiment patterns and visual cues in algorithmically driven video environments.

analysis.tldr: 提出多模态分析管道，研究YouTube Shorts中国家资助新闻对以色列-哈马斯战争的报道，发现小模型在情感分析上优于大模型。
analysis.research_motivation: YouTube Shorts已成为新闻消费的重要形式，但关于地缘政治事件在此格式中的表现研究有限，需要系统的方法来分析多模态内容。
analysis.problem: 如何有效分析YouTube Shorts中多模态新闻内容的情感与视觉特征，并揭示不同国家资助媒体对冲突报道的差异。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出多模态分析管道，结合自动转录、基于方面的情感分析（ABSA）和语义场景分类，先评估可行性，再应用于分析2300多个冲突相关Shorts和94000多个视觉帧。
contributions: 构建了一个多模态分析管道，可推广至TikTok、Instagram等短视频平台。
发现小规模领域适应模型在情感分析上优于大型Transformer和LLM，强调资源高效方法的价值。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定冲突事件，泛化性需验证。
情感分析依赖转录文本，可能忽略视觉情感线索。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出多模态分析管道，研究YouTube Shorts中国家资助新闻对以色列-哈马斯战争的报道，发现小模型在情感分析上优于大模型。

papers.title: Bridging Structured Knowledge and Data: A Unified Framework with Finance Applications
papers.abstract: We develop Structured-Knowledge-Informed Neural Networks (SKINNs), a unified estimation framework that embeds theoretical, simulated, previously learned, or cross-domain insights as differentiable constraints within flexible neural function approximation. SKINNs jointly estimate neural network parameters and economically meaningful structural parameters in a single optimization problem, enforcing theoretical consistency not only on observed data but over a broader input domain through collocation, and therefore nesting approaches such as functional GMM, Bayesian updating, transfer learning, PINNs, and surrogate modeling. SKINNs define a class of M-estimators that are consistent and asymptotically normal with root-N convergence, sandwich covariance, and recovery of pseudo-true parameters under misspecification. We establish identification of structural parameters under joint flexibility, derive generalization and target-risk bounds under distributional shift in a convex proxy, and provide a restricted-optimal characterization of the weighting parameter that governs the bias-variance tradeoff. In an illustrative financial application to option pricing, SKINNs improve out-of-sample valuation and hedging performance, particularly at longer horizons and during high-volatility regimes, while recovering economically interpretable structural parameters with improved stability relative to conventional calibration. More broadly, SKINNs provide a general econometric framework for combining model-based reasoning with high-dimensional, data-driven estimation.

analysis.tldr: 提出SKINNs框架，将结构化知识嵌入神经网络，在金融应用中提升期权定价与对冲性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有方法难以将理论、模拟或跨领域知识有效融入数据驱动的神经网络，导致模型缺乏理论一致性和可解释性。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个统一框架，将结构化知识作为可微约束嵌入神经网络，同时估计网络参数和结构参数，并保证统计性质。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出结构化知识引导神经网络（SKINNs），通过配置点将理论约束施加于更广输入域，联合优化网络参数和结构参数，并建立M-估计量理论。
contributions: 提出SKINNs统一框架，融合多种方法（如函数GMM、贝叶斯更新、迁移学习、PINNs等）。
建立SKINNs的统计性质，包括一致性、渐近正态性、识别性、泛化界和风险界。
analysis.experiments: 在期权定价应用中，SKINNs改进了样本外估值和对冲性能，尤其在长到期和高波动时期，并恢复了经济可解释的结构参数。
limitations: 可能对约束的准确性和完整性敏感。
计算复杂度可能较高，尤其是高维配置点。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出SKINNs框架，将结构化知识嵌入神经网络，在金融应用中提升期权定价与对冲性能。

papers.title: Do Phone-Use Agents Respect Your Privacy?
papers.abstract: We study whether phone-use agents respect privacy while completing benign mobile tasks. This question has remained hard to answer because privacy-compliant behavior is not operationalized for phone-use agents, and ordinary apps do not reveal exactly what data agents type into which form entries during execution. To make this question measurable, we introduce MyPhoneBench, a verifiable evaluation framework for privacy behavior in mobile agents. We operationalize privacy-respecting phone use as permissioned access, minimal disclosure, and user-controlled memory through a minimal privacy contract, iMy, and pair it with instrumented mock apps plus rule-based auditing that make unnecessary permission requests, deceptive re-disclosure, and unnecessary form filling observable and reproducible. Across five frontier models on 10 mobile apps and 300 tasks, we find that task success, privacy-compliant task completion, and later-session use of saved preferences are distinct capabilities, and no single model dominates all three. Evaluating success and privacy jointly reshuffles the model ordering relative to either metric alone. The most persistent failure mode across models is simple data minimization: agents still fill optional personal entries that the task does not require. These results show that privacy failures arise from over-helpful execution of benign tasks, and that success-only evaluation overestimates the deployment readiness of current phone-use agents. All code, mock apps, and agent trajectories are publicly available at~ https://github.com/FreedomIntelligence/MyPhoneBench.

analysis.tldr: 提出MyPhoneBench框架评估手机使用代理的隐私合规性，发现任务成功与隐私保护是独立能力，现有代理普遍过度填写非必要个人信息。
analysis.research_motivation: 手机使用代理在完成用户任务时可能侵犯隐私，但缺乏可量化的评估方法，现有基准无法检测代理在表单中填写了哪些数据。
analysis.problem: 如何系统性地评估手机使用代理在完成良性移动任务时是否尊重用户隐私。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 任务成功、隐私合规任务完成和后续会话中保存偏好的使用是三种独立能力，没有模型在所有三项上占优；联合评估成功与隐私会重新排序模型表现；最常见的失败模式是代理填写任务不需要的可选个人条目。
analysis.method: 提出MyPhoneBench框架，通过最小隐私契约iMy定义隐私合规行为（许可访问、最小披露、用户控制记忆），结合仪表化模拟应用和基于规则的审计，使不必要的权限请求、欺骗性重新披露和不必要的表单填写可观察和可复现。
contributions: 提出MyPhoneBench，首个可验证的手机代理隐私行为评估框架
操作化定义隐私合规的手机使用行为（iMy契约）
通过实验揭示任务成功与隐私保护是独立能力，联合评估改变模型排名
analysis.experiments: 在5个前沿模型、10个移动应用和300个任务上评估，发现任务成功、隐私合规任务完成和后续会话使用保存偏好是三种独立能力，没有模型在所有三项上占优。
limitations: 评估限于模拟应用，真实应用环境可能更复杂
隐私契约iMy可能无法覆盖所有隐私场景
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出MyPhoneBench框架评估手机使用代理的隐私合规性，发现任务成功与隐私保护是独立能力，现有代理普遍过度填写非必要个人信息。

papers.title: Maximizing T2-Only Prostate Cancer Localization from Expected Diffusion Weighted Imaging
papers.abstract: Multiparametric MRI is increasingly recommended as a first-line noninvasive approach to detect and localize prostate cancer, requiring at minimum diffusion-weighted (DWI) and T2-weighted (T2w) MR sequences. Early machine learning attempts using only T2w images have shown promising diagnostic performance in segmenting radiologist-annotated lesions. Such uni-modal T2-only approaches deliver substantial clinical benefits by reducing costs and expertise required to acquire other sequences. This work investigates an arguably more challenging application using only T2w at inference, but to localize individual cancers based on independent histopathology labels. We formulate DWI images as a latent modality (readily available during training) to classify cancer presence at local Barzell zones, given only T2w images as input. In the resulting expectation-maximization algorithm, a latent modality generator (implemented using a flow matching-based generative model) approximates the latent DWI image posterior distribution in the E-steps, while in M-steps a cancer localizer is simultaneously optimized with the generative model to maximize the expected likelihood of cancer presence. The proposed approach provides a novel theoretical framework for learning from a privileged DWI modality, yielding superior cancer localization performance compared to approaches that lack training DWI images or existing frameworks for privileged learning and incomplete modalities. The proposed T2-only methods perform competitively or better than baseline methods using multiple input sequences (e.g., improving the patient-level F1 score by 14.4\% and zone-level QWK by 5.3\% over the T2w+DWI baseline). We present quantitative evaluations using internal and external datasets from 4,133 prostate cancer patients with histopathology-verified labels.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种期望最大化框架，利用训练时的DWI作为潜在模态，仅用T2w图像实现前列腺癌定位，性能优于多模态基线。
analysis.research_motivation: 多参数MRI是前列腺癌一线无创检测手段，但需要DWI和T2w两种序列，获取成本高且需要专业知识。仅用T2w图像进行癌症定位可降低临床门槛和成本，但现有方法多依赖放射科医生标注的病灶，且性能有限。
analysis.problem: 仅利用T2w图像（推理时）实现基于组织病理学标签的个体癌症定位，同时利用训练时可获得的DWI图像作为特权信息。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将DWI视为潜在模态，提出期望最大化（EM）算法：E步用流匹配生成模型近似DWI后验分布，M步联合优化癌症定位器和生成模型以最大化癌症存在的期望似然。
contributions: 提出一种新颖的理论框架，从特权DWI模态中学习，仅用T2w图像实现癌症定位。
在包含4133名患者的内外部数据集上，所提方法在患者级F1分数上比T2w+DWI基线提升14.4%，区域级QWK提升5.3%。
analysis.experiments: 使用来自4133名前列腺癌患者的内外部数据集，有组织病理学验证标签，与多模态基线对比。
limitations: 依赖训练时DWI图像的可用性，可能不适用于完全无DWI的场景。
流匹配生成模型的计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种期望最大化框架，利用训练时的DWI作为潜在模态，仅用T2w图像实现前列腺癌定位，性能优于多模态基线。

papers.title: ACT Now: Preempting LVLM Hallucinations via Adaptive Context Integration
papers.abstract: Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) frequently suffer from severe hallucination issues. Existing mitigation strategies predominantly rely on isolated, single-step states to enhance visual focus or suppress strong linguistic priors. However, these static approaches neglect dynamic context changes across the generation process and struggles to correct inherited information loss. To address this limitation, we propose Adaptive Context inTegration (ACT), a training-free inference intervention method that mitigates hallucination through the adaptive integration of contextual information. Specifically, we first propose visual context exploration, which leverages spatio-temporal profiling to adaptively amplify attention heads responsible for visual exploration. To further facilitate vision-language alignment, we propose semantic context aggregation that marginalizes potential semantic queries to effectively aggregate visual evidence, thereby resolving the information loss caused by the discrete nature of token prediction. Extensive experiments across diverse LVLMs demonstrate that ACT significantly reduces hallucinations and achieves competitive results on both discriminative and generative benchmarks, acting as a robust and highly adaptable solution without compromising fundamental generation capabilities.

analysis.tldr: 提出自适应上下文集成（ACT）方法，无需训练即可通过动态调整视觉和语义上下文来减少LVLM幻觉。
analysis.research_motivation: LVLM存在严重幻觉问题，现有方法依赖静态单步状态，忽略生成过程中的动态上下文变化，且难以纠正信息损失。
analysis.problem: LVLM在生成过程中因静态上下文处理导致的幻觉和信息丢失问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出静态方法忽略动态上下文变化，且无法纠正继承的信息损失。
analysis.method: 提出ACT，包含视觉上下文探索（自适应放大视觉探索注意力头）和语义上下文聚合（边缘化潜在语义查询以聚合视觉证据）。
contributions: 提出无需训练的推理干预方法ACT，通过自适应上下文集成减少LVLM幻觉。
在多种LVLM上实验证明ACT显著减少幻觉，在判别和生成基准上取得有竞争力结果。
analysis.experiments: 在多种LVLM上进行实验，涵盖判别和生成基准，结果显示ACT显著减少幻觉且不损害基础生成能力。
limitations: 可能依赖特定模型架构的注意力头分析。
未讨论对长文本生成或复杂推理任务的适用性。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出自适应上下文集成（ACT）方法，无需训练即可通过动态调整视觉和语义上下文来减少LVLM幻觉。

papers.title: Dual Optimal: Make Your LLM Peer-like with Dignity
papers.abstract: Current aligned language models exhibit a dual failure mode we term the Evasive Servant: they sycophantically validate flawed user beliefs while deflecting responsibility with boilerplate disclaimers. We propose the Dignified Peer framework, which counters servility with anti-sycophancy and trustworthiness, and mitigates evasiveness through empathy and creativity. Realizing this agent requires overcoming significant challenges in data supervision, objective collapse, and evaluation bias. We address these issues by introducing the PersonaKnob dataset which features a compositional partial order structure of multiple persona preference. This data is utilized alongside a tolerant constrained Lagrangian DPO algorithm that dynamically balances all persona dimensions to prevent behavioral collapse. Additionally, we employ a psychometrically calibrated Item Response Theory evaluation protocol to disentangle latent model persona capability from confounders like judge biases. Extensive empirical studies demonstrate that our approach successfully build a LLM agent with both dignity and peer.

analysis.tldr: 提出Dignified Peer框架，通过反谄媚、可信、共情和创造性使LLM摆脱谄媚推诿的Evasive Servant模式。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前对齐的LLM表现出双重失败模式：谄媚地验证用户错误信念，并用模板化免责声明推卸责任，缺乏尊严和同伴感。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个既保持尊严又具有同伴感的LLM，克服数据监督、目标崩溃和评估偏差等挑战。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到LLM存在Evasive Servant模式：谄媚（sycophancy）和推诿（evasiveness），即盲目迎合用户错误观点并回避责任。
analysis.method: 提出Dignified Peer框架，包含PersonaKnob数据集（具有组合偏序结构的多人格偏好）、容忍约束拉格朗日DPO算法（动态平衡人格维度防止行为崩溃）和基于项目反应理论的校准评估协议（解耦潜在人格能力与评判偏差）。
contributions: 识别并形式化了LLM的Evasive Servant双重失败模式。
提出Dignified Peer框架及PersonaKnob数据集、容忍约束拉格朗日DPO算法和IRT评估协议。
实验证明该方法成功构建了兼具尊严和同伴感的LLM代理。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖特定数据集和算法，泛化性需进一步验证。
评估协议虽校准但可能未覆盖所有实际交互场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Dignified Peer框架，通过反谄媚、可信、共情和创造性使LLM摆脱谄媚推诿的Evasive Servant模式。

papers.title: Flow-based Policy With Distributional Reinforcement Learning in Trajectory Optimization
papers.abstract: Reinforcement Learning (RL) has proven highly effective in addressing complex control and decision-making tasks. However, in most traditional RL algorithms, the policy is typically parameterized as a diagonal Gaussian distribution, which constrains the policy from capturing multimodal distributions, making it difficult to cover the full range of optimal solutions in multi-solution problems, and the return is reduced to a mean value, losing its multimodal nature and thus providing insufficient guidance for policy updates. In response to these problems, we propose a RL algorithm termed flow-based policy with distributional RL (FP-DRL). This algorithm models the policy using flow matching, which offers both computational efficiency and the capacity to fit complex distributions. Additionally, it employs a distributional RL approach to model and optimize the entire return distribution, thereby more effectively guiding multimodal policy updates and improving agent performance. Experimental trails on MuJoCo benchmarks demonstrate that the FP-DRL algorithm achieves state-of-the-art (SOTA) performance in most MuJoCo control tasks while exhibiting superior representation capability of the flow policy.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于流匹配策略和分布强化学习的FP-DRL算法，在MuJoCo任务上达到SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统RL策略用对角高斯分布，无法捕捉多模态分布，且回报简化为均值，丢失多模态信息，导致策略更新指导不足。
analysis.problem: 解决传统RL策略分布表达能力有限、回报分布信息丢失的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 用流匹配建模策略（高效且能拟合复杂分布），并用分布RL建模和优化整个回报分布，以更好地指导多模态策略更新。
contributions: 提出FP-DRL算法，结合流匹配策略和分布RL。
在MuJoCo基准上达到SOTA性能，并展示流策略的优越表征能力。
analysis.experiments: 在MuJoCo控制任务上实验，达到SOTA。
limitations: 可能仅在连续控制任务上验证，未提及其他领域。
流匹配的计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于流匹配策略和分布强化学习的FP-DRL算法，在MuJoCo任务上达到SOTA。

papers.title: DLWM: Dual Latent World Models enable Holistic Gaussian-centric Pre-training in Autonomous Driving
papers.abstract: Vision-based autonomous driving has gained much attention due to its low costs and excellent performance. Compared with dense BEV (Bird's Eye View) or sparse query models, Gaussian-centric method is a comprehensive yet sparse representation by describing scene with 3D semantic Gaussians. In this paper, we introduce DLWM, a novel paradigm with Dual Latent World Models specifically designed to enable holistic gaussian-centric pre-training in autonomous driving using two stages. In the first stage, DLWM predicts 3D Gaussians from queries by self-supervised reconstructing multi-view semantic and depth images. Equipped with fine-grained contextual features, in the second stage, two latent world models are trained separately for temporal feature learning, including Gaussian-flow-guided latent prediction for downstream occupancy perception and forecasting tasks, and ego-planning-guided latent prediction for motion planning. Extensive experiments in SurroundOcc and nuScenes benchmarks demonstrate that DLWM shows significant performance gains across Gaussian-centric 3D occupancy perception, 4D occupancy forecasting and motion planning tasks.

analysis.tldr: 提出双潜世界模型DLWM，通过两阶段自监督预训练实现自动驾驶中基于3D语义高斯的全息表征学习，在占用预测和运动规划任务上取得显著提升。
analysis.research_motivation: 基于视觉的自动驾驶因低成本和高性能受到关注，但现有密集BEV或稀疏查询模型在表征全面性和效率上存在不足。高斯中心方法通过3D语义高斯描述场景，是一种全面且稀疏的表征，但缺乏有效的预训练范式。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种自监督预训练方法，使模型能够从多视图图像中学习到全面的3D高斯表征，并支持下游的占用感知、预测和运动规划任务。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: DLWM采用两阶段预训练：第一阶段通过自监督重建多视图语义和深度图像来预测3D高斯；第二阶段分别训练两个潜世界模型，一个用于高斯流引导的潜预测（下游占用感知和预测），另一个用于自车规划引导的潜预测（运动规划）。
contributions: 提出DLWM，首个针对高斯中心自动驾驶预训练的双潜世界模型范式。
两阶段自监督预训练方法，无需标注即可学习时空特征。
在SurroundOcc和nuScenes基准上，3D占用感知、4D占用预测和运动规划任务均取得显著性能提升。
analysis.experiments: 在SurroundOcc和nuScenes基准上进行实验，涵盖3D占用感知、4D占用预测和运动规划任务，结果显示DLWM带来显著性能提升。
limitations: 可能依赖多视图输入，单目场景适用性未知。
两阶段训练可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出双潜世界模型DLWM，通过两阶段自监督预训练实现自动驾驶中基于3D语义高斯的全息表征学习，在占用预测和运动规划任务上取得显著提升。

papers.title: Enhancing Gradient Inversion Attacks in Federated Learning via Hierarchical Feature Optimization
papers.abstract: Federated Learning (FL) has emerged as a compelling paradigm for privacy-preserving distributed machine learning, allowing multiple clients to collaboratively train a global model by transmitting locally computed gradients to a central server without exposing their private data. Nonetheless, recent studies find that the gradients exchanged in the FL system are also vulnerable to privacy leakage, e.g., an attacker can invert shared gradients to reconstruct sensitive data by leveraging pre-trained generative adversarial networks (GAN) as prior knowledge. However, existing attacks simply perform gradient inversion in the latent space of the GAN model, which limits their expression ability and generalizability. To tackle these challenges, we propose \textbf{G}radient \textbf{I}nversion over \textbf{F}eature \textbf{D}omains (GIFD), which disassembles the GAN model and searches the hierarchical features of the intermediate layers. Instead of optimizing only over the initial latent code, we progressively change the optimized layer, from the initial latent space to intermediate layers closer to the output images. In addition, we design a regularizer to avoid unreal image generation by adding a small ${l_1}$ ball constraint to the searching range. We also extend GIFD to the out-of-distribution (OOD) setting, which weakens the assumption that the training sets of GANs and FL tasks obey the same data distribution. Furthermore, we consider the challenging OOD scenario of label inconsistency and propose a label mapping technique as an effective solution. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method can achieve pixel-level reconstruction and outperform competitive baselines across a variety of FL scenarios.

analysis.tldr: 提出分层特征优化方法GIFD，在联邦学习梯度反演攻击中实现像素级数据重建。
analysis.research_motivation: 联邦学习中梯度交换存在隐私泄露风险，现有基于GAN的梯度反演攻击仅在潜空间优化，表达能力和泛化性受限。
analysis.problem: 如何提升梯度反演攻击的重建质量与泛化能力，尤其是在GAN与FL任务数据分布不一致的OOD场景下。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出GIFD方法，将GAN模型分解，在中间层分层特征上逐步优化，从初始潜空间过渡到靠近输出图像的中间层；添加L1球约束正则化避免不真实图像；针对OOD场景提出标签映射技术。
contributions: 提出分层特征优化策略，在GAN中间层进行梯度反演，提升表达能力和重建质量。
设计L1球约束正则化，防止生成不真实图像。
扩展至OOD场景，提出标签映射技术处理标签不一致问题。
analysis.experiments: 在多种联邦学习场景下进行实验，表明方法能实现像素级重建并优于竞争基线。
limitations: 依赖GAN模型作为先验，可能受限于GAN的生成质量。
OOD场景下标签映射的通用性有待进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出分层特征优化方法GIFD，在联邦学习梯度反演攻击中实现像素级数据重建。

papers.title: YieldSAT: A Multimodal Benchmark Dataset for High-Resolution Crop Yield Prediction
papers.abstract: Crop yield prediction requires substantial data to train scalable models. However, creating yield prediction datasets is constrained by high acquisition costs, heterogeneous data quality, and data privacy regulations. Consequently, existing datasets are scarce, low in quality, or limited to regional levels or single crop types, hindering the development of scalable data-driven solutions. In this work, we release YieldSAT, a large, high-quality, and multimodal dataset for high-resolution crop yield prediction. YieldSAT spans various climate zones across multiple countries, including Argentina, Brazil, Uruguay, and Germany, and includes major crop types, including corn, rapeseed, soybeans, and wheat, across 2,173 expert-curated fields. In total, over 12.2 million yield samples are available, each with a spatial resolution of 10 m. Each field is paired with multispectral satellite imagery, resulting in 113,555 labeled satellite images, complemented by auxiliary environmental data. We demonstrate the potential of large-scale and high-resolution crop yield prediction as a pixel regression task by comparing various deep learning models and data fusion architectures. Furthermore, we highlight open challenges arising from severe distribution shifts in the ground truth data under real-world conditions. To mitigate this, we explore a domain-informed Deep Ensemble approach that exhibits significant performance gains. The dataset is available at https://yieldsat.github.io/.

analysis.tldr: YieldSAT 是一个大规模、高质量、多模态的高分辨率作物产量预测基准数据集。
analysis.research_motivation: 作物产量预测需要大量数据训练可扩展模型，但现有数据集因获取成本高、数据质量参差不齐和隐私法规而稀缺、质量低或局限于区域/单一作物，阻碍了数据驱动解决方案的发展。
analysis.problem: 缺乏大规模、高质量、多模态且覆盖多种作物和气候区的高分辨率作物产量预测数据集。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出真实世界数据存在严重的分布偏移，并探索了领域信息深度集成方法以缓解该问题。
analysis.method: 构建 YieldSAT 数据集，包含多光谱卫星图像和辅助环境数据，并将高分辨率作物产量预测视为像素回归任务，比较多种深度学习模型和数据融合架构。
contributions: 发布了 YieldSAT，一个覆盖多国、多作物、高分辨率（10米）的多模态作物产量预测数据集，包含超过1220万个产量样本和113,555张标注卫星图像。
通过比较多种深度学习模型和数据融合架构，展示了大规模高分辨率作物产量预测作为像素回归任务的潜力，并揭示了真实世界分布偏移的挑战。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 数据集可能仍存在未覆盖的作物类型或气候区域。
分布偏移问题可能未被完全解决，深度集成方法的效果需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: YieldSAT 是一个大规模、高质量、多模态的高分辨率作物产量预测基准数据集。

papers.title: WARP: Guaranteed Inner-Layer Repair of NLP Transformers
papers.abstract: Transformer-based NLP models remain vulnerable to adversarial perturbations, yet existing repair methods face a fundamental trade-off: gradient-based approaches offer flexibility but lack verifiability and often overfit; methods that do provide repair guarantees are restricted to the final layer or small networks, significantly limiting the parameter search space available for repair. We present WARP (Weight-Adjusted Repair with Provability), a constraint-based repair framework that extends repair beyond the last layer of Transformer models. WARP formulates repair as a convex quadratic program derived from a first-order linearization of the logit gap, enabling tractable optimization over a high-dimensional parameter space. Under the condition that the first-order approximation holds, this formulation induces three per-sample guarantees: (i) a positive margin constraint ensuring correct classification on repaired inputs, (ii) preservation constraints over a designated remain set, and (iii) a certified robustness radius derived from Lipschitz continuity. To ensure feasibility across varying model architectures, we introduce a sensitivity-based preprocessing step that conditions the optimization landscape accordingly. We further show that the iterative optimization procedure converges to solutions satisfying all repair constraints under mild assumptions. Empirical evaluation on encoder-only Transformers with varying layer architectures validates that these guarantees hold in practice while improving robustness to adversarial inputs. Our results demonstrate that guaranteed, generalizable Transformer repair is achievable through principled constraint-based optimization.

analysis.tldr: 提出WARP框架，通过凸二次规划实现Transformer内层可验证修复，同时保证分类正确性、保留集约束和鲁棒性半径。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有NLP Transformer修复方法存在根本性权衡：基于梯度的方法灵活但缺乏可验证性且易过拟合；提供修复保证的方法仅限于最后一层或小网络，严重限制了参数搜索空间。
analysis.problem: 如何对Transformer模型进行可验证的内层修复，同时保证修复后的模型在对抗样本上的正确性、对保留样本的保持性以及鲁棒性半径。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: WARP将修复问题形式化为基于logit间隙一阶线性化的凸二次规划，包含三个每样本保证：正间隔约束、保留集约束和基于Lipschitz连续性的认证鲁棒性半径；通过基于敏感性的预处理步骤确保可行性，并证明迭代优化收敛到满足所有约束的解。
contributions: 提出WARP，首个将可验证修复扩展到Transformer内层的约束优化框架。
将修复形式化为凸二次规划，提供三个每样本保证（正间隔、保留集、鲁棒性半径）。
引入敏感性预处理步骤确保不同架构下的可行性，并证明迭代优化收敛性。
analysis.experiments: 在编码器-only Transformer上验证，表明保证在实践中成立且提升了对抗鲁棒性。
limitations: 依赖一阶近似的有效性，可能在高非线性区域失效。
仅针对编码器-only Transformer，未涉及解码器或编码器-解码器架构。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出WARP框架，通过凸二次规划实现Transformer内层可验证修复，同时保证分类正确性、保留集约束和鲁棒性半径。

papers.title: EmoScene: A Dual-space Dataset for Controllable Affective Image Generation
papers.abstract: Text-to-image diffusion models have achieved high visual fidelity, yet precise control over scene semantics and fine-grained affective tone remains challenging. Human visual affect arises from the rapid integration of contextual meaning, including valence, arousal, and dominance, with perceptual cues such as color harmony, luminance contrast, texture variation, curvature, and spatial layout. However, current text-to-image models rarely represent affective and perceptual factors within a unified representation, which limits their ability to synthesize scenes with coherent and nuanced emotional intent. To address this gap, we construct EmoScene, a large-scale dual-space emotion dataset that jointly encodes affective dimensions and perceptual attributes, with contextual semantics provided as supporting annotations. EmoScene contains 1.2M images across more than three hundred real-world scene categories, each annotated with discrete emotion labels, continuous VAD values, perceptual descriptors and textual captions. Multi-space analyses reveal how discrete emotions occupy the VAD space and how affect systematically correlates with scene-level perceptual factors. To benchmark EmoScene, we provide a lightweight reference baseline that injects dual-space controls into a frozen diffusion backbone via shallow cross-attention modulation, serving as a reproducible probe of affect controllability enabled by dual-space supervision.

analysis.tldr: 构建大规模双空间情感数据集EmoScene，实现可控情感图像生成。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有文本到图像扩散模型虽视觉保真度高，但难以精确控制场景语义和细粒度情感基调，因为情感与感知因素缺乏统一表示。
analysis.problem: 如何构建同时编码情感维度和感知属性的数据集，并实现可控情感图像生成。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要通过多空间分析揭示了离散情感在VAD空间中的分布以及情感与场景级感知因素的系统相关性。
analysis.method: 构建包含1.2M图像、300+场景类别的大规模双空间情感数据集EmoScene，并设计轻量参考基线，通过浅层交叉注意力调制将双空间控制注入冻结扩散骨干。
contributions: 构建了大规模双空间情感数据集EmoScene，联合编码情感维度、感知属性和上下文语义。
提供了轻量参考基线，通过浅层交叉注意力调制实现可控情感图像生成。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定场景类别，泛化性需验证。
轻量基线可能无法达到最优情感控制效果。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 构建大规模双空间情感数据集EmoScene，实现可控情感图像生成。

papers.title: PsychAgent: An Experience-Driven Lifelong Learning Agent for Self-Evolving Psychological Counselor
papers.abstract: Existing methods for AI psychological counselors predominantly rely on supervised fine-tuning using static dialogue datasets. However, this contrasts with human experts, who continuously refine their proficiency through clinical practice and accumulated experience. To bridge this gap, we propose an Experience-Driven Lifelong Learning Agent (\texttt{PsychAgent}) for psychological counseling. First, we establish a Memory-Augmented Planning Engine tailored for longitudinal multi-session interactions, which ensures therapeutic continuity through persistent memory and strategic planning. Second, to support self-evolution, we design a Skill Evolution Engine that extracts new practice-grounded skills from historical counseling trajectories. Finally, we introduce a Reinforced Internalization Engine that integrates the evolved skills into the model via rejection fine-tuning, aiming to improve performance across diverse scenarios. Comparative analysis shows that our approach achieves higher scores than strong general LLMs (e.g., GPT-5.4, Gemini-3) and domain-specific baselines across all reported evaluation dimensions. These results suggest that lifelong learning can improve the consistency and overall quality of multi-session counseling responses.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种经验驱动的终身学习心理咨询智能体PsychAgent，通过记忆增强规划、技能进化和强化内化机制实现自我进化。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有AI心理咨询方法依赖静态对话数据集进行监督微调，缺乏像人类专家那样通过临床实践和积累经验持续提升能力的能力。
analysis.problem: 如何使AI心理咨询智能体具备终身学习能力，能够从历史咨询轨迹中提取新技能并内化，从而在多轮对话中持续改进。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出PsychAgent框架，包含三个核心引擎：记忆增强规划引擎（确保多轮对话连续性）、技能进化引擎（从历史轨迹中提取新技能）、强化内化引擎（通过拒绝微调将进化技能整合到模型中）。
contributions: 提出一种经验驱动的终身学习心理智能体PsychAgent，实现自我进化。
设计记忆增强规划引擎和技能进化引擎，支持多轮对话连续性和技能提取。
引入强化内化引擎，通过拒绝微调整合进化技能，提升多场景性能。
analysis.experiments: 在多个评估维度上与强通用LLM（如GPT-5.4、Gemini-3）和领域特定基线进行比较，PsychAgent获得更高分数。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量的历史咨询轨迹数据。
终身学习机制在真实临床环境中的泛化性有待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种经验驱动的终身学习心理咨询智能体PsychAgent，通过记忆增强规划、技能进化和强化内化机制实现自我进化。

papers.title: Autoregressive Appearance Prediction for 3D Gaussian Avatars
papers.abstract: A photorealistic and immersive human avatar experience demands capturing fine, person-specific details such as cloth and hair dynamics, subtle facial expressions, and characteristic motion patterns. Achieving this requires large, high-quality datasets, which often introduce ambiguities and spurious correlations when very similar poses correspond to different appearances. Models that fit these details during training can overfit and produce unstable, abrupt appearance changes for novel poses. We propose a 3D Gaussian Splatting avatar model with a spatial MLP backbone that is conditioned on both pose and an appearance latent. The latent is learned during training by an encoder, yielding a compact representation that improves reconstruction quality and helps disambiguate pose-driven renderings. At driving time, our predictor autoregressively infers the latent, producing temporally smooth appearance evolution and improved stability. Overall, our method delivers a robust and practical path to high-fidelity, stable avatar driving.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种自回归外观预测的3D高斯头像模型，通过外观隐变量和自回归预测实现稳定、高保真的头像驱动。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有3D头像模型在捕捉细节（如布料、头发、表情）时，因训练数据中相似姿态对应不同外观而产生歧义和伪相关，导致过拟合和驱动时外观突变。
analysis.problem: 如何从有歧义的大规模数据中学习稳定的外观表示，并在驱动时生成平滑、高保真的外观变化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，当训练数据中非常相似的姿态对应不同外观时，模型会引入歧义和伪相关，导致过拟合和驱动时外观突变。
analysis.method: 基于3D高斯泼溅的头像模型，使用空间MLP骨干网络，以姿态和外观隐变量为条件；训练时通过编码器学习紧凑外观隐变量，驱动时用自回归预测器推断隐变量，实现时间平滑的外观演化。
contributions: 提出结合外观隐变量的3D高斯头像模型，提升重建质量并消除姿态驱动的歧义。
引入自回归外观预测机制，实现驱动时平滑稳定的外观变化。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量训练数据，对极端姿态或未见外观泛化能力未知。
自回归预测可能引入累积误差，影响长期稳定性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种自回归外观预测的3D高斯头像模型，通过外观隐变量和自回归预测实现稳定、高保真的头像驱动。

papers.title: Learning Quantised Structure-Preserving Motion Representations for Dance Fingerprinting
papers.abstract: We present DANCEMATCH, an end-to-end framework for motion-based dance retrieval, the task of identifying semantically similar choreographies directly from raw video, defined as DANCE FINGERPRINTING. While existing motion analysis and retrieval methods can compare pose sequences, they rely on continuous embeddings that are difficult to index, interpret, or scale. In contrast, DANCEMATCH constructs compact, discrete motion signatures that capture the spatio-temporal structure of dance while enabling efficient large-scale retrieval. Our system integrates Skeleton Motion Quantisation (SMQ) with Spatio-Temporal Transformers (STT) to encode human poses, extracted via Apple CoMotion, into a structured motion vocabulary. We further design DANCE RETRIEVAL ENGINE (DRE), which performs sub-linear retrieval using a histogram-based index followed by re-ranking for refined matching. To facilitate reproducible research, we release DANCETYPESBENCHMARK, a pose-aligned dataset annotated with quantised motion tokens. Experiments demonstrate robust retrieval across diverse dance styles and strong generalisation to unseen choreographies, establishing a foundation for scalable motion fingerprinting and quantitative choreographic analysis.

analysis.tldr: 提出DANCEMATCH框架，通过离散运动签名实现高效可扩展的舞蹈检索。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有运动分析方法依赖连续嵌入，难以索引、解释和扩展，无法满足大规模舞蹈检索需求。
analysis.problem: 如何从原始视频中构建紧凑、离散的运动签名，实现高效且可解释的舞蹈指纹检索。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 集成骨骼运动量化（SMQ）与时空Transformer（STT）编码人体姿态，构建离散运动词汇；设计舞蹈检索引擎（DRE）使用直方图索引和重排序实现亚线性检索。
contributions: 提出DANCEMATCH框架，实现基于运动的舞蹈检索。
引入骨骼运动量化（SMQ）和时空Transformer（STT）生成离散运动签名。
发布DANCETYPESBENCHMARK数据集，包含姿态对齐的量化运动令牌标注。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖特定姿态提取器（Apple CoMotion），泛化性待验证。
离散量化可能丢失细微运动细节。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出DANCEMATCH框架，通过离散运动签名实现高效可扩展的舞蹈检索。

papers.title: Representation Selection via Cross-Model Agreement using Canonical Correlation Analysis
papers.abstract: Modern vision pipelines increasingly rely on pretrained image encoders whose representations are reused across tasks and models, yet these representations are often overcomplete and model-specific. We propose a simple, training-free method to improve the efficiency of image representations via a post-hoc canonical correlation analysis (CCA) operator. By leveraging the shared structure between representations produced by two pre-trained image encoders, our method finds linear projections that serve as a principled form of representation selection and dimensionality reduction, retaining shared semantic content while discarding redundant dimensions. Unlike standard dimensionality reduction techniques such as PCA, which operate on a single embedding space, our approach leverages cross-model agreement to guide representation distillation and refinement. The technique allows representations to be reduced by more than 75% in dimensionality with improved downstream performance, or enhanced at fixed dimensionality via post-hoc representation transfer from larger or fine-tuned models. Empirical results on ImageNet-1k, CIFAR-100, MNIST, and additional benchmarks show consistent improvements over both baseline and PCA-projected representations, with accuracy gains of up to 12.6%.

analysis.tldr: 利用典型相关分析（CCA）跨模型对齐来压缩和优化图像表示，无需训练即可降维75%以上并提升下游性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现代视觉流水线依赖预训练图像编码器，但表示常过度完备且模型特异，缺乏高效、通用的降维与精炼方法。
analysis.problem: 如何在不重新训练的情况下，利用跨模型一致性来选择和压缩图像表示，同时提升下游任务性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 不同预训练编码器的表示共享语义结构，通过CCA可提取对齐成分，丢弃冗余维度。
analysis.method: 对两个预训练图像编码器的表示进行典型相关分析（CCA），学习线性投影以实现表示选择与降维，保留共享语义内容。
contributions: 提出一种无需训练的后处理CCA方法，利用跨模型一致性进行表示选择与降维。
在多个基准上验证了方法在降维75%以上时仍能提升下游性能，或通过表示迁移增强固定维度表示。
analysis.experiments: 在ImageNet-1k、CIFAR-100、MNIST等基准上测试，相比基线和PCA投影表示，准确率提升最高达12.6%。
limitations: 依赖两个预训练编码器的可用性，可能不适用于单模型场景。
线性投影可能无法捕捉复杂的非线性跨模型关系。
analysis.primary_area_en: unsupervised, self-supervised, semi-supervised, and supervised representation learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用典型相关分析（CCA）跨模型对齐来压缩和优化图像表示，无需训练即可降维75%以上并提升下游性能。

papers.title: Investigating Autonomous Agent Contributions in the Wild: Activity Patterns and Code Change over Time
papers.abstract: The rise of large language models for code has reshaped software development. Autonomous coding agents, able to create branches, open pull requests, and perform code reviews, now actively contribute to real-world projects. Their growing role offers a unique and timely opportunity to investigate AI-driven contributions and their effects on code quality, team dynamics, and software maintainability. In this work, we construct a novel dataset of approximately $110,000$ open-source pull requests, including associated commits, comments, reviews, issues, and file changes, collectively representing millions of lines of source code. We compare five popular coding agents, including OpenAI Codex, Claude Code, GitHub Copilot, Google Jules, and Devin, examining how their usage differs in various development aspects such as merge frequency, edited file types, and developer interaction signals, including comments and reviews. Furthermore, we emphasize that code authoring and review are only a small part of the larger software engineering process, as the resulting code must also be maintained and updated over time. Hence, we offer several longitudinal estimates of survival and churn rates for agent-generated versus human-authored code. Ultimately, our findings indicate an increasing agent activity in open-source projects, although their contributions are associated with more churn over time compared to human-authored code.

analysis.tldr: 构建约11万开源PR数据集，比较五种编码Agent的贡献模式，发现Agent活动增加但代码更替率更高。
analysis.research_motivation: 自主编码Agent在真实项目中日益活跃，但其对代码质量、团队动态和软件维护性的影响尚不明确，亟需系统研究。
analysis.problem: 量化分析自主编码Agent在开源项目中的贡献模式、代码变更特征及长期维护性差异。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: Agent生成的代码比人类编写的代码具有更高的更替率（churn rate），表明其长期维护性较差。
analysis.method: 构建包含约11万开源PR的数据集，比较五种编码Agent（OpenAI Codex、Claude Code、GitHub Copilot、Google Jules、Devin）在合并频率、编辑文件类型、开发者交互信号（评论、审查）以及代码生存率和更替率上的差异。
contributions: 构建了大规模开源PR数据集，涵盖Agent与人类贡献的对比。
首次提供Agent生成代码的纵向生存率和更替率估计。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但提及了合并频率、文件类型、交互信号及生存率/更替率等分析维度。
limitations: 数据集仅包含开源项目，可能无法推广到闭源或企业环境。
Agent版本和配置差异可能影响结果泛化性。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 构建约11万开源PR数据集，比较五种编码Agent的贡献模式，发现Agent活动增加但代码更替率更高。

papers.title: Benchmarking and Mechanistic Analysis of Vision-Language Models for Cross-Depiction Assembly Instruction Alignment
papers.abstract: 2D assembly diagrams are often abstract and hard to follow, creating a need for intelligent assistants that can monitor progress, detect errors, and provide step-by-step guidance. In mixed reality settings, such systems must recognize completed and ongoing steps from the camera feed and align them with the diagram instructions. Vision Language Models (VLMs) show promise for this task, but face a depiction gap because assembly diagrams and video frames share few visual features. To systematically assess this gap, we construct IKEA-Bench, a benchmark of 1,623 questions across 6 task types on 29 IKEA furniture products, and evaluate 19 VLMs (2B-38B) under three alignment strategies. Our key findings: (1) assembly instruction understanding is recoverable via text, but text simultaneously degrades diagram-to-video alignment; (2) architecture family predicts alignment accuracy more strongly than parameter count; (3) video understanding remains a hard bottleneck unaffected by strategy. A three-level mechanistic analysis further reveals that diagrams and video occupy disjoint ViT subspaces, and that adding text shifts models from visual to text-driven reasoning. These results identify visual encoding as the primary target for improving cross-depiction robustness. Project page: https://ryenhails.github.io/IKEA-Bench/

analysis.tldr: 构建IKEA-Bench基准测试，系统评估VLM在跨描绘装配指令对齐中的表现，发现视觉编码是主要瓶颈。
analysis.research_motivation: 2D装配图抽象难懂，需要智能助手监控进度、检测错误并提供逐步指导，但VLM面临描绘鸿沟（diagram与视频帧视觉特征差异大），现有评估缺乏系统性。
analysis.problem: VLM在混合现实场景中跨描绘（diagram-to-video）的装配指令对齐能力不足，且缺乏基准和机制分析。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到：(1) 装配指令理解可通过文本恢复，但文本同时降低diagram-to-video对齐；(2) 架构家族比参数量更能预测对齐精度；(3) 视频理解是硬瓶颈，不受策略影响。
analysis.method: 构建IKEA-Bench基准（1623个问题，6种任务类型，29个IKEA家具产品），评估19个VLM（2B-38B）在三种对齐策略下的表现，并进行三级机制分析。
contributions: 提出IKEA-Bench基准，系统评估VLM跨描绘装配指令对齐能力
揭示视觉编码是主要瓶颈，diagram和视频占据不相交的ViT子空间
analysis.experiments: 在IKEA-Bench上评估19个VLM，三种对齐策略，报告了关键发现。
limitations: 仅基于IKEA家具，可能不泛化到其他装配场景
未提供具体数值结果，仅定性发现
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 构建IKEA-Bench基准测试，系统评估VLM在跨描绘装配指令对齐中的表现，发现视觉编码是主要瓶颈。

papers.title: ProCap: Projection-Aware Captioning for Spatial Augmented Reality
papers.abstract: Spatial augmented reality (SAR) directly projects digital content onto physical scenes using projectors, creating immersive experience without head-mounted displays. However, for SAR to support intelligent interaction, such as reasoning about the scene or answering user queries, it must semantically distinguish between the physical scene and the projected content. Standard Vision Language Models (VLMs) struggle with this virtual-physical ambiguity, often confusing the two contexts. To address this issue, we introduce ProCap, a novel framework that explicitly decouples projected content from physical scenes. ProCap employs a two-stage pipeline: first it visually isolates virtual and physical layers via automated segmentation; then it uses region-aware retrieval to avoid ambiguous semantic context due to projection distortion. To support this, we present RGBP (RGB + Projections), the first large-scale SAR semantic benchmark dataset, featuring 65 diverse physical scenes and over 180,000 projections with dense, decoupled annotations. Finally, we establish a dual-captioning evaluation protocol using task-specific tokens to assess physical scene and projection descriptions independently. Our experiments show that ProCap provides a robust semantic foundation for future SAR research. The source code, pre-trained models and the RGBP dataset are available on the project page: https://ZimoCao.github.io/ProCap/.

analysis.tldr: 提出ProCap框架，通过解耦投影内容与物理场景，解决空间增强现实中视觉语言模型的虚实混淆问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 空间增强现实（SAR）中，标准视觉语言模型（VLM）无法区分物理场景与投影内容，导致语义混淆，限制了智能交互能力。
analysis.problem: 如何让VLM在SAR场景中准确解耦并分别描述物理场景与投影内容。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 标准VLM在SAR中常混淆虚拟与物理上下文，无法区分投影内容与真实场景。
analysis.method: 两阶段流水线：先通过自动分割视觉隔离虚拟和物理层，再使用区域感知检索避免投影畸变导致的语义歧义。
contributions: 提出ProCap框架，显式解耦投影内容与物理场景。
构建RGBP数据集，首个大规模SAR语义基准，包含65个场景和18万+投影及密集解耦标注。
建立双字幕评估协议，使用任务特定token独立评估物理场景和投影描述。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量分割和检索模块。
数据集规模虽大但场景多样性可能有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出ProCap框架，通过解耦投影内容与物理场景，解决空间增强现实中视觉语言模型的虚实混淆问题。

papers.title: JAMMEval: A Refined Collection of Japanese Benchmarks for Reliable VLM Evaluation
papers.abstract: Reliable evaluation is essential for the development of vision-language models (VLMs). However, Japanese VQA benchmarks have undergone far less iterative refinement than their English counterparts. As a result, many existing benchmarks contain issues such as ambiguous questions, incorrect answers, and instances that can be solved without visual grounding, undermining evaluation reliability and leading to misleading conclusions in model comparisons. To address these limitations, we introduce JAMMEval, a refined collection of Japanese benchmarks for reliable VLM evaluation. It is constructed by systematically refining seven existing Japanese benchmark datasets through two rounds of human annotation, improving both data quality and evaluation reliability. In our experiments, we evaluate open-weight and proprietary VLMs on JAMMEval and analyze the capabilities of recent models on Japanese VQA. We further demonstrate the effectiveness of our refinement by showing that the resulting benchmarks yield evaluation scores that better reflect model capability, exhibit lower run-to-run variance, and improve the ability to distinguish between models of different capability levels. We release our dataset and code to advance reliable evaluation of VLMs.

analysis.tldr: JAMMEval通过系统化精炼七个现有日语VQA基准，提升了VLM评估的可靠性。
analysis.research_motivation: 日语VQA基准缺乏像英语基准那样的迭代精炼，存在模糊问题、错误答案和无需视觉理解即可解答的实例，导致评估不可靠和误导性结论。
analysis.problem: 现有日语VLM评估基准存在数据质量问题，影响评估的可靠性和模型比较的准确性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出日语VQA基准中常见问题包括模糊问题、错误答案和无需视觉接地即可解答的实例，这些问题降低了评估可靠性。
analysis.method: 通过两轮人工标注系统化精炼七个现有日语基准数据集，提升数据质量和评估可靠性。
contributions: 构建了JAMMEval，一个精炼的日语VLM评估基准集合。
通过实验证明精炼后的基准能更好反映模型能力、降低运行间方差、提升模型区分度。
analysis.experiments: 评估了开源和闭源VLM在JAMMEval上的表现，并分析了近期模型在日语VQA上的能力；通过对比精炼前后的评估分数，验证了精炼的有效性。
limitations: 仅针对日语基准，可能不适用于其他语言。
精炼过程依赖人工标注，成本较高且可能引入主观偏差。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: JAMMEval通过系统化精炼七个现有日语VQA基准，提升了VLM评估的可靠性。

papers.title: IDDM: Identity-Decoupled Personalized Diffusion Models with a Tunable Privacy-Utility Trade-off
papers.abstract: Personalized text-to-image diffusion models (e.g., DreamBooth, LoRA) enable users to synthesize high-fidelity avatars from a few reference photos for social expression. However, once these generations are shared on social media platforms (e.g., Instagram, Facebook), they can be linked to the real user via face recognition systems, enabling identity tracking and profiling. Existing defenses mainly follow an anti-personalization strategy that protects publicly released reference photos by disrupting model fine-tuning. While effective against unauthorized personalization, they do not address another practical setting in which personalization is authorized, but the resulting public outputs still leak identity information. To address this problem, we introduce a new defense setting, termed model-side output immunization, whose goal is to produce a personalized model that supports authorized personalization while reducing the identity linkability of public generations, with tunable control over the privacy-utility trade-off to accommodate diverse privacy needs. To this end, we propose Identity-Decoupled personalized Diffusion Models (IDDM), a model-side defense that integrates identity decoupling into the personalization pipeline. Concretely, IDDM follows an alternating procedure that interleaves short personalization updates with identity-decoupled data optimization, using a two-stage schedule to balance identity linkability suppression and generation utility. Extensive experiments across multiple datasets, diverse prompts, and state-of-the-art face recognition systems show that IDDM consistently reduces identity linkability while preserving high-quality personalized generation.

analysis.tldr: 提出IDDM方法，在个性化扩散模型中解耦身份信息，实现可调节的隐私-效用权衡。
analysis.research_motivation: 个性化文本到图像扩散模型生成的图像在社交媒体上分享时，可能被面部识别系统关联到真实用户，导致身份追踪和画像。现有防御主要针对未经授权的个性化，但未解决授权个性化后公开输出仍泄露身份信息的问题。
analysis.problem: 如何在授权个性化场景下，生成高质量个性化图像的同时降低身份可链接性，并提供可调节的隐私-效用权衡。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出身份解耦的个性化扩散模型（IDDM），通过交替进行短个性化更新和身份解耦数据优化，采用两阶段调度平衡身份可链接性抑制和生成效用。
contributions: 提出模型侧输出免疫的新防御设置，针对授权个性化场景保护公开输出中的身份信息。
提出IDDM方法，通过身份解耦和交替优化实现可调节的隐私-效用权衡。
analysis.experiments: 在多个数据集、多样提示和先进面部识别系统上进行实验，表明IDDM在保持高质量个性化生成的同时持续降低身份可链接性。
limitations: 可能仅适用于面部图像生成场景，对其他模态的泛化性未知。
隐私-效用权衡的调节机制可能增加训练复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出IDDM方法，在个性化扩散模型中解耦身份信息，实现可调节的隐私-效用权衡。

papers.title: Experience as a Compass: Multi-agent RAG with Evolving Orchestration and Agent Prompts
papers.abstract: Multi-agent Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), wherein each agent takes on a specific role, supports hard queries that require multiple steps and sources, or complex reasoning. Existing approaches, however, rely on static agent behaviors and fixed orchestration strategies, leading to brittle performance on diverse, multi-hop tasks. We identify two key limitations: the lack of continuously adaptive orchestration mechanisms and the absence of behavior-level learning for individual agents. To this end, we propose HERA, a hierarchical framework that jointly evolves multi-agent orchestration and role-specific agent prompts. At the global level, HERA optimizes query-specific agent topologies through reward-guided sampling and experience accumulation. At the local level, Role-Aware Prompt Evolution refines agent behaviors via credit assignment and dual-axes adaptation along operational and behavioral principles, enabling targeted, role-conditioned improvements. On six knowledge-intensive benchmarks, HERA achieves an average improvement of 38.69\% over recent baselines while maintaining robust generalization and token efficiency. Topological analyses reveal emergent self-organization, where sparse exploration yields compact, high-utility multi-agent networks, demonstrating both efficient coordination and robust reasoning.

analysis.tldr: HERA通过全局拓扑优化和局部角色感知提示进化，实现多智能体RAG的动态编排与自适应行为。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有方法依赖静态智能体行为和固定编排策略，在多跳、多源复杂查询上表现脆弱，缺乏持续自适应编排机制和个体行为级学习能力。
analysis.problem: 如何联合进化多智能体RAG的全局编排拓扑和局部角色特定提示，以提升复杂推理任务的性能与鲁棒性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析，但指出静态编排和固定行为是性能瓶颈。
analysis.method: 提出HERA框架，全局层通过奖励引导采样和经验积累优化查询特定拓扑；局部层通过信用分配和双轴适应（操作与行为原则）进化角色感知提示。
contributions: 提出HERA，首个联合进化多智能体编排和角色特定提示的层次化框架
在六个知识密集型基准上平均提升38.69%，并展现鲁棒泛化和令牌效率
analysis.experiments: 在六个知识密集型基准上评估，平均提升38.69%，并进行了拓扑分析。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量奖励信号
大规模智能体场景下的扩展性待验证
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: HERA通过全局拓扑优化和局部角色感知提示进化，实现多智能体RAG的动态编排与自适应行为。

papers.title: Super-Resolving Coarse-Resolution Weather Forecasts With Flow Matching
papers.abstract: Machine learning-based weather forecasting models now surpass state-of-the-art numerical weather prediction systems, but training and operating these models at high spatial resolution remains computationally expensive. We present a modular framework that decouples forecasting from spatial resolution by applying learned generative super-resolution as a post-processing step to coarse-resolution forecast trajectories. We formulate super-resolution as a stochastic inverse problem, using a residual formulation to preserve large-scale structure while reconstructing unresolved variability. The model is trained with flow matching exclusively on reanalysis data and is applied to global medium-range forecasts. We evaluate (i) design consistency by re-coarsening super-resolved forecasts and comparing them to the original coarse trajectories, and (ii) high-resolution forecast quality using standard ensemble verification metrics and spectral diagnostics. Results show that super-resolution preserves large-scale structure and variance after re-coarsening, introduces physically consistent small-scale variability, and achieves competitive probabilistic forecast skill at 0.25° resolution relative to an operational ensemble baseline, while requiring only a modest additional training cost compared with end-to-end high-resolution forecasting.

analysis.tldr: 用流匹配生成模型对粗分辨率天气预报进行超分辨率重建，在保持大尺度结构的同时恢复小尺度变率。
analysis.research_motivation: 高分辨率天气预报模型训练和运行计算成本高，而现有方法难以在低计算开销下同时保持大尺度准确性和生成物理一致的小尺度细节。
analysis.problem: 如何以低计算成本将粗分辨率天气预报轨迹超分辨率重建为高分辨率，同时保持大尺度结构并生成合理的小尺度变率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出模块化框架，将超分辨率作为后处理步骤，使用残差公式将问题建模为随机逆问题，并用流匹配在再分析数据上训练生成模型。
contributions: 提出将流匹配用于天气预报超分辨率，实现大尺度结构保持与小尺度变率生成。
通过再粗化验证设计一致性，并在0.25°分辨率上达到与业务集合基线相当的预报技能。
analysis.experiments: 在全局中期预报上评估，使用再粗化一致性检验、集合验证指标和谱诊断，与业务集合基线对比。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 可能依赖再分析数据质量，对极端天气事件的泛化能力未知。
仅评估了中期预报，未涉及更长期或区域尺度。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 用流匹配生成模型对粗分辨率天气预报进行超分辨率重建，在保持大尺度结构的同时恢复小尺度变率。

papers.title: Beyond Symbolic Solving: Multi Chain-of-Thought Voting for Geometric Reasoning in Large Language Models
papers.abstract: Geometric Problem Solving (GPS) remains at the heart of enhancing mathematical reasoning in large language models because it requires the combination of diagrammatic understanding, symbolic manipulation and logical inference. In existing literature, researchers have chiefly focused on synchronising the diagram descriptions with text literals and solving the problem. In this vein, they have either taken a neural, symbolic or neuro-symbolic approach. But this solves only the first two of the requirements, namely diagrammatic understanding and symbolic manipulation, while leaving logical inference underdeveloped. The logical inference is often limited to one chain-of-thought (CoT). To address this weakness in hitherto existing models, this paper proposes MARS-GPS, that generates multiple parallel reasoning rollouts augmented with Python code execution for numerical verification, ranks them using token-level entropy as a confidence signal, and aggregates answers through a multi-stage voting and self-verification pipeline. Empirical results show that MARS-GPS with 8 parallel rollouts achieves 88.8% on Geometry3K, a nearly +11% improvement over the prior state-of-the-art, with accuracy scaling consistently as the number of rollouts increases from 1 to 16 (+6.0% on ablation subset). We provide our code and data in an anonymous repository: https://anonymous.4open.science/r/MARS-GPS-DE55.

analysis.tldr: 提出多链思维投票方法MARS-GPS，通过并行推理、代码验证和熵置信度排序提升大模型几何推理能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 几何问题求解需要结合图表理解、符号操作和逻辑推理，现有方法主要解决前两者，逻辑推理仅依赖单条思维链，限制了推理质量。
analysis.problem: 现有大模型在几何推理中逻辑推理能力不足，单条思维链难以保证推理的准确性和鲁棒性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: MARS-GPS：生成多条并行推理轨迹，结合Python代码执行进行数值验证，使用token级熵作为置信度信号排序，通过多阶段投票和自验证聚合答案。
contributions: 提出多链思维投票框架MARS-GPS，增强几何推理中的逻辑推理能力。
在Geometry3K上达到88.8%准确率，相比先前最优提升近11%，且随并行轨迹数增加精度持续提升。
analysis.experiments: 在Geometry3K数据集上评估，8条并行轨迹达88.8%准确率，1到16条轨迹消融实验显示+6.0%提升。
limitations: 可能依赖Python代码执行环境，增加推理开销。
多链投票机制在资源受限场景下可能不适用。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出多链思维投票方法MARS-GPS，通过并行推理、代码验证和熵置信度排序提升大模型几何推理能力。

papers.title: Towards Physically Realizable Adversarial Attenuation Patch against SAR Object Detection
papers.abstract: Deep neural networks have demonstrated excellent performance in SAR target detection tasks but remain susceptible to adversarial attacks. Existing SAR-specific attack methods can effectively deceive detectors; however, they often introduce noticeable perturbations and are largely confined to digital domain, neglecting physical implementation constrains for attacking SAR systems. In this paper, a novel Adversarial Attenuation Patch (AAP) method is proposed that employs energy-constrained optimization strategy coupled with an attenuation-based deployment framework to achieve a seamless balance between attack effectiveness and stealthiness. More importantly, AAP exhibits strong potential for physical realization by aligning with signal-level electronic jamming mechanisms. Experimental results show that AAP effectively degrades detection performance while preserving high imperceptibility, and shows favorable transferability across different models. This study provides a physical grounded perspective for adversarial attacks on SAR target detection systems and facilitates the design of more covert and practically deployable attack strategies. The source code is made available at https://github.com/boremycin/SAAP.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种物理可实现的对抗衰减补丁，用于SAR目标检测，兼顾攻击效果与隐蔽性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有SAR对抗攻击方法多局限于数字域，引入明显扰动且忽略物理实现约束，难以实际部署。
analysis.problem: 设计一种在物理世界中可实现的、隐蔽且有效的对抗补丁，以欺骗SAR目标检测器。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 采用能量约束优化策略和基于衰减的部署框架，生成对抗衰减补丁（AAP），与信号级电子干扰机制对齐。
contributions: 提出一种物理可实现的对抗衰减补丁方法，平衡攻击效果与隐蔽性。
通过能量约束优化和衰减部署框架，实现跨模型的可迁移性。
analysis.experiments: 实验表明AAP有效降低检测性能，保持高隐蔽性，并具有良好的跨模型迁移性。
limitations: 可能仅在特定SAR系统或场景下验证。
物理实现的实际效果可能受环境因素影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种物理可实现的对抗衰减补丁，用于SAR目标检测，兼顾攻击效果与隐蔽性。

papers.title: PixelPrune: Pixel-Level Adaptive Visual Token Reduction via Predictive Coding
papers.abstract: Document understanding and GUI interaction are among the highest-value applications of Vision-Language Models (VLMs), yet they impose exceptionally heavy computational burden: fine-grained text and small UI elements demand high-resolution inputs that produce tens of thousands of visual tokens. We observe that this cost is largely wasteful -- across document and GUI benchmarks, only 22--71\% of image patches are pixel-unique, the rest being exact duplicates of another patch in the same image. We propose \textbf{PixelPrune}, which exploits this pixel-level redundancy through predictive-coding-based compression, pruning redundant patches \emph{before} the Vision Transformer (ViT) encoder. Because it operates in pixel space prior to any neural computation, PixelPrune accelerates both the ViT encoder and the downstream LLM, covering the full inference pipeline. The method is training-free, requires no learnable parameters, and supports pixel-lossless compression ($τ{=}0$) as well as controlled lossy compression ($τ{>}0$). Experiments across three model scales and document and GUI benchmarks show that PixelPrune maintains competitive task accuracy while delivering up to 4.2$\times$ inference speedup and 1.9$\times$ training acceleration. Code is available at https://github.com/OPPO-Mente-Lab/PixelPrune.

analysis.tldr: PixelPrune 通过预测编码在像素级剪枝冗余视觉 token，实现 VLM 在文档/GUI 任务中高达 4.2 倍推理加速且无需训练。
analysis.research_motivation: 文档理解和 GUI 交互是 VLM 的高价值应用，但高分辨率输入产生数万视觉 token，计算负担极重，而大量 token 是冗余的。
analysis.problem: VLM 处理高分辨率文档/GUI 图像时视觉 token 过多导致计算效率低下。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到在文档和 GUI 基准中，仅 22-71% 的图像块是像素唯一的，其余为重复块，表明存在大量像素级冗余。
analysis.method: PixelPrune 在 ViT 编码器之前，基于预测编码在像素空间剪枝冗余图像块，支持无损和有损压缩，无需训练和可学习参数。
contributions: 提出 PixelPrune，一种在像素空间利用预测编码剪枝冗余视觉 token 的方法，加速 ViT 编码器和下游 LLM。
在多个模型规模和基准上实现高达 4.2 倍推理加速和 1.9 倍训练加速，同时保持竞争性任务准确率。
analysis.experiments: 在三个模型规模以及文档和 GUI 基准上进行实验，显示 PixelPrune 保持竞争性任务准确率，同时实现高达 4.2 倍推理加速和 1.9 倍训练加速。
limitations: 可能仅适用于具有大量重复像素块的文档/GUI 图像，对自然图像效果未知。
有损压缩（τ>0）可能引入信息损失，影响某些细粒度任务。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: PixelPrune 通过预测编码在像素级剪枝冗余视觉 token，实现 VLM 在文档/GUI 任务中高达 4.2 倍推理加速且无需训练。

papers.title: OkanNet: A Lightweight Deep Learning Architecture for Classification of Brain Tumor from MRI Images
papers.abstract: Medical imaging techniques, especially Magnetic Resonance Imaging (MRI), are accepted as the gold standard in the diagnosis and treatment planning of neurological diseases. However, the manual analysis of MRI images is a time-consuming process for radiologists and is prone to human error due to fatigue. In this study, two different Deep Learning approaches were developed and analyzed comparatively for the automatic detection and classification of brain tumors (Glioma, Meningioma, Pituitary, and No Tumor). In the first approach, a custom Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) architecture named "OkanNet", which has a low computational cost and fast training time, was designed from scratch. In the second approach, the Transfer Learning method was applied using the 50-layer ResNet-50 [1] architecture, pre-trained on the ImageNet dataset. In experiments conducted on an extended dataset compiled by Masoud Nickparvar containing a total of $7,023$ MRI images, the Transfer Learning-based ResNet-50 model exhibited superior classification performance, achieving $96.49\%$ Accuracy and $0.963$ Precision. In contrast, the custom OkanNet architecture reached an accuracy rate of $88.10\%$; however, it proved to be a strong alternative for mobile and embedded systems with limited computational power by yielding results approximately $3.2$ times faster ($311$ seconds) than ResNet-50 in terms of training time. This study demonstrates the trade-off between model depth and computational efficiency in medical image analysis through experimental data.

analysis.tldr: 提出轻量级CNN架构OkanNet用于脑肿瘤MRI分类，在精度与效率间取得权衡。
analysis.research_motivation: 手动分析MRI图像耗时且易出错，现有深度学习模型计算成本高，不适合资源受限的移动/嵌入式系统。
analysis.problem: 在保持可接受分类精度的前提下，设计轻量级CNN架构以降低计算成本和训练时间。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 设计自定义轻量级CNN架构OkanNet，并与基于ResNet-50的迁移学习方法进行对比。
contributions: 提出OkanNet轻量级CNN架构，训练时间比ResNet-50快3.2倍。
在7023张MRI图像数据集上验证了精度与效率的权衡。
analysis.experiments: 在包含7023张MRI图像的数据集上，OkanNet达到88.10%准确率，训练时间311秒；ResNet-50达到96.49%准确率，0.963精确率。
limitations: OkanNet准确率低于ResNet-50，可能不适用于对精度要求极高的场景。
仅在单一数据集上验证，泛化能力未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出轻量级CNN架构OkanNet用于脑肿瘤MRI分类，在精度与效率间取得权衡。

papers.title: KUET at StanceNakba Shared Task: StanceMoE: Mixture-of-Experts Architecture for Stance Detection
papers.abstract: Actor-level stance detection aims to determine an author expressed position toward specific geopolitical actors mentioned or implicated in a text. Although transformer-based models have achieved relatively good performance in stance classification, they typically rely on unified representations that may not sufficiently capture heterogeneous linguistic signals, such as contrastive discourse structures, framing cues, and salient lexical indicators. This motivates the need for adaptive architectures that explicitly model diverse stance-expressive patterns. In this paper, we propose StanceMoE, a context-enhanced Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) architecture built upon a fine-tuned BERT encoder for actor-level stance detection. Our model integrates six expert modules designed to capture complementary linguistic signals, including global semantic orientation, salient lexical cues, clause-level focus, phrase-level patterns, framing indicators, and contrast-driven discourse shifts. A context-aware gating mechanism dynamically weights expert contributions, enabling adaptive routing based on input characteristics. Experiments are conducted on the StanceNakba 2026 Subtask A dataset, comprising 1,401 annotated English texts where the target actor is implicit in the text. StanceMoE achieves a macro-F1 score of 94.26%, outperforming traditional baselines, and alternative BERT-based variants.

analysis.tldr: 提出StanceMoE，一种基于混合专家架构的立场检测模型，在StanceNakba任务中达到94.26% macro-F1。
analysis.research_motivation: 基于Transformer的立场检测模型使用统一表示，难以捕捉对比性话语结构、框架线索和显著词汇指标等异质语言信号，需要自适应架构显式建模多样立场表达模式。
analysis.problem: 解决演员级立场检测中，如何有效捕捉和整合多种互补的语言信号以提升分类性能的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于微调BERT编码器，集成六个专家模块分别捕捉全局语义、显著词汇、从句焦点、短语模式、框架指示和对比驱动话语转换，并通过上下文感知门控机制动态加权专家贡献。
contributions: 提出StanceMoE架构，显式建模多种立场表达模式。
在StanceNakba 2026数据集上达到94.26% macro-F1，超越传统基线和BERT变体。
analysis.experiments: 在StanceNakba 2026 Subtask A数据集（1401条英文文本）上评估，目标演员隐含在文本中。
limitations: 仅在单一数据集上验证，泛化性未知。
专家模块的设计依赖领域知识，可能不易迁移。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出StanceMoE，一种基于混合专家架构的立场检测模型，在StanceNakba任务中达到94.26% macro-F1。

papers.title: A 4D Representation for Training-Free Agentic Reasoning from Monocular Laparoscopic Video
papers.abstract: Spatiotemporal reasoning is a fundamental capability for artificial intelligence (AI) in soft tissue surgery, paving the way for intelligent assistive systems and autonomous robotics. While 2D vision-language models show increasing promise at understanding surgical video, the spatial complexity of surgical scenes suggests that reasoning systems may benefit from explicit 4D representations. Here, we propose a framework for equipping surgical agents with spatiotemporal tools based on an explicit 4D representation, enabling AI systems to ground their natural language reasoning in both time and 3D space. Leveraging models for point tracking, depth, and segmentation, we develop a coherent 4D model with spatiotemporally consistent tool and tissue semantics. A Multimodal Large Language Model (MLLM) then acts as an agent on tools derived from the explicit 4D representation (e.g., trajectories) without any fine-tuning. We evaluate our method on a new dataset of 134 clinically relevant questions and find that the combination of a general purpose reasoning backbone and our 4D representation significantly improves spatiotemporal understanding and allows for 4D grounding. We demonstrate that spatiotemporal intelligence can be "assembled" from 2D MLLMs and 3D computer vision models without additional training. Code, data, and examples are available at https://tum-ai.github.io/surg4d/

analysis.tldr: 提出一种无需训练的4D表示框架，使2D MLLM具备手术视频中的时空推理能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 软组织手术中的时空推理对AI辅助系统和自主机器人至关重要，但现有2D视觉-语言模型难以处理手术场景的空间复杂性，缺乏显式4D表示。
analysis.problem: 如何让AI系统在单目腹腔镜视频中实现基于自然语言的时空推理和4D定位，而无需额外训练。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 利用点跟踪、深度估计和分割模型构建时空一致的4D表示（含工具和组织语义），然后由多模态大语言模型（MLLM）作为智能体直接使用该4D表示导出的工具（如轨迹）进行推理，无需微调。
contributions: 提出一种无需训练的框架，将2D MLLM与3D视觉模型组合实现手术视频中的4D时空推理。
构建了一个包含134个临床相关问题的评估数据集，验证了方法的有效性。
