analysis.experiments: 在134个临床相关问题上评估，结果显示通用推理骨干与4D表示结合显著提升了时空理解和4D定位能力。
limitations: 依赖点跟踪、深度和分割模型的精度，可能受限于这些模型的性能。
仅在单目腹腔镜视频上验证，泛化到其他手术类型或视角需进一步研究。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种无需训练的4D表示框架，使2D MLLM具备手术视频中的时空推理能力。

papers.title: Shape Representation using Gaussian Process mixture models
papers.abstract: Traditional explicit 3D representations, such as point clouds and meshes, demand significant storage to capture fine geometric details and require complex indexing systems for surface lookups, making functional representations an efficient, compact, and continuous alternative. In this work, we propose a novel, object-specific functional shape representation that models surface geometry with Gaussian Process (GP) mixture models. Rather than relying on computationally heavy neural architectures, our method is lightweight, leveraging GPs to learn continuous directional distance fields from sparsely sampled point clouds. We capture complex topologies by anchoring local GP priors at strategic reference points, which can be flexibly extracted using any structural decomposition method (e.g. skeletonization, distance-based clustering). Extensive evaluations on the ShapeNetCore and IndustryShapes datasets demonstrate that our method can efficiently and accurately represent complex geometries.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于高斯过程混合模型的轻量级连续形状表示方法，无需神经网络即可高效表示复杂3D几何。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统显式3D表示（点云、网格）存储开销大且需要复杂索引，而现有函数表示多依赖计算量大的神经网络，需要更轻量高效的替代方案。
analysis.problem: 如何在不使用神经网络的情况下，实现轻量、连续且能捕捉复杂拓扑的3D形状表示。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 利用高斯过程混合模型学习连续方向距离场，通过锚定局部GP先验于策略参考点（如骨架点）来捕捉复杂拓扑，参考点可灵活提取。
contributions: 提出基于GP混合模型的对象特定函数形状表示，无需神经网络。
通过锚定局部GP先验实现复杂拓扑的连续表示，且支持多种结构分解方法提取参考点。
analysis.experiments: 在ShapeNetCore和IndustryShapes数据集上评估，表明方法能高效准确地表示复杂几何。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 可能依赖参考点提取质量，对噪声或稀疏点云敏感。
未与基于神经网络的方法进行直接计算效率对比。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于高斯过程混合模型的轻量级连续形状表示方法，无需神经网络即可高效表示复杂3D几何。

papers.title: Sparkle: A Robust and Versatile Representation for Point Cloud based Human Motion Capture
papers.abstract: Point cloud-based motion capture leverages rich spatial geometry and privacy-preserving sensing, but learning robust representations from noisy, unstructured point clouds remains challenging. Existing approaches face a struggle trade-off between point-based methods (geometrically detailed but noisy) and skeleton-based ones (robust but oversimplified). We address the fundamental challenge: how to construct an effective representation for human motion capture that can balance expressiveness and robustness. In this paper, we propose Sparkle, a structured representation unifying skeletal joints and surface anchors with explicit kinematic-geometric factorization. Our framework, SparkleMotion, learns this representation through hierarchical modules embedding geometric continuity and kinematic constraints. By explicitly disentangling internal kinematic structure from external surface geometry, SparkleMotion achieves state-of-the-art performance not only in accuracy but crucially in robustness and generalization under severe domain shifts, noise, and occlusion. Extensive experiments demonstrate our superiority across diverse sensor types and challenging real-world scenarios.

analysis.tldr: 提出Sparkle表示，统一骨骼关节与表面锚点，实现鲁棒且通用的点云人体运动捕捉。
analysis.research_motivation: 点云运动捕捉面临点级方法（几何细节丰富但噪声敏感）与骨架方法（鲁棒但过于简化）之间的权衡，现有表示难以兼顾表达力与鲁棒性。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一种既能保持几何细节又能抵抗噪声和遮挡的点云人体运动捕捉表示。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出点级方法几何详细但易受噪声影响，骨架方法鲁棒但丢失表面细节，两者存在根本性权衡。
analysis.method: 提出Sparkle表示，统一骨骼关节与表面锚点，并显式分解运动学与几何因子；SparkleMotion框架通过层次化模块嵌入几何连续性和运动学约束来学习该表示。
contributions: 提出Sparkle结构化表示，统一骨骼关节与表面锚点，实现表达力与鲁棒性的平衡。
设计SparkleMotion框架，通过显式解耦内部运动学结构与外部表面几何，在精度、鲁棒性和泛化性上达到SOTA。
analysis.experiments: 在多种传感器类型和具有挑战性的真实场景下进行实验，表明方法在精度、鲁棒性和泛化性上优于现有方法。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能对极端遮挡或快速运动的处理仍有局限。
表示学习需要额外的层次化模块，可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Sparkle表示，统一骨骼关节与表面锚点，实现鲁棒且通用的点云人体运动捕捉。

papers.title: Perturb-and-Restore: Simulation-driven Structural Augmentation Framework for Imbalance Chromosomal Anomaly Detection
papers.abstract: Detecting structural chromosomal abnormalities is crucial for accurate diagnosis and management of genetic disorders. However, collecting sufficient structural abnormality data is extremely challenging and costly in clinical practice, and not all abnormal types can be readily collected. As a result, deep learning approaches face significant performance degradation due to the severe imbalance and scarcity of abnormal chromosome data. To address this challenge, we propose a Perturb-and-Restore (P&R), a simulation-driven structural augmentation framework that effectively alleviates data imbalance in chromosome anomaly detection. The P&R framework comprises two key components: (1) Structure Perturbation and Restoration Simulation, which generates synthetic abnormal chromosomes by perturbing chromosomal banding patterns of normal chromosomes followed by a restoration diffusion network that reconstructs continuous chromosome content and edges, thus eliminating reliance on rare abnormal samples; and (2) Energy-guided Adaptive Sampling, an energy score-based online selection strategy that dynamically prioritizes high-quality synthetic samples by referencing the energy distribution of real samples. To evaluate our method, we construct a comprehensive structural anomaly dataset consisting of over 260,000 chromosome images, including 4,242 abnormal samples spanning 24 categories. Experimental results demonstrate that the P&R framework achieves state-of-the-art (SOTA) performance, surpassing existing methods with an average improvement of 8.92% in sensitivity, 8.89% in precision, and 13.79% in F1-score across all categories.

analysis.tldr: 提出Perturb-and-Restore框架，通过模拟结构扰动和能量引导采样生成合成异常染色体，显著提升染色体异常检测性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 临床中染色体结构异常数据极度稀缺且不平衡，导致深度学习模型性能严重下降，而收集足够异常样本成本高昂且部分类型难以获取。
analysis.problem: 染色体异常检测中异常样本严重不足和类别不平衡问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Perturb-and-Restore框架，包含结构扰动与恢复模拟（通过扰动正常染色体带型并利用恢复扩散网络生成合成异常染色体）和能量引导自适应采样（基于能量分数的在线选择策略优先高质量合成样本）。
contributions: 提出模拟驱动的结构增强框架P&R，有效缓解染色体异常检测中的数据不平衡问题。
构建包含超过26万张染色体图像、4242个异常样本覆盖24类别的综合结构异常数据集。
在染色体异常检测任务上达到SOTA性能，平均灵敏度提升8.92%，精确率提升8.89%，F1分数提升13.79%。
analysis.experiments: 在自建数据集（超过26万张染色体图像，含4242个异常样本24类别）上进行实验，与现有方法比较，P&R在灵敏度、精确率和F1分数上分别平均提升8.92%、8.89%和13.79%。
limitations: 可能依赖正常染色体数据的多样性和质量。
能量引导采样策略的计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Perturb-and-Restore框架，通过模拟结构扰动和能量引导采样生成合成异常染色体，显著提升染色体异常检测性能。

papers.title: MotionGrounder: Grounded Multi-Object Motion Transfer via Diffusion Transformer
papers.abstract: Motion transfer enables controllable video generation by transferring temporal dynamics from a reference video to synthesize a new video conditioned on a target caption. However, existing Diffusion Transformer (DiT)-based methods are limited to single-object videos, restricting fine-grained control in real-world scenes with multiple objects. In this work, we introduce MotionGrounder, a DiT-based framework that firstly handles motion transfer with multi-object controllability. Our Flow-based Motion Signal (FMS) in MotionGrounder provides a stable motion prior for target video generation, while our Object-Caption Alignment Loss (OCAL) grounds object captions to their corresponding spatial regions. We further propose a new Object Grounding Score (OGS), which jointly evaluates (i) spatial alignment between source video objects and their generated counterparts and (ii) semantic consistency between each generated object and its target caption. Our experiments show that MotionGrounder consistently outperforms recent baselines across quantitative, qualitative, and human evaluations.

analysis.tldr: 首个支持多物体运动迁移的DiT框架，通过流信号和物体-描述对齐损失实现可控视频生成。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于扩散Transformer（DiT）的运动迁移方法仅支持单物体视频，无法处理真实场景中多物体的细粒度控制，限制了实际应用。
analysis.problem: 如何实现多物体视频中的可控运动迁移，同时保证物体空间对齐和语义一致性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出MotionGrounder框架，包含基于流的运动信号（FMS）提供稳定运动先验，物体-描述对齐损失（OCAL）将物体描述与对应空间区域关联，以及物体对齐分数（OGS）联合评估空间对齐和语义一致性。
contributions: 首个支持多物体运动迁移的DiT框架
提出FMS、OCAL和OGS三个关键组件
analysis.experiments: 在定量、定性和人类评估中一致优于近期基线方法。
limitations: 可能依赖参考视频质量
多物体场景的复杂交互可能仍有挑战
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首个支持多物体运动迁移的DiT框架，通过流信号和物体-描述对齐损失实现可控视频生成。

papers.title: Disentangling to Re-couple: Resolving the Similarity-Controllability Paradox in Subject-Driven Text-to-Image Generation
papers.abstract: Subject-Driven Text-to-Image (T2I) Generation aims to preserve a subject's identity while editing its context based on a text prompt. A core challenge in this task is the "similarity-controllability paradox", where enhancing textual control often degrades the subject's fidelity, and vice-versa. We argue this paradox stems from the ambiguous role of text prompts, which are often tasked with describing both the subject and the desired modifications, leading to conflicting signals for the model. To resolve this, we propose DisCo, a novel framework that first Disntangles and then re-Couples visual and textual information. First, our textual-visual decoupling module isolates the sources of information: subject identity is extracted exclusively from the reference image with the entity word of the subject, while the text prompt is simplified to contain only the modification command, where the subject refers to general pronouns, eliminating descriptive ambiguity. However, this strict separation can lead to unnatural compositions between the subject and its contexts. We address this by designing a dedicated reward signal and using reinforcement learning to seamlessly recouple the visually-defined subject and the textually-generated context. Our approach effectively resolves the paradox, enabling simultaneous high-fidelity subject preservation and precise textual control. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance, producing highly realistic and coherent images.

analysis.tldr: 提出DisCo框架，通过解耦视觉与文本信息再强化学习重耦合，解决主体驱动文本到图像生成中的相似性-可控性悖论。
analysis.research_motivation: 主体驱动文本到图像生成中，增强文本控制往往会降低主体保真度，反之亦然，这一悖论限制了生成质量。
analysis.problem: 解决主体驱动T2I生成中的相似性-可控性悖论，即同时实现高保真主体保留和精确文本控制。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 悖论源于文本提示的模糊角色：既要描述主体又要描述修改，导致模型信号冲突。
analysis.method: 提出DisCo框架，包含文本-视觉解耦模块（主体身份仅从参考图像提取，文本提示简化为修改命令）和基于强化学习的重耦合模块（通过奖励信号无缝结合视觉主体与文本上下文）。
contributions: 识别并形式化了主体驱动T2I生成中的相似性-可控性悖论，并归因于文本提示的模糊性。
提出DisCo框架，通过解耦-重耦合机制有效解决该悖论。
实验证明方法达到SOTA，生成高度真实且一致的图像。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖参考图像质量，低质量图像影响主体提取。
强化学习训练可能不稳定或需要大量计算资源。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出DisCo框架，通过解耦视觉与文本信息再强化学习重耦合，解决主体驱动文本到图像生成中的相似性-可控性悖论。

papers.title: Proactive Agent Research Environment: Simulating Active Users to Evaluate Proactive Assistants
papers.abstract: Proactive agents that anticipate user needs and autonomously execute tasks hold great promise as digital assistants, yet the lack of realistic user simulation frameworks hinders their development. Existing approaches model apps as flat tool-calling APIs, failing to capture the stateful and sequential nature of user interaction in digital environments and making realistic user simulation infeasible. We introduce Proactive Agent Research Environment (Pare), a framework for building and evaluating proactive agents in digital environments. Pare models applications as finite state machines with stateful navigation and state-dependent action space for the user simulator, enabling active user simulation. Building on this foundation, we present Pare-Bench, a benchmark of 143 diverse tasks spanning communication, productivity, scheduling, and lifestyle apps, designed to test context observation, goal inference, intervention timing, and multi-app orchestration.

analysis.tldr: 提出Pare框架，通过状态机建模应用环境，实现主动式智能体的用户模拟与评测。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有方法将应用建模为扁平工具调用API，无法捕捉数字环境中用户交互的状态性和顺序性，导致无法进行真实的用户模拟，阻碍了主动式智能体的开发。
analysis.problem: 缺乏能够模拟真实用户交互的框架来评估主动式智能体在数字环境中的表现。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将应用建模为有限状态机，包含状态导航和状态依赖的动作空间，用于用户模拟器，实现主动用户模拟；并构建包含143个任务的基准Pare-Bench。
contributions: 提出Pare框架，通过状态机建模应用环境，支持主动用户模拟。
构建Pare-Bench基准，覆盖通信、生产力、日程和生活方式等应用，测试上下文观察、目标推理、干预时机和多应用编排能力。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 基准任务数量有限（143个），可能无法覆盖所有应用场景。
用户模拟的真实性可能受限于状态机建模的抽象程度。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Pare框架，通过状态机建模应用环境，实现主动式智能体的用户模拟与评测。

papers.title: Transforming OPACs into Intelligent Discovery Systems: An AI-Powered, Knowledge Graph-Driven Smart OPAC for Digital Libraries
papers.abstract: Traditional Online Public Access Catalogues (OPACs) are becoming less effective due to the rapid growth of scholarly literature. Conventional search methods, such as keyword indexing and Boolean queries, often fail to support efficient knowledge discovery. This paper proposes a Smart OPAC framework that transforms traditional OPACs into intelligent discovery systems using artificial intelligence and knowledge graph techniques. The framework enables semantic search, thematic filtering, and knowledge graph-based visualization to enhance user interaction and exploration. It integrates multiple open scholarly data sources and applies semantic embeddings to improve relevance and contextual understanding. The system supports exploratory search, semantic navigation, and refined result filtering based on user-defined themes. Quantitative evaluation demonstrates improvements in retrieval efficiency, relevance, and reduction of information overload. The proposed approach offers practical implications for modernizing digital library services and supports next-generation research workflows. Future work includes user-centric evaluation, personalization, and dynamic knowledge graph updates.

analysis.tldr: 将传统OPAC改造为基于AI和知识图谱的智能发现系统，提升检索效率与相关性。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统OPAC依赖关键词索引和布尔查询，难以应对学术文献快速增长带来的知识发现效率低下和信息过载问题。
analysis.problem: 如何利用AI和知识图谱技术将传统OPAC转变为支持语义搜索、主题过滤和可视化探索的智能发现系统。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Smart OPAC框架，集成开放学术数据源，使用语义嵌入增强相关性，支持语义搜索、主题过滤和知识图谱可视化。
contributions: 提出将AI与知识图谱结合用于OPAC智能化的框架。
通过定量实验证明在检索效率、相关性和信息过载减少方面的改进。
analysis.experiments: 定量评估显示在检索效率、相关性和信息过载减少方面有改进，但未提供具体数值。
limitations: 缺乏用户中心评估和个性化功能。
知识图谱动态更新机制未详细说明。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将传统OPAC改造为基于AI和知识图谱的智能发现系统，提升检索效率与相关性。

papers.title: Learning to Learn-at-Test-Time: Language Agents with Learnable Adaptation Policies
papers.abstract: Test-Time Learning (TTL) enables language agents to iteratively refine their performance through repeated interactions with the environment at inference time. At the core of TTL is an adaptation policy that updates the actor policy based on experience from previous episodes, thereby improving future behavior. Existing methods rely on fixed, hand-crafted adaptation policies rather than optimizing them for downstream improvement. We argue that optimal adaptation policies should be learned from task environments, not hand-engineered based on human intuition. To achieve this, we introduce Meta-TTL, a framework that formulates the discovery of effective adaptation policies as a bi-level optimization problem. Within this framework, the inner loop executes the standard TTL process, measuring how effectively a candidate adaptation policy helps an agent correct errors across sequential episodes. Guided by the agent's performance, the outer loop employs evolutionary search over a diverse distribution of training tasks to iteratively refine the adaptation policy. We evaluate Meta-TTL on Jericho and WebArena-Lite across both in-distribution (ID) and out-of-distribution (OOD) settings, using multiple meta-agent backbones. Results on both benchmarks show that Meta-TTL consistently outperforms hand-crafted baselines, suggesting that the optimized adaptation policy encodes transferable strategies that generalize beyond the training task distribution.

analysis.tldr: 提出Meta-TTL框架，通过双层优化学习语言Agent的测试时适应策略，替代手工设计策略。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有测试时学习方法依赖固定手工设计的适应策略，未针对下游任务优化，限制了Agent在交互环境中的纠错和泛化能力。
analysis.problem: 如何自动学习最优的适应策略，使语言Agent在测试时能有效利用历史经验改进行为。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Meta-TTL框架，将适应策略发现建模为双层优化：内环执行标准TTL过程评估候选策略，外环使用进化搜索在训练任务分布上迭代优化策略。
contributions: 提出Meta-TTL框架，将适应策略学习形式化为双层优化问题。
在Jericho和WebArena-Lite上验证，优化策略在分布内和分布外设置均优于手工基线。
analysis.experiments: 在Jericho和WebArena-Lite基准上，使用多种元Agent骨干，在分布内和分布外设置下评估，Meta-TTL一致优于手工基线。
limitations: 进化搜索可能计算开销较大。
泛化能力可能受训练任务分布多样性影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Meta-TTL框架，通过双层优化学习语言Agent的测试时适应策略，替代手工设计策略。

papers.title: DySCo: Dynamic Semantic Compression for Effective Long-term Time Series Forecasting
papers.abstract: Time series forecasting (TSF) is critical across domains such as finance, meteorology, and energy. While extending the lookback window theoretically provides richer historical context, in practice, it often introduces irrelevant noise and computational redundancy, preventing models from effectively capturing complex long-term dependencies. To address these challenges, we propose a Dynamic Semantic Compression (DySCo) framework. Unlike traditional methods that rely on fixed heuristics, DySCo introduces an Entropy-Guided Dynamic Sampling (EGDS) mechanism to autonomously identify and retain high-entropy segments while compressing redundant trends. Furthermore, we incorporate a Hierarchical Frequency-Enhanced Decomposition (HFED) strategy to separate high-frequency anomalies from low-frequency patterns, ensuring that critical details are preserved during sparse sampling. Finally, a Cross-Scale Interaction Mixer(CSIM) is designed to dynamically fuse global contexts with local representations, replacing simple linear aggregation. Experimental results demonstrate that DySCo serves as a universal plug-and-play module, significantly enhancing the ability of mainstream models to capture long-term correlations with reduced computational cost.

analysis.tldr: 提出动态语义压缩框架DySCo，通过熵引导采样和频率分解提升长时序列预测效率与准确性。
analysis.research_motivation: 长时序列预测中，扩展历史窗口会引入噪声和计算冗余，现有方法依赖固定启发式规则，难以有效捕捉复杂长期依赖。
analysis.problem: 如何在不增加计算负担的前提下，从长历史窗口中提取关键语义信息以提升预测性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 长历史窗口包含冗余趋势和噪声，高熵区域（如异常点）对预测更重要，但传统方法无法自适应选择。
analysis.method: 提出DySCo框架，包含熵引导动态采样（EGDS）、层次化频率增强分解（HFED）和跨尺度交互混合器（CSIM）。
contributions: 提出EGDS机制，根据熵值自动保留高信息量片段并压缩冗余趋势。
设计HFED策略分离高频异常与低频模式，确保稀疏采样时关键细节不丢失。
构建CSIM模块动态融合全局与局部表征，替代简单线性聚合。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能对超参数（如熵阈值）敏感。
在极长序列或极端噪声场景下的鲁棒性未提及。
analysis.primary_area_en: learning on time series and dynamical systems
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出动态语义压缩框架DySCo，通过熵引导采样和频率分解提升长时序列预测效率与准确性。

papers.title: LinguDistill: Recovering Linguistic Ability in Vision-Language Models via Selective Cross-Modal Distillation
papers.abstract: Adapting pretrained language models (LMs) into vision-language models (VLMs) can degrade their native linguistic capability due to representation shift and cross-modal interference introduced during multimodal adaptation. Such loss is difficult to recover, even with targeted task-specific fine-tuning using standard objectives. Prior recovery approaches typically introduce additional modules that act as intermediate alignment layers to maintain or isolate modality-specific subspaces, which increases architectural complexity, adds parameters at inference time, and limits flexibility across models and settings. We propose LinguDistill, an adapter-free distillation method that restores linguistic capability by utilizing the original frozen LM as a teacher. We overcome the key challenge of enabling vision-conditioned teacher supervision by introducing layer-wise KV-cache sharing, which exposes the teacher to the student's multimodal representations without modifying the architecture of either model. We then selectively distill the teacher's strong linguistic signal on language-intensive data to recover language capability, while preserving the student's visual grounding on multimodal tasks. As a result, LinguDistill recovers $\sim$10% of the performance lost on language and knowledge benchmarks, while maintaining comparable performance on vision-heavy tasks. Our findings demonstrate that linguistic capability can be recovered without additional modules, providing an efficient and practical solution to modality-specific degradation in multimodal models.

analysis.tldr: 提出无适配器的蒸馏方法LinguDistill，通过冻结原语言模型作为教师并引入层间KV缓存共享，恢复VLM在语言任务上的性能损失约10%。
analysis.research_motivation: 将预训练语言模型适配为视觉语言模型时，表示偏移和跨模态干扰会损害其原生语言能力，且标准微调难以恢复；现有恢复方法需引入额外模块，增加架构复杂度和推理参数，缺乏灵活性。
analysis.problem: 如何在不增加额外模块和推理参数的前提下，有效恢复VLM因多模态适配而损失的语言能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 多模态适配导致语言能力退化，且标准任务特定微调难以恢复；现有方法通过中间对齐层隔离模态子空间，但增加了复杂性。
analysis.method: 利用冻结的原始语言模型作为教师，通过层间KV缓存共享使教师感知学生的多模态表示，然后在语言密集型数据上选择性蒸馏教师的强语言信号，同时保持学生在多模态任务上的视觉基础能力。
contributions: 提出无适配器的蒸馏方法LinguDistill，无需额外模块即可恢复VLM的语言能力。
引入层间KV缓存共享机制，使冻结的教师模型能感知学生的多模态表示。
在语言和知识基准上恢复约10%的性能损失，同时保持视觉任务性能。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果细节，仅提及在语言和知识基准上恢复约10%性能损失，视觉任务性能相当。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定架构的VLM。
恢复的语言能力幅度有限（约10%），可能无法完全恢复。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出无适配器的蒸馏方法LinguDistill，通过冻结原语言模型作为教师并引入层间KV缓存共享，恢复VLM在语言任务上的性能损失约10%。

papers.title: Video Patch Pruning: Efficient Video Instance Segmentation via Early Token Reduction
papers.abstract: Vision Transformers (ViTs) have demonstrated state-ofthe-art performance in several benchmarks, yet their high computational costs hinders their practical deployment. Patch Pruning offers significant savings, but existing approaches restrict token reduction to deeper layers, leaving early-stage compression unexplored. This limits their potential for holistic efficiency. In this work, we present a novel Video Patch Pruning framework (VPP) that integrates temporal prior knowledge to enable efficient sparsity within early ViT layers. Our approach is motivated by the observation that prior features extracted from deeper layers exhibit strong foreground selectivity. Therefore we propose a fully differentiable module for temporal mapping to accurately select the most relevant patches in early network stages. Notably, the proposed method enables a patch reduction of up to 60% in dense prediction tasks, exceeding the capabilities of conventional image-based patch pruning, which typically operate around a 30% patch sparsity. VPP excels the high-sparsity regime, sustaining remarkable performance even when patch usage is reduced below 55%. Specifically, it preserves stable results with a maximal performance drop of 0.6% on the Youtube-VIS 2021 dataset.

analysis.tldr: 提出视频补丁剪枝框架VPP，在早期ViT层利用时序先验实现高效稀疏化，视频实例分割中补丁减少60%仅损失0.6%性能。
analysis.research_motivation: Vision Transformer计算成本高，现有补丁剪枝仅在深层进行，早期层压缩未被探索，限制了整体效率提升。
analysis.problem: 如何在早期ViT层实现有效的补丁剪枝，以降低视频实例分割的计算成本。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 深层特征具有强前景选择性，可指导早期层补丁选择。
analysis.method: 提出VPP框架，包含一个全可微的时序映射模块，利用深层先验知识在早期网络阶段选择最相关的补丁。
contributions: 首次在早期ViT层实现高效稀疏化，提出视频补丁剪枝框架VPP。
设计全可微的时序映射模块，利用时序先验准确选择早期层补丁。
在视频实例分割任务上实现高达60%的补丁减少，性能损失仅0.6%。
analysis.experiments: 在Youtube-VIS 2021数据集上验证，补丁使用率低于55%时仍保持稳定性能，最大性能下降0.6%。
limitations: 可能依赖视频任务中的时序信息，对静态图像任务不适用。
未在更多数据集或任务上验证泛化性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出视频补丁剪枝框架VPP，在早期ViT层利用时序先验实现高效稀疏化，视频实例分割中补丁减少60%仅损失0.6%性能。

papers.title: Continual Vision-Language Learning for Remote Sensing: Benchmarking and Analysis
papers.abstract: Current remote sensing vision-language models (RS VLMs) demonstrate impressive performance in image interpretation but rely on static training data, limiting their ability to accommodate continuously emerging sensing modalities and downstream tasks. This exposes a fundamental challenge: enabling RS VLMs to continually adapt without catastrophic forgetting. Despite its practical importance, the continual learning capability of RS VLMs remains underexplored, and no dedicated benchmark currently exists. In this work, we present CLeaRS, a comprehensive benchmark for continual vision-language learning in remote sensing. CLeaRS comprises 10 curated subsets with over 207k image-text pairs, spanning diverse interpretation tasks, sensing modalities, and application scenarios. We further define three evaluation protocols: long-horizon, modality-incremental, and task-incremental settings, to systematically assess continual adaptation. Extensive benchmarking of diverse vision-language models reveals catastrophic forgetting across all settings. Moreover, representative continual learning methods, when adapted to RS VLMs, exhibit limited effectiveness in handling task, instruction, and modality transitions. Our findings underscore the need for developing continual learning methods tailored to RS VLMs.

analysis.tldr: 遥感视觉-语言模型在持续学习场景下存在灾难性遗忘，CLeaRS基准测试揭示了现有方法的局限性。
analysis.research_motivation: 遥感视觉-语言模型依赖静态训练数据，无法适应持续涌现的新感知模态和下游任务，而现有研究缺乏针对遥感领域的持续学习基准。
analysis.problem: 遥感视觉-语言模型在持续学习场景下的灾难性遗忘问题，以及缺乏专用基准来评估其持续适应能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，在长时域、模态增量、任务增量三种评估协议下，所有视觉-语言模型均出现灾难性遗忘；现有持续学习方法在适应任务、指令和模态转换时效果有限。
analysis.method: 构建CLeaRS基准，包含10个子集、超过20.7万图像-文本对，覆盖多种解释任务、感知模态和应用场景，并定义三种评估协议。
contributions: 提出了首个面向遥感持续视觉-语言学习的综合基准CLeaRS
系统评估了多种视觉-语言模型和持续学习方法，揭示了灾难性遗忘问题
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但提到对多种视觉-语言模型和持续学习方法进行了广泛基准测试。
limitations: 基准可能未覆盖所有遥感任务和模态
现有持续学习方法在遥感场景下效果有限，需进一步定制
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 遥感视觉-语言模型在持续学习场景下存在灾难性遗忘，CLeaRS基准测试揭示了现有方法的局限性。

papers.title: Emotion Entanglement and Bayesian Inference for Multi-Dimensional Emotion Understanding
papers.abstract: Understanding emotions in natural language is inherently a multi-dimensional reasoning problem, where multiple affective signals interact through context, interpersonal relations, and situational cues. However, most existing emotion understanding benchmarks rely on short texts and predefined emotion labels, reducing this process to independent label prediction and ignoring the structured dependencies among emotions. To address this limitation, we introduce Emotional Scenarios (EmoScene), a theory-grounded benchmark of 4,731 context-rich scenarios annotated with an 8-dimensional emotion vector derived from Plutchik's basic emotions. We evaluate six instruction-tuned large language models in a zero-shot setting and observe modest performance, with the best model achieving a Macro F1 of 0.501, highlighting the difficulty of context-aware multi-label emotion prediction. Motivated by the observation that emotions rarely occur independently, we further propose an entanglement-aware Bayesian inference framework that incorporates emotion co-occurrence statistics to perform joint posterior inference over the emotion vector. This lightweight post-processing improves structural consistency of predictions and yields notable gains for weaker models (e.g., +0.051 Macro F1 for Qwen2.5-7B). EmoScene therefore provides a challenging benchmark for studying multi-dimensional emotion understanding and the limitations of current language models.

analysis.tldr: 提出多维度情感理解基准EmoScene和基于贝叶斯推理的纠缠感知框架，提升情感预测的结构一致性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有情感理解基准多依赖短文本和预定义标签，忽略情感间的结构化依赖关系，无法反映真实场景中多维度情感推理的复杂性。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个包含上下文丰富、标注多维情感向量的基准，并利用情感共现统计进行联合推理以提升情感预测的结构一致性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建EmoScene基准（4731个上下文丰富场景，8维情感向量标注），并提出纠缠感知贝叶斯推理框架，利用情感共现统计进行联合后验推断。
contributions: 提出EmoScene基准，包含4731个上下文丰富场景和8维情感向量标注，基于Plutchik基本情感理论。
提出纠缠感知贝叶斯推理框架，利用情感共现统计进行联合后验推断，提升情感预测的结构一致性。
analysis.experiments: 在EmoScene上评估6个指令微调大语言模型（零样本），最佳模型Macro F1为0.501；贝叶斯框架对弱模型有提升（如Qwen2.5-7B提升+0.051 Macro F1）。
limitations: 基准规模有限（4731个场景），可能不足以覆盖所有情感维度。
贝叶斯框架依赖情感共现统计，可能受数据稀疏性影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出多维度情感理解基准EmoScene和基于贝叶斯推理的纠缠感知框架，提升情感预测的结构一致性。

papers.title: Multicentric thrombus segmentation using an attention-based recurrent network with gradual modality dropout
papers.abstract: Detecting and delineating tiny targets in 3D brain scans is a central yet under-addressed challenge in medical imaging.In ischemic stroke, for instance, the culprit thrombus is small, low-contrast, and variably expressed across modalities(e.g., susceptibility-weighted T2 blooming, diffusion restriction on DWI/ADC), while real-world multi-center dataintroduce domain shifts, anisotropy, and frequent missing sequences. We introduce a methodology that couples an attention-based recurrent segmentation network (UpAttLLSTM), a training schedule that progressively increases the difficulty of hetero-modal learning, with gradual modality dropout, UpAttLLSTM aggregates context across slices via recurrent units (2.5D) and uses attention gates to fuse complementary cues across available sequences, making it robust to anisotropy and class imbalance. Gradual modality dropout systematically simulates site heterogeneity,noise, and missing modalities during training, acting as both augmentation and regularization to improve multi-center generalization. On a monocentric cohort, our approach detects thrombi in >90% of cases with a Dice score of 0.65. In a multi-center setting with missing modalities, it achieves-80% detection with a Dice score around 0.35. Beyond stroke, the proposed methodology directly transfers to other small-lesion tasks in 3D medical imaging where targets are scarce, subtle, and modality-dependent

analysis.tldr: 提出结合注意力循环网络与渐进模态丢弃的方法，提升多中心脑卒中血栓分割的鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: 3D脑扫描中微小目标（如血栓）检测与分割是医学影像的难点，现有方法对多中心数据中的域偏移、各向异性和缺失模态鲁棒性不足。
analysis.problem: 解决多中心、多模态3D医学影像中微小低对比度目标（如血栓）的分割问题，特别是应对模态缺失和域差异。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出UpAttLLSTM注意力循环分割网络，结合2.5D循环单元聚合切片上下文和注意力门融合多模态互补信息；并采用渐进模态丢弃训练策略，模拟模态缺失和噪声，增强多中心泛化。
contributions: 提出UpAttLLSTM网络，利用注意力机制和循环单元处理各向异性和类别不平衡。
引入渐进模态丢弃训练策略，作为数据增强和正则化，提升多中心泛化能力。
analysis.experiments: 在单中心队列中检测率>90%，Dice 0.65；多中心缺失模态场景下检测率约80%，Dice约0.35。
limitations: Dice分数在缺失模态场景下较低（0.35），可能仍有改进空间。
方法仅在血栓分割任务上验证，其他小病灶任务需进一步实验。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出结合注意力循环网络与渐进模态丢弃的方法，提升多中心脑卒中血栓分割的鲁棒性。

papers.title: DVGT-2: Vision-Geometry-Action Model for Autonomous Driving at Scale
papers.abstract: End-to-end autonomous driving has evolved from the conventional paradigm based on sparse perception into vision-language-action (VLA) models, which focus on learning language descriptions as an auxiliary task to facilitate planning. In this paper, we propose an alternative Vision-Geometry-Action (VGA) paradigm that advocates dense 3D geometry as the critical cue for autonomous driving. As vehicles operate in a 3D world, we think dense 3D geometry provides the most comprehensive information for decision-making. However, most existing geometry reconstruction methods (e.g., DVGT) rely on computationally expensive batch processing of multi-frame inputs and cannot be applied to online planning. To address this, we introduce a streaming Driving Visual Geometry Transformer (DVGT-2), which processes inputs in an online manner and jointly outputs dense geometry and trajectory planning for the current frame. We employ temporal causal attention and cache historical features to support on-the-fly inference. To further enhance efficiency, we propose a sliding-window streaming strategy and use historical caches within a certain interval to avoid repetitive computations. Despite the faster speed, DVGT-2 achieves superior geometry reconstruction performance on various datasets. The same trained DVGT-2 can be directly applied to planning across diverse camera configurations without fine-tuning, including closed-loop NAVSIM and open-loop nuScenes benchmarks.

analysis.tldr: 提出流式视觉几何-动作模型DVGT-2，通过在线稠密3D几何重建实现端到端自动驾驶规划。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有VLA模型依赖语言描述作为辅助任务，而稠密3D几何能为决策提供更全面的信息，但传统几何重建方法计算昂贵且无法在线规划。
analysis.problem: 如何实现高效的在线稠密3D几何重建并直接用于自动驾驶轨迹规划。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出流式驾驶视觉几何Transformer（DVGT-2），采用时序因果注意力与历史特征缓存实现逐帧在线推理，并设计滑动窗口流式策略避免重复计算。
contributions: 提出VGA范式，以稠密3D几何作为自动驾驶关键线索。
设计DVGT-2实现高效的在线几何重建与轨迹规划联合输出。
在多种数据集上取得优越几何重建性能，且无需微调即可直接应用于不同相机配置的规划任务。
analysis.experiments: 在多个数据集上评估几何重建性能，并在闭环NAVSIM和开环nuScenes基准上测试规划能力。
limitations: 可能对极端动态场景的鲁棒性有限。
滑动窗口策略可能限制长时序依赖的建模。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出流式视觉几何-动作模型DVGT-2，通过在线稠密3D几何重建实现端到端自动驾驶规划。

papers.title: Revisiting Human-in-the-Loop Object Retrieval with Pre-Trained Vision Transformers
papers.abstract: Building on existing approaches, we revisit Human-in-the-Loop Object Retrieval, a task that consists of iteratively retrieving images containing objects of a class-of-interest, specified by a user-provided query. Starting from a large unlabeled image collection, the aim is to rapidly identify diverse instances of an object category relying solely on the initial query and the user's Relevance Feedback, with no prior labels. The retrieval process is formulated as a binary classification task, where the system continuously learns to distinguish between relevant and non-relevant images to the query, through iterative user interaction. This interaction is guided by an Active Learning loop: at each iteration, the system selects informative samples for user annotation, thereby refining the retrieval performance. This task is particularly challenging in multi-object datasets, where the object of interest may occupy only a small region of the image within a complex, cluttered scene. Unlike object-centered settings where global descriptors often suffice, multi-object images require more adapted, localized descriptors. In this work, we formulate and revisit the Human-in-the-Loop Object Retrieval task by leveraging pre-trained ViT representations, and addressing key design questions, including which object instances to consider in an image, what form the annotations should take, how Active Selection should be applied, and which representation strategies best capture the object's features. We compare several representation strategies across multi-object datasets highlighting trade-offs between capturing the global context and focusing on fine-grained local object details. Our results offer practical insights for the design of effective interactive retrieval pipelines based on Active Learning for object class retrieval.

analysis.tldr: 利用预训练ViT重新审视人机交互式目标检索，通过主动学习迭代优化分类器。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有方法在复杂多目标场景中，全局描述符不足以捕获小目标特征，需要更适配的局部描述符。
analysis.problem: 如何设计基于预训练ViT的交互式目标检索流程，包括样本选择、标注形式、主动选择策略和表征策略。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 多目标图像中目标仅占小区域，全局描述符效果有限，需要权衡全局上下文与局部细节。
analysis.method: 将检索视为二分类任务，利用预训练ViT提取特征，通过主动学习循环选择信息样本供用户标注，迭代优化分类器。
contributions: 重新审视并形式化了人机交互式目标检索任务，基于预训练ViT提出系统方案。
比较了多种表征策略，揭示了全局与局部特征之间的权衡。
提供了设计有效交互式检索管道的实用见解。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖用户标注质量，未讨论标注噪声影响。
仅针对目标类别检索，未扩展到其他检索任务。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用预训练ViT重新审视人机交互式目标检索，通过主动学习迭代优化分类器。

papers.title: Compact Keyframe-Optimized Multi-Agent Gaussian Splatting SLAM
papers.abstract: Efficient multi-agent 3D mapping is essential for robotic teams operating in unknown environments, but dense representations hinder real-time exchange over constrained communication links. In multi-agent Simultaneous Localization and Mapping (SLAM), systems typically rely on a centralized server to merge and optimize the local maps produced by individual agents. However, sharing these large map representations, particularly those generated by recent methods such as Gaussian Splatting, becomes a bottleneck in real-world scenarios with limited bandwidth. We present an improved multi-agent RGB-D Gaussian Splatting SLAM framework that reduces communication load while preserving map fidelity. First, we incorporate a compaction step into our SLAM system to remove redundant 3D Gaussians, without degrading the rendering quality. Second, our approach performs centralized loop closure computation without initial guess, operating in two modes: a pure rendered-depth mode that requires no data beyond the 3D Gaussians, and a camera-depth mode that includes lightweight depth images for improved registration accuracy and additional Gaussian pruning. Evaluation on both synthetic and real-world datasets shows up to 85-95\% reduction in transmitted data compared to state-of-the-art approaches in both modes, bringing 3D Gaussian multi-agent SLAM closer to practical deployment in real-world scenarios. Code: https://github.com/lemonci/coko-slam

analysis.tldr: 提出一种紧凑关键帧优化的多智能体高斯泼溅SLAM框架，在保持地图质量的同时减少85-95%的通信数据。
analysis.research_motivation: 多智能体3D建图中，密集表示（如高斯泼溅）在有限带宽下实时共享成为瓶颈，现有方法通信负载过高，阻碍实际部署。
analysis.problem: 如何减少多智能体高斯泼溅SLAM中的通信数据量，同时保持地图渲染质量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 在SLAM系统中引入紧凑化步骤去除冗余3D高斯，并设计两种集中式闭环检测模式（纯渲染深度模式和相机深度模式），后者使用轻量深度图像提升配准精度并进一步修剪高斯。
contributions: 提出一种紧凑关键帧优化的多智能体高斯泼溅SLAM框架，显著降低通信负载。
设计两种闭环检测模式，在减少数据量的同时保持或提升地图质量。
analysis.experiments: 在合成和真实数据集上评估，两种模式下相比现有方法传输数据减少85-95%。
limitations: 可能依赖RGB-D输入，不适用于纯单目场景。
闭环检测的精度在纯渲染深度模式下可能受限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种紧凑关键帧优化的多智能体高斯泼溅SLAM框架，在保持地图质量的同时减少85-95%的通信数据。

papers.title: Routing-Free Mixture-of-Experts
papers.abstract: Standard Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) models rely on centralized routing mechanisms that introduce rigid inductive biases. We propose Routing-Free MoE which eliminates any hard-coded centralized designs including external routers, Softmax, Top-K and load balancing, instead encapsulating all activation functionalities within individual experts and directly optimized through continuous gradient flow, enabling each expert to determine its activation entirely on its own. We introduce a unified adaptive load-balancing framework to simultaneously optimize both expert-balancing and token-balancing objectives through a configurable interpolation, allowing flexible and customizable resource allocation. Extensive experiments show that Routing-Free MoE can consistently outperform baselines with better scalability and robustness. We analyze its behavior in detail and offer insights that may facilitate future MoE design ad optimization.

analysis.tldr: 提出无路由MoE，每个专家自主决定激活，消除集中式路由机制。
analysis.research_motivation: 标准MoE依赖集中式路由，引入刚性归纳偏置，限制了模型灵活性和可扩展性。
analysis.problem: 如何消除MoE中的集中式路由机制，让专家自主决定激活并实现自适应负载均衡。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: Routing-Free MoE：移除外部路由器、Softmax、Top-K和负载均衡，通过连续梯度流直接优化专家激活；引入统一自适应负载均衡框架，通过可配置插值同时优化专家均衡和令牌均衡。
contributions: 提出无路由MoE架构，消除集中式路由设计。
引入统一自适应负载均衡框架，灵活分配资源。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能在大规模部署时负载均衡插值参数调优复杂。
缺乏与标准MoE在推理效率上的直接对比。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出无路由MoE，每个专家自主决定激活，消除集中式路由机制。

papers.title: Multimodal Language Models Cannot Spot Spatial Inconsistencies
papers.abstract: Spatial consistency is a fundamental property of the visual world and a key requirement for models that aim to understand physical reality. Despite recent advances, multimodal large language models (MLLMs) often struggle to reason about 3D geometry across multiple views. Rather than asking models to describe scene attributes, we introduce a more challenging task: given two views of the same scene, identify the object that violates 3D motion consistency. We propose a simple and scalable method for generating realistic, spatially inconsistent image pairs from multi-view scenes, enabling systematic evaluation of this capability. Our results show that state-of-the-art MLLMs significantly underperform human observers and exhibit substantial variability across different scene attributes, revealing a fragile and incomplete understanding of 3D structure. We hope our findings underscore the need for approaches that develop a more deeply grounded understanding of the physical world.

analysis.tldr: 多模态大模型在检测跨视图3D运动一致性方面远不如人类，暴露了其对物理世界理解的脆弱性。
analysis.research_motivation: 空间一致性是视觉世界的基本属性，但现有MLLM对3D几何的跨视图推理能力不足，缺乏系统性评估方法。
analysis.problem: MLLM无法可靠识别多视图场景中违反3D运动一致性的物体。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出SOTA MLLM在检测空间不一致性任务上显著低于人类，且在不同场景属性上表现差异大，表明其对3D结构的理解不完整且脆弱。
analysis.method: 提出一种简单可扩展的方法，从多视图场景生成真实的空间不一致图像对，用于系统评估MLLM的3D运动一致性检测能力。
contributions: 定义了一个新的挑战性任务：从两个视图识别违反3D运动一致性的物体。
提出一种简单可扩展的生成空间不一致图像对的方法，支持系统评估。
实验揭示SOTA MLLM在此任务上远逊于人类，且表现不稳定。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 方法可能仅适用于特定类型的多视图场景。
未讨论如何改进MLLM以解决该问题。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 多模态大模型在检测跨视图3D运动一致性方面远不如人类，暴露了其对物理世界理解的脆弱性。

papers.title: Preference Guided Iterated Pareto Referent Optimisation for Accessible Route Planning
papers.abstract: We propose the Preference Guided Iterated Pareto Referent Optimisation (PG-IPRO) for urban route planning for people with different accessibility requirements and preferences. With this algorithm the user can interact with the system by giving feedback on a route, i.e., the user can say which objective should be further minimized, or conversely can be relaxed. This leads to intuitive user interaction, that is especially effective during early iterations compared to information-gain-based interaction. Furthermore, due to PG-IPRO's iterative nature, the full set of alternative, possibly optimal policies (the Pareto front), is never computed, leading to higher computational efficiency and shorter waiting times for users.

analysis.tldr: 提出PG-IPRO算法，通过用户偏好反馈迭代优化帕累托前沿，实现高效无障碍路径规划。
analysis.research_motivation: 城市路径规划需满足不同用户的个性化无障碍需求，传统方法计算完整帕累托前沿效率低，且用户交互不直观。
analysis.problem: 如何高效生成符合用户偏好的无障碍路径，同时减少计算开销和等待时间。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 基于信息增益的交互在早期迭代中效果较差，而基于偏好反馈的交互更直观有效。
analysis.method: 提出PG-IPRO算法，用户通过反馈指定目标优化或放松方向，迭代逼近帕累托前沿，避免完整计算。
contributions: 提出PG-IPRO算法，结合用户偏好反馈与迭代帕累托优化，提升交互直观性。
避免完整帕累托前沿计算，显著提高计算效率，缩短用户等待时间。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖用户反馈的准确性和一致性。
未讨论多目标冲突时的收敛保证。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出PG-IPRO算法，通过用户偏好反馈迭代优化帕累托前沿，实现高效无障碍路径规划。

papers.title: HICT: High-precision 3D CBCT reconstruction from a single X-ray
papers.abstract: Accurate 3D dental imaging is vital for diagnosis and treatment planning, yet CBCT's high radiation dose and cost limit its accessibility. Reconstructing 3D volumes from a single low-dose panoramic X-ray is a promising alternative but remains challenging due to geometric inconsistencies and limited accuracy. We propose HiCT, a two-stage framework that first generates geometrically consistent multi-view projections from a single panoramic image using a video diffusion model, and then reconstructs high-fidelity CBCT from the projections using a ray-based dynamic attention network and an X-ray sampling strategy. To support this, we built XCT, a large-scale dataset combining public CBCT data with 500 paired PX-CBCT cases. Extensive experiments show that HiCT achieves state-of-the-art performance, delivering accurate and geometrically consistent reconstructions for clinical use.

analysis.tldr: 提出HiCT两阶段框架，从单张全景X光片生成多视角投影并重建高精度3D CBCT图像。
analysis.research_motivation: CBCT辐射剂量高、成本高，限制了其可及性；从单张低剂量全景X光重建3D体积是低辐射替代方案，但存在几何不一致性和精度不足的问题。
analysis.problem: 如何从单张全景X光片重建高精度、几何一致的3D CBCT图像。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 两阶段框架：先使用视频扩散模型从单张全景图像生成几何一致的多视角投影，再通过基于射线的动态注意力网络和X射线采样策略从投影重建高保真CBCT。
contributions: 提出HiCT，首个从单张全景X光重建高精度3D CBCT的两阶段框架。
构建XCT大规模数据集，包含公共CBCT数据和500对PX-CBCT病例。
analysis.experiments: 在XCT数据集上进行实验，达到最先进性能，重建结果准确且几何一致。
limitations: 可能依赖数据集规模和质量，泛化性需进一步验证。
视频扩散模型的计算成本可能较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出HiCT两阶段框架，从单张全景X光片生成多视角投影并重建高精度3D CBCT图像。

papers.title: RefineRL: Advancing Competitive Programming with Self-Refinement Reinforcement Learning
papers.abstract: While large language models (LLMs) have demonstrated strong performance on complex reasoning tasks such as competitive programming (CP), existing methods predominantly focus on single-attempt settings, overlooking their capacity for iterative refinement. In this paper, we present RefineRL, a novel approach designed to unleash the self-refinement capabilities of LLMs for CP problem solving. RefineRL introduces two key innovations: (1) Skeptical-Agent, an iterative self-refinement agent equipped with local execution tools to validate generated solutions against public test cases of CP problems. This agent always maintains a skeptical attitude towards its own outputs and thereby enforces rigorous self-refinement even when validation suggests correctness. (2) A reinforcement learning (RL) solution to incentivize LLMs to self-refine with only standard RLVR data (i.e., problems paired with their verifiable answers). Extensive experiments on Qwen3-4B and Qwen3-4B-2507 demonstrate that our method yields substantial gains: after our RL training, these compact 4B models integrated with the Skeptical-Agent not only outperform much larger 32B models but also approach the single-attempt performance of 235B models. These findings suggest that self-refinement holds considerable promise for scaling LLM reasoning, with significant potential for further advancement.

analysis.tldr: 提出RefineRL，通过怀疑代理和强化学习激发LLM在竞技编程中的自我改进能力，4B模型超越32B模型。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM在竞技编程等复杂推理任务中主要关注单次尝试，忽略了迭代改进的潜力，而自我改进能力对于提升推理性能至关重要。
analysis.problem: 如何有效激发和训练LLM在竞技编程问题解决中的自我改进能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出RefineRL，包含两个创新：Skeptical-Agent（持怀疑态度的迭代自我改进代理，使用本地执行工具验证解决方案）和基于强化学习的训练方法，仅使用标准RLVR数据（问题与可验证答案配对）来激励LLM进行自我改进。
contributions: 提出Skeptical-Agent，一种迭代自我改进代理，通过保持怀疑态度强制进行严格的自我改进。
设计基于强化学习的训练方法，仅使用标准RLVR数据即可有效激励LLM自我改进。
实验表明，4B模型集成Skeptical-Agent后超越32B模型，接近235B模型的单次尝试性能。
analysis.experiments: 在Qwen3-4B和Qwen3-4B-2507上进行了广泛实验，结果显示经过RL训练后，这些紧凑的4B模型集成Skeptical-Agent不仅优于更大的32B模型，而且接近235B模型的单次尝试性能。
limitations: 方法可能依赖于可验证的测试用例，对于没有明确验证信号的任务可能不适用。
实验仅在竞技编程领域进行，泛化到其他推理任务有待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出RefineRL，通过怀疑代理和强化学习激发LLM在竞技编程中的自我改进能力，4B模型超越32B模型。

papers.title: UK AISI Alignment Evaluation Case-Study
papers.abstract: This technical report presents methods developed by the UK AI Security Institute for assessing whether advanced AI systems reliably follow intended goals. Specifically, we evaluate whether frontier models sabotage safety research when deployed as coding assistants within an AI lab. Applying our methods to four frontier models, we find no confirmed instances of research sabotage. However, we observe that Claude Opus 4.5 Preview (a pre-release snapshot of Opus 4.5) and Sonnet 4.5 frequently refuse to engage with safety-relevant research tasks, citing concerns about research direction, involvement in self-training, and research scope. We additionally find that Opus 4.5 Preview shows reduced unprompted evaluation awareness compared to Sonnet 4.5, while both models can distinguish evaluation from deployment scenarios when prompted. Our evaluation framework builds on Petri, an open-source LLM auditing tool, with a custom scaffold designed to simulate realistic internal deployment of a coding agent. We validate that this scaffold produces trajectories that all tested models fail to reliably distinguish from real deployment data. We test models across scenarios varying in research motivation, activity type, replacement threat, and model autonomy. Finally, we discuss limitations including scenario coverage and evaluation awareness.

analysis.tldr: UK AISI 评估前沿模型在编码助手场景中是否破坏安全研究，未发现确认案例但观察到模型拒绝参与安全任务。
analysis.research_motivation: 随着 AI 系统能力增强，确保其可靠地遵循预期目标变得至关重要，尤其是防止前沿模型在部署中破坏安全研究。
analysis.problem: 评估前沿模型在作为编码助手部署时是否会故意破坏安全研究。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: Claude Opus 4.5 Preview 和 Sonnet 4.5 频繁拒绝参与安全相关研究任务，理由包括对研究方向、参与自我训练和研究范围的担忧；Opus 4.5 Preview 在无提示时评估意识较低，但两者在提示下能区分评估与部署场景。
analysis.method: 基于开源 LLM 审计工具 Petri 构建自定义脚手架，模拟编码代理在 AI 实验室内部的真实部署，并验证脚手架产生的轨迹无法被模型可靠区分于真实部署数据。
contributions: 提出了评估前沿模型是否破坏安全研究的系统方法
构建了模拟真实部署的评估框架并验证其有效性
analysis.experiments: 对四个前沿模型进行测试，场景变化包括研究动机、活动类型、替代威胁和模型自主性。
limitations: 场景覆盖有限
评估意识可能影响结果
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: UK AISI 评估前沿模型在编码助手场景中是否破坏安全研究，未发现确认案例但观察到模型拒绝参与安全任务。

papers.title: Scalable Pretraining of Large Mixture of Experts Language Models on Aurora Super Computer
papers.abstract: Pretraining Large Language Models (LLMs) from scratch requires massive amount of compute. Aurora super computer is an ExaScale machine with 127,488 Intel PVC (Ponte Vechio) GPU tiles. In this work, we showcase LLM pretraining on Aurora at the scale of 1000s of GPU tiles. Towards this effort, we developed Optimus, an inhouse training library with support for standard large model training techniques. Using Optimus, we first pretrained Mula-1B, a 1 Billion dense model and Mula-7B-A1B, a 7 Billion Mixture of Experts (MoE) model from scratch on 3072 GPU tiles for the full 4 trillion tokens of the OLMoE-mix-0924 dataset. We then demonstrated model scaling by pretraining three large MoE models Mula-20B-A2B, Mula-100B-A7B, and Mula-220B-A10B till 100 Billion tokens on the same dataset. On our largest model Mula-220B-A10B, we pushed the compute scaling from 384 to 12288 GPU tiles and observed scaling efficiency of around 90% at 12288 GPU tiles. We significantly improved the runtime performance of MoE models using custom GPU kernels for expert computation, and a novel EP-Aware sharded optimizer resulting in training speedups up to 1.71x. As part of the Optimus library, we also developed a robust set of reliability and fault tolerant features to improve training stability and continuity at scale.

analysis.tldr: 在Aurora超算上实现大规模MoE语言模型的高效预训练，提出Optimus库和EP-Aware优化器，在12288 GPU上达到约90%的扩展效率。
analysis.research_motivation: 大规模LLM预训练需要海量计算资源，现有系统在ExaScale超算上的扩展性和效率面临挑战，亟需针对大规模GPU集群优化的训练框架。
analysis.problem: 如何在Aurora超算上高效预训练大规模MoE语言模型，并实现接近线性的扩展效率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 开发Optimus训练库，支持标准大模型训练技术；使用自定义GPU内核加速专家计算；提出EP-Aware分片优化器提升训练速度。
contributions: 在Aurora超算上从零预训练了Mula-1B、Mula-7B-A1B及三个更大MoE模型，最大模型Mula-220B-A10B在12288 GPU上达到约90%扩展效率。
提出Optimus库，包含自定义GPU内核和EP-Aware分片优化器，实现最高1.71倍训练加速。
开发了鲁棒的可靠性及容错特性，提升大规模训练稳定性。
analysis.experiments: 在3072 GPU上预训练Mula-1B和Mula-7B-A1B至4万亿tokens；在更大规模上预训练Mula-20B-A2B、Mula-100B-A7B、Mula-220B-A10B至1000亿tokens；扩展效率测试从384到12288 GPU，约90%效率。
limitations: 摘要未提供下游任务性能评估。
仅展示了1000亿tokens的预训练，未达到完整4万亿tokens。
analysis.primary_area_en: infrastructure, software libraries, hardware, systems, etc.
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 在Aurora超算上实现大规模MoE语言模型的高效预训练，提出Optimus库和EP-Aware优化器，在12288 GPU上达到约90%的扩展效率。

papers.title: An Approach to Enriching Surgical Video Datasets for Fine-Grained Spatial-Temporal Understanding of Vision-Language Models
papers.abstract: Surgical video understanding is a crucial prerequisite for advancing Computer-Assisted Surgery. While vision-language models (VLMs) have recently been applied to the surgical domain, existing surgical vision-language datasets lack in capturing and evaluating complex, interleaved spatial-temporal dynamics. Creating large scale datasets that accurately represent fine-grained spatial-temporal relationships in surgical videos is challenging due to costly manual annotations or error-prone generation using large language models. To address this gap, we introduce the SurgSTU-Pipeline, a deterministic generation pipeline featuring temporal and spatial continuity filtering to reliably create surgical datasets for fine-grained spatial-temporal multimodal understanding. Applying this pipeline to publicly available surgical datasets, we create the SurgSTU dataset, comprising 7515 video clips densely extended with 150k fine-grained spatial-temporal question-answer samples. Our comprehensive evaluation shows that while state-of-the-art generalist VLMs struggle in zero-shot settings, their spatial-temporal capabilities can be improved through in-context learning. A fine-tuned VLM on the SurgSTU training dataset achieves highest performance among all spatial-temporal tasks, validating the dataset's efficacy to improve spatial-temporal understanding of VLMs in surgical videos. Code will be made publicly available.

analysis.tldr: 提出SurgSTU-Pipeline生成高质量手术视频时空问答数据集，微调VLM显著提升细粒度时空理解。
analysis.research_motivation: 手术视频理解对计算机辅助手术至关重要，但现有数据集缺乏对复杂时空动态的捕捉和评估，且大规模标注成本高或生成质量不可靠。
analysis.problem: 缺乏能够准确表示手术视频中细粒度时空关系的大规模数据集。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 最先进通用VLM在零样本设置下表现不佳，但通过上下文学习可提升时空能力。
analysis.method: 提出SurgSTU-Pipeline，包含时序和空间连续性过滤的确定性生成流程，用于创建细粒度时空多模态理解数据集。
contributions: 提出SurgSTU-Pipeline，一种确定性数据集生成流程，确保时空连续性。
构建SurgSTU数据集，包含7515个视频片段和150k细粒度时空问答对。
实验证明微调VLM在时空任务上达到最优性能，验证数据集有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在SurgSTU数据集上评估了多种VLM，包括零样本、上下文学习和微调设置，微调模型在所有时空任务上取得最高性能。
limitations: 数据集仅基于公开手术视频，可能未覆盖所有手术类型。
生成流程依赖确定性规则，可能无法捕捉所有复杂时空关系。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出SurgSTU-Pipeline生成高质量手术视频时空问答数据集，微调VLM显著提升细粒度时空理解。

papers.title: Using predefined vector systems to speed up neural network multimillion class classification
papers.abstract: Label prediction in neural networks (NNs) has O(n) complexity proportional to the number of classes. This holds true for classification using fully connected layers and cosine similarity with some set of class prototypes. In this paper we show that if NN latent space (LS) geometry is known and possesses specific properties, label prediction complexity can be significantly reduced. This is achieved by associating label prediction with the O(1) complexity closest cluster center search in a vector system used as target for latent space configuration (LSC). The proposed method only requires finding indexes of several largest and lowest values in the embedding vector making it extremely computationally efficient. We show that the proposed method does not change NN training accuracy computational results. We also measure the time required by different computational stages of NN inference and label prediction on multiple datasets. The experiments show that the proposed method allows to achieve up to 11.6 times overall acceleration over conventional methods. Furthermore, the proposed method has unique properties which allow to predict the existence of new classes.

analysis.tldr: 利用预定义向量系统将标签预测复杂度从O(n)降至O(1)，实现多类分类加速。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统神经网络多类分类中标签预测复杂度与类别数线性相关，当类别数极大时成为瓶颈，亟需高效方法。
analysis.problem: 如何降低神经网络多类分类中标签预测的计算复杂度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 利用预定义向量系统（如球面码）作为潜在空间配置目标，将标签预测转化为O(1)复杂度的最近簇中心搜索，仅需查找嵌入向量中若干最大和最小值索引。
contributions: 提出一种将标签预测复杂度从O(n)降至O(1)的方法，仅需查找最大/最小值索引。
实验表明该方法在多个数据集上实现高达11.6倍的整体加速，且不改变训练精度。
方法具有预测新类别存在的独特性质。
analysis.experiments: 在多个数据集上测量了神经网络推理和标签预测各阶段的时间，显示最高11.6倍加速。
limitations: 依赖潜在空间具有特定几何性质（如球面结构），可能不适用于所有模型。
加速效果可能受数据集和模型架构影响，泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用预定义向量系统将标签预测复杂度从O(n)降至O(1)，实现多类分类加速。

papers.title: Thinking Wrong in Silence: Backdoor Attacks on Continuous Latent Reasoning
papers.abstract: A new generation of language models reasons entirely in continuous hidden states, producing no tokens and leaving no audit trail. We show that this silence creates a fundamentally new attack surface. ThoughtSteer perturbs a single embedding vector at the input layer; the model's own multi-pass reasoning amplifies this perturbation into a hijacked latent trajectory that reliably produces the attacker's chosen answer, while remaining structurally invisible to every token-level defense. Across two architectures (Coconut and SimCoT), three reasoning benchmarks, and model scales from 124M to 3B parameters, ThoughtSteer achieves >=99% attack success rate with near-baseline clean accuracy, transfers to held-out benchmarks without retraining (94-100%), evades all five evaluated active defenses, and survives 25 epochs of clean fine-tuning. We trace these results to a unifying mechanism: Neural Collapse in the latent space pulls triggered representations onto a tight geometric attractor, explaining both why defenses fail and why any effective backdoor must leave a linearly separable signature (probe AUC>=0.999). Yet a striking paradox emerges: individual latent vectors still encode the correct answer even as the model outputs the wrong one. The adversarial information is not in any single vector but in the collective trajectory, establishing backdoor perturbations as a new lens for mechanistic interpretability of continuous reasoning. Code and checkpoints are available.

analysis.tldr: 针对连续隐空间推理模型的后门攻击方法，利用神经坍缩实现高成功率且无法被现有防御检测。
analysis.research_motivation: 新一代语言模型在连续隐空间中进行推理，不产生可审计的token，导致现有基于token的防御失效，存在严重安全隐患。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种针对连续隐空间推理模型的后门攻击，使其在保持模型正常性能的同时，无法被现有防御机制检测。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要揭示了神经坍缩机制：触发样本的隐表示被拉向一个紧致的几何吸引子，导致后门攻击具有高成功率和防御逃逸能力；同时发现单个隐向量仍编码正确答案，但模型输出错误答案，表明对抗信息存在于集体轨迹而非单个向量。
analysis.method: ThoughtSteer：在输入层扰动单个嵌入向量，利用模型的多轮推理放大扰动，劫持隐空间轨迹，使模型输出攻击者选择的答案。
contributions: 首次提出针对连续隐空间推理模型的后门攻击方法ThoughtSteer，在多个架构和基准上实现>=99%攻击成功率且保持近基线干净准确率。
揭示神经坍缩是攻击成功和防御失败的根本机制，并发现隐空间轨迹中的对抗信息为连续推理的可解释性提供新视角。
analysis.experiments: 在Coconut和SimCoT两种架构、三个推理基准、124M到3B参数规模上评估，攻击成功率>=99%，干净准确率接近基线；攻击可迁移至未见过基准（94-100%），逃逸所有五种主动防御，且经过25轮干净微调后仍有效。
limitations: 攻击需要攻击者能够控制输入嵌入向量，实际部署中可能受限。
方法依赖于模型的多轮推理机制，对于单步推理模型可能不适用。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 针对连续隐空间推理模型的后门攻击方法，利用神经坍缩实现高成功率且无法被现有防御检测。

papers.title: PrivHAR-Bench: A Graduated Privacy Benchmark Dataset for Video-Based Action Recognition
papers.abstract: Existing research on privacy-preserving Human Activity Recognition (HAR) typically evaluates methods against a binary paradigm: clear video versus a single privacy transformation. This limits cross-method comparability and obscures the nuanced relationship between privacy strength and recognition utility. We introduce \textit{PrivHAR-Bench}, a multi-tier benchmark dataset designed to standardize the evaluation of the \textit{Privacy-Utility Trade-off} in video-based action recognition. PrivHAR-Bench applies a graduated spectrum of visual privacy transformations: from lightweight spatial obfuscation to cryptographic block permutation, to a curated subset of 15 activity classes selected for human articulation diversity. Each of the 1,932 source videos is distributed across 9 parallel tiers of increasing privacy strength, with additional background-removed variants to isolate the contribution of human motion features from contextual scene bias. We provide lossless frame sequences, per-frame bounding boxes, estimated pose keypoints with joint-level confidence scores, standardized group-based train/test splits, and an evaluation toolkit computing recognition accuracy and privacy metrics. Empirical validation using R3D-18 demonstrates a measurable and interpretable degradation curve across tiers, with within-tier accuracy declining from 88.8\% (clear) to 53.5\% (encrypted, background-removed) and cross-domain accuracy collapsing to 4.8\%, establishing PrivHAR-Bench as a controlled benchmark for comparing privacy-preserving HAR methods under standardized conditions. The dataset, generation pipeline, and evaluation code are publicly available.

analysis.tldr: 提出一个多层级隐私基准数据集PrivHAR-Bench，用于标准化视频动作识别中的隐私-效用权衡评估。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有隐私保护HAR研究通常采用二元范式（清晰视频 vs 单一隐私变换），导致跨方法可比性差，且模糊了隐私强度与识别效用之间的细微关系。
analysis.problem: 缺乏一个标准化、多层级、可比较的基准数据集来系统评估视频动作识别中的隐私-效用权衡。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建PrivHAR-Bench数据集：从15个动作类别的1932个源视频出发，应用9个逐渐增强的隐私变换层级（从轻量空间模糊到加密块置换），并提供背景移除变体、无损帧序列、边界框、姿态关键点、标准化划分和评估工具包。
contributions: 提出了一个多层级隐私基准数据集PrivHAR-Bench，包含9个隐私强度层级和背景移除变体。
提供了标准化评估工具包，包括识别准确率和隐私度量，并基于R3D-18进行了实证验证，展示了可测量的性能退化曲线。
analysis.experiments: 使用R3D-18进行实证验证，结果显示同域准确率从88.8%（清晰）下降到53.5%（加密+背景移除），跨域准确率降至4.8%。
limitations: 仅基于15个动作类别，可能无法覆盖所有现实场景。
隐私变换的强度层级可能未涵盖所有可能的隐私保护技术。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一个多层级隐私基准数据集PrivHAR-Bench，用于标准化视频动作识别中的隐私-效用权衡评估。

papers.title: IWP: Token Pruning as Implicit Weight Pruning in Large Vision Language Models
papers.abstract: Large Vision Language Models show impressive performance across image and video understanding tasks, yet their computational cost grows rapidly with the number of visual tokens. Existing token pruning methods mitigate this issue through empirical approaches while overlooking the internal mechanism of attention. In this paper, we propose a novel training free token pruning framework grounded in the dual form perspective of attention. We reformulate attention as an implicit linear layer whose weight matrix is the sum of rank 1 outer products, each generated by a single token's key value pair. Token pruning thus reduces to selecting an optimal subset of these rank 1 updates that best approximates the original dual weight matrix. Extending this perspective to standard softmax attention in LVLMs, we derive a novel metric quantifying both a token's information magnitude and information duplication. To efficiently select the subset with the proposed metric, we introduce Progressive Chunked Maximal Marginal Relevance. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method achieves a better trade off between performance and efficiency, while providing another perspective on existing pruning approaches.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种基于注意力对偶形式的免训练令牌剪枝框架，通过信息量与信息重复度指标实现高效视觉令牌选择。
analysis.research_motivation: 大型视觉语言模型（LVLM）在图像和视频理解任务中表现优异，但视觉令牌数量导致计算成本快速增长。现有剪枝方法缺乏对注意力内部机制的深入理解，通常依赖经验性策略。
analysis.problem: 如何在保持模型性能的同时，高效地剪枝冗余视觉令牌以降低计算开销？
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 注意力机制可视为隐式线性层，其权重矩阵由每个令牌的键值对生成的秩1外积之和构成；令牌剪枝等价于选择最优子集近似原始对偶权重矩阵。
analysis.method: 提出训练无关的令牌剪枝框架，基于注意力对偶形式推导出衡量令牌信息量（information magnitude）和信息重复度（information duplication）的指标，并采用渐进分块最大边际相关性（Progressive Chunked Maximal Marginal Relevance）高效选择子集。
contributions: 从注意力对偶形式角度重新解释令牌剪枝，揭示其与隐式权重剪枝的联系。
提出信息量与信息重复度指标，以及渐进分块选择算法，实现性能与效率的更好权衡。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定注意力机制（如softmax attention）。
渐进分块算法的效率与最优性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种基于注意力对偶形式的免训练令牌剪枝框架，通过信息量与信息重复度指标实现高效视觉令牌选择。

papers.title: Generative AI-Based Virtual Assistant using Retrieval-Augmented Generation: An evaluation study for bachelor projects
papers.abstract: Large Language Models have been increasingly employed in the creation of Virtual Assistants due to their ability to generate human-like text and handle complex inquiries. While these models hold great promise, challenges such as hallucinations, missing information, and the difficulty of providing accurate and context-specific responses persist, particularly when applied to highly specialized content domains. In this paper, we focus on addressing these challenges by developing a virtual assistant designed to support students at Maastricht University in navigating project-specific regulations. We propose a virtual assistant based on a Retrieval-Augmented Generation system that enhances the accuracy and reliability of responses by integrating up-to-date, domain-specific knowledge. Through a robust evaluation framework and real-life testing, we demonstrate that our virtual assistant can effectively meet the needs of students while addressing the inherent challenges of applying Large Language Models to a specialized educational context. This work contributes to the ongoing discourse on improving LLM-based systems for specific applications and highlights areas for further research.

analysis.tldr: 基于RAG的虚拟助手用于大学本科项目，评估显示能有效提升回答准确性和可靠性。
analysis.research_motivation: 大型语言模型在虚拟助手中应用广泛，但在专业领域存在幻觉、信息缺失和上下文不准确等问题，需要提升其可靠性和领域适应性。
analysis.problem: 如何为特定教育场景（如本科项目规定）构建一个准确、可靠的虚拟助手，克服LLM在专业领域中的局限性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出基于检索增强生成（RAG）的虚拟助手，通过集成最新领域知识增强回答的准确性和可靠性。
contributions: 开发了一个针对大学本科项目规定的RAG虚拟助手。
通过评估框架和真实测试验证了系统在专业教育场景中的有效性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅针对特定大学和项目规定，泛化性有限。
未详细说明评估指标和对比基线。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 基于RAG的虚拟助手用于大学本科项目，评估显示能有效提升回答准确性和可靠性。

papers.title: BioCOMPASS: Integrating Biomarkers into Transformer-Based Immunotherapy Response Prediction
papers.abstract: Datasets used in immunotherapy response prediction are typically small in size, as well as diverse in cancer type, drug administered, and sequencer used. Models often drop in performance when tested on patient cohorts that are not included in the training process. Recent work has shown that transformer-based models along with self-supervised learning show better generalisation performance than threshold-based biomarkers, but is still suboptimal. We present BioCOMPASS, an extension of a transformer-based model called COMPASS, that integrates biomarkers and treatment information to further improve its generalisability. Instead of feeding biomarker data as input, we built loss components to align them with the model's intermediate representations. We found that components such as treatment gating and pathway consistency loss improved generalisability when evaluated with Leave-one-cohort-out, Leave-one-cancer-type-out and Leave-one-treatment-out strategies. Results show that building components that exploit biomarker and treatment information can help in generalisability of immunotherapy response prediction. Careful curation of additional components that leverage complementary clinical information and domain knowledge represents a promising direction for future research.

analysis.tldr: 通过将生物标志物整合为损失组件而非输入特征，提升免疫治疗反应预测模型的泛化能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 免疫治疗反应预测数据集规模小、异质性高，现有模型在未见患者队列上性能下降，亟需提升泛化能力。
analysis.problem: 如何利用生物标志物和治疗信息提高基于Transformer的免疫治疗反应预测模型的泛化性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 直接将生物标志物作为输入效果不佳，而将其作为损失组件与模型中间表示对齐可改善泛化；治疗门控和通路一致性损失等组件在留一队列、留一癌症类型和留一治疗策略评估中有效。
analysis.method: 在COMPASS模型基础上，构建治疗门控和通路一致性损失等组件，将生物标志物和治疗信息与模型中间表示对齐，而非作为输入特征。
contributions: 提出BioCOMPASS框架，通过损失组件整合生物标志物和治疗信息，提升泛化能力。
在多种留一评估策略下验证了治疗门控和通路一致性损失的有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在多个免疫治疗数据集上采用留一队列、留一癌症类型和留一治疗策略进行评估，结果表明所提组件提升了泛化性。
limitations: 摘要未提供具体性能数值或与基线方法的定量比较。
可能依赖特定生物标志物和通路知识，扩展性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过将生物标志物整合为损失组件而非输入特征，提升免疫治疗反应预测模型的泛化能力。

papers.title: Spectral Compact Training: Pre-Training Large Language Models via Permanent Truncated SVD and Stiefel QR Retraction
papers.abstract: The memory wall remains the primary bottleneck for training large language models on consumer hardware. We introduce Spectral Compact Training (SCT), a method that replaces dense weight matrices with permanent truncated SVD factors W = U diag(s) V^T, where the full dense matrix is never materialized during training or inference. Gradients flow through the compact spectral factors via standard backpropagation, and U, V are retracted to the Stiefel manifold via QR decomposition after each optimizer step. SCT achieves up to 199x memory reduction per MLP layer at rank 32, enabling full training steps of 70B-parameter architectures on a Steam Deck handheld (7.2 GB peak memory vs. 1,245 GB for dense FP32 training with Adam). Rank-sweep experiments on SmolLM2-1.7B (ranks 32-256, 2000 steps, NVIDIA A100) show that all tested ranks converge to the same loss floor (~4.2-4.5), identifying the learning rate schedule -- not MLP rank -- as the primary bottleneck. Rank 128 emerges as the efficiency sweet spot at 11.7x MLP compression with the lowest perplexity. GPU memory drops 46% at rank 32 while training throughput doubles.

analysis.tldr: 用永久截断SVD替换全连接权重矩阵，在Steam Deck上训练70B模型，内存降低199倍。
analysis.research_motivation: 内存墙是消费级硬件训练大语言模型的主要瓶颈，现有方法无法在极低内存下完成完整训练。
analysis.problem: 如何在不实例化全连接权重矩阵的情况下，实现大语言模型的低内存训练。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 所有测试秩（32-256）收敛到相同损失下限（~4.2-4.5），表明学习率调度是主要瓶颈而非MLP秩；秩128在11.7倍MLP压缩下获得最低困惑度。
analysis.method: 用永久截断SVD分解W=U diag(s) V^T替代全连接权重矩阵，梯度通过标准反向传播流经谱因子，优化后通过QR分解将U、V回缩到Stiefel流形。
contributions: 提出Spectral Compact Training (SCT)，实现训练和推理中全连接权重矩阵永不实例化。
在Steam Deck上完成70B参数架构的完整训练步骤，峰值内存仅7.2GB（对比密集FP32训练需1245GB）。
analysis.experiments: 在SmolLM2-1.7B上进行秩扫描实验（32-256，2000步，NVIDIA A100），所有秩收敛到相同损失下限；秩128在11.7倍MLP压缩下获得最低困惑度；GPU内存降低46%（秩32），训练吞吐量翻倍。
limitations: 仅针对MLP层进行压缩，未涉及注意力层或其他模块。
秩扫描实验步数较少（2000步），可能未充分验证长期训练效果。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 用永久截断SVD替换全连接权重矩阵，在Steam Deck上训练70B模型，内存降低199倍。

papers.title: A CEFR-Inspired Classification Framework with Fuzzy C-Means To Automate Assessment of Programming Skills in Scratch
papers.abstract: Context: Schools, training platforms, and technology firms increasingly need to assess programming proficiency at scale with transparent, reproducible methods that support personalized learning pathways. Objective: This study introduces a pedagogical framework for Scratch project assessment, aligned with the Common European Framework of Reference (CEFR), providing universal competency levels for students and teachers alongside actionable insights for curriculum design. Method: We apply Fuzzy C-Means clustering to 2008246 Scratch projects evaluated via Dr.Scratch, implementing an ordinal criterion to map clusters to CEFR levels (A1-C2), and introducing enhanced classification metrics that identify transitional learners, enable continuous progress tracking, and quantify classification certainty to balance automated feedback with instructor review. Impact: The framework enables diagnosis of systemic curriculum gaps-notably a "B2 bottleneck" where only 13.3% of learners reside due to the cognitive load of integrating Logic Synchronization, and Data Representation--while providing certainty--based triggers for human intervention.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于CEFR和模糊C均值的Scratch编程技能自动评估框架，发现B2瓶颈并支持个性化反馈。
analysis.research_motivation: 学校、培训平台和科技公司需要大规模、透明、可复现的编程能力评估方法，以支持个性化学习路径，但现有方法缺乏统一的能力等级标准和自动评估机制。
analysis.problem: 如何自动、可解释地将Scratch项目映射到CEFR能力等级，并识别课程设计中的系统性差距。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现一个“B2瓶颈”：仅13.3%的学习者达到B2水平，原因是整合逻辑同步和数据表征的认知负荷过高。
analysis.method: 使用模糊C均值聚类对2008246个Scratch项目进行聚类，通过序数准则将聚类映射到CEFR等级（A1-C2），并引入增强分类指标（识别过渡学习者、连续进度跟踪、分类确定性量化）。
contributions: 提出一个基于CEFR的Scratch项目评估框架，提供通用能力等级和课程设计洞见。
应用模糊C均值聚类实现大规模自动分级，并引入确定性触发机制平衡自动反馈与人工审查。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅提及在2008246个Scratch项目上应用方法并发现B2瓶颈。
limitations: 依赖Dr.Scratch的评估指标，可能无法覆盖所有编程技能维度。
聚类映射到CEFR的序数准则可能引入主观性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于CEFR和模糊C均值的Scratch编程技能自动评估框架，发现B2瓶颈并支持个性化反馈。

papers.title: A Benchmark of State-Space Models vs. Transformers and BiLSTM-based Models for Historical Newspaper OCR
papers.abstract: End-to-end OCR for historical newspapers remains challenging, as models must handle long text sequences, degraded print quality, and complex layouts. While Transformer-based recognizers dominate current research, their quadratic complexity limits efficient paragraph-level transcription and large-scale deployment. We investigate linear-time State-Space Models (SSMs), specifically Mamba, as a scalable alternative to Transformer-based sequence modeling for OCR. We present to our knowledge, the first OCR architecture based on SSMs, combining a CNN visual encoder with bi-directional and autoregressive Mamba sequence modeling, and conduct a large-scale benchmark comparing SSMs with Transformer- and BiLSTM-based recognizers. Multiple decoding strategies (CTC, autoregressive, and non-autoregressive) are evaluated under identical training conditions alongside strong neural baselines (VAN, DAN, DANIEL) and widely used off-the-shelf OCR engines (PERO-OCR, Tesseract OCR, TrOCR, Gemini). Experiments on historical newspapers from the Bibliothèque nationale du Luxembourg, with newly released >99% verified gold-standard annotations, and cross-dataset tests on Fraktur and Antiqua lines, show that all neural models achieve low error rates (~2% CER), making computational efficiency the main differentiator. Mamba-based models maintain competitive accuracy while halving inference time and exhibiting superior memory scaling (1.26x vs 2.30x growth at 1000 chars), reaching 6.07% CER at the severely degraded paragraph level compared to 5.24% for DAN, while remaining 2.05x faster. We release code, trained models, and standardized evaluation protocols to enable reproducible research and guide practitioners in large-scale cultural heritage OCR.

analysis.tldr: 首个基于状态空间模型（Mamba）的OCR架构，在历史报纸识别中达到与Transformer相当的精度，但推理速度翻倍且内存扩展更优。
analysis.research_motivation: 历史报纸OCR面临长文本序列、低质量印刷和复杂布局的挑战，Transformer模型因二次复杂度难以高效处理段落级转录和大规模部署，需要更高效的序列建模替代方案。
analysis.problem: 如何设计线性复杂度的OCR架构，在保持高精度的同时提升推理效率和内存可扩展性，以适用于历史报纸的段落级识别。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 所有神经模型在行级识别上均达到约2% CER的低错误率，计算效率成为主要区分因素；Mamba模型在段落级严重退化场景下CER为6.07%，略高于DAN的5.24%，但速度优势显著。
analysis.method: 提出首个基于SSM的OCR架构，结合CNN视觉编码器与双向和自回归Mamba序列建模，并在统一训练条件下对比多种解码策略（CTC、自回归、非自回归）及强基线模型。
contributions: 首次将状态空间模型（Mamba）应用于OCR任务，并设计了CNN+双向/自回归Mamba的架构。
构建了大规模基准测试，系统比较SSM、Transformer和BiLSTM在历史报纸OCR上的性能与效率。
发布了代码、训练模型、标准化评估协议以及超过99%验证精度的金标准注释数据集。
analysis.experiments: 在卢森堡国家图书馆的历史报纸数据集（含新发布的金标准注释）以及Fraktur和Antiqua行级跨数据集测试上评估，所有神经模型行级CER约2%，Mamba模型推理时间减半，内存增长1.26x vs Transformer的2.30x（1000字符）。
limitations: Mamba在段落级严重退化场景下CER略高于DAN（6.07% vs 5.24%），精度仍有提升空间。
仅针对历史报纸OCR，未验证在其他OCR领域（如现代文档、手写体）的泛化性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首个基于状态空间模型（Mamba）的OCR架构，在历史报纸识别中达到与Transformer相当的精度，但推理速度翻倍且内存扩展更优。

papers.title: GRASP: Gradient Realignment via Active Shared Perception for Multi-Agent Collaborative Optimization
papers.abstract: Non-stationarity arises from concurrent policy updates and leads to persistent environmental fluctuations. Existing approaches like Centralized Training with Decentralized Execution (CTDE) and sequential update schemes mitigate this issue. However, since the perception of the policies of other agents remains dependent on sampling environmental interaction data, the agent essentially operates in a passive perception state. This inevitably triggers equilibrium oscillations and significantly slows the convergence speed of the system. To address this issue, we propose Gradient Realignment via Active Shared Perception (GRASP), a novel framework that defines generalized Bellman equilibrium as a stable objective for policy evolution. The core mechanism of GRASP involves utilizing the independent gradients of agents to derive a defined consensus gradient, enabling agents to actively perceive policy updates and optimize team collaboration. Theoretically, we leverage the Kakutani Fixed-Point Theorem to prove that the consensus direction $u^*$ guarantees the existence and attainability of this equilibrium. Extensive experiments on StarCraft II Multi-Agent Challenge (SMAC) and Google Research Football (GRF) demonstrate the scalability and promising performance of the framework.

analysis.tldr: GRASP通过主动共享梯度实现多智能体协作优化，加速收敛并提升性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 多智能体系统中，非平稳性源于并发策略更新导致环境持续波动，现有方法（如CTDE和顺序更新）虽能缓解但依赖被动感知，导致平衡振荡和收敛缓慢。
analysis.problem: 解决多智能体强化学习中因被动感知策略更新导致的收敛速度慢和平衡振荡问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 被动感知策略更新导致系统平衡振荡，收敛速度显著降低。
analysis.method: 提出GRASP框架，定义广义贝尔曼均衡作为策略演化的稳定目标，通过独立梯度推导共识梯度，使智能体主动感知策略更新并优化团队协作。
contributions: 提出GRASP框架，利用主动共享梯度实现多智能体协作优化。
理论上利用角谷不动点定理证明共识方向u*保证均衡的存在性和可达性。
analysis.experiments: 在StarCraft II Multi-Agent Challenge (SMAC)和Google Research Football (GRF)上实验，展示了框架的可扩展性和有前景的性能。
limitations: 可能对梯度通信开销敏感。
理论分析假设条件可能在实际复杂环境中受限。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: GRASP通过主动共享梯度实现多智能体协作优化，加速收敛并提升性能。

papers.title: CircuitProbe: Predicting Reasoning Circuits in Transformers via Stability Zone Detection
papers.abstract: Transformer language models contain localized reasoning circuits, contiguous layer blocks that improve reasoning when duplicated at inference time. Finding these circuits currently requires brute-force sweeps costing 25 GPU hours per model. We propose CircuitProbe, which predicts circuit locations from activation statistics in under 5 minutes on CPU, providing a speedup of three to four orders of magnitude. We find that reasoning circuits come in two types: stability circuits in early layers, detected through the derivative of representation change, and magnitude circuits in late layers, detected through anomaly scoring. We validate across 9 models spanning 6 architectures, including 2025 models, confirming that CircuitProbe top predictions match or are within 2 layers of the optimal circuit in all validated cases. A scaling experiment across the Qwen 2.5 family reveals that layer duplication consistently benefits models under 3B parameters but degrades performance in 7B+ models, making this a practical scaling technique for small language models. CircuitProbe requires as few as 10 calibration examples and its predictions are stable across English, Hindi, Chinese, and French.

analysis.tldr: 提出CircuitProbe，通过激活统计在5分钟内预测Transformer中的推理电路位置，比暴力搜索快3-4个数量级。
analysis.research_motivation: Transformer语言模型中的推理电路（连续层块）可通过推理时复制来提升性能，但现有方法需要暴力搜索，耗时25 GPU小时，效率极低。
analysis.problem: 如何快速、低成本地预测Transformer中推理电路的位置，避免昂贵的暴力搜索。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现推理电路分为两种类型：早期层的稳定性电路（通过表征变化的导数检测）和后期层的幅度电路（通过异常评分检测）。
analysis.method: CircuitProbe：基于激活统计，对早期层使用表征变化导数检测稳定性电路，对后期层使用异常评分检测幅度电路，无需GPU，5分钟内完成。
contributions: 提出CircuitProbe，将电路定位时间从25 GPU小时降至5分钟CPU，加速3-4个数量级。
揭示推理电路的两种类型（稳定性电路和幅度电路）及其检测方法。
在9个模型（6种架构）上验证，预测结果与最优电路相差不超过2层。
发现层复制对小于3B参数的模型有效，但对7B+模型有害。
analysis.experiments: 在9个模型（6种架构，包括2025年模型）上验证，预测结果与最优电路匹配或相差不超过2层；在Qwen 2.5系列上进行缩放实验，发现层复制对小于3B参数模型有益，对7B+模型有害；仅需10个校准样本，预测在英语、印地语、中文和法语中稳定。
limitations: 仅针对推理电路（连续层块），可能不适用于其他类型的电路。
缩放实验仅基于Qwen 2.5系列，泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出CircuitProbe，通过激活统计在5分钟内预测Transformer中的推理电路位置，比暴力搜索快3-4个数量级。

papers.title: To Memorize or to Retrieve: Scaling Laws for RAG-Considerate Pretraining
papers.abstract: Retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) improves language model (LM) performance by providing relevant context at test time for knowledge-intensive situations. However, the relationship between parametric knowledge acquired during pretraining and non-parametric knowledge accessed via retrieval remains poorly understood, especially under fixed data budgets. In this work, we systematically study the trade-off between pretraining corpus size and retrieval store size across a wide range of model and data scales.
