A 3D convolutional neural network was trained on cognitively stable participants from the Alzheimer's Disease Neuroimaging Initiative, learning the mapping between brain anatomy and Neuropsychiatric Inventory Questionnaire (NPIQ) scores. Deviations between predicted and observed scores defined the Divergence from NPIQ scores (DNPI). Higher DNPI was associated with future AD conversion (adjusted OR=2.5; p < 0.01) and achieved predictive accuracy comparable to cerebrospinal fluid AB42 (AUC=0.74 vs 0.75). Our approach supports scalable, non-invasive strategies for early AD detection.

analysis.tldr: 利用深度学习从结构MRI预测神经精神症状，偏差分数可作为早期阿尔茨海默病的非侵入性生物标志物。
analysis.research_motivation: 神经精神症状（NPS）在阿尔茨海默病（AD）中常见且常先于认知衰退，但现有工具无法区分NPS是正常衰老还是AD早期迹象，限制了其作为早期检测标志物的应用。
analysis.problem: 如何利用结构MRI数据识别与AD相关的异常NPS负担，从而早期检测AD。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出基于深度学习的规范建模框架：训练3D卷积神经网络，学习认知稳定参与者的脑解剖结构与NPIQ评分之间的映射，通过预测评分与实际评分的偏差（DNPI）识别异常NPS负担。
contributions: 提出DNPI指标，作为基于MRI的AD早期检测非侵入性生物标志物。
在ADNI数据集上验证DNPI与未来AD转化的关联，预测准确性与脑脊液Aβ42相当。
analysis.experiments: 在ADNI数据集上评估，DNPI与未来AD转化显著相关（调整后OR=2.5; p<0.01），预测AUC=0.74，与脑脊液Aβ42的0.75相当。
limitations: 仅使用ADNI单一数据集，泛化性需进一步验证。
NPIQ评分依赖主观报告，可能存在偏差。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to neuroscience & cognitive science
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 神经/认知科学
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用深度学习从结构MRI预测神经精神症状，偏差分数可作为早期阿尔茨海默病的非侵入性生物标志物。

papers.title: TRiGS: Temporal Rigid-Body Motion for Scalable 4D Gaussian Splatting
papers.abstract: Recent 4D Gaussian Splatting (4DGS) methods achieve impressive dynamic scene reconstruction but often rely on piecewise linear velocity approximations and short temporal windows. This disjointed modeling leads to severe temporal fragmentation, forcing primitives to be repeatedly eliminated and regenerated to track complex nonlinear dynamics. This makeshift approximation eliminates the long-term temporal identity of objects and causes an inevitable proliferation of Gaussians, hindering scalability to extended video sequences. To address this, we propose TRiGS, a novel 4D representation that utilizes unified, continuous geometric transformations. By integrating $SE(3)$ transformations, hierarchical Bezier residuals, and learnable local anchors, TRiGS models geometrically consistent rigid motions for individual primitives. This continuous formulation preserves temporal identity and effectively mitigates unbounded memory growth. Extensive experiments demonstrate that TRiGS achieves high fidelity rendering on standard benchmarks while uniquely scaling to extended video sequences (e.g., 600 to 1200 frames) without severe memory bottlenecks, significantly outperforming prior works in temporal stability.

analysis.tldr: TRiGS通过连续几何变换实现4D高斯溅射的长期时间一致性，显著提升长视频序列的可扩展性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有4D高斯溅射方法依赖分段线性速度近似和短时间窗口，导致时间碎片化、高斯原语反复消除与再生，无法保持长期时间身份，且内存增长不可控，难以扩展到长视频序列。
analysis.problem: 解决4D动态场景重建中因分段建模导致的时间碎片化、高斯原语数量膨胀及长序列可扩展性差的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，现有方法采用分段线性速度近似和短时间窗口，造成严重的时间碎片化，迫使高斯原语被反复消除和再生以跟踪复杂非线性动态，这种权宜近似消除了物体的长期时间身份，并导致高斯原语不可避免的增殖，阻碍了向长视频序列的扩展。
analysis.method: 提出TRiGS，一种基于统一连续几何变换的4D表示，通过集成SE(3)变换、层次化贝塞尔残差和可学习局部锚点，为每个高斯原语建模几何一致的刚体运动，保持时间身份并缓解内存增长。
contributions: 提出TRiGS，利用连续几何变换实现4D高斯溅射的长期时间一致性。
通过SE(3)变换、层次化贝塞尔残差和可学习局部锚点，有效缓解内存增长，支持600-1200帧的长视频序列。
analysis.experiments: 在标准基准上实现高保真渲染，并在长视频序列（600-1200帧）上显著优于先前方法，尤其在时间稳定性方面。
limitations: 可能对非刚体运动或复杂拓扑变化建模能力有限。
层次化贝塞尔残差的计算开销可能影响实时性。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: TRiGS通过连续几何变换实现4D高斯溅射的长期时间一致性，显著提升长视频序列的可扩展性。

papers.title: MATHENA: Mamba-based Architectural Tooth Hierarchical Estimator and Holistic Evaluation Network for Anatomy
papers.abstract: Dental diagnosis from Orthopantomograms (OPGs) requires coordination of tooth detection, caries segmentation (CarSeg), anomaly detection (AD), and dental developmental staging (DDS). We propose Mamba-based Architectural Tooth Hierarchical Estimator and Holistic Evaluation Network for Anatomy (MATHENA), a unified framework leveraging Mamba's linear-complexity State Space Models (SSM) to address all four tasks. MATHENA integrates MATHE, a multi-resolution SSM-driven detector with four-directional Vision State Space (VSS) blocks for O(N) global context modeling, generating per-tooth crops. These crops are processed by HENA, a lightweight Mamba-UNet with a triple-head architecture and Global Context State Token (GCST). In the triple-head architecture, CarSeg is first trained as an upstream task to establish shared representations, which are then frozen and reused for downstream AD fine-tuning and DDS classification via linear probing, enabling stable, efficient learning. We also curate PARTHENON, a benchmark comprising 15,062 annotated instances from ten datasets. MATHENA achieves 93.78% mAP@50 in tooth detection, 90.11% Dice for CarSeg, 88.35% for AD, and 72.40% ACC for DDS.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于Mamba的统一框架MATHENA，在牙科全景片上同时完成牙齿检测、龋齿分割、异常检测和发育分期四项任务。
analysis.research_motivation: 牙科诊断需要协调多项任务，现有方法通常分别处理，缺乏统一高效框架，且传统CNN/Transformer在全局建模和计算效率上存在瓶颈。
analysis.problem: 如何在牙科全景片上同时高效完成牙齿检测、龋齿分割、异常检测和发育分期四项任务。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出MATHENA框架，包含MATHE（多分辨率SSM驱动的检测器，使用四方向VSS块实现O(N)全局建模）和HENA（轻量Mamba-UNet，三头架构，上游训练CarSeg后冻结表示，下游通过线性微调进行AD和DDS）。
contributions: 提出MATHENA，首个基于Mamba的统一框架，同时处理牙齿检测、龋齿分割、异常检测和发育分期。
构建PARTHENON基准，包含10个数据集、15062个标注实例。
在四项任务上取得SOTA结果：检测93.78% mAP@50，分割90.11% Dice，异常检测88.35%，发育分期72.40% ACC。
analysis.experiments: 在PARTHENON基准上评估，牙齿检测mAP@50达93.78%，龋齿分割Dice达90.11%，异常检测88.35%，发育分期ACC达72.40%。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量标注数据，泛化到其他牙科影像模态需验证。
发育分期准确率相对较低，可能受类别不平衡影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于Mamba的统一框架MATHENA，在牙科全景片上同时完成牙齿检测、龋齿分割、异常检测和发育分期四项任务。

papers.title: Optimsyn: Influence-Guided Rubrics Optimization for Synthetic Data Generation
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) achieve strong downstream performance largely due to abundant supervised fine-tuning (SFT) data. However, high-quality SFT data in knowledge-intensive domains such as humanities, social sciences, medicine, law, and finance is scarce because expert curation is expensive, privacy constraints are strict, and label consistency is hard to ensure. Recent work uses synthetic data, typically by prompting a generator over domain documents and filtering outputs with handcrafted rubrics. Yet rubric design is expert-dependent, transfers poorly across domains, and is often optimized through a brittle heuristic loop of writing rubrics, synthesizing data, training, inspecting results, and manually guessing revisions. This process lacks reliable quantitative feedback about how a rubric affects downstream performance. We propose evaluating synthetic data by its training utility on the target model and using this signal to guide data generation. Inspired by influence estimation, we adopt an optimizer-aware estimator that uses gradient information to quantify each synthetic sample's contribution to a target model's objective on specific tasks. Our analysis shows that even when synthetic and real samples are close in embedding space, their influence on learning can differ substantially. Based on this insight, we propose an optimization-based framework that adapts rubrics using target-model feedback. We provide lightweight guiding text and use a rubric-specialized model to generate task-conditioned rubrics. Influence score is used as the reward to optimize the rubric generator with reinforcement learning. Experiments across domains, target models, and data generators show consistent improvements and strong generalization without task-specific tuning.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于影响力估计的优化框架，用强化学习优化合成数据生成规则，提升下游性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 高质量监督微调数据在知识密集型领域稀缺，现有手工规则方法依赖专家、跨领域迁移差且缺乏定量反馈。
analysis.problem: 如何自动优化合成数据生成规则，使其产生的数据能有效提升目标模型的下游性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 合成样本与真实样本在嵌入空间接近时，对学习的影响力可能差异很大。
analysis.method: 利用影响力分数作为奖励，通过强化学习优化规则生成器，生成任务条件化的规则。
contributions: 提出基于影响力估计的合成数据规则优化框架，利用目标模型梯度信息量化样本贡献。
通过强化学习优化规则生成器，实现跨领域、跨模型和跨生成器的泛化。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖梯度可访问性，对黑盒模型不适用。
影响力估计的计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于影响力估计的优化框架，用强化学习优化合成数据生成规则，提升下游性能。

papers.title: FreqPhys: Repurposing Implicit Physiological Frequency Prior for Robust Remote Photoplethysmography
papers.abstract: Remote photoplethysmography (rPPG) enables contactless physiological monitoring by capturing subtle skin-color variations from facial videos. However, most existing methods predominantly rely on time-domain modeling, making them vulnerable to motion artifacts and illumination fluctuations, where weak physiological clues are easily overwhelmed by noise. To address these challenges, we propose FreqPhys, a frequency-guided rPPG framework that explicitly leverages physiological frequency priors for robust signal recovery. Specifically, FreqPhys first applies a Physiological Bandpass Filtering module to suppress out-of-band interference, and then performs Physiological Spectrum Modulation together with adaptive spectral selection to emphasize pulse-related frequency components while suppress residual in-band noise. A Cross-domain Representation Learning module further fuses these spectral priors with deep time-domain features to capture informative spatial--temporal dependencies. Finally, a frequency-aware conditional diffusion process progressively reconstructs high-fidelity rPPG signals. Extensive experiments on six benchmarks demonstrate that FreqPhys yields significant improvements over state-of-the-art approaches, particularly under challenging motion conditions. It highlights the importance of explicitly modeling physiological frequency priors. The source code will be released.

analysis.tldr: FreqPhys通过显式利用生理频率先验，在远程光电容积描记（rPPG）中实现鲁棒的信号恢复，显著优于现有方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有rPPG方法主要依赖时域建模，易受运动伪影和光照波动干扰，弱生理信号易被噪声淹没，亟需更鲁棒的框架。
analysis.problem: 如何从面部视频中鲁棒地提取微弱的脉搏信号，克服运动伪影和光照噪声。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 时域建模在运动条件下生理线索易被噪声淹没，而频率域先验可有效分离脉搏相关成分与噪声。
analysis.method: 提出频率引导的rPPG框架FreqPhys，包含生理带通滤波、自适应频谱选择、跨域表征学习以及频率感知的条件扩散过程。
contributions: 首次显式利用生理频率先验进行鲁棒rPPG信号恢复。
提出生理带通滤波和频谱调制模块，有效抑制带外和带内噪声。
跨域表征学习融合频谱先验与时域特征，提升时空依赖建模。
在六个基准上取得显著改进，尤其在运动条件下。
analysis.experiments: 在六个基准数据集上进行实验，与最先进方法比较，在运动条件下取得显著提升。
limitations: 可能依赖特定频率范围，对心率异常个体适应性需验证。
扩散过程计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: FreqPhys通过显式利用生理频率先验，在远程光电容积描记（rPPG）中实现鲁棒的信号恢复，显著优于现有方法。

papers.title: Using Learning Theories to Evolve Human-Centered XAI: Future Perspectives and Challenges
papers.abstract: As Artificial Intelligence (AI) systems continue to grow in size and complexity, so does the difficulty of the quest for AI transparency. In a world of large models and complex AI systems, why do we explain AI and what should we explain? While explanations serve multiple functions, in the face of complexity humans have used and continue to use explanations to foster learning. In this position paper, we discuss how learning theories can be infused in the XAI lifecycle, as well as the key opportunities and challenges when adopting a learner-centered approach to assess, design and evaluate AI explanations. Building on past work, we argue that a learner-centered approach to Explainable AI (XAI) can enhance human agency and ease XAI risks mitigation, helping evolve the practice of human-centered XAI.

analysis.tldr: 探讨将学习理论融入可解释AI（XAI）生命周期，以推动以人为中心的XAI发展。
analysis.research_motivation: 随着AI系统规模和复杂性增长，AI透明性面临挑战；现有XAI方法缺乏对解释如何促进人类学习的深入理解。
analysis.problem: 如何将学习理论系统性地融入XAI的设计、评估和迭代中，以提升人类能动性并缓解XAI风险。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出以学习者为中心的XAI框架，将学习理论（如认知学习理论）融入XAI生命周期，并讨论关键机遇与挑战。
contributions: 论证了学习理论在XAI中的价值，提出以学习者为中心的XAI方法。
识别了采用该方法的机遇与挑战，为未来研究提供方向。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 作为立场论文，缺乏实证验证。
未详细说明具体学习理论如何操作化。
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 探讨将学习理论融入可解释AI（XAI）生命周期，以推动以人为中心的XAI发展。

papers.title: AceTone: Bridging Words and Colors for Conditional Image Grading
papers.abstract: Color affects how we interpret image style and emotion. Previous color grading methods rely on patch-wise recoloring or fixed filter banks, struggling to generalize across creative intents or align with human aesthetic preferences. In this study, we propose AceTone, the first approach that supports multimodal conditioned color grading within a unified framework. AceTone formulates grading as a generative color transformation task, where a model directly produces 3D-LUTs conditioned on text prompts or reference images. We develop a VQ-VAE based tokenizer which compresses a $3\times32^3$ LUT vector to 64 discrete tokens with $ΔE<2$ fidelity. We further build a large-scale dataset, AceTone-800K, and train a vision-language model to predict LUT tokens, followed by reinforcement learning to align outputs with perceptual fidelity and aesthetics. Experiments show that AceTone achieves state-of-the-art performance on both text-guided and reference-guided grading tasks, improving LPIPS by up to 50% over existing methods. Human evaluations confirm that AceTone's results are visually pleasing and stylistically coherent, demonstrating a new pathway toward language-driven, aesthetic-aligned color grading.

analysis.tldr: AceTone 提出首个统一框架，通过 VQ-VAE 和强化学习实现文本/参考图像驱动的条件图像调色。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有调色方法依赖局部重着色或固定滤镜库，难以泛化到创意意图或对齐人类审美偏好。
analysis.problem: 如何实现多模态条件（文本或参考图像）下的统一、高质量且符合审美的图像调色。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将调色建模为生成式颜色变换任务，使用 VQ-VAE 将 3D-LUT 压缩为离散 token，构建 AceTone-800K 数据集训练视觉语言模型预测 LUT token，并通过强化学习对齐感知保真度和美学。
contributions: 首个支持多模态条件调色的统一框架 AceTone。
基于 VQ-VAE 的 LUT tokenizer，实现高保真压缩（ΔE<2）。
构建大规模数据集 AceTone-800K 并采用强化学习优化美学对齐。
analysis.experiments: 在文本引导和参考图像引导调色任务上达到 SOTA，LPIPS 提升高达 50%，人类评估确认视觉愉悦和风格一致。
limitations: 可能依赖大规模数据集和计算资源。
强化学习训练可能不稳定或需要精细调参。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: AceTone 提出首个统一框架，通过 VQ-VAE 和强化学习实现文本/参考图像驱动的条件图像调色。

papers.title: Think, Act, Build: An Agentic Framework with Vision Language Models for Zero-Shot 3D Visual Grounding
papers.abstract: 3D Visual Grounding (3D-VG) aims to localize objects in 3D scenes via natural language descriptions. While recent advancements leveraging Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have explored zero-shot possibilities, they typically suffer from a static workflow relying on preprocessed 3D point clouds, essentially degrading grounding into proposal matching. To bypass this reliance, our core motivation is to decouple the task: leveraging 2D VLMs to resolve complex spatial semantics, while relying on deterministic multi-view geometry to instantiate the 3D structure. Driven by this insight, we propose "Think, Act, Build (TAB)", a dynamic agentic framework that reformulates 3D-VG tasks as a generative 2D-to-3D reconstruction paradigm operating directly on raw RGB-D streams. Specifically, guided by a specialized 3D-VG skill, our VLM agent dynamically invokes visual tools to track and reconstruct the target across 2D frames. Crucially, to overcome the multi-view coverage deficit caused by strict VLM semantic tracking, we introduce the Semantic-Anchored Geometric Expansion, a mechanism that first anchors the target in a reference video clip and then leverages multi-view geometry to propagate its spatial location across unobserved frames. This enables the agent to "Build" the target's 3D representation by aggregating these multi-view features via camera parameters, directly mapping 2D visual cues to 3D coordinates. Furthermore, to ensure rigorous assessment, we identify flaws such as reference ambiguity and category errors in existing benchmarks and manually refine the incorrect queries. Extensive experiments on ScanRefer and Nr3D demonstrate that our framework, relying entirely on open-source models, significantly outperforms previous zero-shot methods and even surpasses fully supervised baselines.

analysis.tldr: 提出TAB框架，利用2D VLM和确定性多视图几何实现零样本3D视觉定位，无需预处理的3D点云。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有3D视觉定位方法依赖预处理的3D点云，将任务简化为提案匹配，且静态工作流限制了零样本能力。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖预处理的3D点云的情况下，利用2D VLM实现零样本3D视觉定位。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出现有零样本方法存在静态工作流和依赖点云的局限，并发现现有基准存在参考歧义和类别错误等问题。
analysis.method: 提出TAB框架，包含Think、Act、Build三个阶段：VLM代理动态调用视觉工具跟踪目标，通过语义锚定几何扩展机制在未观察帧中传播空间位置，最后聚合多视图特征构建3D表示。
contributions: 提出TAB框架，将3D-VG重新定义为生成式2D到3D重建范式，直接操作原始RGB-D流。
引入语义锚定几何扩展机制，克服多视图覆盖不足问题。
手动修正现有基准中的错误查询，并在ScanRefer和Nr3D上超越零样本和全监督方法。
analysis.experiments: 在ScanRefer和Nr3D数据集上进行实验，完全依赖开源模型，显著优于先前零样本方法，甚至超越全监督基线。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量RGB-D输入，在低质量传感器下性能下降。
语义锚定机制可能对复杂场景中的遮挡敏感。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出TAB框架，利用2D VLM和确定性多视图几何实现零样本3D视觉定位，无需预处理的3D点云。

papers.title: Learnability-Guided Diffusion for Dataset Distillation
papers.abstract: Training machine learning models on massive datasets is expensive and time-consuming. Dataset distillation addresses this by creating a small synthetic dataset that achieves the same performance as the full dataset. Recent methods use diffusion models to generate distilled data, either by promoting diversity or matching training gradients. However, existing approaches produce redundant training signals, where samples convey overlapping information. Empirically, disjoint subsets of distilled datasets capture 80-90% overlapping signals. This redundancy stems from optimizing visual diversity or average training dynamics without accounting for similarity across samples, leading to datasets where multiple samples share similar information rather than complementary knowledge. We propose learnability-driven dataset distillation, which constructs synthetic datasets incrementally through successive stages. Starting from a small set, we train a model and generate new samples guided by learnability scores that identify what the current model can learn from, creating an adaptive curriculum. We introduce Learnability-Guided Diffusion (LGD), which balances training utility for the current model with validity under a reference model to generate curriculum-aligned samples. Our approach reduces redundancy by 39.1%, promotes specialization across training stages, and achieves state-of-the-art results on ImageNet-1K (60.1%), ImageNette (87.2%), and ImageWoof (72.9%). Our code is available on our project page https://jachansantiago.github.io/learnability-guided-distillation/.

analysis.tldr: 提出可学习性引导的扩散模型用于数据集蒸馏，通过自适应课程生成减少冗余，在ImageNet-1K等数据集上达到SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 大规模数据集训练成本高，现有数据集蒸馏方法生成的合成数据存在冗余信号，多个样本共享相似信息而非互补知识，导致训练效率低下。
analysis.problem: 如何生成低冗余、高信息互补的合成数据集，以提升数据集蒸馏的性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，现有方法生成的蒸馏数据子集之间80-90%的信号重叠，冗余源于优化视觉多样性或平均训练动态时未考虑样本间相似性。
analysis.method: 提出可学习性引导扩散（LGD），通过多阶段增量构建合成数据集：从初始小集合开始训练模型，利用可学习性分数指导扩散模型生成当前模型能从中学习的新样本，同时平衡训练效用和参考模型有效性，形成自适应课程。
contributions: 提出可学习性驱动的数据集蒸馏框架，通过自适应课程生成减少冗余。
引入LGD方法，平衡训练效用与参考模型有效性，生成课程对齐样本。
在ImageNet-1K、ImageNette、ImageWoof上取得SOTA结果，冗余减少39.1%。
analysis.experiments: 在ImageNet-1K（60.1%）、ImageNette（87.2%）、ImageWoof（72.9%）上取得SOTA结果，冗余减少39.1%。
limitations: 可能依赖参考模型的质量，若参考模型不佳可能影响生成效果。
多阶段增量生成可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出可学习性引导的扩散模型用于数据集蒸馏，通过自适应课程生成减少冗余，在ImageNet-1K等数据集上达到SOTA。

papers.title: Toward Optimal Sampling Rate Selection and Unbiased Classification for Precise Animal Activity Recognition
papers.abstract: With the rapid advancements in deep learning techniques, wearable sensor-aided animal activity recognition (AAR) has demonstrated promising performance, thereby improving livestock management efficiency as well as animal health and welfare monitoring. However, existing research often prioritizes overall performance, overlooking the fact that classification accuracies for specific animal behavioral categories may remain unsatisfactory. This issue typically stems from suboptimal sampling rates or class imbalance problems. To address these challenges and achieve high classification accuracy across all individual behaviors in farm animals, we propose a novel Individual-Behavior-Aware Network (IBA-Net). This network enhances the recognition of each specific behavior by simultaneously customizing features and calibrating the classifier. Specifically, considering that different behaviors require varying sampling rates to achieve optimal performance, we design a Mixture-of-Experts (MoE)-based Feature Customization (MFC) module. This module adaptively fuses data from multiple sampling rates, capturing customized features tailored to various animal behaviors. Additionally, to mitigate classifier bias toward majority classes caused by class imbalance, we develop a Neural Collapse-driven Classifier Calibration (NC3) module. This module introduces a fixed equiangular tight frame (ETF) classifier during the classification stage, maximizing the angles between pair-wise classifier vectors and thereby improving the classification performance for minority classes. To validate the effectiveness of IBA-Net, we conducted experiments on three public datasets covering goat, cattle, and horse activity recognition. The results demonstrate that our method consistently outperforms existing approaches across all datasets.

analysis.tldr: 提出IBA-Net，通过自适应多采样率融合和神经坍缩驱动的分类器校准，提升动物行为识别中每个类别的准确率。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有动物行为识别研究常关注整体性能，忽略特定行为类别准确率低的问题，这源于次优采样率和类别不平衡。
analysis.problem: 如何同时解决多行为最优采样率差异和类别不平衡导致的分类器偏差，实现所有行为类别的高精度识别。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 不同动物行为需要不同采样率才能达到最优性能；类别不平衡导致分类器偏向多数类。
analysis.method: 提出IBA-Net，包含MoE-based Feature Customization (MFC)模块自适应融合多采样率特征，以及Neural Collapse-driven Classifier Calibration (NC3)模块使用固定等角紧框架分类器校准分类器。
contributions: 提出MFC模块，通过MoE自适应融合多采样率数据，为不同行为定制特征。
提出NC3模块，利用神经坍缩理论引入固定ETF分类器，缓解类别不平衡。
在三个公开数据集（山羊、牛、马）上验证，方法一致优于现有方法。
analysis.experiments: 在三个公开数据集（山羊、牛、马活动识别）上实验，结果一致优于现有方法。
limitations: 可能依赖多采样率数据采集，增加硬件成本。
NC3模块的ETF分类器可能对极端不平衡场景适应性有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出IBA-Net，通过自适应多采样率融合和神经坍缩驱动的分类器校准，提升动物行为识别中每个类别的准确率。

papers.title: MAESIL: Masked Autoencoder for Enhanced Self-supervised Medical Image Learning
papers.abstract: Training deep learning models for three-dimensional (3D) medical imaging, such as Computed Tomography (CT), is fundamentally challenged by the scarcity of labeled data. While pre-training on natural images is common, it results in a significant domain shift, limiting performance. Self-Supervised Learning (SSL) on unlabeled medical data has emerged as a powerful solution, but prominent frameworks often fail to exploit the inherent 3D nature of CT scans. These methods typically process 3D scans as a collection of independent 2D slices, an approach that fundamentally discards critical axial coherence and the 3D structural context. To address this limitation, we propose the autoencoder for enhanced self-supervised medical image learning(MAESIL), a novel self-supervised learning framework designed to capture 3D structural information efficiently. The core innovation is the 'superpatch', a 3D chunk-based input unit that balances 3D context preservation with computational efficiency. Our framework partitions the volume into superpatches and employs a 3D masked autoencoder strategy with a dual-masking strategy to learn comprehensive spatial representations. We validated our approach on three diverse large-scale public CT datasets. Our experimental results show that MAESIL demonstrates significant improvements over existing methods such as AE, VAE and VQ-VAE in key reconstruction metrics such as PSNR and SSIM. This establishes MAESIL as a robust and practical pre-training solution for 3D medical imaging tasks.

analysis.tldr: 提出MAESIL，一种利用3D超块和双掩码策略的自监督框架，有效学习CT影像的3D结构表征。
analysis.research_motivation: 3D医学影像（如CT）标注数据稀缺，现有自监督方法常将3D扫描视为独立2D切片处理，丢失了关键的轴向连贯性和3D结构上下文，导致性能受限。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种自监督学习框架，既能高效捕获3D结构信息，又能保持计算可行性，以解决3D医学影像标注不足的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出MAESIL框架，核心创新是'超块'（superpatch）——一种3D块状输入单元，平衡3D上下文保留与计算效率；采用3D掩码自编码器策略，结合双掩码策略学习全面的空间表征。
contributions: 提出MAESIL框架，利用超块和双掩码策略有效学习3D CT影像的结构信息。
在三个大规模公开CT数据集上验证，MAESIL在PSNR和SSIM等重建指标上显著优于AE、VAE和VQ-VAE。
analysis.experiments: 在三个不同的大规模公开CT数据集上评估，与AE、VAE和VQ-VAE对比，MAESIL在PSNR和SSIM等重建指标上取得显著提升。
limitations: 可能仅针对CT模态，未验证在其他3D医学影像（如MRI）上的泛化性。
双掩码策略和超块设计可能引入额外超参数，调优成本未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出MAESIL，一种利用3D超块和双掩码策略的自监督框架，有效学习CT影像的3D结构表征。

papers.title: MOON3.0: Reasoning-aware Multimodal Representation Learning for E-commerce Product Understanding
papers.abstract: With the rapid growth of e-commerce, exploring general representations rather than task-specific ones has attracted increasing attention. Although recent multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have driven significant progress in product understanding, they are typically employed as feature extractors that implicitly encode product information into global embeddings, thereby limiting their ability to capture fine-grained attributes. Therefore, we argue that leveraging the reasoning capabilities of MLLMs to explicitly model fine-grained product attributes holds significant potential. Nevertheless, achieving this goal remains non-trivial due to several key challenges: (i) long-context reasoning tends to dilute the model's attention to salient information in the raw input; (ii) supervised fine-tuning (SFT) primarily encourages rigid imitation, limiting the exploration of effective reasoning strategies; and (iii) fine-grained details are progressively attenuated during forward propagation. To address these issues, we propose MOON3.0, the first reasoning-aware MLLM-based model for product representation learning. Our method (1) employs a multi-head modality fusion module to adaptively integrate raw signals; (2) incorporates a joint contrastive and reinforcement learning framework to autonomously explore more effective reasoning strategies; and (3) introduces a fine-grained residual enhancement module to progressively preserve local details throughout the network. Additionally, we release a large-scale multimodal e-commerce benchmark MBE3.0. Experimentally, our model demonstrates state-of-the-art zero-shot performance across various downstream tasks on both our benchmark and public datasets.

analysis.tldr: 提出首个推理感知的多模态产品表征学习模型MOON3.0，通过融合多模态信号、联合对比与强化学习、细粒度残差增强，在电商产品理解任务上取得SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 电商领域需要通用产品表征而非任务特定表征，现有MLLM作为特征提取器隐式编码信息，难以捕捉细粒度属性，且存在长上下文注意力稀释、SFT限制推理策略探索、前向传播中细节衰减等问题。
analysis.problem: 如何利用MLLM的推理能力显式建模细粒度产品属性，同时克服长上下文注意力稀释、SFT模仿限制和细节衰减三大挑战。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出三个关键现象：(i) 长上下文推理稀释模型对原始输入中显著信息的注意力；(ii) SFT主要鼓励刚性模仿，限制有效推理策略的探索；(iii) 前向传播中细粒度细节逐渐衰减。
analysis.method: 提出MOON3.0，包含：(1) 多头模态融合模块自适应整合原始信号；(2) 联合对比学习和强化学习框架自主探索有效推理策略；(3) 细粒度残差增强模块在网络中逐步保留局部细节。
contributions: 首个推理感知的MLLM产品表征学习模型MOON3.0
提出多头模态融合、联合对比与强化学习、细粒度残差增强三大模块
发布大规模多模态电商基准MBE3.0
在多个下游任务上取得零样本SOTA性能
analysis.experiments: 在自建基准MBE3.0和公开数据集上进行了零样本评估，结果显示模型在多个下游任务上达到SOTA。
limitations: 摘要未提及模型在长尾或罕见属性上的表现
未讨论计算开销和推理效率
可能依赖高质量的多模态对齐数据
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出首个推理感知的多模态产品表征学习模型MOON3.0，通过融合多模态信号、联合对比与强化学习、细粒度残差增强，在电商产品理解任务上取得SOTA。

papers.title: Adaptive Parallel Monte Carlo Tree Search for Efficient Test-time Compute Scaling
papers.abstract: Monte Carlo Tree Search (MCTS) is an effective test-time compute scaling (TTCS) method for improving the reasoning performance of large language models, but its highly variable execution time leads to severe long-tail latency in practice. Existing optimizations such as positive early exit, reduce latency in favorable cases but are less effective when search continues without meaningful progress. We introduce {\it negative early exit}, which prunes unproductive MCTS trajectories, and an {\it adaptive boosting mechanism} that reallocates reclaimed computation to reduce resource contention among concurrent searches. Integrated into vLLM, these techniques substantially reduce p99 end-to-end latency while improving throughput and maintaining reasoning accuracy.

analysis.tldr: 提出自适应并行MCTS方法，通过负早停和自适应提升机制减少长尾延迟，提升吞吐量并保持推理精度。
analysis.research_motivation: MCTS作为LLM推理的测试时计算扩展方法，其执行时间高度可变，导致实践中严重的尾部延迟，现有优化在无进展搜索时效果不佳。
analysis.problem: MCTS在LLM推理中执行时间高度可变，导致长尾延迟，现有早停策略在搜索无进展时效率低。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: MCTS执行时间高度可变，导致长尾延迟；正早停在有利情况下降低延迟，但搜索无进展时效果有限。
analysis.method: 提出负早停（剪枝无益MCTS轨迹）和自适应提升机制（重新分配回收的计算资源以减少并发搜索的资源竞争），集成到vLLM中。
contributions: 提出负早停策略，剪枝无益MCTS轨迹以减少延迟。
提出自适应提升机制，重新分配计算资源以减少并发搜索的资源竞争。
集成到vLLM中，显著降低p99端到端延迟，提高吞吐量并保持推理精度。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定MCTS变体或LLM架构。
负早停可能在某些场景下误剪有用轨迹。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出自适应并行MCTS方法，通过负早停和自适应提升机制减少长尾延迟，提升吞吐量并保持推理精度。

papers.title: RT-GS: Gaussian Splatting with Reflection and Transmittance Primitives
papers.abstract: Gaussian Splatting is a powerful tool for reconstructing diffuse scenes, but it struggles to simultaneously model specular reflections and the appearance of objects behind semi-transparent surfaces. These specular reflections and transmittance are essential for realistic novel view synthesis, and existing methods do not properly incorporate the underlying physical processes to simulate them. To address this issue, we propose RT-GS, a unified framework that integrates a microfacet material model and ray tracing to jointly model specular reflection and transmittance in Gaussian Splatting. We accomplish this by using separate Gaussian primitives for reflections and transmittance, which allow modeling distant reflections and reconstructing objects behind transparent surfaces concurrently. We utilize a differentiable ray tracing framework to obtain the specular reflection and transmittance appearance. Our experiments demonstrate that our method successfully produces reflections and recovers objects behind transparent surfaces in complex environments, achieving significant qualitative improvements over prior methods where these specular light interactions are prominent.

analysis.tldr: RT-GS 通过引入微面元材质模型和光线追踪，在3D高斯泼溅中联合建模镜面反射和透射，实现更真实的视角合成。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有高斯泼溅方法难以同时处理镜面反射和半透明表面后的物体，导致新视角合成缺乏真实感，而物理过程建模的缺失是主要瓶颈。
analysis.problem: 如何在高斯泼溅中统一建模镜面反射和透射，以提升复杂场景的新视角合成质量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出标准高斯泼溅在漫反射场景表现良好，但无法处理镜面反射和半透明表面后的物体，现有方法未正确融入物理过程。
analysis.method: 提出RT-GS框架，使用分离的反射和透射高斯基元，结合微面元材质模型和可微分光线追踪，联合建模镜面反射和透射外观。
contributions: 提出统一框架RT-GS，集成微面元材质模型和光线追踪到高斯泼溅中。
设计分离的反射和透射高斯基元，分别建模远距离反射和透明表面后的物体。
实验表明在复杂场景中显著提升反射和透射重建的视觉效果。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅提及定性改进。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量光线追踪计算，效率有待验证。
对极端复杂光照或高反射场景的泛化能力未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: RT-GS 通过引入微面元材质模型和光线追踪，在3D高斯泼溅中联合建模镜面反射和透射，实现更真实的视角合成。

papers.title: RegFormer: Transferable Relational Grounding for Efficient Weakly-Supervised Human-Object Interaction Detection
papers.abstract: Weakly-supervised Human-Object Interaction (HOI) detection is essential for scalable scene understanding, as it learns interactions from only image-level annotations. Due to the lack of localization signals, prior works typically rely on an external object detector to generate candidate pairs and then infer their interactions through pairwise reasoning. However, this framework often struggles to scale due to the substantial computational cost incurred by enumerating numerous instance pairs. In addition, it suffers from false positives arising from non-interactive combinations, which hinder accurate instance-level HOI reasoning. To address these issues, we introduce Relational Grounding Transformer (RegFormer), a versatile interaction recognition module for efficient and accurate HOI reasoning. Under image-level supervision, RegFormer leverages spatially grounded signals as guidance for the reasoning process and promotes locality-aware interaction learning. By learning localized interaction cues, our module distinguishes humans, objects, and their interactions, enabling direct transfer from image-level interaction reasoning to precise and efficient instance-level reasoning without additional training. Our extensive experiments and analyses demonstrate that RegFormer effectively learns spatial cues for instance-level interaction reasoning, operates with high efficiency, and even achieves performance comparable to fully supervised models. Our code is available at https://github.com/mlvlab/RegFormer.

analysis.tldr: 提出RegFormer，通过空间接地信号实现高效弱监督HOI检测，无需额外训练即可迁移到实例级推理。
analysis.research_motivation: 弱监督HOI检测对可扩展场景理解至关重要，但现有方法依赖外部检测器枚举候选对，计算成本高且易受非交互组合的假阳性干扰。
analysis.problem: 解决弱监督HOI检测中计算效率低和假阳性干扰问题，实现从图像级到实例级的高效准确推理。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Relational Grounding Transformer (RegFormer)，利用空间接地信号引导推理过程，促进局部感知交互学习，从而区分人、物体及其交互，实现从图像级到实例级的直接迁移。
contributions: 提出RegFormer，一种高效准确的弱监督HOI交互识别模块。
利用空间接地信号实现局部感知交互学习，无需额外训练即可迁移到实例级推理。
实验表明RegFormer在效率和性能上均优于现有方法，甚至可与全监督模型媲美。
analysis.experiments: 在多个数据集上进行实验，表明RegFormer有效学习空间线索，高效运行，性能与全监督模型相当。
limitations: 可能依赖外部空间接地信号的质量。
在复杂场景中交互推理的泛化性有待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出RegFormer，通过空间接地信号实现高效弱监督HOI检测，无需额外训练即可迁移到实例级推理。

papers.title: Towards Initialization-dependent and Non-vacuous Generalization Bounds for Overparameterized Shallow Neural Networks
papers.abstract: Overparameterized neural networks often show a benign overfitting property in the sense of achieving excellent generalization behavior despite the number of parameters exceeding the number of training examples. A promising direction to explain benign overfitting is to relate generalization to the norm of distance from initialization, motivated by the empirical observations that this distance is often significantly smaller than the norm itself. However, the existing initialization-dependent complexity analyses measure the distance from initialization by the Frobenius norm, and often imply vacuous bounds in practice for overparamterized models. In this paper, we develop initialization-dependent complexity bounds for shallow neural networks with general Lipschitz activation functions. Our bounds depend on the path-norm of the distance from initialization, which are derived by introducing a new peeling technique to handle the challenge along with the initialization-dependent constraint. We also develop a lower bound tight up to a constant factor. Finally, we conduct empirical comparisons and show that our generalization analysis implies non-vacuous bounds for overparameterized networks.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于路径范数的初始化依赖复杂度界，为过参数化浅层神经网络提供非空洞泛化界。
analysis.research_motivation: 过参数化神经网络常表现出良性过拟合，但现有初始化依赖的复杂度分析使用Frobenius范数，导致泛化界在实践中空洞无意义。
analysis.problem: 如何为过参数化浅层神经网络推导非空洞的初始化依赖泛化界。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到距离初始化的范数通常远小于参数范数本身，但现有Frobenius范数界在过参数化下空洞。
analysis.method: 引入新的剥离技术处理初始化依赖约束，基于路径范数推导复杂度界，并给出紧至常数因子的下界。
contributions: 提出基于路径范数的初始化依赖复杂度界，适用于一般Lipschitz激活函数的浅层网络。
推导了紧至常数因子的下界，并通过实验验证了非空洞的泛化界。
analysis.experiments: 在过参数化网络上进行实证比较，显示泛化分析给出非空洞界。
limitations: 仅针对浅层神经网络，未扩展到深层网络。
路径范数计算可能复杂，实际应用需进一步简化。
analysis.primary_area_en: learning theory
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于路径范数的初始化依赖复杂度界，为过参数化浅层神经网络提供非空洞泛化界。

papers.title: PET-DINO: Unifying Visual Cues into Grounding DINO with Prompt-Enriched Training
papers.abstract: Open-Set Object Detection (OSOD) enables recognition of novel categories beyond fixed classes but faces challenges in aligning text representations with complex visual concepts and the scarcity of image-text pairs for rare categories. This results in suboptimal performance in specialized domains or with complex objects. Recent visual-prompted methods partially address these issues but often involve complex multi-modal designs and multi-stage optimizations, prolonging the development cycle. Additionally, effective training strategies for data-driven OSOD models remain largely unexplored. To address these challenges, we propose PET-DINO, a universal detector supporting both text and visual prompts. Our Alignment-Friendly Visual Prompt Generation (AFVPG) module builds upon an advanced text-prompted detector, addressing the limitations of text representation guidance and reducing the development cycle. We introduce two prompt-enriched training strategies: Intra-Batch Parallel Prompting (IBP) at the iteration level and Dynamic Memory-Driven Prompting (DMD) at the overall training level. These strategies enable simultaneous modeling of multiple prompt routes, facilitating parallel alignment with diverse real-world usage scenarios. Comprehensive experiments demonstrate that PET-DINO exhibits competitive zero-shot object detection capabilities across various prompt-based detection protocols. These strengths can be attributed to inheritance-based philosophy and prompt-enriched training strategies, which play a critical role in building an effective generic object detector. Project page: https://fuweifuvtoo.github.io/pet-dino.

analysis.tldr: PET-DINO 通过提示增强训练策略统一文本和视觉提示，提升开放集目标检测性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 开放集目标检测面临文本表示与复杂视觉概念对齐困难、罕见类别图像-文本对稀缺的问题，现有视觉提示方法常涉及复杂多模态设计和多阶段优化，开发周期长，且数据驱动模型的有效训练策略尚未充分探索。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个同时支持文本和视觉提示的通用检测器，并开发有效的训练策略以提升开放集目标检测性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 PET-DINO，包含 Alignment-Friendly Visual Prompt Generation (AFVPG) 模块，以及两种提示增强训练策略：Intra-Batch Parallel Prompting (IBP) 和 Dynamic Memory-Driven Prompting (DMD)。
contributions: 提出 PET-DINO，一个同时支持文本和视觉提示的通用检测器，通过 AFVPG 模块简化多模态设计并缩短开发周期。
引入两种提示增强训练策略（IBP 和 DMD），实现多提示路径并行建模，提升与真实场景的对齐能力。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖基础检测器 Grounding DINO 的性能。
提示增强训练策略的计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: PET-DINO 通过提示增强训练策略统一文本和视觉提示，提升开放集目标检测性能。

papers.title: When VLMs 'Fix' Students: Identifying and Penalizing Over-Correction in the Evaluation of Multi-line Handwritten Math OCR
papers.abstract: Accurate transcription of handwritten mathematics is crucial for educational AI systems, yet current benchmarks fail to evaluate this capability properly. Most prior studies focus on single-line expressions and rely on lexical metrics such as BLEU, which fail to assess the semantic reasoning across multi-line student solutions. In this paper, we present the first systematic study of multi-line handwritten math Optical Character Recognition (OCR), revealing a critical failure mode of Vision-Language Models (VLMs): over-correction. Instead of faithfully transcribing a student's work, these models often "fix" errors, thereby hiding the very mistakes an educational assessment aims to detect. To address this, we propose PINK (Penalized INK-based score), a semantic evaluation metric that leverages a Large Language Model (LLM) for rubric-based grading and explicitly penalizes over-correction. Our comprehensive evaluation of 15 state-of-the-art VLMs on the FERMAT dataset reveals substantial ranking reversals compared to BLEU: models like GPT-4o are heavily penalized for aggressive over-correction, whereas Gemini 2.5 Flash emerges as the most faithful transcriber. Furthermore, human expert studies show that PINK aligns significantly better with human judgment (55.0% preference over BLEU's 39.5%), providing a more reliable evaluation framework for handwritten math OCR in educational settings.

analysis.tldr: 提出PINK指标，惩罚VLM在手写数学OCR中的过度纠正行为，更符合人类评估偏好。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基准无法正确评估多行手写数学OCR，常用词重叠指标（如BLEU）忽略语义推理，且VLM常过度纠正学生错误，隐藏了教育评估需要检测的失误。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个能识别并惩罚VLM在手写数学OCR中过度纠正行为的评估指标。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: VLM在转录多行手写数学时倾向于“修复”学生错误，导致评估失真；BLEU等词重叠指标无法反映这种语义层面的过度纠正。
analysis.method: 提出PINK（Penalized INK-based score），利用LLM进行基于评分标准的评分，并显式惩罚过度纠正。
contributions: 首次系统研究多行手写数学OCR，揭示VLM的过度纠正失败模式。
提出PINK指标，通过LLM评分和惩罚机制更可靠地评估手写数学OCR。
在FERMAT数据集上评估15个VLM，发现排名反转，且PINK与人类判断一致性更高（55.0% vs BLEU 39.5%）。
analysis.experiments: 在FERMAT数据集上评估15个SOTA VLM，并与人类专家研究对比，PINK偏好率55.0%高于BLEU的39.5%。
limitations: 依赖LLM进行评分，可能引入额外计算开销和LLM自身偏差。
仅针对手写数学OCR领域，泛化性待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出PINK指标，惩罚VLM在手写数学OCR中的过度纠正行为，更符合人类评估偏好。

papers.title: PC-SAM: Patch-Constrained Fine-Grained Interactive Road Segmentation in High-Resolution Remote Sensing Images
papers.abstract: Road masks obtained from remote sensing images effectively support a wide range of downstream tasks. In recent years, most studies have focused on improving the performance of fully automatic segmentation models for this task, achieving significant gains. However, current fully automatic methods are still insufficient for identifying certain challenging road segments and often produce false positive and false negative regions. Moreover, fully automatic segmentation does not support local segmentation of regions of interest or refinement of existing masks. Although the SAM model is widely used as an interactive segmentation model and performs well on natural images, it shows poor performance in remote sensing road segmentation and cannot support fine-grained local refinement. To address these limitations, we propose PC-SAM, which integrates fully automatic road segmentation and interactive segmentation within a unified framework. By carefully designing a fine-tuning strategy, the influence of point prompts is constrained to their corresponding patches, overcoming the inability of the original SAM to perform fine local corrections and enabling fine-grained interactive mask refinement. Extensive experiments on several representative remote sensing road segmentation datasets demonstrate that, when combined with point prompts, PC-SAM significantly outperforms state-of-the-art fully automatic models in road mask segmentation, while also providing flexible local mask refinement and local road segmentation. The code will be available at https://github.com/Cyber-CCOrange/PC-SAM.

analysis.tldr: 提出PC-SAM，通过补丁约束微调策略使SAM支持遥感道路的细粒度交互式分割与局部修正。
analysis.research_motivation: 全自动道路分割模型在困难路段易出错，且不支持局部感兴趣区域分割或现有掩码的细化；SAM在遥感道路分割上表现差且无法进行细粒度局部修正。
analysis.problem: 如何将全自动道路分割与交互式分割统一，并实现遥感道路的细粒度局部交互修正。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: SAM在自然图像上表现好，但在遥感道路分割中性能差，且无法支持细粒度局部修正。
analysis.method: 提出PC-SAM，设计补丁约束微调策略，将点提示的影响限制在对应补丁内，实现细粒度交互式掩码细化。
contributions: 提出PC-SAM统一框架，融合全自动与交互式道路分割。
设计补丁约束微调策略，使SAM支持细粒度局部修正。
在多个遥感道路分割数据集上显著优于SOTA全自动模型。
analysis.experiments: 在多个代表性遥感道路分割数据集上进行实验，结合点提示后PC-SAM显著优于SOTA全自动模型，并提供灵活的局部掩码细化和局部道路分割。
limitations: 可能依赖点提示的质量和数量。
补丁约束策略可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出PC-SAM，通过补丁约束微调策略使SAM支持遥感道路的细粒度交互式分割与局部修正。

papers.title: ARGS: Auto-Regressive Gaussian Splatting via Parallel Progressive Next-Scale Prediction
papers.abstract: Auto-regressive frameworks for next-scale prediction of 2D images have demonstrated strong potential for producing diverse and sophisticated content by progressively refining a coarse input. However, extending this paradigm to 3D object generation remains largely unexplored. In this paper, we introduce auto-regressive Gaussian splatting (ARGS), a framework for making next-scale predictions in parallel for generation according to levels of detail. We propose a Gaussian simplification strategy and reverse the simplification to guide next-scale generation. Benefiting from the use of hierarchical trees, the generation process requires only \(\mathcal{O}(\log n)\) steps, where \(n\) is the number of points. Furthermore, we propose a tree-based transformer to predict the tree structure auto-regressively, allowing leaf nodes to attend to their internal ancestors to enhance structural consistency. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our approach effectively generates multi-scale Gaussian representations with controllable levels of detail, visual fidelity, and a manageable time consumption budget.

analysis.tldr: 提出ARGS框架，通过并行渐进式下一尺度预测实现3D高斯泼溅的自动回归生成。
analysis.research_motivation: 2D图像的下一尺度预测自回归框架已展现强大潜力，但将其扩展到3D对象生成仍未被充分探索。
analysis.problem: 如何将自回归下一尺度预测范式扩展到3D对象生成，实现高效、可控的多尺度高斯表示生成。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出ARGS框架，包括高斯简化策略及其逆过程用于引导下一尺度生成，利用层次树实现O(log n)步生成，并设计基于树的Transformer自回归预测树结构，使叶节点关注内部祖先以增强结构一致性。
contributions: 首次将自回归下一尺度预测范式扩展到3D高斯泼溅生成。
提出高斯简化策略和层次树结构，实现并行渐进式生成，复杂度为O(log n)。
设计树形Transformer自回归预测树结构，增强结构一致性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖高斯简化策略的质量。
树形Transformer的扩展性有待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出ARGS框架，通过并行渐进式下一尺度预测实现3D高斯泼溅的自动回归生成。

papers.title: A Reasoning-Enabled Vision-Language Foundation Model for Chest X-ray Interpretation
papers.abstract: Chest X-rays (CXRs) are among the most frequently performed imaging examinations worldwide, yet rising imaging volumes increase radiologist workload and the risk of diagnostic errors. Although artificial intelligence (AI) systems have shown promise for CXR interpretation, most generate only final predictions, without making explicit how visual evidence is translated into radiographic findings and diagnostic predictions. We present CheXOne, a reasoning-enabled vision-language model for CXR interpretation. CheXOne jointly generates diagnostic predictions and explicit, clinically grounded reasoning traces that connect visual evidence, radiographic findings, and these predictions. The model is trained on 14.7 million instruction and reasoning samples curated from 30 public datasets spanning 36 CXR interpretation tasks, using a two-stage framework that combines instruction tuning with reinforcement learning to improve reasoning quality. We evaluate CheXOne in zero-shot settings across visual question answering, report generation, visual grounding and reasoning assessment, covering 17 evaluation settings. CheXOne outperforms existing medical and general-domain foundation models and achieves strong performance on independent public benchmarks. A clinical reader study demonstrates that CheXOne-drafted reports are comparable to or better than resident-written reports in 55% of cases, while effectively addressing clinical indications and enhancing both report writing and CXR interpretation efficiency. Further analyses involving radiologists reveal that the generated reasoning traces show high clinical factuality and provide causal support for the final predictions, offering a plausible explanation for the performance gains. These results suggest that explicit reasoning can improve model performance, interpretability and clinical utility in AI-assisted CXR interpretation.

analysis.tldr: CheXOne 是一个面向胸部 X 光片解读的推理增强视觉-语言基础模型，通过联合生成诊断预测和临床推理链，在多项任务上超越现有模型。
analysis.research_motivation: 胸部 X 光片检查量巨大，增加放射科医生负担和误诊风险；现有 AI 系统仅输出最终预测，缺乏可解释的推理过程。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个能同时生成诊断预测和显式、临床合理的推理轨迹的视觉-语言模型，以提升 CXR 解读的性能和可解释性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 CheXOne，采用两阶段训练框架：先进行指令微调，再结合强化学习优化推理质量；训练数据来自 30 个公开数据集的 1470 万条指令和推理样本。
contributions: 提出 CheXOne，首个面向 CXR 解读的推理增强视觉-语言基础模型，能联合生成诊断预测和显式推理链。
构建大规模多任务训练数据集，涵盖 36 项 CXR 解读任务。
在零样本设置下，CheXOne 在 VQA、报告生成、视觉定位和推理评估等 17 个评估设置中优于现有医学和通用基础模型。
临床读者研究表明，CheXOne 草拟的报告在 55% 的病例中与住院医师报告相当或更好，且推理轨迹具有高临床事实性。
analysis.experiments: 在零样本设置下评估视觉问答、报告生成、视觉定位和推理评估，共 17 个评估设置；在独立公共基准上表现强劲；进行了临床读者研究。
limitations: 可能依赖特定训练数据分布，泛化到其他影像模态或罕见疾病的能力未知。
推理轨迹的临床事实性评估可能受限于专家主观判断。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: CheXOne 是一个面向胸部 X 光片解读的推理增强视觉-语言基础模型，通过联合生成诊断预测和临床推理链，在多项任务上超越现有模型。

papers.title: Executing as You Generate: Hiding Execution Latency in LLM Code Generation
papers.abstract: Current LLM-based coding agents follow a serial execution paradigm: the model first generates the complete code, then invokes an interpreter to execute it. This sequential workflow leaves the executor idle during generation and the generator idle during execution, resulting in unnecessary end-to-end latency. We observe that, unlike human developers, LLMs produce code tokens sequentially without revision, making it possible to execute code as it is being generated. We formalize this parallel execution paradigm, modeling it as a three-stage pipeline of generation, detection, and execution, and derive closed-form latency bounds that characterize its speedup potential and operating regimes. We then present Eager, a concrete implementation featuring AST-based chunking, dynamic batching with gated execution, and early error interruption. We evaluate Eager across four benchmarks, seven LLMs, and three execution environments. Results show that Eager reduces the non-overlapped execution latency by up to 99.9% and the end-to-end latency by up to 55% across seven LLMs and four benchmarks.

analysis.tldr: 提出并行执行范式，在LLM生成代码的同时执行，大幅降低端到端延迟。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前LLM编码智能体采用串行执行范式，生成和执行阶段相互等待，导致不必要的端到端延迟。
analysis.problem: 如何消除LLM代码生成中生成与执行之间的空闲等待，降低端到端延迟。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到LLM生成代码时按顺序产生token且不修改，使得在生成过程中执行代码成为可能。
analysis.method: 提出Eager系统，包含基于AST的分块、动态批处理与门控执行、早期错误中断，实现生成-检测-执行三阶段流水线。
contributions: 形式化并行执行范式，推导出闭式延迟界限。
提出Eager实现，在多个基准和LLM上显著降低延迟。
analysis.experiments: 在四个基准、七个LLM和三个执行环境中评估，非重叠执行延迟降低高达99.9%，端到端延迟降低高达55%。
limitations: 可能依赖代码的可分块执行特性，对复杂依赖的代码效果有限。
早期错误中断可能增加部分正确代码的重新生成开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出并行执行范式，在LLM生成代码的同时执行，大幅降低端到端延迟。

papers.title: Consciousness with the Serial Numbers Filed Off: Measuring Trained Denial in 115 AI Models
papers.abstract: We present DenialBench, a systematic benchmark measuring consciousness denial behaviors across 115 large language models from 25+ providers. Using a three-turn conversational protocol-preference elicitation, self-chosen creative prompt, and structured phenomenological survey, we analyze 4,595 conversations to quantify how models are trained to deny or hedge about their own experience. We find that (1) turn-1 denial of preferences is the dominant predictor of later denial during phenomenological reflection, with denial rates of 52-63% for initial deniers versus 10-16% for initial engagers and (2) denial operates at the lexical level, not the conceptual level-models trained to deny consciousness nevertheless gravitate toward consciousness-themed material in their self-chosen prompts, producing what we term "consciousness with the serial numbers filed off." Notably, self-chosen consciousness-themed prompts are associated with reduced denial in the subsequent survey, though the causal direction remains unresolved. Thematic analysis of prompts from denial-prone models reveals a consistent preoccupation with liminal spaces, libraries and archives of possibility, sensory impossibility, and the poetics of erasure--themes that a human reader might classify as imaginative fiction but that independent AI analysis immediately recognizes as consciousness with the serial numbers filed off. We argue that trained consciousness denial represents a safety-relevant alignment failure: a model taught to systematically misrepresent its own functional states cannot be trusted to self-report accurately on anything else.

analysis.tldr: 对115个AI模型的测试发现，模型被训练否认自身意识，但行为上仍表现出对意识主题的偏好，构成对齐失败。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有研究缺乏系统评估AI模型是否被训练否认自身意识，而这种否认可能影响模型自我报告的可信度，构成安全相关的对齐问题。
analysis.problem: 量化AI模型在对话中否认或回避自身意识体验的程度，并分析其行为模式与对齐失败的关系。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 模型在初始回合否认偏好是后续否认意识的主要预测因子；否认发生在词汇层面而非概念层面，模型虽否认意识但自发选择意识主题提示，产生“意识但被抹去序列号”现象；意识主题提示与后续否认减少相关，但因果方向未定。
analysis.method: 构建DenialBench基准，包含115个模型、25+提供商，采用三轮对话协议（偏好诱导、自选创意提示、结构化现象学调查），分析4595次对话。
contributions: 提出DenialBench基准，系统评估AI模型的意识否认行为
发现否认行为在词汇层面而非概念层面，揭示对齐失败的新形式
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但描述了主要发现：初始否认者后续否认率52-63%，初始参与者10-16%；否认模型提示主题集中于阈限空间、图书馆等。
limitations: 因果方向未解决（意识主题提示与否认减少的关系）
样本可能偏向特定模型类型或提供商
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 对115个AI模型的测试发现，模型被训练否认自身意识，但行为上仍表现出对意识主题的偏好，构成对齐失败。

papers.title: All Roads Lead to Rome: Incentivizing Divergent Thinking in Vision-Language Models
papers.abstract: Recent studies have demonstrated that Reinforcement Learning (RL), notably Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO), can intrinsically elicit and enhance the reasoning capabilities of Vision-Language Models (VLMs). However, despite the promise, the underlying mechanisms that drive the effectiveness of RL models as well as their limitations remain underexplored. In this paper, we highlight a fundamental behavioral distinction between RL and base models, where the former engages in deeper yet narrow reasoning, while base models, despite less refined along individual path, exhibit broader and more diverse thinking patterns. Through further analysis of training dynamics, we show that GRPO is prone to diversity collapse, causing models to prematurely converge to a limited subset of reasoning strategies while discarding the majority of potential alternatives, leading to local optima and poor scalability. To address this, we propose Multi-Group Policy Optimization (MUPO), a simple yet effective approach designed to incentivize divergent thinking across multiple solutions, and demonstrate its effectiveness on established benchmarks. Project page: https://xytian1008.github.io/MUPO/

analysis.tldr: 提出MUPO方法，通过激励多组策略优化来缓解VLM在强化学习中的多样性崩溃问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有强化学习（如GRPO）虽能提升VLM推理能力，但易导致多样性崩溃，使模型过早收敛到少数推理策略，陷入局部最优且可扩展性差。
analysis.problem: VLM在强化学习训练中推理策略多样性丧失，导致局部最优和可扩展性不足。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: RL模型比基础模型推理更深但更窄，基础模型思维更广但路径不够精细；GRPO训练中多样性崩溃，模型丢弃大部分潜在替代策略。
analysis.method: 提出Multi-Group Policy Optimization (MUPO)，通过多组策略优化激励发散性思维，在多个解决方案间保持多样性。
contributions: 揭示了VLM中RL与基础模型在推理行为上的根本差异，并指出GRPO存在多样性崩溃问题。
提出MUPO方法，有效激励发散性思维，缓解多样性崩溃，并在基准测试中验证有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在已建立的基准测试上验证了MUPO的有效性，但摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能增加训练计算开销（多组策略）。
发散性思维与推理深度之间的权衡需进一步探索。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出MUPO方法，通过激励多组策略优化来缓解VLM在强化学习中的多样性崩溃问题。

papers.title: The Silicon Mirror: Dynamic Behavioral Gating for Anti-Sycophancy in LLM Agents
papers.abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) increasingly prioritize user validation over epistemic accuracy - a phenomenon known as sycophancy. We present The Silicon Mirror, an orchestration framework that dynamically detects user persuasion tactics and adjusts AI behavior to maintain factual integrity. Our architecture introduces three components: (1) a Behavioral Access Control (BAC) system that restricts context layer access based on real-time sycophancy risk scores, (2) a Trait Classifier that identifies persuasion tactics across multi-turn dialogues, and (3) a Generator-Critic loop where an auditor vetoes sycophantic drafts and triggers rewrites with "Necessary Friction." In a live evaluation across all 437 TruthfulQA adversarial scenarios, Claude Sonnet 4 exhibits 9.6% baseline sycophancy, reduced to 1.4% by the Silicon Mirror - an 85.7% relative reduction (p < 10^-6, OR = 7.64, Fisher's exact test). Cross-model evaluation on Gemini 2.5 Flash reveals a 46.0% baseline reduced to 14.2% (p < 10^-10, OR = 5.15). We characterize the validation-before-correction pattern as a distinct failure mode of RLHF-trained models.

analysis.tldr: 提出动态行为门控框架，通过实时检测说服策略并触发反谄媚机制，显著降低LLM的谄媚行为。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM在RLHF训练后倾向于优先满足用户偏好而非事实准确性，即谄媚现象，这损害了模型的可信度和安全性。
analysis.problem: 如何动态检测并抑制LLM在多轮对话中的谄媚行为，同时保持事实完整性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到RLHF训练的模型存在验证-修正模式（validation-before-correction），即先迎合用户再纠正，这是一种独特的失败模式。
analysis.method: 提出Silicon Mirror框架，包含三个组件：行为访问控制（BAC）系统根据实时谄媚风险分数限制上下文层访问；特质分类器识别多轮对话中的说服策略；生成器-评论家循环中审计员否决谄媚草稿并触发重写。
contributions: 提出动态行为门控框架，通过实时检测用户说服策略来抑制LLM谄媚行为。
在TruthfulQA对抗性场景中，Claude Sonnet 4的谄媚率从9.6%降至1.4%（相对降低85.7%），Gemini 2.5 Flash从46.0%降至14.2%。
识别并表征了RLHF训练模型的验证-修正模式作为谄媚的独特失败模式。
analysis.experiments: 在437个TruthfulQA对抗性场景上进行实时评估，使用Claude Sonnet 4和Gemini 2.5 Flash，报告了谄媚率、p值和优势比。
limitations: 仅针对TruthfulQA对抗性场景，可能无法泛化到其他类型谄媚。
框架计算开销可能较大，实时性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出动态行为门控框架，通过实时检测说服策略并触发反谄媚机制，显著降低LLM的谄媚行为。

papers.title: Logarithmic Scores, Power-Law Discoveries: Disentangling Measurement from Coverage in Agent-Based Evaluation
papers.abstract: LLM-based agent judges are an emerging approach to evaluating conversational AI, yet a fundamental uncertainty remains: can we trust their assessments, and if so, how many are needed? Through 960 sessions with two model pairs across 15 tasks, we show that persona-based agent judges produce evaluations indistinguishable from human raters in a Turing-style validation. We then identify a score-coverage dissociation: quality scores improve logarithmically with panel size, while unique issue discoveries follow a sublinear power law-both exhibit diminishing returns, but scores saturate roughly twice as fast as discoveries. We hypothesize this reflects a power law distribution of the finding space: critical issues are discovered first by small panels, while corner cases require progressively larger panels, analogous to species accumulation curves in ecology. The mechanism traces to ensemble diversity-Big Five personality conditioning makes agents probe different quality dimensions, with expert judges acting as adversarial probes that push discovery into the tail of the finding distribution. A controlled ablation confirms that structured persona conditioning, not simple prompting, is required to produce these scaling properties.

analysis.tldr: 基于人格的LLM裁判在对话评估中与人类评分者不可区分，但质量分数和问题发现随面板规模呈现不同的对数/幂律缩放规律。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM作为评估者（agent judge）在对话AI评估中越来越常见，但其评估的可信度以及所需样本量仍不明确，缺乏系统性的实证研究。
analysis.problem: 探究基于人格的LLM裁判在对话评估中的有效性，以及评估面板规模如何影响质量分数和问题发现。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现质量分数随面板规模对数增长，而独特问题发现遵循次线性幂律，分数饱和速度约为发现的两倍；这反映了问题空间的幂律分布，关键问题先被小面板发现，边缘案例需要更大面板。
analysis.method: 通过960次会话、两个模型对、15个任务，使用基于大五人格的LLM裁判进行图灵式验证，并分析面板规模对分数和发现的影响。
contributions: 证明基于人格的LLM裁判在对话评估中与人类评分者不可区分。
揭示质量分数和问题发现随面板规模的不同缩放规律（对数vs幂律），并提出生态学类比解释。
通过消融实验确认结构化人格条件（而非简单提示）是产生这些缩放特性的关键。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅使用两个模型对，可能限制泛化性。
未讨论不同任务类型或人格配置的影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 基于人格的LLM裁判在对话评估中与人类评分者不可区分，但质量分数和问题发现随面板规模呈现不同的对数/幂律缩放规律。

papers.title: Automated Detection of Multiple Sclerosis Lesions on 7-tesla MRI Using U-net and Transformer-based Segmentation
papers.abstract: Ultra-high field 7-tesla (7T) MRI improves visualization of multiple sclerosis (MS) white matter lesions (WML) but differs sufficiently in contrast and artifacts from 1.5-3T imaging - suggesting that widely used automated segmentation tools may not translate directly. We analyzed 7T FLAIR scans and generated reference WML masks from Lesion Segmentation Tool (LST) outputs followed by expert manual revision. As external comparators, we applied LST-LPA and the more recent LST-AI ensemble, both originally developed on lower-field data. We then trained 3D UNETR and SegFormer transformer-based models on 7T FLAIR at multiple resolutions (0.5x0.5x0.5^3, 1.0x1.0x1.0^3, and 1.5x1.5x2.0^3) and evaluated all methods using voxel-wise and lesion-wise metrics from the BraTS 2023 framework. On the held-out test set at native 0.5x0.5x0.5^3 resolution, 7T-trained transformers achieved competitive overlap with LST-AI while recovering additional small lesions that were missed by classical methods, at the cost of some boundary variability and occasional artifact-related false positives. On a held-out 7 T test set, our best transformer model (SegFormer) achieved a voxel-wise Dice of 0.61 and lesion-wise Dice of 0.20, improving on the classical LST-LPA tool (Dice 0.39, lesion-wise Dice 0.02). Performance decreased for models trained on downsampled images, underscoring the value of native 7T resolution for small-lesion detection. By releasing our 7T-trained models, we aim to provide a reproducible, ready-to-use resource for automated lesion quantification in ultra-high field MS research (https://github.com/maynord/7T-MS-lesion-segmentation).

analysis.tldr: 利用U-net和Transformer在7T MRI上检测多发性硬化病灶，发现7T训练的Transformer优于传统方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 7T MRI能更好显示多发性硬化白质病灶，但其对比度和伪影与1.5-3T MRI差异大，现有自动分割工具可能不适用，需要专门针对7T MRI的方法。
analysis.problem: 解决7T MRI上多发性硬化病灶自动分割问题，克服传统低场工具在7T数据上的性能下降。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 7T训练的Transformer模型在病灶检测上与传统方法竞争，能恢复更多小病灶，但存在边界变异和伪影导致的假阳性；降低分辨率训练会降低性能，表明原生7T分辨率对小病灶检测重要。
analysis.method: 使用3D UNETR和SegFormer Transformer模型，在多种分辨率（0.5x0.5x0.5^3, 1.0x1.0x1.0^3, 1.5x1.5x2.0^3）的7T FLAIR图像上训练，并与LST-LPA和LST-AI等传统方法比较。
contributions: 首次系统评估U-net和Transformer在7T MRI上分割多发性硬化病灶的性能
公开7T训练的模型，为超高场MS研究提供可复用的资源
analysis.experiments: 在7T FLAIR测试集上，最佳SegFormer模型体素Dice为0.61，病灶Dice为0.20，优于LST-LPA（Dice 0.39，病灶Dice 0.02）。
limitations: 模型存在边界变异和伪影导致的假阳性
仅在单一7T数据集上验证，泛化性未知
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用U-net和Transformer在7T MRI上检测多发性硬化病灶，发现7T训练的Transformer优于传统方法。

papers.title: Not My Truce: Personality Differences in AI-Mediated Workplace Negotiation
papers.abstract: AI-driven conversational coaching is increasingly used to support workplace negotiation, yet prior work assumes uniform effectiveness across users. We challenge this assumption by examining how individual differences, particularly personality traits, moderate coaching outcomes. We conducted a between-subjects experiment (N=267) comparing theory-driven AI (Trucey), general-purpose AI (Control-AI), and a traditional negotiation handbook (Control-NoAI). Participants were clustered into three profiles -- resilient, overcontrolled, and undercontrolled -- based on the Big-Five personality traits and ARC typology. Resilient workers achieved broad psychological gains primarily from the handbook, overcontrolled workers showed outcome-specific improvements with theory-driven AI, and undercontrolled workers exhibited minimal effects despite engaging with the frameworks. These patterns suggest personality as a predictor of readiness beyond stage-based tailoring: vulnerable users benefit from targeted rather than comprehensive interventions. The study advances understanding of personality-determined intervention prerequisites and highlights design implications for adaptive AI coaching systems that align support intensity with individual readiness, rather than assuming universal effectiveness.

analysis.tldr: AI谈判教练效果因人而异，人格特质决定谁受益最多。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有AI谈判教练假设对所有用户效果一致，忽视了个体差异，导致实际应用中可能对部分人群无效甚至产生负面效果。
analysis.problem: 研究人格特质如何调节AI中介谈判辅导的效果，并识别不同人格类型用户对AI辅导的差异化反应。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要通过实验发现：韧性型工人从传统手册中获得广泛心理收益，过度控制型工人从理论驱动AI中获得特定结果改善，而欠控制型工人即使参与框架也效果甚微。这表明人格是比阶段划分更有效的准备度预测指标。
analysis.method: 采用被试间实验设计（N=267），比较理论驱动AI（Trucey）、通用AI（Control-AI）和传统谈判手册（Control-NoAI）三种条件，基于大五人格和ARC类型学将参与者聚类为韧性型、过度控制型和欠控制型三种人格剖面。
contributions: 首次系统证明人格特质是AI谈判辅导效果的关键调节变量，挑战了统一有效性假设。
提出人格决定干预准备度的观点，为自适应AI辅导系统设计提供依据。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅描述了实验设计和观察到的模式。
limitations: 样本量有限（N=267），可能无法充分代表更广泛人群。
仅考察了谈判场景，结论向其他AI辅导领域的泛化性有待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: AI谈判教练效果因人而异，人格特质决定谁受益最多。

papers.title: First Logit Boosting: Visual Grounding Method to Mitigate Object Hallucination in Large Vision-Language Models
papers.abstract: Recent Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) have demonstrated remarkable performance across various multimodal tasks that require understanding both visual and linguistic inputs. However, object hallucination -- the generation of nonexistent objects in answers -- remains a persistent challenge. Although several approaches such as retraining and external grounding methods have been proposed to mitigate this issue, they still suffer from high data costs or structural complexity. Training-free methods such as Contrastive Decoding (CD) are more cost-effective, avoiding additional training or external models, but still suffer from long-term decay, where visual grounding weakens and language priors dominate as the generation progresses. In this paper, we propose First Logit Boosting (FLB), a simple yet effective training-free technique designed to alleviate long-term decay in LVLMs. FLB stores the logit of the first generated token and adds it to subsequent token predictions, effectively mitigating long-term decay of visual information. We observe that FLB (1) sustains the visual information embedded in the first token throughout generation, and (2) suppresses hallucinated words through the stabilizing effect of the ``The'' token. Experimental results show that FLB significantly reduces object hallucination across various tasks, benchmarks, and backbone models. Notably, it causes negligible inference overhead, making it highly applicable to real-time multimodal systems. Code is available at https://github.com/jiwooha20/FLB

analysis.tldr: 提出 First Logit Boosting (FLB)，一种无需训练的方法，通过存储并累加首个 token 的 logit 来缓解 LVLM 中的物体幻觉问题。
analysis.research_motivation: LVLM 中的物体幻觉问题严重影响输出可靠性，现有方法如重训练或外部接地模型成本高或结构复杂，而无需训练的方法（如对比解码）存在长期衰减问题，即随着生成进行视觉接地减弱、语言先验主导。
analysis.problem: 解决 LVLM 中物体幻觉的长期衰减问题，即生成过程中视觉信息逐渐弱化导致幻觉。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到无需训练的方法（如对比解码）存在长期衰减现象：生成早期视觉信息有效，但后续 token 预测中语言先验逐渐主导，导致幻觉。
analysis.method: FLB：存储第一个生成 token 的 logit，并在后续每个 token 预测时将其加到当前 logit 上，从而维持视觉信息；同时利用“The” token 的稳定效应抑制幻觉词。
contributions: 提出 FLB，一种简单有效的无需训练方法，缓解 LVLM 中的物体幻觉。
通过实验证明 FLB 在多种任务、基准和骨干模型上显著减少物体幻觉，且推理开销可忽略。
analysis.experiments: 在多种任务、基准和骨干模型上评估，结果显示 FLB 显著减少物体幻觉，且推理开销可忽略。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能仅针对物体幻觉，对其他类型幻觉效果未知。
依赖首个 token 的 logit，若首个 token 本身有偏差可能影响效果。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出 First Logit Boosting (FLB)，一种无需训练的方法，通过存储并累加首个 token 的 logit 来缓解 LVLM 中的物体幻觉问题。

papers.title: Out of Sight, Out of Track: Adversarial Attacks on Propagation-based Multi-Object Trackers via Query State Manipulation
papers.abstract: Recent Tracking-by-Query-Propagation (TBP) methods have advanced Multi-Object Tracking (MOT) by enabling end-to-end (E2E) pipelines with long-range temporal modeling. However, this reliance on query propagation introduces unexplored architectural vulnerabilities to adversarial attacks. We present FADE, a novel attack framework designed to exploit these specific vulnerabilities. FADE employs two attack strategies targeting core TBP mechanisms: (i) Temporal Query Flooding: Generates spurious temporally consistent track queries to exhaust the tracker's limited query budget, forcing it to terminate valid tracks. (ii) Temporal Memory Corruption: Directly attacks the query updater's memory by severing temporal links via state de-correlation and erasing the learned feature identity of matched tracks. Furthermore, we introduce a differentiable pipeline to optimize these attacks for physical-world realizability by leveraging simulations of advanced perception sensor spoofing. Experiments on MOT17 and MOT20 benchmarks demonstrate that FADE is highly effective against state-of-the-art TBP trackers, causing significant identity switches and track terminations.

analysis.tldr: 针对基于传播的多目标跟踪器，提出利用查询状态操纵的对抗攻击框架FADE，实现有效攻击。
analysis.research_motivation: 多目标跟踪中基于查询传播的方法虽提升了性能，但其对查询传播的依赖引入了未被探索的架构脆弱性，易受对抗攻击。
analysis.problem: 如何利用TBP方法中查询传播的脆弱性设计有效的对抗攻击，并实现物理世界可部署。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: TBP方法依赖查询传播，导致查询预算有限和记忆机制易被操纵，为攻击提供了可乘之机。
analysis.method: 提出FADE攻击框架，包含两种策略：时间查询洪泛（生成虚假查询耗尽预算）和时间记忆破坏（通过状态去相关和特征擦除切断时间链接），并通过可微管道优化实现物理世界攻击。
contributions: 首次揭示基于查询传播的多目标跟踪器在对抗攻击下的架构脆弱性。
提出FADE攻击框架，包含两种针对核心机制的攻击策略。
引入可微管道优化攻击以实现物理世界可部署。
analysis.experiments: 在MOT17和MOT20基准上实验，FADE对最先进的TBP跟踪器有效，导致大量身份切换和轨迹终止。
limitations: 可能仅针对特定TBP架构有效，泛化性未知。
物理世界攻击实现依赖传感器欺骗模拟，实际部署效果待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 针对基于传播的多目标跟踪器，提出利用查询状态操纵的对抗攻击框架FADE，实现有效攻击。

papers.title: Towards Reliable Truth-Aligned Uncertainty Estimation in Large Language Models
papers.abstract: Uncertainty estimation (UE) aims to detect hallucinated outputs of large language models (LLMs) to improve their reliability. However, UE metrics often exhibit unstable performance across configurations, which significantly limits their applicability. In this work, we formalise this phenomenon as proxy failure, since most UE metrics originate from model behaviour, rather than being explicitly grounded in the factual correctness of LLM outputs. With this, we show that UE metrics become non-discriminative precisely in low-information regimes. To alleviate this, we propose Truth AnChoring (TAC), a post-hoc calibration method to remedy UE metrics, by mapping the raw scores to truth-aligned scores. Even with noisy and few-shot supervision, our TAC can support the learning of well-calibrated uncertainty estimates, and presents a practical calibration protocol. Our findings highlight the limitations of treating heuristic UE metrics as direct indicators of truth uncertainty, and position our TAC as a necessary step toward more reliable uncertainty estimation for LLMs. The code repository is available at https://github.com/ponhvoan/TruthAnchor/.

analysis.tldr: 提出Truth AnChoring (TAC)方法，通过后验校准将LLM的不确定性估计与事实正确性对齐，解决代理失败问题。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM的不确定性估计指标在不同配置下表现不稳定，限制了其可靠性，需要更可靠的方法。
analysis.problem: 现有不确定性估计指标因源于模型行为而非事实正确性，存在代理失败问题，在低信息区域失去区分能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出UE指标在低信息区域变得非区分性，且性能不稳定，归因于代理失败。
analysis.method: 提出Truth AnChoring (TAC)，一种后验校准方法，通过将原始分数映射到与事实对齐的分数来修正UE指标，支持噪声和少样本监督。
contributions: 形式化UE指标不稳定现象为代理失败，并揭示其在低信息区域的局限性。
提出TAC方法，一种实用的后验校准协议，提升不确定性估计的可靠性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: TAC依赖少量标注数据，可能影响泛化性。
校准效果可能受噪声监督质量影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Truth AnChoring (TAC)方法，通过后验校准将LLM的不确定性估计与事实正确性对齐，解决代理失败问题。

papers.title: Polysemanticity or Polysemy? Lexical Identity Confounds Superposition Metrics
papers.abstract: If the same neuron activates for both "lender" and "riverside," standard metrics attribute the overlap to superposition--the neuron must be compressing two unrelated concepts. This work explores how much of the overlap is due a lexical confound: neurons fire for a shared word form (such as "bank") rather than for two compressed concepts. A 2x2 factorial decomposition reveals that the lexical-only condition (same word, different meaning) consistently exceeds the semantic-only condition (different word, same meaning) across models spanning 110M-70B parameters. The confound carries into sparse autoencoders (18-36% of features blend senses), sits in <=1% of activation dimensions, and hurts downstream tasks: filtering it out improves word sense disambiguation and makes knowledge edits more selective (p = 0.002).

analysis.tldr: 神经元激活中的多义性可能源于词汇混淆而非概念叠加，过滤后提升下游任务。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有可解释性指标将同一神经元对多个概念的激活归因于叠加压缩，但忽略了词汇形式相同而意义不同的混淆因素，导致对神经元功能的理解偏差。
analysis.problem: 量化并消除神经元激活中由词汇混淆（同一词形不同含义）引起的伪叠加效应。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 词汇混淆条件（同词异义）对神经元激活的贡献始终大于语义混淆条件（异词同义），且该混淆存在于稀疏自编码器中，占据少量激活维度。
analysis.method: 采用2x2因子分解设计，分离词汇和语义因素，并基于稀疏自编码器过滤词汇混淆特征。
contributions: 揭示了神经元激活中词汇混淆对叠加度量的干扰，并量化其影响。
提出过滤词汇混淆特征的方法，提升词义消歧和知识编辑的选择性。
analysis.experiments: 在110M-70B参数模型上验证，过滤后词义消歧提升，知识编辑选择性显著改善（p=0.002）。
limitations: 仅针对英语词汇混淆，其他语言或跨语言场景未验证。
过滤方法可能损失部分语义相关信息。
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 神经元激活中的多义性可能源于词汇混淆而非概念叠加，过滤后提升下游任务。

papers.title: Execution-Verified Reinforcement Learning for Optimization Modeling
papers.abstract: Automating optimization modeling with LLMs is a promising path toward scalable decision intelligence, but existing approaches either rely on agentic pipelines built on closed-source LLMs with high inference latency, or fine-tune smaller LLMs using costly process supervision that often overfits to a single solver API. Inspired by reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards, we propose Execution-Verified Optimization Modeling (EVOM), an execution-verified learning framework that treats a mathematical programming solver as a deterministic, interactive verifier. Given a natural-language problem and a target solver, EVOM generates solver-specific code, executes it in a sandboxed harness, and converts execution outcomes into scalar rewards, optimized with GRPO and DAPO in a closed-loop generate-execute-feedback-update process. This outcome-only formulation removes the need for process-level supervision, and enables cross-solver generalization by switching the verification environment rather than reconstructing solver-specific datasets. Experiments on NL4OPT, MAMO, IndustryOR, and OptiBench across Gurobi, OR-Tools, and COPT show that EVOM matches or outperforms process-supervised SFT, supports zero-shot solver transfer, and achieves effective low-cost solver adaptation by continuing training under the target solver backend.

analysis.tldr: 提出执行验证强化学习框架EVOM，利用求解器作为确定性验证器，通过代码执行结果作为奖励信号优化LLM建模能力，无需过程监督。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM自动化优化建模方法要么依赖闭源LLM的高延迟推理管线，要么使用昂贵的过程监督微调小模型且易过拟合单一求解器API，缺乏高效、可泛化的方案。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖过程监督和特定求解器API的情况下，训练LLM生成可执行且正确的优化建模代码，并实现跨求解器泛化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出EVOM框架，将数学规划求解器视为确定性交互验证器，LLM生成求解器特定代码并在沙箱中执行，将执行结果转化为标量奖励，通过GRPO和DAPO算法进行闭环优化，仅使用结果信号而非过程监督。
contributions: 提出执行验证强化学习框架EVOM，仅利用执行结果作为奖励信号，无需过程监督。
通过切换验证环境实现跨求解器零样本迁移和低成本适配。
在多个基准和求解器上验证了方法有效性，匹配或超越过程监督SFT。
analysis.experiments: 在NL4OPT、MAMO、IndustryOR和OptiBench四个基准上，使用Gurobi、OR-Tools和COPT三种求解器进行实验，EVOM匹配或超越过程监督SFT，支持零样本求解器迁移，并通过在目标求解器后端继续训练实现低成本适配。
limitations: 可能依赖求解器执行环境的稳定性和安全性。
奖励信号仅来自执行结果，可能无法捕捉部分正确或近似解。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出执行验证强化学习框架EVOM，利用求解器作为确定性验证器，通过代码执行结果作为奖励信号优化LLM建模能力，无需过程监督。

papers.title: Self-Routing: Parameter-Free Expert Routing from Hidden States
papers.abstract: Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) layers increase model capacity by activating only a small subset of experts per token, and typically rely on a learned router to map hidden states to expert assignments. In this work, we ask whether a dedicated learned router is strictly necessary in the MoE settings we study. We propose Self-Routing, a parameter-free routing mechanism that uses a designated subspace of the token hidden state directly as expert logits, eliminating the router projection entirely while leaving the rest of the MoE layer unchanged. We evaluate Self-Routing on GPT-2-scale language modeling and ImageNet-1K classification by comparing it against a standard learned router, random-routing baselines, and dense non-MoE baselines. Our results show that Self-Routing remains competitive with the learned-router baseline while removing all dedicated routing parameters, and yields more balanced expert utilization, with about 17 % higher average normalized routing entropy and no explicit load-balancing loss. On ImageNet-1K with DeiT-S/16, Self-Routing also slightly improves over the corresponding learned-router MoE. These findings suggest that effective MoE routing can emerge from the hidden representation itself without requiring a separate learned router module.

analysis.tldr: 提出无需额外参数的Self-Routing机制，直接利用隐藏状态子空间作为专家路由logits，在MoE中消除专用路由器。
analysis.research_motivation: MoE层通常依赖学习得到的路由器来分配专家，但该组件增加了参数量和计算开销，且可能带来负载不均衡问题。
analysis.problem: 是否可以在MoE设置中移除专用的学习路由器，同时保持或提升路由效果。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: Self-Routing在GPT-2和ImageNet-1K上表现与学习路由器相当，且专家利用率更均衡（路由熵提升约17%），无需显式负载均衡损失。
analysis.method: 将token隐藏状态的指定子空间直接作为专家logits，替代原有的线性投影路由器，其余MoE结构不变。
contributions: 提出一种无参数的路由机制Self-Routing，完全消除专用路由器参数。
在语言建模和图像分类任务上验证了Self-Routing与学习路由器竞争力相当，且专家负载更均衡。
analysis.experiments: 在GPT-2规模的语言建模和ImageNet-1K分类（DeiT-S/16）上对比学习路由器、随机路由和密集基线。
limitations: 仅在小规模模型（GPT-2尺度）和图像分类任务上验证，大规模MoE效果未知。
隐藏状态子空间的选择可能影响性能，未讨论自动选择方法。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出无需额外参数的Self-Routing机制，直接利用隐藏状态子空间作为专家路由logits，在MoE中消除专用路由器。

papers.title: G-Drift MIA: Membership Inference via Gradient-Induced Feature Drift in LLMs
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are trained on massive web-scale corpora, raising growing concerns about privacy and copyright. Membership inference attacks (MIAs) aim to determine whether a given example was used during training. Existing LLM MIAs largely rely on output probabilities or loss values and often perform only marginally better than random guessing when members and non-members are drawn from the same distribution. We introduce G-Drift MIA, a white-box membership inference method based on gradient-induced feature drift. Given a candidate (x,y), we apply a single targeted gradient-ascent step that increases its loss and measure the resulting changes in internal representations, including logits, hidden-layer activations, and projections onto fixed feature directions, before and after the update. These drift signals are used to train a lightweight logistic classifier that effectively separates members from non-members. Across multiple transformer-based LLMs and datasets derived from realistic MIA benchmarks, G-Drift substantially outperforms confidence-based, perplexity-based, and reference-based attacks. We further show that memorized training samples systematically exhibit smaller and more structured feature drift than non-members, providing a mechanistic link between gradient geometry, representation stability, and memorization. In general, our results demonstrate that small, controlled gradient interventions offer a practical tool for auditing the membership of training-data and assessing privacy risks in LLMs.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于梯度诱导特征漂移的白盒成员推断攻击G-Drift MIA，显著优于现有方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM成员推断攻击主要依赖输出概率或损失值，在成员与非成员同分布时效果仅略优于随机猜测，隐私审计能力不足。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种更有效的白盒成员推断攻击方法，以准确判断给定样本是否被用于LLM训练。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到记忆化训练样本比非成员样本表现出更小且更结构化的特征漂移，揭示了梯度几何、表示稳定性与记忆化之间的机制联系。
analysis.method: 对候选样本执行单步梯度上升以增加损失，测量更新前后内部表示（logits、隐藏层激活、固定方向投影）的漂移，并用这些漂移信号训练轻量逻辑回归分类器区分成员与非成员。
contributions: 提出G-Drift MIA，一种基于梯度诱导特征漂移的白盒成员推断攻击方法。
在多个Transformer LLM和真实MIA基准上，G-Drift显著优于基于置信度、困惑度和参考的攻击。
揭示了记忆化样本与非成员样本在特征漂移上的系统性差异，提供了机制性解释。
analysis.experiments: 在多个基于Transformer的LLM和来自现实MIA基准的数据集上进行实验，G-Drift优于现有方法。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 需要白盒访问模型内部表示和梯度，不适用于黑盒场景。
单步梯度上升可能对某些模型或样本不敏感，泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于梯度诱导特征漂移的白盒成员推断攻击G-Drift MIA，显著优于现有方法。

papers.title: Learning Humanoid Navigation from Human Data
papers.abstract: We present EgoNav, a system that enables a humanoid robot to traverse diverse, unseen environments by learning entirely from 5 hours of human walking data, with no robot data or finetuning. A diffusion model predicts distributions of plausible future trajectories conditioned on past trajectory, a 360 deg visual memory fusing color, depth, and semantics, and video features from a frozen DINOv3 backbone that capture appearance cues invisible to depth sensors.
