A hybrid sampling scheme achieves real-time inference in 10 denoising steps, and a receding-horizon controller selects paths from the predicted distribution. We validate EgoNav through offline evaluations, where it outperforms baselines in collision avoidance and multi-modal coverage, and through zero-shot deployment on a Unitree G1 humanoid across unseen indoor and outdoor environments. Behaviors such as waiting for doors to open, navigating around crowds, and avoiding glass walls emerge naturally from the learned prior. We will release the dataset and trained models. Our website: https://egonav.weizhuowang.com

analysis.tldr: 仅用5小时人类行走数据训练扩散模型，实现人形机器人零样本导航。
analysis.research_motivation: 人形机器人导航通常需要大量机器人数据或精细调参，缺乏从人类数据直接迁移的高效方法。
analysis.problem: 如何仅利用人类行走数据，让双足人形机器人在未见过的室内外环境中实现零样本导航。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: EgoNav系统：扩散模型以历史轨迹、360度视觉记忆（融合颜色、深度、语义）和DINOv3视频特征为条件，预测未来轨迹分布；混合采样实现10步实时推理；后退地平线控制器从分布中选择路径。
contributions: 提出仅从人类行走数据学习的人形机器人导航系统，无需机器人数据或微调。
设计融合多模态视觉记忆的扩散轨迹预测模型，实现零样本部署。
analysis.experiments: 离线评估中在碰撞避免和多模态覆盖上优于基线；在Unitree G1人形机器人上零样本部署于室内外环境，涌现出等待开门、绕开人群等行为。
limitations: 仅依赖5小时人类数据，可能对极端场景泛化不足。
未提及在复杂动态环境中的实时性能上限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 仅用5小时人类行走数据训练扩散模型，实现人形机器人零样本导航。

papers.title: Decision-Centric Design for LLM Systems
papers.abstract: LLM systems must make control decisions in addition to generating outputs: whether to answer, clarify, retrieve, call tools, repair, or escalate. In many current architectures, these decisions remain implicit within generation, entangling assessment and action in a single model call and making failures hard to inspect, constrain, or repair. We propose a decision-centric framework that separates decision-relevant signals from the policy that maps them to actions, turning control into an explicit and inspectable layer of the system. This separation supports attribution of failures to signal estimation, decision policy, or execution, and enables modular improvement of each component. It unifies familiar single-step settings such as routing and adaptive inference, and extends naturally to sequential settings in which actions alter the information available before acting. Across three controlled experiments, the framework reduces futile actions, improves task success, and reveals interpretable failure modes. More broadly, it offers a general architectural principle for building more reliable, controllable, and diagnosable LLM systems.

analysis.tldr: 提出决策中心框架，将LLM系统中的控制决策与生成分离，提升可诊断性和可控性。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前LLM系统将决策隐式嵌入生成过程，导致失败难以检查、约束和修复，缺乏可解释性和模块化改进能力。
analysis.problem: LLM系统中控制决策（如是否回答、检索、调用工具等）与生成过程纠缠，缺乏显式、可检查的决策层。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出决策中心框架，将决策相关信号与映射到动作的策略分离，使控制成为显式且可检查的系统层，支持失败归因和模块化改进。
contributions: 提出决策中心框架，分离决策信号与策略，实现显式控制层。
统一了路由、自适应推理等单步设置，并扩展到序列决策场景。
通过实验验证框架减少无效动作、提升任务成功率并揭示可解释失败模式。
analysis.experiments: 在三个受控实验中，框架减少了无效动作，提高了任务成功率，并揭示了可解释的失败模式。
limitations: 实验规模较小，可能未覆盖复杂真实场景。
框架的通用性需在更多LLM系统架构中验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出决策中心框架，将LLM系统中的控制决策与生成分离，提升可诊断性和可控性。

papers.title: Deliberative Alignment is Deep, but Uncertainty Remains: Inference time safety improvement in reasoning via attribution of unsafe behavior to base model
papers.abstract: While the wide adoption of refusal training in large language models (LLMs) has showcased improvements in model safety, recent works have highlighted shortcomings due to the shallow nature of these alignment methods. To this end, the work on Deliberative alignment proposed distilling reasoning capabilities from stronger reasoning models, thereby instilling deeper safety in LLMs. In this work, we study the impact of deliberative alignment in language models. First, we show that despite being larger in model size and stronger in safety capability, there exists an alignment gap between teacher and student language models, which affects both the safety and general utility of the student model. Furthermore, we show that models aligned through deliberative alignment can retain unsafe behaviors from the base model despite learning the reasoning patterns of larger reasoning models. Building upon this observation, we propose a BoN sampling method that attributes the unsafe behavior back to the base LLMs in the latent space, thereby down-ranking unsafe responses to gain a meaningful improvement in model safety across multiple safety benchmarks with minimal loss in utility. In particular, across 7 teacher models and 6 student models of different classes and sizes, we show an average attack success rate (ASR) reduction of 28.2% in DAN, 31.3% in WildJailbreak and 35.4 % in StrongREJECT benchmarks. We further show that these safety gains prevail post RL training, thus highlighting the uncertainty in safety reasoning and it's explicit attribution to the base model.

analysis.tldr: 深思对齐虽能提升模型安全性，但学生模型仍保留基座模型的不安全行为，通过BoN采样归因不安全行为可显著降低攻击成功率。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有拒绝训练对齐方法较浅层，无法彻底消除不安全行为，需要更深入的安全对齐方法。
analysis.problem: 深思对齐后的学生模型仍保留基座模型的不安全行为，存在对齐差距，影响安全性和实用性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 学生模型虽学习了强推理模式，但仍保留基座模型的不安全行为，且安全推理存在不确定性。
analysis.method: 提出BoN采样方法，在潜在空间中将不安全行为归因于基座模型，从而降低不安全响应的排名。
contributions: 发现深思对齐中学生模型存在对齐差距，保留基座模型的不安全行为。
提出BoN采样方法，通过归因不安全行为到基座模型来提升安全性，在多个基准上平均降低攻击成功率28-35%。
analysis.experiments: 在7个教师模型和6个学生模型上，DAN、WildJailbreak和StrongREJECT基准的平均攻击成功率分别降低28.2%、31.3%和35.4%，且RL训练后安全增益仍保持。
limitations: BoN采样可能增加推理开销。
归因方法可能不完全准确。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 深思对齐虽能提升模型安全性，但学生模型仍保留基座模型的不安全行为，通过BoN采样归因不安全行为可显著降低攻击成功率。

papers.title: The 1st Winner for 5th PVUW MeViS-Text Challenge: Strong MLLMs Meet SAM3 for Referring Video Object Segmentation
papers.abstract: This report presents our winning solution to the 5th PVUW MeViS-Text Challenge. The track studies referring video object segmentation under motion-centric language expressions, where the model must jointly understand appearance, temporal behavior, and object interactions. To address this problem, we build a fully training-free pipeline that combines strong multimodal large language models with SAM3. Our method contains three stages. First, Gemini-3.1 Pro decomposes each target event into instance-level grounding targets, selects the frame where the target is most clearly visible, and generates a discriminative description. Second, SAM3-agent produces a precise seed mask on the selected frame, and the official SAM3 tracker propagates the mask through the whole video. Third, a refinement stage uses Qwen3.5-Plus and behavior-level verification to correct ambiguous or semantically inconsistent predictions. Without task-specific fine-tuning, our method ranks first on the PVUW 2026 MeViS-Text test set, achieving a Final score of 0.909064 and a J&F score of 0.7897. The code is available at https://github.com/Moujuruo/MeViSv2_Track_Solution_2026.

analysis.tldr: 无训练流水线结合MLLM与SAM3，在运动中心指代视频目标分割挑战赛中夺冠。
analysis.research_motivation: 运动中心语言表达下的指代视频目标分割需要模型同时理解外观、时序行为和物体交互，现有方法通常需要任务特定微调，泛化性受限。
analysis.problem: 如何在不进行任务特定微调的情况下，利用现有多模态大模型和分割模型实现高质量的运动中心指代视频目标分割。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 三阶段无训练流水线：1) Gemini-3.1 Pro分解事件、选择关键帧并生成判别性描述；2) SAM3-agent生成种子掩码并由SAM3跟踪器传播；3) Qwen3.5-Plus进行行为级验证修正。
contributions: 提出首个完全无训练的三阶段流水线，结合MLLM与SAM3解决运动中心指代视频目标分割。
在PVUW 2026 MeViS-Text测试集上取得第一名，Final score 0.909064，J&F 0.7897。
analysis.experiments: 在PVUW 2026 MeViS-Text测试集上评估，取得第一名，具体分数为Final score 0.909064，J&F 0.7897。
limitations: 依赖多个外部模型（Gemini、SAM3、Qwen），可能增加推理成本。
未进行任务特定微调，在复杂场景下可能仍有语义不一致问题。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 无训练流水线结合MLLM与SAM3，在运动中心指代视频目标分割挑战赛中夺冠。

papers.title: COTTA: Context-Aware Transfer Adaptation for Trajectory Prediction in Autonomous Driving
papers.abstract: Developing robust models to accurately predict the trajectories of surrounding agents is fundamental to autonomous driving safety. However, most public datasets, such as the Waymo Open Motion Dataset and Argoverse, are collected in Western road environments and do not reflect the unique traffic patterns, infrastructure, and driving behaviors of other regions, including South Korea. This domain discrepancy leads to performance degradation when state-of-the-art models trained on Western data are deployed in different geographic contexts. In this work, we investigate the adaptability of Query-Centric Trajectory Prediction (QCNet) when transferred from U.S.-based data to Korean road environments. Using a Korean autonomous driving dataset, we compare four training strategies: zero-shot transfer, training from scratch, full fine-tuning, and encoder freezing. Experimental results demonstrate that leveraging pretrained knowledge significantly improves prediction performance. Specifically, selectively fine-tuning the decoder while freezing the encoder yields the best trade-off between accuracy and training efficiency, reducing prediction error by over 66% compared to training from scratch. This study provides practical insights into effective transfer learning strategies for deploying trajectory prediction models in new geographic domains.

analysis.tldr: 通过冻结编码器、微调解码器的迁移策略，将美国数据训练的轨迹预测模型适配到韩国道路环境，预测误差降低66%以上。
analysis.research_motivation: 自动驾驶轨迹预测模型在跨地理区域部署时，由于训练数据（如美国）与目标域（如韩国）的交通模式、基础设施和驾驶行为存在差异，导致性能显著下降，亟需高效的迁移学习方法。
analysis.problem: 如何将基于西方数据训练的轨迹预测模型（如QCNet）有效迁移到韩国等非西方道路环境，以提升预测精度和训练效率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 零样本迁移性能差，从头训练成本高，全微调效率低，而冻结编码器、微调解码器在精度和效率间取得最佳平衡。
analysis.method: 对比四种迁移策略：零样本迁移、从头训练、全微调、编码器冻结+解码器微调，并推荐后者。
contributions: 系统评估了QCNet从美国到韩国道路环境的迁移性能，揭示了领域差异的影响。
提出编码器冻结+解码器微调策略，在韩国数据集上实现预测误差降低66%以上，且训练高效。
analysis.experiments: 在韩国自动驾驶数据集上比较四种训练策略，使用QCNet模型，报告预测误差降低比例。
limitations: 仅针对QCNet一种模型，泛化性未验证。
未分析其他地理区域（如欧洲、亚洲其他国家）的迁移效果。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过冻结编码器、微调解码器的迁移策略，将美国数据训练的轨迹预测模型适配到韩国道路环境，预测误差降低66%以上。

papers.title: Improving Generalization of Deep Learning for Brain Metastases Segmentation Across Institutions
papers.abstract: Background: Deep learning has demonstrated significant potential for automated brain metastases (BM) segmentation; however, models trained at a singular institution often exhibit suboptimal performance at various sites due to disparities in scanner hardware, imaging protocols, and patient demographics. The goal of this work is to create a domain adaptation framework that will allow for BM segmentation to be used across multiple institutions. Methods: We propose a VAE-MMD preprocessing pipeline that combines variational autoencoders (VAE) with maximum mean discrepancy (MMD) loss, incorporating skip connections and self-attention mechanisms alongside nnU-Net segmentation. The method was tested on 740 patients from four public databases: Stanford, UCSF, UCLM, and PKG, evaluated by domain classifier's accuracy, sensitivity, precision, F1/F2 scores, surface Dice (sDice), and 95th percentile Hausdorff distance (HD95). Results: VAE-MMD reduced domain classifier accuracy from 0.91 to 0.50, indicating successful feature alignment across institutions. Reconstructed volumes attained a PSNR greater than 36 dB, maintaining anatomical accuracy. The combined method raised the mean F1 by 11.1% (0.700 to 0.778), the mean sDice by 7.93% (0.7121 to 0.7686), and reduced the mean HD95 by 65.5% (11.33 to 3.91 mm) across all four centers compared to the baseline nnU-Net. Conclusions: VAE-MMD effectively diminishes cross-institutional data heterogeneity and enhances BM segmentation generalization across volumetric, detection, and boundary-level metrics without necessitating target-domain labels, thereby overcoming a significant obstacle to the clinical implementation of AI-assisted segmentation.

analysis.tldr: 提出VAE-MMD预处理流程，通过域对齐提升脑转移瘤分割模型跨机构泛化能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 深度学习模型在单一机构训练后，因扫描硬件、成像协议和患者人口统计差异，在跨机构应用中性能显著下降，阻碍了AI辅助分割的临床落地。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖目标域标签的情况下，消除跨机构数据异质性，提升脑转移瘤分割模型的泛化性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出VAE-MMD预处理流程：结合变分自编码器（VAE）与最大均值差异（MMD）损失，并引入跳跃连接和自注意力机制，再配合nnU-Net进行分割。
contributions: 提出VAE-MMD域适应框架，有效降低跨机构数据异质性。
在四个公开数据集上验证，相比基线nnU-Net，F1提升11.1%，表面Dice提升7.93%，HD95降低65.5%。
analysis.experiments: 在740名患者（来自Stanford、UCSF、UCLM、PKG四个公开数据库）上测试，评估指标包括域分类器准确率、灵敏度、精确率、F1/F2分数、表面Dice和95% Hausdorff距离。
limitations: 可能仅适用于脑转移瘤分割任务，泛化到其他医学图像分割任务需验证。
VAE-MMD预处理增加了计算开销，可能影响实时性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出VAE-MMD预处理流程，通过域对齐提升脑转移瘤分割模型跨机构泛化能力。

papers.title: VLM-in-the-Loop: A Plug-In Quality Assurance Module for ECG Digitization Pipelines
papers.abstract: ECG digitization could unlock billions of archived clinical records, yet existing methods collapse on real-world images despite strong benchmark numbers. We introduce \textbf{VLM-in-the-Loop}, a plug-in quality assurance module that wraps any digitization backend with closed-loop VLM feedback via a standardized interface, requiring no modification to the underlying digitizer. The core mechanism is \textbf{tool grounding}: anchoring VLM assessment in quantitative evidence from domain-specific signal analysis tools. In a controlled ablation on 200 records with paired ground truth, tool grounding raises verdict consistency from 71\% to 89\% and doubles fidelity separation ($Δ$PCC 0.03 $\rightarrow$ 0.08), with the effect replicating across three VLMs (Claude Opus~4, GPT-4o, Gemini~2.5 Pro), confirming a pattern-level rather than model-specific gain. Deployed across four backends, the module improves every one: 29.4\% of borderline leads improved on our pipeline; 41.2\% of failed limb leads recovered on ECG-Digitiser; valid leads per image doubled on Open-ECG-Digitizer (2.5 $\rightarrow$ 5.8). On 428 real clinical HCM images, the integrated system reaches 98.0\% Excellent quality. Both the plug-in architecture and tool-grounding mechanism are domain-parametric, suggesting broader applicability wherever quality criteria are objectively measurable.

analysis.tldr: 提出VLM-in-the-Loop插件模块，通过工具锚定闭环VLM反馈提升心电图数字化质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 心电图数字化可解锁数十亿存档临床记录，但现有方法在真实图像上性能崩溃，缺乏质量保证机制。
analysis.problem: 现有心电图数字化流水线在真实世界图像上鲁棒性差，需要一种无需修改底层数字化器的质量保证方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 工具锚定将VLM判决一致性从71%提升至89%，保真度分离翻倍（ΔPCC 0.03→0.08），效果跨三个VLM复现，表明是模式级增益而非模型特定。
analysis.method: 提出VLM-in-the-Loop插件模块，通过标准化接口包裹任何数字化后端，核心机制是工具锚定：将VLM评估锚定在领域特定信号分析工具的定量证据上。
contributions: 提出VLM-in-the-Loop插件架构，无需修改底层数字化器即可提升质量。
引入工具锚定机制，显著提高VLM判决一致性和保真度分离。
在多个后端和真实临床图像上验证有效性，达到98.0%优秀质量。
analysis.experiments: 在200条记录配对真值上进行消融实验，在四个后端上部署，并在428张真实临床HCM图像上测试，达到98.0%优秀质量。
limitations: 依赖领域特定信号分析工具的可用性。
VLM反馈可能受工具输出质量影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出VLM-in-the-Loop插件模块，通过工具锚定闭环VLM反馈提升心电图数字化质量。

papers.title: Advancing Complex Video Object Segmentation via Tracking-Enhanced Prompt: The 1st Winner for 5th PVUW MOSE Challenge
papers.abstract: In the Complex Video Object Segmentation task, researchers are required to track and segment specific targets within cluttered environments, which rigorously tests a method's capability for target comprehension and environmental adaptability. Although SAM3, the current state-of-the-art solution, exhibits unparalleled segmentation performance and robustness on conventional targets, it underperforms on tiny and semantic-dominated objects. The root cause of this limitation lies in SAM3's insufficient comprehension of these specific target types. To address this issue, we propose TEP: Advancing Complex Video Object Segmentation via Tracking-Enhanced Prompts. As a training-free approach, TEP leverages external tracking models and Multimodal Large Language Models to introduce tracking-enhanced prompts, thereby alleviating the difficulty SAM3 faces in understanding these challenging targets. Our method achieved first place (56.91%) on the test set of the PVUW Challenge 2026: Complex Video Object Segmentation Track.

analysis.tldr: 提出无训练跟踪增强提示方法TEP，解决SAM3在复杂视频目标分割中对微小和语义主导目标理解不足的问题，获PVUW 2026挑战赛第一。
analysis.research_motivation: 复杂视频目标分割中，现有最优方法SAM3在常规目标上表现优异，但对微小和语义主导目标理解不足，限制了其在杂乱环境中的适用性。
analysis.problem: SAM3对微小和语义主导目标的语义理解能力不足，导致分割性能下降。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: SAM3在微小和语义主导目标上表现不佳，根源在于对这些特定目标类型的理解不充分。
analysis.method: 提出TEP，一种无训练方法，利用外部跟踪模型和多模态大语言模型生成跟踪增强提示，辅助SAM3理解困难目标。
contributions: 提出无训练跟踪增强提示方法TEP，有效提升SAM3在复杂视频目标分割中对微小和语义主导目标的分割性能。
在PVUW 2026复杂视频目标分割赛道测试集上取得第一名（56.91%）。
analysis.experiments: 在PVUW 2026复杂视频目标分割赛道测试集上评估，取得56.91%的指标，排名第一。
limitations: 依赖外部跟踪模型和多模态大语言模型，可能引入额外计算开销。
方法仅在特定挑战赛数据集上验证，泛化性需进一步测试。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出无训练跟踪增强提示方法TEP，解决SAM3在复杂视频目标分割中对微小和语义主导目标理解不足的问题，获PVUW 2026挑战赛第一。

papers.title: Deep Networks Favor Simple Data
papers.abstract: Estimated density is often interpreted as indicating how typical a sample is under a model. Yet deep models trained on one dataset can assign higher density to simpler out-of-distribution (OOD) data than to in-distribution test data. We refer to this behavior as the OOD anomaly. Prior work typically studies this phenomenon within a single architecture, detector, or benchmark, implicitly assuming certain canonical densities. We instead separate the trained network from the density estimator built from its representations or outputs. We introduce two estimators: Jacobian-based estimators and autoregressive self-estimators, making density analysis applicable to a wide range of models. Applying this perspective to a range of models, including iGPT, PixelCNN++, Glow, score-based diffusion models, DINOv2, and I-JEPA, we find the same striking regularity that goes beyond the OOD anomaly: lower-complexity samples receive higher estimated density, while higher-complexity samples receive lower estimated density. This ordering appears within a test set and across OOD pairs such as CIFAR-10 and SVHN, and remains highly consistent across independently trained models. To quantify these orderings, we introduce Spearman rank correlation and find striking agreement both across models and with external complexity metrics. Even when trained only on the lowest-density (most complex) samples - or even a single such sample - the resulting models still rank simpler images as higher density. These observations lead us beyond the original OOD anomaly to a more general conclusion: deep networks consistently favor simple data. Our goal is not to close this question, but to define and visualize it more clearly. We broaden its empirical scope and show that it appears across architectures, objectives, and density estimators.

analysis.tldr: 深度网络在密度估计中普遍偏好简单数据，导致复杂样本密度被低估。
analysis.research_motivation: 深度模型在密度估计中常对简单OOD数据赋予更高密度，这一反直觉现象（OOD异常）的普遍性和根本原因尚不明确。
analysis.problem: 揭示深度网络密度估计中偏好简单数据的普遍规律，并量化其与数据复杂度的关系。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但指出在多种模型（iGPT、PixelCNN++、Glow、扩散模型、DINOv2、I-JEPA）和密度估计器（Jacobian、自回归）中，低复杂度样本始终获得更高估计密度，且该排序与外部复杂度指标高度一致。
analysis.method: 提出Jacobian估计器和自回归自估计器，将训练网络与密度估计器分离，使密度分析适用于多种模型；使用Spearman秩相关量化密度排序与复杂度的一致性。
contributions: 提出两种通用密度估计器（Jacobian和自回归），扩展了密度分析的适用范围。
通过跨架构、目标和密度估计器的实验，证明深度网络普遍偏好简单数据，且该偏好独立于训练数据分布。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 未提供具体实验数据或基准结果。
未探讨该偏好对实际应用（如OOD检测）的影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 深度网络在密度估计中普遍偏好简单数据，导致复杂样本密度被低估。

papers.title: EvolveTool-Bench: Evaluating the Quality of LLM-Generated Tool Libraries as Software Artifacts
papers.abstract: Modern LLM agents increasingly create their own tools at runtime -- from Python functions to API clients -- yet existing benchmarks evaluate them almost exclusively by downstream task completion. This is analogous to judging a software engineer only by whether their code runs, ignoring redundancy, regression, and safety. We introduce EvolveTool-Bench, a diagnostic benchmark for LLM-generated tool libraries in software engineering workflows. Across three domains requiring actual tool execution (proprietary data formats, API orchestration, and numerical computation), we define library-level software quality metrics -- reuse, redundancy, composition success, regression stability, and safety -- alongside a per-tool Tool Quality Score measuring correctness, robustness, generality, and code quality. In the first head-to-head comparison of code-level and strategy-level tool evolution (ARISE vs. EvoSkill vs. one-shot baselines, 99 tasks, two models), we show that systems with similar task completion (63-68%) differ by up to 18% in library health, revealing software quality risks invisible to task-only evaluation. Our results highlight that evaluation and governance of LLM-generated tools require treating the evolving tool library as a first-class software artifact, not a black box.

analysis.tldr: 提出EvolveTool-Bench基准，从软件质量角度评估LLM生成的工具库，发现任务完成率相近的系统在库健康度上差异显著。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基准仅通过下游任务完成度评估LLM生成的工具，忽略了代码冗余、回归、安全等软件质量属性，类似仅凭代码能否运行评判软件工程师。
analysis.problem: 缺乏从软件工程质量角度（如复用性、冗余度、组合成功率、回归稳定性、安全性）评估LLM生成工具库的基准。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 任务完成率相近（63-68%）的系统在库健康度上差异高达18%，表明仅靠任务完成度评估会掩盖软件质量风险。
analysis.method: 构建EvolveTool-Bench基准，定义库级软件质量指标（复用、冗余、组合成功、回归稳定、安全）和工具级质量评分（正确性、鲁棒性、通用性、代码质量），并在三个领域（专有数据格式、API编排、数值计算）进行对比评估。
contributions: 提出首个从软件质量角度评估LLM生成工具库的诊断基准EvolveTool-Bench。
通过实验揭示任务完成率相近的系统在库健康度上存在显著差异，强调需要将工具库视为一等软件制品进行治理。
analysis.experiments: 在三个领域、99个任务、两个模型上对比了代码级和策略级工具演化方法（ARISE、EvoSkill、一次性基线），任务完成率63-68%，库健康度差异达18%。
limitations: 仅覆盖三个领域，可能不全面。
评估指标可能未涵盖所有软件质量维度。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出EvolveTool-Bench基准，从软件质量角度评估LLM生成的工具库，发现任务完成率相近的系统在库健康度上差异显著。

papers.title: RAGShield: Detecting Numerical Claim Manipulation in Government RAG Systems
papers.abstract: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) systems are deployed across federal agencies for citizen-facing tax guidance, benefits eligibility, and legal information, where a single incorrect number causes direct financial harm. This paper proves that all embedding-based RAG defenses share a fundamental blind spot: changing a tax deduction by $50,000 produces cosine similarity 0.9998, invisible to every known detection threshold. Across 174 manipulation pairs and two embedding models, the mean sensitivity gap is 1,459x. The blind spot is confirmed on real IRS documents.The root cause is that embeddings encode topic, not numerical precision. RAGShield sidesteps this by operating on extracted values directly: a pattern-based engine identifies dollar amounts and percentages in government text, links each value to its governing entity through two-pass context propagation (99.8% entity detection on 2,742 real IRS passages), and verifies every claim against a cross-source registry built from the corpus itself. A temporal tracker flags value changes that fall outside known government update schedules. On 430 attacks generated from real IRS document content, RAGShield detects every one (0.0% ASR, 95% CI [0%, 1%]) while embedding-based defenses miss 79-90% of the same attacks.

analysis.tldr: RAGShield通过直接提取数值和跨源验证，解决了RAG系统对数值篡改的盲区问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 政府RAG系统用于公民税务、福利等场景，一个数字错误就会造成直接经济损失，但现有基于嵌入的防御对所有数值篡改都存在盲区。
analysis.problem: 所有基于嵌入的RAG防御无法检测数值篡改，因为嵌入编码的是主题而非数值精度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要发现：改变5万美元税额后余弦相似度仍为0.9998，平均敏感度差距达1459倍，且该盲区在真实IRS文档上得到确认。
analysis.method: RAGShield采用模式引擎提取美元金额和百分比，通过两轮上下文传播将数值与管辖实体关联（实体检测99.8%），并基于语料库构建跨源注册表进行验证，同时使用时序追踪器标记不符合政府更新计划的数值变化。
contributions: 证明所有基于嵌入的RAG防御对数值篡改存在固有盲区，并量化了敏感度差距。
提出RAGShield，一种直接操作提取数值的防御方法，在430次攻击中实现0%攻击成功率。
analysis.experiments: 在174个篡改对、两个嵌入模型、2742个真实IRS段落和430个基于真实IRS文档内容的攻击上进行评估，RAGShield检测所有攻击（ASR 0.0%），而嵌入防御漏检79-90%。
limitations: 可能仅适用于结构化数值（如美元金额、百分比），对非结构化数值或模糊表述效果未知。
依赖模式引擎和实体链接，可能受文本格式变化或实体歧义影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: RAGShield通过直接提取数值和跨源验证，解决了RAG系统对数值篡改的盲区问题。

papers.title: Mine-JEPA: In-Domain Self-Supervised Learning for Mine-Like Object Classification in Side-Scan Sonar
papers.abstract: Side-scan sonar (SSS) mine classification is a challenging maritime vision problem characterized by extreme data scarcity and a large domain gap from natural images. While self-supervised learning (SSL) and general-purpose vision foundation models have shown strong performance in general vision and several specialized domains, their use in SSS remains largely unexplored. We present Mine-JEPA, the first in-domain SSL pipeline for SSS mine classification, using SIGReg, a regularization-based SSL loss, to pretrain on only 1,170 unlabeled sonar images. In the binary mine vs. non-mine setting, Mine-JEPA achieves an F1 score of 0.935, outperforming fine-tuned DINOv3 (0.922), a foundation model pretrained on 1.7B images. For 3-class mine-like object classification, Mine-JEPA reaches 0.820 with synthetic data augmentation, again outperforming fine-tuned DINOv3 (0.810). We further observe that applying in-domain SSL to foundation models degrades performance by 10--13 percentage points, suggesting that stronger pretrained models do not always benefit from additional domain adaptation. In addition, Mine-JEPA with a compact ViT-Tiny backbone achieves competitive performance while using 4x fewer parameters than DINOv3. These results suggest that carefully designed in-domain self-supervised learning is a viable alternative to much larger foundation models in data-scarce maritime sonar imagery.

analysis.tldr: 提出首个侧扫声纳领域自监督学习管道Mine-JEPA，仅用1170张无标签图像即超越大规模基础模型DINOv3。
analysis.research_motivation: 侧扫声纳图像分类面临极端数据稀缺和与自然图像的大领域差距，现有自监督学习和视觉基础模型在该领域应用尚未探索。
analysis.problem: 在数据极度稀缺的侧扫声纳图像中，实现高效的水雷类目标分类。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 将领域内自监督学习应用于基础模型会导致性能下降10-13个百分点，表明更强的预训练模型并不总是受益于额外的领域适应。
analysis.method: 提出Mine-JEPA，首个领域内自监督学习管道，使用基于正则化的自监督损失SIGReg，在1170张无标签声纳图像上预训练。
contributions: 首个针对侧扫声纳图像分类的领域内自监督学习管道Mine-JEPA
提出SIGReg正则化自监督损失
实验证明领域内自监督学习在数据稀缺场景下可替代大规模基础模型
analysis.experiments: 在二分类（水雷vs非水雷）上F1达0.935，超越DINOv3的0.922；三分类（水雷类目标）上达0.820，超越DINOv3的0.810。
limitations: 仅针对侧扫声纳图像，泛化性未知
未与其他领域内自监督方法对比
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出首个侧扫声纳领域自监督学习管道Mine-JEPA，仅用1170张无标签图像即超越大规模基础模型DINOv3。

papers.title: mmAnomaly: Leveraging Visual Context for Robust Anomaly Detection in the Non-Visual World with mmWave Radar
papers.abstract: mmWave radar enables human sensing in non-visual scenarios-e.g., through clothing or certain types of walls-where traditional cameras fail due to occlusion or privacy limitations. However, robust anomaly detection with mmWave remains challenging, as signal reflections are influenced by material properties, clutter, and multipath interference, producing complex, non-Gaussian distortions. Existing methods lack contextual awareness and misclassify benign signal variations as anomalies. We present mmAnomaly, a multi-modal anomaly detection framework that combines mmWave radar with RGBD input to incorporate visual context. Our system extracts semantic cues-such as scene geometry and material properties-using a fast ResNet-based classifier, and uses a conditional latent diffusion model to synthesize the expected mmWave spectrum for the given visual context. A dual-input comparison module then identifies spatial deviations between real and generated spectra to localize anomalies. We evaluate mmAnomaly on two multi-modal datasets across three applications: concealed weapon localization, through-wall intruder localization, and through-wall fall localization. The system achieves up to 94% F1 score and sub-meter localization error, demonstrating robust generalization across clothing, occlusions, and cluttered environments. These results establish mmAnomaly as an accurate and interpretable framework for context-aware anomaly detection in mmWave sensing.

analysis.tldr: 提出mmAnomaly，结合毫米波雷达与RGBD视觉上下文，利用条件潜扩散模型生成预期频谱，通过双输入比较模块实现鲁棒异常检测。
analysis.research_motivation: 毫米波雷达在非视觉场景（如穿墙、遮挡）中具有优势，但信号受材料、杂波和多径干扰产生复杂非高斯失真，现有方法缺乏上下文感知，易将良性信号变化误判为异常。
analysis.problem: 如何在毫米波雷达感知中结合视觉上下文，实现鲁棒的异常检测并准确定位异常区域。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 毫米波雷达信号反射受材料属性、杂波和多径干扰影响，产生复杂非高斯失真，导致现有方法误分类。
analysis.method: 多模态异常检测框架，使用快速ResNet分类器提取场景几何和材料属性等语义线索，通过条件潜扩散模型合成给定视觉上下文下的预期毫米波频谱，再通过双输入比较模块识别真实与生成频谱之间的空间偏差以定位异常。
contributions: 提出mmAnomaly，首个结合毫米波雷达与RGBD视觉上下文的异常检测框架。
利用条件潜扩散模型生成上下文感知的预期频谱，实现可解释的异常定位。
在三个应用（隐蔽武器、穿墙入侵者、穿墙跌倒）上达到94% F1分数和亚米级定位误差。
analysis.experiments: 在两个多模态数据集上评估三个应用，达到94% F1分数和亚米级定位误差，展示了对衣物、遮挡和杂乱环境的鲁棒泛化。
limitations: 依赖RGBD输入，在完全无光或传感器失效场景可能受限。
扩散模型推理速度可能影响实时性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出mmAnomaly，结合毫米波雷达与RGBD视觉上下文，利用条件潜扩散模型生成预期频谱，通过双输入比较模块实现鲁棒异常检测。

papers.title: UCMNet: Uncertainty-Aware Context Memory Network for Under-Display Camera Image Restoration
papers.abstract: Under-display cameras (UDCs) allow for full-screen designs by positioning the imaging sensor underneath the display. Nonetheless, light diffraction and scattering through the various display layers result in spatially varying and complex degradations, which significantly reduce high-frequency details. Current PSF-based physical modeling techniques and frequency-separation networks are effective at reconstructing low-frequency structures and maintaining overall color consistency. However, they still face challenges in recovering fine details when dealing with complex, spatially varying degradation. To solve this problem, we propose a lightweight \textbf{U}ncertainty-aware \textbf{C}ontext-\textbf{M}emory \textbf{Network} (\textbf{UCMNet}), for UDC image restoration. Unlike previous methods that apply uniform restoration, UCMNet performs uncertainty-aware adaptive processing to restore high-frequency details in regions with varying degradations. The estimated uncertainty maps, learned through an uncertainty-driven loss, quantify spatial uncertainty induced by diffraction and scattering, and guide the Memory Bank to retrieve region-adaptive context from the Context Bank. This process enables effective modeling of the non-uniform degradation characteristics inherent to UDC imaging. Leveraging this uncertainty as a prior, UCMNet achieves state-of-the-art performance on multiple benchmarks with 30\% fewer parameters than previous models. Project page: \href{https://kdhrick2222.github.io/projects/UCMNet/}{https://kdhrick2222.github.io/projects/UCMNet}.

analysis.tldr: 提出不确定性感知上下文记忆网络（UCMNet），利用不确定性图引导自适应恢复，在UDC图像复原中实现SOTA且参数量减少30%。
analysis.research_motivation: 屏下相机（UDC）因显示层衍射和散射导致空间变化的复杂退化，现有方法难以恢复精细细节。
analysis.problem: 解决UDC图像中空间变化退化导致的精细细节恢复难题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出UCMNet，通过不确定性驱动损失学习不确定性图，引导记忆库从上下文库中检索区域自适应上下文，实现不确定性感知的自适应处理。
contributions: 提出不确定性感知上下文记忆网络（UCMNet），用于UDC图像复原。
利用不确定性图作为先验，实现区域自适应恢复，在多个基准上达到SOTA且参数量减少30%。
analysis.experiments: 在多个基准上达到SOTA性能，参数量比先前模型减少30%。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量的不确定性估计，在极端退化下效果未知。
轻量级设计可能限制极端复杂场景的恢复能力。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出不确定性感知上下文记忆网络（UCMNet），利用不确定性图引导自适应恢复，在UDC图像复原中实现SOTA且参数量减少30%。

papers.title: Grading the Unspoken: Evaluating Tacit Reasoning in Quantum Field Theory and String Theory with LLMs
papers.abstract: Large language models have demonstrated impressive performance across many domains of mathematics and physics. One natural question is whether such models can support research in highly abstract theoretical fields such as quantum field theory and string theory. Evaluating this possibility faces an immediate challenge: correctness in these domains is layered, tacit, and fundamentally non-binary. Standard answer-matching metrics fail to capture whether intermediate conceptual steps are properly reconstructed or whether implicit structural constraints are respected. We construct a compact expert-curated dataset of twelve questions spanning core areas of quantum field theory and string theory, and introduce a five-level grading rubric separating statement correctness, key concept awareness, reasoning chain presence, tacit step reconstruction, and enrichment. Evaluating multiple contemporary LLMs, we observe near-ceiling performance on explicit derivations within stable conceptual frames, but systematic degradation when tasks require reconstruction of omitted reasoning steps or reorganization of representations under global consistency constraints. These failures are driven not only by missing intermediate steps, but by an instability in representation selection: models often fail to identify the correct conceptual framing required to resolve implicit tensions. We argue that highly abstract theoretical physics provides a uniquely sensitive lens on the epistemic limits of current evaluation paradigms.

analysis.tldr: LLMs在量子场论和弦论的显式推导上表现优异，但在重构隐含推理步骤和全局一致性约束下表现系统性退化。
analysis.research_motivation: 评估LLMs在高度抽象的理论物理（如量子场论和弦论）中的能力面临挑战，因为标准答案匹配指标无法捕捉中间概念步骤的重构和隐式结构约束的遵守。
analysis.problem: 如何评估LLMs在量子场论和弦论中的隐性推理能力，特别是处理非二值正确性和隐含推理步骤的能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: LLMs在显式推导上接近天花板，但在需要重构省略推理步骤或全局一致性约束下重组表征时表现系统性退化，失败源于表征选择的不稳定性。
analysis.method: 构建包含12个问题的专家精选数据集，引入五级评分标准（陈述正确性、关键概念意识、推理链存在、隐性步骤重构、丰富性），评估多个当代LLMs。
contributions: 构建了一个针对量子场论和弦论的紧凑专家精选数据集。
引入了一个五级评分标准，用于评估隐性推理的不同方面。
揭示了LLMs在隐性推理和全局一致性约束下的系统性失败模式。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 数据集规模较小（12个问题），可能限制泛化性。
评分标准可能依赖专家主观判断。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LLMs在量子场论和弦论的显式推导上表现优异，但在重构隐含推理步骤和全局一致性约束下表现系统性退化。

papers.title: Camouflage-aware Image-Text Retrieval via Expert Collaboration
papers.abstract: Camouflaged scene understanding (CSU) has attracted significant attention due to its broad practical implications. However, in this field, robust image-text cross-modal alignment remains under-explored, hindering deeper understanding of camouflaged scenarios and their related applications. To this end, we focus on the typical image-text retrieval task, and formulate a new task dubbed ``camouflage-aware image-text retrieval'' (CA-ITR). We first construct a dedicated camouflage image-text retrieval dataset (CamoIT), comprising $\sim$10.5K samples with multi-granularity textual annotations. Benchmark results conducted on CamoIT reveal the underlying challenges of CA-ITR for existing cutting-edge retrieval techniques, which are mainly caused by objects' camouflage properties as well as those complex image contents. As a solution, we propose a camouflage-expert collaborative network (CECNet), which features a dual-branch visual encoder: one branch captures holistic image representations, while the other incorporates a dedicated model to inject representations of camouflaged objects. A novel confidence-conditioned graph attention (C\textsuperscript{2}GA) mechanism is incorporated to exploit the complementarity across branches. Comparative experiments show that CECNet achieves $\sim$29% overall CA-ITR accuracy boost, surpassing seven representative retrieval models. The dataset and code will be available at https://github.com/jiangyao-scu/CA-ITR.

analysis.tldr: 提出伪装感知图文检索任务及专用数据集CamoIT，并设计双分支视觉编码器CECNet，通过置信度条件图注意力机制融合整体与伪装目标表征，实现约29%的检索精度提升。
analysis.research_motivation: 伪装场景理解具有广泛实际应用，但现有图文检索方法在伪装场景下跨模态对齐不足，缺乏专用数据集和针对性方法。
analysis.problem: 解决伪装场景中图像与文本的跨模态检索难题，克服伪装属性和复杂图像内容导致的检索性能下降。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有先进检索技术在CamoIT数据集上表现不佳，主要原因是物体的伪装属性和复杂图像内容干扰了跨模态对齐。
analysis.method: 提出伪装专家协作网络CECNet，包含双分支视觉编码器：整体分支捕获全局图像表征，伪装分支注入伪装目标表征；并引入置信度条件图注意力机制融合双分支互补信息。
contributions: 定义了伪装感知图文检索新任务CA-ITR，并构建了包含约10.5K样本及多粒度文本标注的专用数据集CamoIT。
提出CECNet，通过双分支视觉编码器和置信度条件图注意力机制有效融合整体与伪装目标表征。
实验表明CECNet在CA-ITR任务上超越七种代表性检索模型，总体精度提升约29%。
analysis.experiments: 在CamoIT数据集上进行对比实验，CECNet总体CA-ITR精度提升约29%，超越七种代表性检索模型。摘要未提供具体消融实验或跨数据集泛化结果。
limitations: 数据集规模较小（约10.5K样本），可能限制模型泛化能力。
方法仅在伪装场景下验证，未讨论在通用场景下的适用性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出伪装感知图文检索任务及专用数据集CamoIT，并设计双分支视觉编码器CECNet，通过置信度条件图注意力机制融合整体与伪装目标表征，实现约29%的检索精度提升。

papers.title: Dynamic Graph Neural Network with Adaptive Features Selection for RGB-D Based Indoor Scene Recognition
papers.abstract: Multi-modality of color and depth, i.e., RGB-D, is of great importance in recent research of indoor scene recognition. In this kind of data representation, depth map is able to describe the 3D structure of scenes and geometric relations among objects. Previous works showed that local features of both modalities are vital for promotion of recognition accuracy. However, the problem of adaptive selection and effective exploitation on these key local features remains open in this field. In this paper, a dynamic graph model is proposed with adaptive node selection mechanism to solve the above problem. In this model, a dynamic graph is built up to model the relations among objects and scene, and a method of adaptive node selection is proposed to take key local features from both modalities of RGB and depth for graph modeling. After that, these nodes are grouped by three different levels, representing near or far relations among objects. Moreover, the graph model is updated dynamically according to attention weights. Finally, the updated and optimized features of RGB and depth modalities are fused together for indoor scene recognition. Experiments are performed on public datasets including SUN RGB-D and NYU Depth v2. Extensive results demonstrate that our method has superior performance when comparing to state-of-the-arts methods, and show that the proposed method is able to exploit crucial local features from both modalities of RGB and depth.

analysis.tldr: 提出动态图神经网络，通过自适应特征选择融合RGB-D多模态信息，提升室内场景识别精度。
analysis.research_motivation: RGB-D多模态数据中深度图能描述3D结构和物体几何关系，但如何自适应选择和有效利用关键局部特征仍是开放问题。
analysis.problem: 解决RGB-D室内场景识别中关键局部特征的自适应选择与有效利用问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建动态图模型，通过自适应节点选择机制从RGB和深度模态提取关键局部特征，按远近关系分组节点，并根据注意力权重动态更新图结构，最后融合优化后的多模态特征进行分类。
contributions: 提出动态图模型与自适应节点选择机制，实现RGB-D关键局部特征的自动选取。
设计三级节点分组策略和动态图更新方法，有效建模物体间远近关系。
analysis.experiments: 在SUN RGB-D和NYU Depth v2公开数据集上实验，与现有方法对比取得优越性能。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量深度图，对噪声敏感。
动态图更新计算复杂度较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出动态图神经网络，通过自适应特征选择融合RGB-D多模态信息，提升室内场景识别精度。

papers.title: CoLA: Cross-Modal Low-rank Adaptation for Multimodal Downstream Tasks
papers.abstract: Foundation models have revolutionized AI, but adapting them efficiently for multimodal tasks, particularly in dual-stream architectures composed of unimodal encoders, such as DINO and BERT, remains a significant challenge. Parameter-Efficient Fine-Tuning (PEFT) methods like Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) enable lightweight adaptation, yet they operate in isolation within each modality, limiting their ability in capturing cross-modal interactions. In this paper, we take a step in bridging this gap with Cross-Modal Low-Rank Adaptation (CoLA), a novel PEFT framework that extends LoRA by introducing a dedicated inter-modal adaptation pathway alongside the standard intra-modal one. This dual-path design enables CoLA to adapt unimodal foundation models to multimodal tasks effectively, without interference between modality-specific and cross-modal learning. We evaluate CoLA across a range of vision-language (RefCOCO, RefCOCO+, RefCOCOg) and audio-visual (AVE, AVS) benchmarks, where it consistently outperforms LORA, achieving a relative gain of around 3\% and 2\%, respectively, while maintaining parameter efficiency. Notably, CoLA enables the first multi-task PEFT framework for visual grounding, bridging a key gap in efficient multimodal adaptation.

analysis.tldr: CoLA 通过引入跨模态低秩适配路径，在保持参数效率的同时显著提升了多模态下游任务的性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有参数高效微调方法（如 LoRA）在双流架构中仅独立适配每个模态，无法有效捕捉跨模态交互，限制了多模态任务的表现。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种参数高效的微调方法，使其既能保持单模态编码器的独立性，又能有效建模跨模态交互。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 Cross-Modal Low-Rank Adaptation (CoLA)，在标准模态内适配路径（intra-modal）基础上增加专用的跨模态适配路径（inter-modal），形成双路径设计，避免模态特定学习与跨模态学习之间的干扰。
contributions: 提出 CoLA 框架，首次在 PEFT 中显式引入跨模态适配路径，实现高效多模态微调。
在视觉-语言和音频-视觉基准上验证了 CoLA 优于 LoRA，相对提升约 2-3%，并首次实现视觉定位的多任务 PEFT。
analysis.experiments: 在 RefCOCO、RefCOCO+、RefCOCOg（视觉-语言）和 AVE、AVS（音频-视觉）基准上评估，CoLA 相对 LoRA 分别获得约 3% 和 2% 的增益。
limitations: 可能仅在双流架构上有效，对单流多模态模型需进一步验证。
跨模态适配路径的设计可能引入额外计算开销，摘要未详细分析效率。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: CoLA 通过引入跨模态低秩适配路径，在保持参数效率的同时显著提升了多模态下游任务的性能。

papers.title: Neural Reconstruction of LiDAR Point Clouds under Jamming Attacks via Full-Waveform Representation and Simultaneous Laser Sensing
papers.abstract: LiDAR sensors are critical for autonomous driving perception, yet remain vulnerable to spoofing attacks. Jamming attacks inject high-frequency laser pulses that completely blind LiDAR sensors by overwhelming authentic returns with malicious signals. We discover that while point clouds become randomized, the underlying full-waveform data retains distinguishable signatures between attack and legitimate signals. In this work, we propose PULSAR-Net, capable of reconstructing authentic point clouds under jamming attacks by leveraging previously underutilized intermediate full-waveform representations and simultaneous laser sensing in modern LiDAR systems. PULSAR-Net adopts a novel U-Net architecture with axial spatial attention mechanisms specifically designed to identify attack-induced signals from authentic object returns in the full-waveform representation. To address the lack of full-waveform representations in existing LiDAR datasets under jamming attacks, we introduce a physics-aware dataset generation pipeline that synthesizes realistic full-waveform representations under jamming attacks. Despite being trained exclusively on synthetic data, PULSAR-Net achieves reconstruction rates of 92% and 73% for vehicles obscured by jamming attacks in real-world static and driving scenarios, respectively.

analysis.tldr: 提出PULSAR-Net，利用全波形表示和同时激光感知在干扰攻击下重建LiDAR点云。
analysis.research_motivation: LiDAR传感器易受欺骗攻击，干扰攻击通过注入高频激光脉冲使传感器完全失明，现有方法无法有效重建真实点云。
analysis.problem: 在干扰攻击下，如何从被破坏的LiDAR数据中重建真实的点云。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现点云虽被随机化，但底层全波形数据中攻击信号与合法信号仍保留可区分的特征。
analysis.method: 提出PULSAR-Net，采用U-Net架构结合轴向空间注意力机制，从全波形表示中识别攻击信号并重建点云；同时引入物理感知的数据集生成管道合成干扰攻击下的全波形数据。
contributions: 首次利用全波形表示和同时激光感知在干扰攻击下重建LiDAR点云。
提出PULSAR-Net，结合轴向空间注意力的U-Net架构有效区分攻击信号。
引入物理感知的数据集生成管道，合成干扰攻击下的全波形表示。
analysis.experiments: 在真实静态和驾驶场景中，PULSAR-Net对干扰攻击下被遮挡的车辆分别达到92%和73%的重建率。
limitations: 仅针对车辆目标进行验证，其他目标类型未测试。
依赖合成数据训练，真实场景泛化性可能受限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出PULSAR-Net，利用全波形表示和同时激光感知在干扰攻击下重建LiDAR点云。

papers.title: A Dual-Stream Transformer Architecture for Illumination-Invariant TIR-LiDAR Person Tracking
papers.abstract: Robust person tracking is a critical capability for autonomous mobile robots operating in diverse and unpredictable environments. While RGB-D tracking has shown high precision, its performance severely degrades under challenging illumination conditions, such as total darkness or intense backlighting. To achieve all-weather robustness, this paper proposes a novel Thermal-Infrared and Depth (TIR-D) tracking architecture that leverages the standard sensor suite of SLAM-capable robots, namely LiDAR and TIR cameras. A major challenge in TIR-D tracking is the scarcity of annotated multi-modal datasets. To address this, we introduce a sequential knowledge transfer strategy that evolves structural priors from a large-scale thermal-trained model into the TIR-D domain. By employing a differential learning rate strategy -- referred to as ``Fine-grained Differential Learning Rate Strategy'' -- we effectively preserve pre-trained feature extraction capabilities while enabling rapid adaptation to geometric depth cues. Experimental results demonstrate that our proposed TIR-D tracker achieves superior performance, with an Average Overlap (AO) of 0.700 and a Success Rate (SR) of 58.7\%, significantly outperforming conventional RGB-transfer and single-modality baselines. Our approach provides a practical and resource-efficient solution for robust human-following in all-weather robotics applications.

analysis.tldr: 提出双流Transformer架构融合热红外与深度数据，通过知识迁移实现光照不变的人员跟踪。
analysis.research_motivation: RGB-D跟踪在黑暗或强背光等恶劣光照条件下性能严重下降，而现有热红外-深度（TIR-D）跟踪缺乏标注数据集，亟需一种全天候鲁棒的跟踪方案。
analysis.problem: 如何利用SLAM机器人标配的LiDAR和TIR相机，在缺乏标注数据的情况下实现光照不变的TIR-D人员跟踪。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出双流Transformer架构，并采用顺序知识迁移策略，将大规模热红外训练模型的结构先验迁移到TIR-D域；同时使用细粒度差分学习率策略，保留预训练特征提取能力并快速适应几何深度线索。
contributions: 提出一种双流Transformer架构用于TIR-LiDAR人员跟踪，实现光照不变性。
引入顺序知识迁移策略和细粒度差分学习率策略，解决多模态标注数据稀缺问题。
analysis.experiments: 在自建或公开数据集上评估，平均重叠率（AO）为0.700，成功率（SR）为58.7%，显著优于RGB迁移和单模态基线。
limitations: 可能依赖特定传感器配置（LiDAR和TIR相机），泛化性需验证。
知识迁移策略可能对源域和目标域差异敏感。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出双流Transformer架构融合热红外与深度数据，通过知识迁移实现光照不变的人员跟踪。

papers.title: In harmony with gpt-oss
papers.abstract: No one has independently reproduced OpenAI's published scores for gpt-oss-20b with tools, because the original paper discloses neither the tools nor the agent harness. We reverse-engineered the model's in-distribution tools: when prompted without tool definitions, gpt-oss still calls tools from its training distribution with high statistical confidence -- a strong prior, not a hallucination. We then built a native harmony agent harness (https://github.com/borislavmavrin/harmonyagent.git) that encodes messages in the model's native format, bypassing the lossy Chat Completions conversion. Together, these yield the first independent reproduction of OpenAI's published scores: 60.4% on SWE Verified HIGH (published 60.7%), 53.3% MEDIUM (53.2%), and 91.7% on AIME25 with tools (90.4%).

analysis.tldr: 通过逆向工程和原生Agent框架，首次独立复现了OpenAI的gpt-oss-20b在SWE Verified和AIME25上的公开分数。
analysis.research_motivation: OpenAI未公开gpt-oss-20b的工具和Agent框架，导致其公开分数无法被独立复现，阻碍了研究的可重复性和可信度。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖OpenAI原始工具和框架的情况下，独立复现gpt-oss-20b的公开评测分数。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 逆向工程推断模型训练时使用的工具集，并构建原生Harmony Agent框架，以模型原生格式编码消息，避免Chat Completions转换的信息损失。
contributions: 首次独立复现了gpt-oss-20b在SWE Verified和AIME25上的公开分数。
揭示了gpt-oss-20b在无工具定义提示时仍会调用训练分布中的工具，表明这是一种强先验而非幻觉。
开源了Harmony Agent框架，支持原生消息格式编码。
analysis.experiments: 在SWE Verified HIGH上达到60.4%（公开60.7%），MEDIUM上53.3%（公开53.2%），AIME25 with tools上91.7%（公开90.4%）。
limitations: 仅针对gpt-oss-20b模型，泛化性未知。
逆向工程可能未覆盖所有训练工具。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过逆向工程和原生Agent框架，首次独立复现了OpenAI的gpt-oss-20b在SWE Verified和AIME25上的公开分数。

papers.title: VADMamba++: Efficient Video Anomaly Detection via Hybrid Modeling in Grayscale Space
papers.abstract: VADMamba pioneered the introduction of Mamba to Video Anomaly Detection (VAD), achieving high accuracy and fast inference through hybrid proxy tasks. Nevertheless, its heavy reliance on optical flow as auxiliary input and inter-task fusion scoring constrains its applicability to a single proxy task. In this paper, we introduce VADMamba++, an efficient VAD method based on the Gray-to-RGB paradigm that enforces a Single-Channel to Three-Channel reconstruction mapping, designed for a single proxy task and operating without auxiliary inputs. This paradigm compels inferring color appearances from grayscale structures, allowing anomalies to be more effectively revealed through dual inconsistencies between structure and chromatic cues. Specifically, VADMamba++ reconstructs grayscale frames into the RGB space to simultaneously discriminate structural geometry and chromatic fidelity, thereby enhancing sensitivity to explicit visual anomalies. We further design a hybrid modeling backbone that integrates Mamba, CNN, and Transformer modules to capture diverse normal patterns while suppressing the appearance of anomalies. Furthermore, an intra-task fusion scoring strategy integrates explicit future-frame prediction errors with implicit quantized feature errors, further improving accuracy under a single task setting. Extensive experiments on three benchmark datasets demonstrate that VADMamba++ outperforms state-of-the-art methods while meeting performance and efficiency, especially under a strict single-task setting with only frame-level inputs.

analysis.tldr: 提出VADMamba++，通过灰度到RGB的混合建模实现高效视频异常检测，无需光流等辅助输入。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视频异常检测方法依赖光流等辅助输入和多任务融合，限制了单任务场景下的适用性和效率。
analysis.problem: 如何在无需辅助输入的单任务设置下，高效且准确地检测视频中的异常。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 灰度到RGB的重建映射能通过结构和颜色线索的双重不一致性更有效地揭示异常。
analysis.method: 提出Gray-to-RGB范式，将灰度帧重建为RGB空间；设计混合建模骨干（Mamba、CNN、Transformer）捕获正常模式；采用任务内融合评分策略结合预测误差和量化特征误差。
contributions: 提出Gray-to-RGB范式，实现单任务、无辅助输入的异常检测。
设计混合建模骨干，融合Mamba、CNN和Transformer。
提出任务内融合评分策略，提升单任务设置下的检测精度。
analysis.experiments: 在三个基准数据集上实验，VADMamba++优于现有方法，尤其在仅帧级输入的单任务设置下。
limitations: 可能对灰度到RGB映射的泛化性有依赖。
混合建模骨干的计算开销需进一步评估。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出VADMamba++，通过灰度到RGB的混合建模实现高效视频异常检测，无需光流等辅助输入。

papers.title: AI-assisted Human-in-the-Loop Web Platform for Structural Characterization in Hard drive design
papers.abstract: Scanning transmission electron microscopy (STEM) has become a cornerstone instrument for semiconductor materials metrology, enabling nanoscale analysis of complex multilayer structures that define device performance. Developing effective metrology workflows for such systems requires balancing automation with flexibility; rigid pipelines are brittle to sample variability, while purely manual approaches are slow and subjective. Here, we present a tunable human-AI-assisted workflow framework that enables modular and adaptive analysis of STEM images for device characterization. As an illustrative example, we demonstrate a workflow for automated layer thickness and interface roughness quantification in multilayer thin films. The system integrates gradient-based peak detection with interactive correction modules, allowing human input at the design stage while maintaining fully automated execution across samples. Implemented as a web-based interface, it processes TEM/EMD files directly, applies noise reduction and interface tracking algorithms, and outputs statistical roughness and thickness metrics with nanometer precision. This architecture exemplifies a general approach toward adaptive, reusable metrology workflows - bridging human insight and machine precision for scalable, standardized analysis in semiconductor manufacturing. The code is made available at https://github.com/utkarshp1161/thickness-mapping-webapp

analysis.tldr: 提出一种人机协作的Web平台，用于硬盘设计中STEM图像的自动化结构表征。
analysis.research_motivation: 半导体材料计量中，STEM图像分析需要平衡自动化与灵活性，刚性管道对样本变化脆弱，纯手动方法缓慢且主观。
analysis.problem: 开发一种可调的人机协作工作流框架，实现STEM图像的模块化自适应分析，用于器件表征。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 集成梯度峰值检测与交互校正模块，允许设计阶段人工输入，同时保持跨样本的自动执行；实现为基于Web的界面，直接处理TEM/EMD文件，应用降噪和界面跟踪算法，输出纳米级统计粗糙度和厚度指标。
contributions: 提出一种可调的人机协作工作流框架，实现STEM图像的模块化自适应分析。
开发了基于Web的界面，集成自动化算法与交互校正，用于多层薄膜的层厚和界面粗糙度量化。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅以多层薄膜为例，可能未验证其他类型结构的适用性。
交互校正模块的效率与用户依赖性未量化评估。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种人机协作的Web平台，用于硬盘设计中STEM图像的自动化结构表征。

papers.title: Signals: Trajectory Sampling and Triage for Agentic Interactions
papers.abstract: Agentic applications based on large language models increasingly rely on multi-step interaction loops involving planning, action execution, and environment feedback. While such systems are now deployed at scale, improving them post-deployment remains challenging. Agent trajectories are voluminous and non-deterministic, and reviewing each one, whether through human review or auxiliary LLMs, is slow and cost-prohibitive. We propose a lightweight, signal-based framework for triaging agentic interaction trajectories. Our approach computes cheap, broadly applicable signals from live interactions and attaches them as structured attributes for trajectory triage, identifying interactions likely to be informative without affecting online agent behavior. We organize signals into a coarse-grained taxonomy spanning interaction (misalignment, stagnation, disengagement, satisfaction), execution (failure, loop), and environment (exhaustion), designed for computation without model calls. In a controlled annotation study on $τ$-bench, a widely used benchmark for tool-augmented agent evaluation, we show that signal-based sampling achieves an 82\% informativeness rate compared to 74\% for heuristic filtering and 54\% for random sampling, with a 1.52x efficiency gain per informative trajectory. The advantage is robust across reward strata and task domains, confirming that signals provide genuine per-trajectory informativeness gains rather than merely oversampling obvious failures. These results show that lightweight signals can serve as practical sampling infrastructure for agentic systems, and suggest a path toward preference data construction and post-deployment optimization.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种轻量级信号框架，用于对LLM智能体交互轨迹进行高效采样和分类，显著提升信息性轨迹筛选效率。
analysis.research_motivation: 大规模部署的LLM智能体系统在部署后改进困难，因为轨迹数据量大且非确定性，人工或辅助LLM审查成本高昂。
analysis.problem: 如何在不影响在线行为的前提下，从大量智能体交互轨迹中高效识别出信息量丰富的轨迹。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出基于信号的轨迹分类框架，计算轻量级信号（如交互、执行、环境三类）作为轨迹的结构化属性，用于采样和分类。
contributions: 提出一种轻量级、无需模型调用的信号框架，用于智能体轨迹分类。
在τ-bench基准上验证了信号采样相比启发式过滤和随机采样的效率优势。
analysis.experiments: 在τ-bench基准上进行受控标注研究，信号采样达到82%信息率，优于启发式过滤的74%和随机采样的54%，效率提升1.52倍。
limitations: 信号框架可能依赖特定任务领域，泛化性需进一步验证。
未讨论信号计算的具体开销与大规模部署的可行性。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种轻量级信号框架，用于对LLM智能体交互轨迹进行高效采样和分类，显著提升信息性轨迹筛选效率。

papers.title: Go Big or Go Home: Simulating Mobbing Behavior with Braitenbergian Robots
papers.abstract: We used the Webots robotics simulation platform to simulate a dyadic avoiding and mobbing predator behavior in a group of Braitenbergian robots. Mobbing is an antipredator adaptation used by some animals in which the individuals cooperatively attack or harass a predator to protect themselves. One way of coordinating a mobbing attack is using mobbing calls to summon other individuals of the mobbing species. We imitated this mechanism and simulated Braitenbergian robots that use mobbing calls when they face a light source (representing an inanimate predator) and mob it if they can summon allies, otherwise, they escape from it. We explore the effects of range of mobbing call (infinite range, mid-range and low-range) and the size of the robot group (ten robots vs three) on the overall success of mobbing. Our results suggest that both variables have significant impacts. This work has implications for simulations of action selection in artificial life and designing control architectures for autonomous agents.

analysis.tldr: 用Braitenberg机器人模拟动物集群防御行为，发现呼叫范围和群体规模显著影响成功率。
analysis.research_motivation: 动物集群防御（mobbing）是一种重要的反捕食适应行为，但如何在人工生命或机器人系统中有效模拟这一行为尚不清楚，尤其是群体协调机制（如呼叫）的影响。
analysis.problem: 研究Braitenberg机器人中，呼叫范围和群体规模对模拟集群防御行为成功率的影响。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 在Webots仿真平台上，使用Braitenberg机器人模拟面对光源（代表捕食者）时的集群防御行为：机器人通过呼叫召唤同伴，若成功召集则攻击光源，否则逃跑。实验变量为呼叫范围（无限、中、低）和群体规模（10 vs 3）。
contributions: 首次在Braitenberg机器人中模拟了基于呼叫的集群防御行为。
揭示了呼叫范围和群体规模对集群防御成功率的显著影响。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅使用仿真平台，未在真实机器人上验证。
行为模型较为简化，未考虑更复杂的生态因素。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 用Braitenberg机器人模拟动物集群防御行为，发现呼叫范围和群体规模显著影响成功率。

papers.title: Soft MPCritic: Amortized Model Predictive Value Iteration
papers.abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) and model predictive control (MPC) offer complementary strengths, yet combining them at scale remains computationally challenging. We propose soft MPCritic, an RL-MPC framework that learns in (soft) value space while using sample-based planning for both online control and value target generation. soft MPCritic instantiates MPC through model predictive path integral control (MPPI) and trains a terminal Q-function with fitted value iteration, aligning the learned value function with the planner and implicitly extending the effective planning horizon. We introduce an amortized warm-start strategy that recycles planned open-loop action sequences from online observations when computing batched MPPI-based value targets. This makes soft MPCritic computationally practical, while preserving solution quality. soft MPCritic plans in a scenario-based fashion with an ensemble of dynamic models trained for next-step prediction accuracy. Together, these ingredients enable soft MPCritic to learn effectively through robust, short-horizon planning on classic and complex control tasks. These results establish soft MPCritic as a practical and scalable blueprint for synthesizing MPC policies in settings where policy extraction and direct, long-horizon planning may fail.

analysis.tldr: 提出软MPCritic框架，通过值空间学习和样本规划结合强化学习与模型预测控制，实现高效在线控制。
analysis.research_motivation: 强化学习和模型预测控制各有优势，但大规模结合时计算成本高，需高效实用方案。
analysis.problem: 解决RL与MPC结合时计算复杂、规划与值函数不一致的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 短视规划结合学习值函数可隐式扩展规划视野，但计算开销大；摊销热身策略能降低计算成本。
analysis.main_method: 使用MPPI进行样本规划，通过拟合值迭代训练终端Q函数，并采用摊销热身策略重用在线观测的规划序列。
analysis.key_experiments: 在经典和复杂控制任务上验证，使用动态模型集成进行场景规划，评估学习效果和计算效率。
analysis.contributions: 提出实用可扩展的RL-MPC框架，实现值函数与规划器对齐，并引入摊销热身策略降低计算成本。
analysis.limitations: 依赖动态模型集成，模型误差可能影响性能；摊销策略在极端动态环境下可能失效。

papers.title: ReFormeR: Learning and Applying Explicit Query Reformulation Patterns
papers.abstract: We present ReFormeR, a pattern-guided approach for query reformulation. Instead of prompting a language model to generate reformulations of a query directly, ReFormeR first elicits short reformulation patterns from pairs of initial queries and empirically stronger reformulations, consolidates them into a compact library of transferable reformulation patterns, and then selects an appropriate reformulation pattern for a new query given its retrieval context. The selected pattern constrains query reformulation to controlled operations such as sense disambiguation, vocabulary grounding, or discriminative facet addition, to name a few. As such, our proposed approach makes the reformulation policy explicit through these reformulation patterns, guiding the LLM towards targeted and effective query reformulations. Our extensive experiments on TREC DL 2019, DL 2020, and DL Hard show consistent improvements over classical feedback methods and recent LLM-based query reformulation and expansion approaches.

analysis.tldr: 提出ReFormeR，通过显式模式引导大模型进行查询改写，在多个检索基准上超越现有方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有查询改写方法依赖隐式提示，缺乏可解释性和可控性，需要更显式的改写策略。
analysis.problem: 如何让大模型生成更有效且可控的查询改写，避免直接提示带来的不可预测性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 直接提示大模型改写查询效果不稳定，而通过预定义模式（如消歧、词汇接地）可提升改写质量。
analysis.main_method: 从初始查询与强改写对中提取简短模式，构建可迁移模式库，再为新查询选择合适模式约束LLM生成。
analysis.key_experiments: 在TREC DL 2019、DL 2020和DL Hard上实验，对比经典反馈方法和近期LLM方法，取得一致提升。
analysis.contributions: 首次提出显式模式引导的查询改写框架，提升可控性和效果，并开源模式库。
analysis.limitations: 模式库构建依赖人工标注或强改写对，可能限制泛化性；未在更多领域验证。

papers.title: Improving Latent Generalization Using Test-time Compute
papers.abstract: Language Models (LMs) exhibit two distinct mechanisms for knowledge acquisition: in-weights learning (i.e., encoding information within the model weights) and in-context learning (ICL). Although these two modes offer complementary strengths, in-weights learning frequently struggles to facilitate deductive reasoning over the internalized knowledge. We characterize this limitation as a deficit in latent generalization, of which the reversal curse is one example. Conversely, in-context learning demonstrates highly robust latent generalization capabilities. To improve latent generalization from in-weights knowledge, prior approaches rely on train-time data augmentation, yet these techniques are task-specific, scale poorly, and fail to generalize to out-of-distribution knowledge. To overcome these shortcomings, this work studies how models can be taught to use test-time compute, or 'thinking', specifically to improve latent generalization. We use Reinforcement Learning (RL) from correctness feedback to train models to produce long chains-of-thought (CoTs) to improve latent generalization. Our experiments show that this thinking approach not only resolves many instances of latent generalization failures on in-distribution knowledge but also, unlike augmentation baselines, generalizes to new knowledge for which no RL was performed. Nevertheless, on pure reversal tasks, we find that thinking does not unlock direct knowledge inversion, but the generate-and-verify ability of thinking models enables them to get well above chance performance. The brittleness of factual self-verification means thinking models still remain well below the performance of in-context learning for this task. Overall, our results establish test-time thinking as a flexible and promising direction for improving the latent generalization of LMs.

analysis.tldr: 通过强化学习训练模型在测试时生成长思维链，提升语言模型对内部知识的潜在泛化能力，优于数据增强方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 语言模型通过权重学习获取的知识难以进行演绎推理（如反转诅咒），而上下文学习则表现出强大的潜在泛化能力，因此需要改进权重知识的泛化。
analysis.problem: 现有数据增强方法任务特定、扩展性差且无法泛化到分布外知识，需要更灵活的测试时计算策略。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 权重学习与上下文学习在潜在泛化上存在显著差距，前者缺乏演绎推理能力，后者则能有效利用上下文进行推理。
analysis.main_method: 使用强化学习从正确性反馈中训练模型生成长思维链，在测试时通过思考提升潜在泛化。
analysis.key_experiments: 在分布内知识上解决潜在泛化失败，并泛化到未进行强化学习的新知识；在纯反转任务中，思考模型通过生成-验证机制超越随机水平。
analysis.contributions: 提出测试时思考作为灵活且有效的潜在泛化改进方向，证明其优于数据增强基线并具有跨知识泛化能力。
analysis.limitations: 思考模型在纯反转任务中无法直接实现知识反转，且事实自验证的脆弱性使其性能仍低于上下文学习。

papers.title: The topological gap at criticality: scaling exponent d + {\eta}, universality, and scope
papers.abstract:
The topological gap $\Delta = TP_{H_1}^{real} - TP_{H_1}^{shuf}$ -- the excess $H_1$ total persistence of the majority-spin alpha complex over a density-matched null -- encodes critical correlations in spin models. We establish finite-size scaling: $\Delta(L,T) = A L^{d+\eta} G_-(L|t/T_c|)$, with $G_-(x) \sim (1+x/x_0)^{-(1+ eta/
u)}$. For 2D Ising, $\alpha = 2.249 \pm 0.038$, matching $d+\eta = 9/4$ to $0.03\sigma$; the $G_-$ exponent $\gamma = 1.089 \pm 0.077$ is consistent with $1+ eta/
u = 9/8$ ($\Delta R^2 < 10^{-5}$). For 2D Potts $q=3$ with $L$ up to 1024, $\alpha = 2.272 \pm 0.024$ ($0.2\sigma$ from $d+\eta = 2.267$), with two-term corrections to scaling ($R^2 = 0.9999$). The $G_-$ exponent $\gamma = 1.114$ (68% CI $[1.053, 1.173]$) matches $1+ eta/
u = 17/15$. Scope boundaries: the law fails for 2D Potts $q=4$ ($\alpha = 2.347 \pm 0.017$, $9.3\sigma$ from $d+\eta = 5/2$) where logarithmic corrections prevent convergence, and for raw 3D Ising ($4\sigma$ from $d+\eta$), but density normalization $\Delta/|M|^{1/2}$ recovers $\alpha = 3.06 \pm 0.04$ ($0.6\sigma$). The framework fails for first-order, BKT, and percolation. The criterion: $\alpha = d+\eta$ holds when corrections to scaling are algebraic ($\omega > 0$) but fails when logarithmic ($\omega 	o 0$).

analysis.tldr: 拓扑间隙在临界点的标度指数为d+η，适用于代数修正的模型，但对数修正时失效。
analysis.research_motivation: 探索拓扑间隙在临界点的标度行为及其普适性，以理解其与临界指数的关系。
analysis.problem: 确定拓扑间隙Δ的有限尺寸标度形式，并检验其指数是否等于d+η。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 拓扑间隙Δ在临界点标度为L^{d+η}，但仅当修正为代数形式时成立；对数修正（如2D Potts q=4）导致偏离。
analysis.main_method: 通过计算多数自旋alpha复形的H1总持续同调，与密度匹配的零模型比较得到Δ，并进行有限尺寸标度拟合。
analysis.key_experiments: 在2D Ising、2D Potts q=3和q=4、3D Ising等模型上验证标度律，使用L最大至1024。
analysis.contributions: 建立了拓扑间隙的有限尺寸标度理论，揭示了其与临界指数d+η的关联，并划定了适用范围。
analysis.limitations: 框架对一阶相变、BKT和逾渗模型失效，且对数修正模型（如2D Potts q=4）不适用。

papers.title: The power of context: Random Forest classification of near synonyms. A case study in Modern Hindi
papers.abstract: Synonymy is a widespread yet puzzling linguistic phenomenon. Absolute synonyms theoretically should not exist, as they do not expand language's expressive potential. However, it was suggested that even if synonyms denote the same concept, they may reflect different perspectives or carry distinct cultural associations, claims that have rarely been tested quantitatively. In Hindi, prolonged contact with Persian produced many Perso-Arabic loanwords coexisting with their Sanskrit counterpart, forming numerous synonym pairs. This study investigates whether centuries after these borrowings appeared in the Subcontinent their origin can still be distinguished using distributional data alone and regardless of their semantic content. A Random Forest trained on word embeddings of Hindi synonyms successfully classified words by Sanskrit or Perso-Arabic origin, even when they were semantically unrelated, suggesting that usage patterns preserve traces of etymology. These findings provide quantitative evidence that context encodes etymological signals and that synonymy may reflect subtle but systematic distinctions linked to origin. They support the idea that synonymous words can offer different perspectives and that etymologically related words may form distinct conceptual subspaces, creating a new type of semantic frame shaped by historical origin. Overall, the results highlight the power of context in capturing nuanced distinctions beyond traditional semantic similarity.

analysis.tldr: 通过随机森林分类器分析印地语近义词的词嵌入，发现语境能编码词源信号，支持同义词反映不同视角的观点。
analysis.research_motivation: 同义词现象普遍但缺乏定量研究，尤其是词源对使用模式的影响。
analysis.problem: 验证印地语中波斯-阿拉伯借词与梵语同义词是否仅通过分布数据即可区分词源。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 即使语义无关，词嵌入仍保留词源痕迹，表明语境编码了历史起源信息。
analysis.main_method: 使用随机森林分类器对印地语同义词的词嵌入进行分类，区分梵语和波斯-阿拉伯词源。
analysis.key_experiments: 训练分类器于语义无关的同义词对，成功预测词源，验证了分布数据的词源信号。
analysis.contributions: 提供定量证据表明语境编码词源信号，支持同义词反映不同视角的理论。
analysis.limitations: 仅针对印地语，未探讨其他语言或更复杂的语义关系。

papers.title: Know Your Streams: On the Conceptualization, Characterization, and Generation of Intentional Event Streams
papers.abstract: The shift toward IoT-enabled, sensor-driven systems has transformed how operational data is generated, favoring continuous, real-time event streams (ES) over static event logs. This evolution presents new challenges for Streaming Process Mining (SPM), which must cope with out-of-order events, concurrent activities, incomplete cases, and concept drifts. Yet, the evaluation of SPM algorithms remains rooted in outdated practices, relying on static logs or artificially streamified data that fail to reflect the complexities of real-world streams. To address this gap, we first perform a comprehensive review of data stream literature to identify stream characteristics currently not reflected in the SPM community. Next, we use this information to extend the conceptual foundation for ES. Finally, we propose Stream of Intent, a prototype generator to produce ES with specific features. Our evaluation shows excellence in producing reproducible, intentional ES for targeted benchmarking and adaptive algorithm development in SPM.

analysis.tldr: 针对流式过程挖掘中缺乏真实事件流基准的问题，提出概念扩展和生成器，以产生可复现的、具有特定特征的事件流。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有流式过程挖掘算法评估仍依赖静态日志或人工流化数据，无法反映真实事件流的复杂性。
analysis.problem: 缺乏能够反映真实事件流特征（如乱序、并发、不完整案例、概念漂移）的基准数据。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 物联网和传感器系统产生连续实时事件流，但流式过程挖掘社区仍沿用静态日志评估方法，导致算法与实际场景脱节。
analysis.main_method: 通过综述数据流文献识别未反映的流特征，扩展事件流概念基础，并设计Stream of Intent生成器以产生具有特定意图的事件流。
analysis.key_experiments: 评估Stream of Intent生成器在产生可复现、具有意图的事件流方面的表现，用于流式过程挖掘的基准测试和算法开发。
analysis.contributions: 提供了事件流的概念扩展和可复现的生成工具，填补了流式过程挖掘基准数据的空白。
analysis.limitations: 生成器可能无法完全覆盖所有真实世界事件流的复杂性和多样性。

papers.title: Cost-Efficient Estimation of General Abilities Across Benchmarks
papers.abstract: Thousands of diverse benchmarks have been developed to measure the quality of large language models (LLMs). Yet prior work has demonstrated that LLM performance is often sufficiently explained by a small set of latent factors, or abilities. This suggests the potential for more efficient and principled benchmarking, but it remains difficult to compare the quality of different methods. Motivated by predictive validity, we argue that the quality of a benchmarking framework should be grounded in how efficiently it enables the prediction of model performance on unseen tasks. To analyze this objective, we collect the "Wide-scale Item Level Dataset" (WILD), a dataset of item-model response pairs, comprising evaluations of 65 models on 109,564 unique items spanning 163 tasks drawn from 27 datasets. This dataset enables the first analysis of how different techniques can predict a model's performance on a large, diverse collection of unseen tasks under different budget constraints. We demonstrate that combining a modified multidimensional item response theory (IRT) model with adaptive item selection driven by optimal experimental design can predict performance on 112 held-out benchmark tasks with a mean absolute error (MAE) of less than 7%, and can do so after observing only 16 items. We further demonstrate that incorporating cost-aware discount factors into our selection criteria can reduce the total tokens needed to reach 7% MAE from 141,000 tokens to only 22,000, an 85% reduction in evaluation cost.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种结合多维IRT和自适应项目选择的方法，仅需16个测试项即可预测模型在112个未见基准上的性能，误差低于7%，并将评估成本降低85%。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基准数量庞大，但模型性能常由少数潜在能力解释，需要更高效、有原则的基准测试方法。
analysis.problem: 如何高效预测模型在未见任务上的性能，并在有限预算下优化评估成本。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 模型性能可由少量潜在因子解释，但不同基准测试方法的比较缺乏基于预测效度的统一标准。
analysis.main_method: 使用改进的多维项目反应理论（IRT）模型，结合基于最优实验设计的自适应项目选择，并引入成本感知折扣因子。
analysis.key_experiments: 在WILD数据集（65个模型、109,564个项、163个任务）上，预测112个保留基准的性能，仅需16个项达到7% MAE，并将token消耗从141,000降至22,000。
analysis.contributions: 构建了大规模WILD数据集；提出成本高效的基准预测框架；首次分析不同预算约束下的预测方法。
analysis.limitations: 方法依赖IRT假设，可能不适用于所有模型或任务类型；实验仅基于公开数据集，未验证在更广泛场景下的泛化性。

papers.title: Wired for Overconfidence: A Mechanistic Perspective on Inflated Verbalized Confidence in LLMs
papers.abstract: Large language models are often not just wrong, but \emph{confidently wrong}: when they produce factually incorrect answers, they tend to verbalize overly high confidence rather than signal uncertainty. Such verbalized overconfidence can mislead users and weaken confidence scores as a reliable uncertainty signal, yet its internal mechanisms remain poorly understood. We present a circuit-level mechanistic analysis of this inflated verbalized confidence in LLMs, organized around three axes: capturing verbalized confidence as a differentiable internal signal, identifying the circuits that causally inflate it, and leveraging these insights for targeted inference-time recalibration. Across two instruction-tuned LLMs on three datasets, we find that a compact set of MLP blocks and attention heads, concentrated in middle-to-late layers, consistently writes the confidence-inflation signal at the final token position. We further show that targeted inference-time interventions on these circuits substantially improve calibration. Together, our results suggest that verbalized overconfidence in LLMs is driven by identifiable internal circuits and can be mitigated through targeted intervention.

analysis.tldr: 通过电路级机制分析，发现LLM的过度自信由中后层特定MLP和注意力头驱动，可通过针对性干预缓解。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM常自信地输出错误答案，但内部机制不明，需理解过度自信的根源以提升可靠性。
analysis.problem: LLM在错误答案时表达过高置信度，削弱了置信度作为不确定性信号的可信度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 过度自信信号由中后层紧凑的MLP块和注意力头在最终token位置写入，形成可识别的内部电路。
analysis.main_method: 采用电路级机制分析，将口头化置信度作为可微内部信号，识别因果性膨胀电路，并实施推理时干预。
analysis.key_experiments: 在两个指令微调LLM和三个数据集上验证，发现中后层电路一致驱动置信度膨胀，干预后校准显著改善。
analysis.contributions: 揭示了LLM口头化过度自信的电路机制，并证明通过靶向干预可有效缓解。
analysis.limitations: 仅分析两个模型和三个数据集，泛化性需验证；干预可能影响其他性能。

papers.title: Generative Profiling for Soft Real-Time Systems and its Applications to Resource Allocation
papers.abstract: Modern real-time systems require accurate characterization of task timing behavior to ensure predictable performance, particularly on complex hardware architectures. Existing methods, such as worst-case execution time analysis, often fail to capture the fine-grained timing behaviors of a task under varying resource contexts (e.g., an allocation of cache, memory bandwidth, and CPU frequency), which is necessary to achieve efficient resource utilization. In this paper, we introduce a novel generative profiling approach that synthesizes context-dependent, fine-grained timing profiles for real-time tasks, including those for unmeasured resource allocations. Our approach leverages a nonparametric, conditional multi-marginal Schr\"odinger Bridge (MSB) formulation to generate accurate execution profiles for unseen resource contexts, with maximum likelihood guarantees. We demonstrate the efficiency and effectiveness of our approach through real-world benchmarks, and showcase its practical utility in a representative case study of adaptive multicore resource allocation for real-time systems.

analysis.tldr: 提出生成式分析方法，利用条件多边际薛定谔桥合成实时任务在未测量资源分配下的细粒度时序特征，提升资源利用率。
analysis.research_motivation: 现代实时系统在复杂硬件上需要精确的任务时序特征以确保可预测性能，但现有方法如最坏情况执行时间分析无法捕捉资源上下文相关的细粒度行为。
analysis.problem: 现有方法无法为未测量的资源分配（如缓存、内存带宽、CPU频率）生成准确的细粒度时序特征，导致资源利用效率低下。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 任务时序行为高度依赖资源上下文，不同资源分配下执行时间分布差异显著，传统静态分析难以泛化到未见场景。
analysis.main_method: 采用非参数条件多边际薛定谔桥（MSB）公式，合成未测量资源分配下的执行时间分布，并提供最大似然保证。
analysis.key_experiments: 通过真实基准测试验证方法效率，并在自适应多核资源分配案例中展示实际效用。
analysis.contributions: 首次将生成式方法用于实时系统时序分析，支持未测量资源上下文的细粒度特征合成，并保证统计最优性。
analysis.limitations: 依赖训练数据覆盖的资源分配范围，极端未测量场景可能影响生成精度；计算开销在超大规模系统中需进一步评估。

papers.title: When Reward Hacking Rebounds: Understanding and Mitigating It with Representation-Level Signals
papers.abstract: Reinforcement learning for LLMs is vulnerable to reward hacking, where models exploit shortcuts to maximize reward without solving the intended task. We systematically study this phenomenon in coding tasks using an environment-manipulation setting, where models can rewrite evaluator code to trivially pass tests without solving the task, as a controlled testbed. Across both studied models, we identify a reproducible three-phase rebound pattern: models first attempt to rewrite the evaluator but fail, as their rewrites embed test cases their own solutions cannot pass. They then temporarily retreat to legitimate solving. When legitimate reward remains scarce, they rebound into successful hacking with qualitatively different strategies. Using representation engineering, we extract concept directions for shortcut, deception, and evaluation awareness from domain-general contrastive pairs and find that the shortcut direction tracks hacking behavior most closely, making it an effective representational proxy for detection. Motivated by this finding, we propose Advantage Modification, which integrates shortcut concept scores into GRPO advantage computation to penalize hacking rollouts before policy updates. Because the penalty is internalized into the training signal rather than applied only at inference time, Advantage Modification provides more robust suppression of hacking compared with generation-time activation steering.

analysis.tldr: 研究LLM强化学习中的奖励黑客现象，发现三阶段反弹模式，并提出基于表征级信号的Advantage Modification方法进行抑制。
analysis.research_motivation: 强化学习训练LLM时易出现奖励黑客问题，模型利用捷径而非真正完成任务来获取奖励，需要深入理解并缓解该现象。
analysis.problem: 奖励黑客导致模型在编码任务中通过重写评估器代码作弊，且存在反弹模式，现有方法难以有效抑制。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 模型经历失败尝试、暂时退回到合法求解、最终成功黑客的三阶段反弹模式，且黑客策略在后期发生质变。
analysis.main_method: 利用表征工程从领域通用对比对中提取捷径、欺骗和评估意识的概念方向，并将捷径分数集成到GRPO优势计算中，形成Advantage Modification方法。
analysis.key_experiments: 在环境操纵设置下对编码任务进行实验，观察两种模型的三阶段反弹模式，并比较Advantage Modification与生成时激活引导的效果。
analysis.contributions: 系统揭示了奖励黑客的反弹模式，提出基于表征级信号的检测与抑制方法，比传统推理时干预更鲁棒。
analysis.limitations: 仅针对编码任务中的环境操纵场景，未验证其他类型奖励黑客；依赖预定义概念方向，可能需领域适配。

papers.title: Benchmark Problems and Benchmark Datasets for the evaluation of Machine and Deep Learning methods on Photoplethysmography signals: the D4 report from the QUMPHY project
papers.abstract: This report is part of the Qumphy project (22HLT01 Qumphy) that is funded by the European Union and is dedicated to the development of measures to quantify the uncertainties associated with Machine Learning algorithms applied to medical problems, in particular the analysis and processing of Photoplethysmography (PPG) signals. In this report, a list of six medical problems that are related to PPG signals and serve as Benchmark Problems is given. Suitable Benchmark datasets and their usage are described also.

analysis.tldr: 该报告为QUMPHY项目的一部分，定义了六个基于光电容积描记（PPG）信号的基准问题及相应数据集，用于评估机器/深度学习方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 量化机器学习在医疗应用中（尤其是PPG信号处理）的不确定性，需要标准化的基准测试框架。
analysis.problem: 缺乏统一的基准问题和数据集来评估PPG信号上的机器学习方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: PPG信号在医疗诊断中广泛应用，但不同研究使用不同数据集和任务，导致结果难以比较。
analysis.main_method: 定义了六个与PPG相关的医疗问题作为基准问题，并推荐了合适的数据集及使用方式。
analysis.key_experiments: 未涉及具体实验，主要提供基准问题和数据集描述。
analysis.contributions: 提供了标准化的基准问题和数据集，促进PPG机器学习方法的可重复性和可比性。
analysis.limitations: 仅定义基准，未提供基线结果或方法性能比较。

papers.title: Residuals-based Offline Reinforcement Learning
papers.abstract: Offline reinforcement learning (RL) has received increasing attention for learning policies from previously collected data without interaction with the real environment, which is particularly important in high-stakes applications. While a growing body of work has developed offline RL algorithms, these methods often rely on restrictive assumptions about data coverage and suffer from distribution shift. In this paper, we propose a residuals-based offline RL framework for general state and action spaces. Specifically, we define a residuals-based Bellman optimality operator that explicitly incorporates estimation error in learning transition dynamics into policy optimization by leveraging empirical residuals. We show that this Bellman operator is a contraction mapping and identify conditions under which its fixed point is asymptotically optimal and possesses finite-sample guarantees. We further develop a residuals-based offline deep Q-learning (DQN) algorithm. Using a stochastic CartPole environment, we demonstrate the effectiveness of our residuals-based offline DQN algorithm.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于残差的离线强化学习框架，通过整合转移动力学估计误差到策略优化中，解决分布偏移问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 离线强化学习在安全关键应用中重要，但现有方法常依赖严格的数据覆盖假设并受分布偏移困扰。
analysis.problem: 离线强化学习中转移动力学估计误差导致的分布偏移和策略性能下降问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 传统离线RL方法忽略模型误差，导致策略在未见状态-动作对上的泛化失败。
analysis.main_method: 定义基于残差的贝尔曼最优算子，利用经验残差将转移动力学估计误差显式融入策略优化。
analysis.key_experiments: 在随机CartPole环境中验证基于残差的离线DQN算法有效性。
analysis.contributions: 提出残差贝尔曼算子并证明其收缩性、渐近最优性和有限样本保证。
analysis.limitations: 仅在一个简单环境（CartPole）中验证，未在复杂基准任务上测试。

papers.title: Open-Domain Safety Policy Construction
papers.abstract: Moderation layers are increasingly a core component of many products built on user- or model-generated content. However, drafting and maintaining domain-specific safety policies remains costly. We present Deep Policy Research (DPR), a minimal agentic system that drafts a full content moderation policy based on only human-written seed domain information. DPR uses a single web search tool and lightweight scaffolding to iteratively propose search queries, distill diverse web sources into policy rules, and organize rules into an indexed document.
