We evaluate DPR on (1) the OpenAI undesired content benchmark across five domains with two compact reader LLMs and (2) an in-house multimodal advertisement moderation benchmark. DPR consistently outperforms definition-only and in-context learning baselines, and in our end-to-end setting it is competitive with expert-written policy sections in several domains. Moreover, under the same seed specification and evaluation protocol, DPR outperforms a general-purpose deep research system, suggesting that a task-specific, structured research loop can be more effective than generic web research for policy drafting. We release our experiment code at https://github.com/xiaowu0162/deep-policy-research.

analysis.tldr: 提出Deep Policy Research (DPR)系统，仅需人工种子领域信息即可自动生成内容审核政策，在多个基准上优于基线方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 人工制定和维护领域特定安全政策成本高昂，需要自动化方法降低开销。
analysis.problem: 如何仅基于少量种子信息自动生成高质量、领域特定的内容审核政策。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 通用深度研究系统在政策起草任务上不如任务特定的结构化研究循环有效。
analysis.main_method: DPR使用单一网络搜索工具和轻量级脚手架，迭代提出搜索查询、从多样网络来源提炼政策规则并组织成索引文档。
analysis.key_experiments: 在OpenAI undesired content基准（5个领域）和内部多模态广告审核基准上评估，使用两个紧凑型读者LLM。
analysis.contributions: 提出DPR系统，证明任务特定结构化研究循环优于通用网络研究，开源实验代码。
analysis.limitations: 依赖种子领域信息质量，可能无法覆盖所有边缘案例；仅使用单一搜索工具。

papers.title: Assessing Pause Thresholds for empirical Translation Process Research
papers.abstract: Text production (and translations) proceeds in the form of stretches of typing, interrupted by keystroke pauses. It is often assumed that fast typing reflects unchallenged/automated translation production while long(er) typing pauses are indicative of translation problems, hurdles or difficulties. Building on a long discussion concerning the determination of pause thresholds that separate automated from presumably reflective translation processes (O'Brien, 2006; Alves and Vale, 2009; Timarova et al., 2011; Dragsted and Carl, 2013; Lacruz et al., 2014; Kumpulainen, 2015; Heilmann and Neumann 2016), this paper compares three recent approaches for computing these pause thresholds, and suggest and evaluate a novel method for computing Production Unit Breaks.

analysis.tldr: 本文比较了三种计算翻译过程中停顿阈值的方法，并提出了一种新的生产单元中断计算方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 翻译过程中的停顿常被视为翻译困难的指标，但如何确定区分自动与反思性翻译过程的停顿阈值存在长期争议。
analysis.problem: 现有停顿阈值计算方法不一致，缺乏统一标准来有效分离自动化翻译与反思性翻译过程。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 快速打字通常反映自动化翻译，而长停顿则暗示翻译问题或困难，但阈值设定影响分析结果。
analysis.main_method: 比较三种现有停顿阈值计算方法，并提出一种新的生产单元中断计算方法进行评估。
analysis.key_experiments: 基于翻译过程数据，对比不同阈值方法在识别生产单元中断上的表现。
analysis.contributions: 系统比较了现有方法，并提出了改进的停顿阈值计算方法，有助于更精确地分析翻译认知过程。
analysis.limitations: 新方法可能依赖特定数据集，泛化性需进一步验证；未讨论实际应用中的计算复杂度。

papers.title: VIANA: character Value-enhanced Intensity Assessment via domain-informed Neural Architecture
papers.abstract: Predicting the perceived intensity of odorants remains a fundamental challenge in sensory science due to the complex, non-linear behavior of their response, as well as the difficulty in correlating molecular structure with human perception. While traditional deep learning models, such as Graph Convolutional Networks (GCNs), excel at capturing molecular topology, they often fail to account for the biological and perceptual context of olfaction. This study introduces VIANA, a novel "tri-pillar" framework that integrates structural graph theory, character value embeddings, and phenomenological behavior. This methodology systematically evaluates knowledge transfer across three distinct domains: molecular structure via GCNs, semantic odor character values via Principal Odor Map (POM) embeddings, and biological dose-response logic via Hill's law. We demonstrate that knowledge transfer is not inherently positive; rather, a balance must be maintained in the volume of information provided to the model. While raw semantic data led to "information overload" in domain-informed models, applying Principal Component Analysis (PCA) to distill the 95% most impactful semantic variance yielded a superior "signal distillation" effect. Results indicate that the synthesis of these three knowledge transfer pillars significantly outperforms baseline structural models, with VIANA achieving a peak R^2 of 0.996 and a test Mean Squared Error (MSE) of 0.19. In this context, VIANA successfully captures the physical ceiling of saturation, the sensitivity of detection thresholds, and the nuance of odor character value expression, providing a domain grounded simulation of the human olfactory experience. This research provides a robust framework for digital olfaction, effectively bridging the gap between molecular informatics and sensory perception.

analysis.tldr: 提出VIANA三支柱框架，融合分子结构、语义气味值和生物剂量-响应逻辑，显著提升气味强度预测性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统深度学习模型难以关联分子结构与人类嗅觉感知，需要更全面的生物和感知上下文建模。
analysis.problem: 预测气味感知强度时，分子拓扑与人类感知之间的复杂非线性关系难以捕捉。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 知识迁移并非总是正向，原始语义数据会导致信息过载，而PCA降维可产生信号蒸馏效果。
analysis.main_method: 构建三支柱框架：GCN处理分子结构、POM嵌入编码语义气味值、Hill定律模拟生物剂量-响应逻辑。
analysis.key_experiments: 在气味强度预测任务上，VIANA达到R²=0.996和测试MSE=0.19，显著优于基线结构模型。
analysis.contributions: 提出首个整合结构、语义和生物知识的嗅觉预测框架，并揭示知识迁移中的信息平衡原则。
analysis.limitations: 依赖预定义的语义气味映射和剂量-响应模型，可能限制对新气味类型的泛化能力。

papers.title: Causal Optimal Coupling for Gaussian Input-Output Distributional Data
papers.abstract: We study the problem of identifying an optimal coupling between input-output distributional data generated by a causal dynamical system. The coupling is required to satisfy prescribed marginal distributions and a causality constraint reflecting the temporal structure of the system. We formulate this problem as a Schr"odinger Bridge, which seeks the coupling closest - in Kullback-Leibler divergence - to a given prior while enforcing both marginal and causality constraints. For the case of Gaussian marginals and general time-dependent quadratic cost functions, we derive a fully tractable characterization of the Sinkhorn iterations that converges to the optimal solution. Beyond its theoretical contribution, the proposed framework provides a principled foundation for applying causal optimal transport methods to system identification from distributional data.

analysis.tldr: 提出因果最优耦合方法，通过Schrödinger桥在因果约束下匹配高斯输入-输出分布数据，并给出可解的Sinkhorn迭代。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有最优传输方法未考虑因果动态系统的时序约束，无法直接用于分布数据的系统辨识。
analysis.problem: 如何找到满足因果约束和边际分布的最优耦合，以匹配因果动态系统的输入-输出分布数据。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 因果约束使耦合问题转化为带时序结构的Schrödinger桥，高斯边际下可解析求解。
analysis.main_method: 将问题建模为Schrödinger桥，通过KL散度最小化在因果约束下匹配边际分布，并推导高斯情形下Sinkhorn迭代的闭式解。
analysis.key_experiments: 论文未提供实验，但理论推导了高斯边际和二次成本函数下的完整求解过程。
analysis.contributions: 首次将因果约束引入Schrödinger桥框架，给出高斯情形的可解表征，为分布数据系统辨识提供理论基础。
analysis.limitations: 仅适用于高斯边际和二次成本函数，非高斯或非线性系统需进一步扩展。

papers.title: Model Merging via Data-Free Covariance Estimation
authors: Marawan Gamal Abdel Hameed and Derek Tam and Pascal Jr Tikeng Notsawo and Colin Raffel and Guillaume Rabusseau
papers.abstract: Model merging provides a way of cheaply combining individual models to produce a model that inherits each individual's capabilities. While some merging methods can approach the performance of multitask training, they are often heuristically motivated and lack theoretical justification. A principled alternative is to pose model merging as a layer-wise optimization problem that directly minimizes interference between tasks. However, this formulation requires estimating per-layer covariance matrices from data, which may not be available when performing merging. In contrast, many of the heuristically-motivated methods do not require auxiliary data, making them practically advantageous. In this work, we revisit the interference minimization framework and show that, under certain conditions, covariance matrices can be estimated directly from difference matrices, eliminating the need for data while also reducing computational costs. We validate our approach across vision and language benchmarks on models ranging from 86M parameters to 7B parameters, outperforming previous data-free state-of-the-art merging methods

analysis.tldr: 提出一种无需数据的模型合并方法，通过从差值矩阵估计协方差矩阵来最小化任务干扰，在视觉和语言任务上超越现有无数据方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有模型合并方法多为启发式且缺乏理论依据，而基于干扰最小化的方法需要数据估计协方差矩阵，限制了实用性。
analysis.problem: 如何在无辅助数据的情况下，实现基于干扰最小化的模型合并，同时降低计算成本。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 在特定条件下，协方差矩阵可直接从模型权重差值矩阵中估计，无需依赖训练数据。
analysis.main_method: 提出无数据协方差估计方法，利用层间权重差值矩阵近似协方差，并基于此优化合并过程以最小化任务干扰。
analysis.key_experiments: 在视觉和语言基准上测试了86M到7B参数的模型，与多种无数据合并方法对比，性能达到最优。
analysis.contributions: 首次实现无数据场景下基于干扰最小化的模型合并，理论推导了协方差估计的可行性，并显著降低计算开销。
analysis.limitations: 协方差估计的准确性依赖于差值矩阵的统计特性，可能不适用于所有模型架构或任务分布。

papers.title: Bias Inheritance in Neural-Symbolic Discovery of Constitutive Closures Under Function-Class Mismatch
papers.abstract: We investigate the data-driven discovery of constitutive closures in nonlinear reaction-diffusion systems with known governing PDE structures. Our objective is to robustly recover diffusion and reaction laws from spatiotemporal observations while avoiding the common pitfall where low residuals or short-horizon predictions are conflated with physical recovery. We propose a three-stage neural-symbolic framework: (1) learning numerical surrogates under physical constraints using a noise-robust weak-form-driven objective; (2) compressing these surrogates into restricted interpretable symbolic families (e.g., polynomial, rational, and saturation forms); and (3) validating the symbolic closures through explicit forward re-simulation on unseen initial conditions. Extensive numerical experiments reveal two distinct regimes. Under matched-library settings, weak polynomial baselines behave as correctly specified reference estimators, showing that neural surrogates do not uniformly outperform classical bases. Conversely, under function-class mismatch, neural surrogates provide necessary flexibility and can be compressed into compact symbolic laws with minimal rollout degradation. However, we identify a critical "bias inheritance" mechanism where symbolic compression does not automatically repair constitutive bias. Across various observation regimes, the true error of the symbolic closure closely tracks that of the neural surrogate, yielding a bias inheritance ratio near one. These findings demonstrate that the primary bottleneck in neural-symbolic modeling lies in the initial numerical inverse problem rather than the subsequent symbolic compression. We underscore that constitutive claims must be rigorously supported by forward validation rather than residual minimization alone.

analysis.tldr: 提出三阶段神经符号框架发现非线性反应扩散系统的本构闭包，揭示符号压缩无法自动修复数值逆问题中的偏差继承机制。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有数据驱动方法常将低残差或短时预测误认为物理恢复，需避免此陷阱并稳健恢复本构定律。
analysis.problem: 在函数类不匹配下，神经符号发现的本构闭包可能继承数值逆问题的偏差，导致物理恢复失败。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 符号压缩后闭包的真实误差与神经替代模型紧密相关，偏差继承比率接近1，表明瓶颈在初始逆问题而非符号压缩。
analysis.main_method: 三阶段框架：弱形式驱动噪声鲁棒神经替代学习、压缩为受限符号族（多项式/有理/饱和）、前向重模拟验证。
analysis.key_experiments: 在匹配库设置下弱多项式基线表现良好；函数类不匹配时神经替代提供灵活性，但符号压缩不自动修复偏差。
analysis.contributions: 揭示偏差继承机制，强调前向验证而非残差最小化是验证本构闭包的关键。
analysis.limitations: 仅针对特定非线性反应扩散系统，未探讨其他PDE类型或更高维问题。

papers.title: Test-Time Scaling Makes Overtraining Compute-Optimal
papers.abstract: Modern LLMs scale at test-time, e.g. via repeated sampling, where inference cost grows with model size and the number of samples. This creates a trade-off that pretraining scaling laws, such as Chinchilla, do not address. We present Train-to-Test ($T^2$) scaling laws that jointly optimize model size, training tokens, and number of inference samples under fixed end-to-end budgets. $T^2$ modernizes pretraining scaling laws with pass@$k$ modeling used for test-time scaling, then jointly optimizes pretraining and test-time decisions. Forecasts from $T^2$ are robust over distinct modeling approaches: measuring joint scaling effect on the task loss and modeling impact on task accuracy. Across eight downstream tasks, we find that when accounting for inference cost, optimal pretraining decisions shift radically into the overtraining regime, well-outside of the range of standard pretraining scaling suites. We validate our results by pretraining heavily overtrained models in the optimal region that $T^2$ scaling forecasts, confirming their substantially stronger performance compared to pretraining scaling alone. Finally, as frontier LLMs are post-trained, we show that our findings survive the post-training stage, making $T^2$ scaling meaningful in modern deployments.

analysis.tldr: 提出T²缩放定律，联合优化模型大小、训练数据和推理样本数，发现考虑推理成本后，最优预训练转向过训练区域。
analysis.research_motivation: 现代LLM在测试时通过重复采样扩展，但现有预训练缩放定律（如Chinchilla）未考虑推理成本，导致预训练决策不最优。
analysis.problem: 如何在固定端到端预算下，联合优化模型大小、训练数据和测试时推理样本数，使预训练和测试时决策最优。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 考虑推理成本后，最优预训练决策从标准区域转向过训练区域，即使用更多训练数据但更小模型，以平衡测试时采样成本。
analysis.main_method: 提出Train-to-Test (T²) 缩放定律，结合pass@k建模测试时缩放，联合优化预训练和测试时决策，并在任务损失和准确率上建模。
analysis.key_experiments: 在8个下游任务上验证，预训练过训练模型在T²预测的最优区域表现显著优于仅预训练缩放模型，且结果在后训练阶段保持。
analysis.contributions: 首次联合优化预训练和测试时缩放，揭示推理成本下过训练的最优性，并提供鲁棒的缩放预测。
analysis.limitations: 依赖特定任务和模型架构，未考虑更复杂的测试时策略（如链式思维）或硬件约束。

papers.title: Macroscopic transport patterns of UAV traffic in 3D anisotropic wind fields: A constraint-preserving hybrid PINN-FVM approach
papers.abstract: Macroscopic unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV) traffic organization in three-dimensional airspace faces significant challenges from static wind fields and complex obstacles. A critical difficulty lies in simultaneously capturing the strong anisotropy induced by wind while strictly preserving transport consistency and boundary semantics, which are often compromised in standard physics-informed learning approaches. To resolve this, we propose a constraint-preserving hybrid solver that integrates a physics-informed neural network for the anisotropic Eikonal value problem with a conservative finite-volume method for steady density transport. These components are coupled through an outer Picard iteration with under-relaxation, where the target condition is hard-encoded and strictly conservative no-flux boundaries are enforced during the transport step. We evaluate the framework on reproducible homing and point-to-point scenarios, effectively capturing value slices, induced-motion patterns, and steady density structures such as bands and bottlenecks. Ultimately, our perspective emphasizes the value of a reproducible computational framework supported by transparent empirical diagnostics to enable the traceable assessment of macroscopic traffic phenomena.

analysis.tldr: 提出混合PINN-FVM方法，在三维各向异性风场中严格保持无人机宏观交通的传输一致性和边界语义。
analysis.research_motivation: 三维空域中无人机交通受静态风场和复杂障碍物影响，现有物理信息学习方法难以同时捕捉风致各向异性并保持传输一致性。
analysis.problem: 标准物理信息学习方法在强各向异性风场中会破坏传输一致性和边界语义。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 风场导致无人机交通呈现强各向异性，形成带状和瓶颈等稳态密度结构。
analysis.main_method: 将物理信息神经网络用于各向异性Eikonal值问题，与保守有限体积法耦合，通过Picard迭代和欠松弛实现硬编码目标条件和严格无通量边界。
analysis.key_experiments: 在可复现的归航和点对点场景中评估，捕捉值切片、诱导运动模式和稳态密度结构。
analysis.contributions: 提出约束保持的混合求解器，确保传输一致性和边界语义，提供可复现的计算框架。
analysis.limitations: 未讨论计算效率或扩展到动态风场的情况。

papers.title: JetPrism: diagnosing convergence for generative simulation and inverse problems in nuclear physics
papers.abstract: High-fidelity Monte Carlo simulations and complex inverse problems, such as mapping smeared experimental observations to ground-truth states, are computationally intensive yet essential for robust data analysis. Conditional Flow Matching (CFM) offers a mathematically robust approach to accelerating these tasks, but we demonstrate its standard training loss is fundamentally misleading. In rigorous physics applications, CFM loss plateaus prematurely, serving as an unreliable indicator of true convergence and physical fidelity. To investigate this disconnect, we designed JetPrism, a configurable CFM framework acting as an efficient generative surrogate for evaluating unconditional generation and conditional detector unfolding. Using synthetic stress tests and a Jefferson Lab kinematic dataset ($\gamma p \to \rho^0 p \to \pi^+\pi^- p$) relevant to the forthcoming Electron-Ion Collider (EIC), we establish that physics-informed metrics continue to improve significantly long after the standard loss converges. Consequently, we propose a multi-metric evaluation protocol incorporating marginal and pairwise $\chi^2$ statistics, $W_1$ distances, correlation matrix distances ($D_{\mathrm{corr}}$), and nearest-neighbor distance ratios ($R_{\mathrm{NN}}$). By demonstrating that domain-specific evaluations must supersede generic loss metrics, this work establishes JetPrism as a dependable generative surrogate that ensures precise statistical agreement with ground-truth data without memorizing the training set. While demonstrated in nuclear physics, this diagnostic framework is readily extensible to parameter generation and complex inverse problems across broad domains. Potential applications span medical imaging, astrophysics, semiconductor discovery, and quantitative finance, where high-fidelity simulation, rigorous inversion, and generative reliability are critical.

analysis.tldr: 提出JetPrism框架，揭示条件流匹配训练损失在核物理生成模拟中不可靠，需用物理信息指标评估收敛。
analysis.research_motivation: 高保真蒙特卡洛模拟和逆问题计算昂贵，条件流匹配虽加速但标准损失误导收敛判断，需可靠诊断方法。
analysis.problem: 条件流匹配的标准训练损失在核物理应用中过早收敛，无法反映真实收敛和物理保真度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 标准损失收敛后，物理指标仍持续改进，表明损失与物理一致性脱节。
analysis.main_method: 设计JetPrism框架，采用多指标评估协议，包括边际/配对χ²、W1距离、相关矩阵距离和最近邻距离比。
analysis.key_experiments: 使用合成压力测试和Jefferson Lab运动学数据集（γp→ρ⁰p→π⁺π⁻p）验证，对比标准损失与物理指标。
analysis.contributions: 建立领域特定评估优于通用损失的范式，提供可靠生成代理，确保统计一致性而不记忆训练集。
analysis.limitations: 仅验证于核物理场景，需扩展至其他领域；框架配置可能依赖专家知识。

papers.title: Forecasting Supply Chain Disruptions with Foresight Learning
papers.abstract: Anticipating supply chain disruptions before they materialize is a core challenge for firms and policymakers alike. A key difficulty is learning to reason reliably about infrequent, high-impact events from noisy and unstructured inputs - a setting where general-purpose models struggle without task-specific adaptation. We introduce an end-to-end framework that trains LLMs to produce calibrated probabilistic forecasts using realized disruption outcomes as supervision. The resulting model substantially outperforms strong baselines - including GPT-5 - on accuracy, calibration, and precision. We also show that training induces more structured and reliable probabilistic reasoning without explicit prompting. These results suggest a general pathway for training domain-specific forecasting models that produce decision-ready signals. To support transparency we open-source the evaluation dataset used in this study. Dataset: https://huggingface.co/datasets/LightningRodLabs/supply-chain-predictions

analysis.tldr: 提出端到端框架，用真实中断事件监督训练LLM，生成校准的概率预测，显著优于GPT-5等基线。
analysis.research_motivation: 供应链中断预测对企业和政策制定者至关重要，但现有通用模型难以处理低频高影响事件和噪声数据。
analysis.problem: 如何从噪声和非结构化输入中可靠预测罕见但高影响的供应链中断事件。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 通用模型（如GPT-5）在无任务特定适配时，对罕见事件的概率推理不准确且校准差。
analysis.main_method: 利用真实中断结果作为监督信号，端到端训练LLM生成校准的概率预测，无需显式提示。
analysis.key_experiments: 在供应链预测数据集上对比GPT-5等强基线，评估准确性、校准度和精确性。
analysis.contributions: 提出训练领域特定预测模型的通用路径，开源评估数据集以促进透明性。
analysis.limitations: 依赖高质量监督数据，可能难以推广到其他领域或数据稀缺场景。

papers.title: UQ-SHRED: uncertainty quantification of shallow recurrent decoder networks for sparse sensing via engression
papers.abstract: Reconstructing high-dimensional spatiotemporal fields from sparse sensor measurements is critical in a wide range of scientific applications. The SHallow REcurrent Decoder (SHRED) architecture is a recent state-of-the-art architecture that reconstructs high-quality spatial domain from hyper-sparse sensor measurement streams. An important limitation of SHRED is that in complex, data-scarce, high-frequency, or stochastic systems, portions of the spatiotemporal field must be modeled with valid uncertainty estimation. We introduce UQ-SHRED, a distributional learning framework for sparse sensing problems that provides uncertainty quantification through a neural network-based distributional regression called engression. UQ-SHRED models the uncertainty by learning the predictive distribution of the spatial state conditioned on the sensor history. By injecting stochastic noise into sensor inputs and training with an energy score loss, UQ-SHRED produces predictive distributions with minimal computational overhead, requiring only noise injection at the input and resampling through a single architecture without retraining or additional network structures. On complicated synthetic and real-life datasets including turbulent flow, atmospheric dynamics, neuroscience and astrophysics, UQ-SHRED provides a distributional approximation with well-calibrated confidence intervals. We further conduct ablation studies to understand how each model setting affects the quality of the UQ-SHRED performance, and its validity on uncertainty quantification over a set of different experimental setups.

analysis.tldr: 提出UQ-SHRED框架，通过engression为稀疏传感的SHRED模型提供不确定性量化，无需额外网络结构。
analysis.research_motivation: SHRED在复杂、数据稀缺或随机系统中无法提供有效的不确定性估计，限制了其应用可靠性。
analysis.problem: 解决SHRED在稀疏传感中无法量化高维时空场重建不确定性的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 在复杂系统中，部分时空场必须用有效的不确定性估计建模，而SHRED缺乏此能力。
analysis.main_method: 采用engression（基于能量分数损失的分布回归），在输入注入随机噪声，通过单架构重采样生成预测分布。
analysis.key_experiments: 在湍流、大气动力学、神经科学和天体物理学等合成与真实数据集上验证，置信区间校准良好，并进行了消融研究。
analysis.contributions: 首次将engression应用于稀疏传感不确定性量化，计算开销小，无需重训练或附加网络。
analysis.limitations: 依赖噪声注入和重采样，可能在高维极端稀疏场景下校准效果有限。

papers.title: Scaling Reasoning Tokens via RL and Parallel Thinking: Evidence From Competitive Programming
papers.abstract: We study how to scale reasoning token budgets for competitive programming through two complementary approaches: training-time reinforcement learning (RL) and test-time parallel thinking. During RL training, we observe an approximately log-linear relationship between validation accuracy and the average number of generated reasoning tokens over successive checkpoints, and show two ways to shift this training trajectory: verification RL warmup raises the starting point, while randomized clipping produces a steeper trend in the observed regime. As scaling single-generation reasoning during RL quickly becomes expensive under full attention, we introduce a multi-round parallel thinking pipeline that distributes the token budget across threads and rounds of generation, verification, and refinement. We train the model end-to-end on this pipeline to match the training objective to the test-time structure. Starting from Seed-OSS-36B, the full system with 16 threads and 16 rounds per thread matches the underlying RL model's oracle pass@16 at pass@1 using 7.6 million tokens per problem on average, and surpasses GPT-5-high on 456 hard competitive programming problems from AetherCode.

analysis.tldr: 通过强化学习训练和并行推理两种方式扩展推理token预算，在竞争编程中提升模型性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 探索如何有效扩展推理token预算以提升复杂推理任务性能，尤其是在竞争编程中。
analysis.problem: 单次推理扩展token在训练时成本高，且难以平衡训练与测试时的推理结构。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 验证准确率与平均推理token数呈近似对数线性关系，验证RL预热和随机裁剪可调整训练轨迹。
analysis.main_method: 提出多轮并行推理管道，将token预算分配到多个线程和轮次中，并端到端训练模型匹配测试时结构。
analysis.key_experiments: 在AetherCode的456个困难问题上，16线程16轮系统以平均760万token/问题达到pass@1，超越GPT-5-high。
analysis.contributions: 揭示了RL训练中推理token与准确率的关系，并提出了高效的并行推理框架。
analysis.limitations: token预算仍较高，且方法可能依赖特定领域（竞争编程）。

papers.title: Universal YOCO for Efficient Depth Scaling
papers.abstract: The rise of test-time scaling has remarkably boosted the reasoning and agentic proficiency of Large Language Models (LLMs). Yet, standard Transformers struggle to scale inference-time compute efficiently, as conventional looping strategies suffer from high computational overhead and a KV cache that inflates alongside model depth. We present Universal YOCO (YOCO-U), which combines the YOCO decoder-decoder architecture with recursive computation to achieve a synergistic effect greater than either alone. Built on the YOCO framework, YOCO-U implements a Universal Self-Decoder that performs multiple iterations via parameter sharing, while confining the iterative process to shallow, efficient-attention layers. This combination yields a favorable capability-efficiency tradeoff that neither YOCO nor recursion achieves independently. The YOCO architecture provides a constant global KV cache and linear pre-filling, while partial recursion enhances representational depth with limited overhead. Together, YOCO-U improves token utility and scaling behavior while maintaining efficient inference. Empirical results confirm that YOCO-U remains highly competitive in general and long-context benchmarks, demonstrating that the integration of efficient-attention architectures and recursive computation is a promising direction for scalable LLMs.

analysis.tldr: 提出 Universal YOCO，结合 YOCO 架构与递归计算，实现高效深度扩展，在保持推理效率的同时提升 token 利用率和缩放行为。
analysis.research_motivation: 标准 Transformer 在测试时缩放推理计算效率低，循环策略计算开销大且 KV 缓存随深度膨胀，需要更高效的深度扩展方法。
analysis.problem: 标准 Transformer 无法高效缩放推理时间计算，传统循环策略导致高计算开销和 KV 缓存随模型深度增长的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: YOCO 架构提供恒定全局 KV 缓存和线性预填充，而部分递归以有限开销增强表示深度，两者结合产生协同效应，优于单独使用。
analysis.main_method: 基于 YOCO 解码器-解码器架构，实现通用自解码器，通过参数共享进行多次迭代，并将迭代过程限制在浅层高效注意力层。
analysis.key_experiments: 在通用和长上下文基准测试中验证，YOCO-U 保持高度竞争力，证明高效注意力架构与递归计算的结合是扩展 LLM 的有前景方向。
analysis.contributions: 提出 YOCO-U 架构，实现高效深度扩展；展示 YOCO 与递归计算的协同效应；在保持推理效率的同时提升性能。
analysis.limitations: 论文未明确讨论在极深模型或极端长上下文下的性能边界，以及递归计算可能引入的额外延迟。

papers.title: An Online Machine Learning Multi-resolution Optimization Framework for Energy System Design Limit of Performance Analysis
papers.abstract: Designing reliable integrated energy systems for industrial processes requires optimization and verification models across multiple fidelities, from architecture-level sizing to high-fidelity dynamic operation. However, model mismatch across fidelities obscures the sources of performance loss and complicates the quantification of architecture-to-operation performance gaps. We propose an online, machine-learning-accelerated multi-resolution optimization framework that estimates an architecture-specific upper bound on achievable performance while minimizing expensive high-fidelity model evaluations. We demonstrate the approach on a pilot energy system supplying a 1 MW industrial heat load. First, we solve a multi-objective architecture optimization to select the system configuration and component capacities. We then develop an machine learning (ML)-accelerated multi-resolution, receding-horizon optimal control strategy that approaches the achievable-performance bound for the specified architecture, given the additional controls and dynamics not captured by the architectural optimization model. The ML-guided controller adaptively schedules the optimization resolution based on predictive uncertainty and warm-starts high-fidelity solves using elite low-fidelity solutions. Our results on the pilot case study show that the proposed multi-resolution strategy reduces the architecture-to-operation performance gap by up to 42% relative to a rule-based controller, while reducing required high-fidelity model evaluations by 34% relative to the same multi-fidelity approach without ML guidance, enabling faster and more reliable design verification. Together, these gains make high-fidelity verification tractable, providing a practical upper bound on achievable operational performance.

analysis.tldr: 提出在线机器学习加速的多分辨率优化框架，减少工业能源系统设计验证中的性能差距和高保真计算成本。
analysis.research_motivation: 多保真度模型间的失配掩盖了性能损失来源，且高保真模型评估昂贵，难以量化架构到运行的性能差距。
analysis.problem: 如何高效估计能源系统架构特定的可实现性能上限，同时最小化高保真模型评估次数。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 不同保真度模型间的差异导致架构优化与动态运行性能之间存在显著差距，且传统方法难以平衡精度与计算成本。
analysis.main_method: 结合多目标架构优化与ML加速的多分辨率滚动时域最优控制，基于预测不确定性自适应调度分辨率，并用低保真解热启动高保真求解。
analysis.key_experiments: 在1 MW工业热负荷试点能源系统上验证，相比规则控制器减少42%性能差距，相比无ML引导的多保真方法减少34%高保真评估。
analysis.contributions: 提出ML引导的多分辨率优化框架，有效缩小架构到运行的性能差距，并提供可实现性能上限的实用估计。
analysis.limitations: 方法依赖ML模型的预测不确定性质量，且未讨论对更复杂系统或不同工业场景的泛化性。

papers.title: NeuroDDAF: Neural Dynamic Diffusion-Advection Fields with Evidential Fusion for Air Quality Forecasting
papers.abstract: Accurate air quality forecasting is crucial for protecting public health and guiding environmental policy, yet it remains challenging due to nonlinear spatiotemporal dynamics, wind-driven transport, and distribution shifts across regions. Physics-based models are interpretable but computationally expensive and often rely on restrictive assumptions, whereas purely data-driven models can be accurate but may lack robustness and calibrated uncertainty. To address these limitations, we propose Neural Dynamic Diffusion-Advection Fields (NeuroDDAF), a physics-informed forecasting framework that unifies neural representation learning with open-system transport modeling. NeuroDDAF integrates (i) a GRU-Graph Attention encoder to capture temporal dynamics and wind-aware spatial interactions, (ii) a Fourier-domain diffusion-advection module with learnable residuals, (iii) a wind-modulated latent Neural ODE to model continuous-time evolution under time-varying connectivity, and (iv) an evidential fusion mechanism that adaptively combines physics-guided and neural forecasts while quantifying uncertainty. Experiments on four urban datasets (Beijing, Shenzhen, Tianjin, and Ancona) across 1-3 day horizons show that NeuroDDAF consistently outperforms strong baselines, including AirPhyNet, achieving up to 9.7% reduction in RMSE and 9.4% reduction in MAE on long-term forecasts. On the Beijing dataset, NeuroDDAF attains an RMSE of 41.63 $\mu$g/m$^3$ for 1-day prediction and 48.88 $\mu$g/m$^3$ for 3-day prediction, representing the best performance among all compared methods. In addition, NeuroDDAF improves cross-city generalization and yields well-calibrated uncertainty estimates, as confirmed by ensemble variance analysis and case studies under varying wind conditions.

analysis.tldr: 提出NeuroDDAF，融合物理信息与神经网络的空气质量预测框架，在多个城市数据集上优于现有方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有物理模型计算昂贵且假设严格，纯数据驱动模型缺乏鲁棒性和不确定性校准，需结合两者优势。
analysis.problem: 空气质量预测中非线性时空动态、风驱动传输和区域分布偏移带来的挑战。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 污染物扩散受风场影响显著，且不同区域存在分布偏移，导致传统模型泛化困难。
analysis.main_method: 集成GRU-图注意力编码器、傅里叶域扩散-平流模块、风调制神经ODE和证据融合机制。
analysis.key_experiments: 在北京、深圳、天津和安科纳四个城市数据集上评估1-3天预测，RMSE降低9.7%，MAE降低9.4%。
analysis.contributions: 首次将神经动态扩散-平流场与证据融合结合，实现物理引导与不确定性量化。
analysis.limitations: 未讨论模型在极端天气或数据稀疏场景下的表现，计算复杂度可能较高。

papers.title: LLM REgression with a Latent Iterative State Head
papers.abstract: We present RELISH (REgression with a Latent Iterative State Head), a novel, lightweight architecture designed for text regression with large language models. Rather than decoding numeric targets as text or aggregating multiple generated outputs, RELISH predicts scalar values directly from frozen LLM representations by iteratively refining a learned latent state through cross-attention over token-level representations, and then mapping the final state to a point estimate with a linear regressor. Across five datasets, four LLM backbones, and two LLM training regimes, RELISH consistently outperforms prior baselines from all three major LLM regression families, including autoregressive decoding, regression-aware inference, and existing predictive head methods. Despite these gains, RELISH remains highly parameter-efficient, requiring only 3.4-3.7M trainable parameters across frozen LLM backbones (only 0.01-0.04% additional overhead), far less than LoRA-based alternatives that grow with model size (0.26-0.42%).

analysis.tldr: 提出 RELISH 架构，通过迭代潜状态头从冻结的 LLM 表示中直接预测标量值，在文本回归任务上超越现有方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有 LLM 文本回归方法（如解码为文本或聚合输出）效率低或性能有限，需要更轻量且有效的方案。
analysis.problem: 如何从冻结的 LLM 表示中高效、准确地直接预测连续数值，避免解码或聚合的复杂性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: LLM 的 token 级表示包含丰富信息，但现有预测头方法未能充分利用迭代精化机制来提升回归性能。
analysis.main_method: 设计一个可学习的潜状态，通过跨注意力迭代精化 token 级表示，最终用线性回归器映射为标量预测。
analysis.key_experiments: 在 5 个数据集、4 种 LLM 骨干和 2 种训练范式下，与自回归解码、回归感知推理和预测头方法对比，RELISH 一致最优。
analysis.contributions: 提出一种参数高效（仅 3.4-3.7M 参数）的回归架构，显著优于现有方法，且开销远低于 LoRA。
analysis.limitations: 依赖冻结 LLM 表示，可能无法适应需要微调 LLM 的任务；跨注意力迭代可能增加推理时间。

papers.title: Embarrassingly Simple Self-Distillation Improves Code Generation
papers.abstract: Can a large language model (LLM) improve at code generation using only its own raw outputs, without a verifier, a teacher model, or reinforcement learning? We answer in the affirmative with simple self-distillation (SSD): sample solutions from the model with certain temperature and truncation configurations, then fine-tune on those samples with standard supervised fine-tuning. SSD improves Qwen3-30B-Instruct from 42.4% to 55.3% pass@1 on LiveCodeBench v6, with gains concentrating on harder problems, and it generalizes across Qwen and Llama models at 4B, 8B, and 30B scale, including both instruct and thinking variants. To understand why such a simple method can work, we trace these gains to a precision-exploration conflict in LLM decoding and show that SSD reshapes token distributions in a context-dependent way, suppressing distractor tails where precision matters while preserving useful diversity where exploration matters. Taken together, SSD offers a complementary post-training direction for improving LLM code generation.

analysis.tldr: 简单自蒸馏（SSD）仅使用模型自身输出，无需验证器或强化学习，即可显著提升代码生成能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 探索是否仅通过模型自身原始输出就能提升代码生成性能，避免依赖外部验证器或复杂训练流程。
analysis.problem: 大语言模型在代码生成中面临精度与探索的冲突，难以同时兼顾正确性和多样性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 模型解码时存在精度-探索冲突：高精度需要抑制干扰性尾部token，而探索需要保留有用多样性。SSD通过上下文相关方式重塑token分布，平衡两者。
analysis.main_method: 简单自蒸馏（SSD）：以特定温度和截断配置从模型采样解决方案，然后对这些样本进行标准监督微调。
analysis.key_experiments: 在LiveCodeBench v6上，Qwen3-30B-Instruct的pass@1从42.4%提升至55.3%，效果集中在难题上；在Qwen和Llama模型（4B、8B、30B规模）上均有效。
analysis.contributions: 提出一种极简且有效的自蒸馏方法，无需外部资源即可提升代码生成；揭示了精度-探索冲突机制并验证了SSD的泛化性。
analysis.limitations: 未探讨SSD在非代码任务上的效果；对采样配置（温度、截断）的敏感性未深入分析。

papers.title: Safe learning-based control via function-based uncertainty quantification
papers.abstract: Uncertainty quantification is essential when deploying learning-based control methods in safety-critical systems. This is commonly realized by constructing uncertainty tubes that enclose the unknown function of interest, e.g., the reward and constraint functions or the underlying dynamics model, with high probability. However, existing approaches for uncertainty quantification typically rely on restrictive assumptions on the unknown function, such as known bounds on functional norms or Lipschitz constants, and struggle with discontinuities. In this paper, we model the unknown function as a random function from which independent and identically distributed realizations can be generated, and construct uncertainty tubes via the scenario approach that hold with high probability and rely solely on the sampled realizations. We integrate these uncertainty tubes into a safe Bayesian optimization algorithm, which we then use to safely tune control parameters on a real Furuta pendulum.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于函数不确定性量化的安全学习方法，通过场景方法构建不确定性管，用于安全贝叶斯优化，并在真实倒立摆上验证。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有不确定性量化方法依赖函数范数或Lipschitz常数等严格假设，难以处理不连续函数，限制了学习控制方法在安全关键系统中的应用。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖严格假设（如已知函数范数或Lipschitz常数）的情况下，为未知函数构建高概率不确定性管，并用于安全控制。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 传统不确定性管构建方法对函数连续性要求高，而实际系统（如倒立摆）中的函数可能不连续，导致安全保证失效。
analysis.main_method: 将未知函数建模为随机函数，通过独立同分布采样生成实现，并利用场景方法构建高概率不确定性管，集成到安全贝叶斯优化算法中。
analysis.key_experiments: 在真实Furuta倒立摆上，使用所提方法安全地调优控制参数，验证了方法的实际有效性。
analysis.contributions: 提出一种无需严格假设的不确定性管构建方法，结合场景方法实现安全贝叶斯优化，并在真实硬件上成功应用。
analysis.limitations: 依赖随机函数假设和采样实现，可能在高维或样本效率低时受限；未讨论计算复杂度。

papers.title: Deep Reinforcement Learning for Robotic Manipulation under Distribution Shift with Bounded Extremum Seeking
papers.abstract: Reinforcement learning has shown strong performance in robotic manipulation, but learned policies often degrade in performance when test conditions differ from the training distribution. This limitation is especially important in contact-rich tasks such as pushing and pick-and-place, where changes in goals, contact conditions, or robot dynamics can drive the system out-of-distribution at inference time. In this paper, we investigate a hybrid controller that combines reinforcement learning with bounded extremum seeking to improve robustness under such conditions. In the proposed approach, deep deterministic policy gradient (DDPG) policies are trained under standard conditions on the robotic pushing and pick-and-place tasks, and are then combined with bounded ES during deployment. The RL policy provides fast manipulation behavior, while bounded ES ensures robustness of the overall controller to time variations when operating conditions depart from those seen during training. The resulting controller is evaluated under several out-of-distribution settings, including time-varying goals and spatially varying friction patches.

analysis.tldr: 结合强化学习与有界极值搜索，提升机器人操作策略在分布偏移下的鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: 强化学习策略在测试条件与训练分布不同时性能下降，尤其在接触丰富的机器人操作任务中。
analysis.problem: 解决机器人操作中因目标、接触条件或动力学变化导致的分布偏移问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 分布偏移导致预训练策略性能退化，而有界极值搜索能在线适应时变环境。
analysis.main_method: 训练DDPG策略后，在部署时结合有界极值搜索进行混合控制。
analysis.key_experiments: 在机器人推和抓取任务上评估，包括时变目标和空间变化摩擦片等分布偏移场景。
analysis.contributions: 提出一种混合控制器，结合RL的快速操作与有界ES的鲁棒性，有效应对分布偏移。
analysis.limitations: 未明确讨论计算开销或高维任务扩展性。

papers.title: Reasoning Shift: How Context Silently Shortens LLM Reasoning
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) exhibiting test-time scaling behavior, such as extended reasoning traces and self-verification, have demonstrated remarkable performance on complex, long-term reasoning tasks. However, the robustness of these reasoning behaviors remains underexplored. To investigate this, we conduct a systematic evaluation of multiple reasoning models across three scenarios: (1) problems augmented with lengthy, irrelevant context; (2) multi-turn conversational settings with independent tasks; and (3) problems presented as a subtask within a complex task. We observe an interesting phenomenon: reasoning models tend to produce much shorter reasoning traces (up to 50%) for the same problem under different context conditions compared to the traces produced when the problem is presented in isolation. A finer-grained analysis reveals that this compression is associated with a decrease in self-verification and uncertainty management behaviors, such as double-checking. While this behavioral shift does not compromise performance on straightforward problems, it might affect performance on more challenging tasks. We hope our findings draw additional attention to both the robustness of reasoning models and the problem of context management for LLMs and LLM-based agents.

analysis.tldr: 研究发现，在冗长上下文或多轮对话中，LLM 推理链长度可缩短 50%，伴随自我验证行为减少，可能影响复杂任务表现。
analysis.research_motivation: 尽管 LLM 在复杂推理任务中表现出色，但其推理行为的鲁棒性尚未被充分探索。
analysis.problem: 探究上下文变化（如无关信息、多轮对话、子任务）如何影响 LLM 的推理深度和可靠性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 模型在非孤立场景下推理链显著缩短（最多 50%），且自我验证和双重检查等行为减少，但简单任务性能未受影响。
analysis.main_method: 系统评估多个推理模型在三种场景（冗长上下文、多轮对话、子任务）下的推理行为，并与孤立问题对比。
analysis.key_experiments: 对比相同问题在不同上下文条件下的推理链长度、自我验证频率，并分析对简单与复杂任务性能的影响。
analysis.contributions: 揭示了上下文对 LLM 推理行为的隐性压缩效应，并指出其对复杂任务潜在风险，呼吁关注鲁棒性。
analysis.limitations: 未深入探讨压缩机制的根本原因，且实验可能受限于特定模型和任务类型。

papers.title: Reconsidering Dependency Networks from an Information Geometry Perspective
papers.abstract: Dependency networks (Heckerman et al., 2000) provide a flexible framework for modeling complex systems with many variables by combining independently learned local conditional distributions through pseudo-Gibbs sampling. Despite their computational advantages over Bayesian and Markov networks, the theoretical foundations of dependency networks remain incomplete, primarily because their model distributions -- defined as stationary distributions of pseudo-Gibbs sampling -- lack closed-form expressions. This paper develops an information-geometric analysis of pseudo-Gibbs sampling, interpreting each sampling step as an m-projection onto a full conditional manifold. Building on this interpretation, we introduce the full conditional divergence and derive an upper bound that characterizes the location of the stationary distribution in the space of probability distributions. We then reformulate both structure and parameter learning as optimization problems that decompose into independent subproblems for each node, and prove that the learned model distribution converges to the true underlying distribution as the number of training samples grows to infinity. Experiments confirm that the proposed upper bound is tight in practice.

analysis.tldr: 从信息几何视角重新审视依赖网络，将伪吉布斯采样解释为m-投影，并推导出平稳分布的上界。
analysis.research_motivation: 依赖网络的理论基础不完整，其模型分布缺乏闭式表达，需要更深入的理论分析。
analysis.problem: 依赖网络的平稳分布无法解析表达，导致理论分析困难。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 伪吉布斯采样的每一步可视为对全条件流形的m-投影，从而在概率分布空间中定位平稳分布。
analysis.main_method: 引入全条件散度，推导平稳分布的上界，并将结构学习和参数学习分解为独立子问题。
analysis.key_experiments: 实验验证了所提上界在实际中的紧致性。
analysis.contributions: 提供了依赖网络的信息几何解释，证明了学习模型分布随样本量增加收敛到真实分布。
analysis.limitations: 未讨论高维或非平稳场景下的适用性。

papers.title: Bridging the Simulation-to-Experiment Gap with Generative Models using Adversarial Distribution Alignment
papers.abstract: A fundamental challenge in science and engineering is the simulation-to-experiment gap. While we often possess prior knowledge of physical laws, these physical laws can be too difficult to solve exactly for complex systems. Such systems are commonly modeled using simulators, which impose computational approximations. Meanwhile, experimental measurements more faithfully represent the real world, but experimental data typically consists of observations that only partially reflect the system's full underlying state. We propose a data-driven distribution alignment framework that bridges this simulation-to-experiment gap by pre-training a generative model on fully observed (but imperfect) simulation data, then aligning it with partial (but real) observations of experimental data. While our method is domain-agnostic, we ground our approach in the physical sciences by introducing Adversarial Distribution Alignment (ADA). This method aligns a generative model of atomic positions -- initially trained on a simulated Boltzmann distribution -- with the distribution of experimental observations. We prove that our method recovers the target observable distribution, even with multiple, potentially correlated observables. We also empirically validate our framework on synthetic, molecular, and experimental protein data, demonstrating that it can align generative models with diverse observables. Our code is available at https://kaityrusnelson.com/ada/.

analysis.tldr: 提出对抗分布对齐（ADA）方法，用生成模型弥合模拟与实验数据之间的分布差异，在蛋白质等系统上验证有效。
analysis.research_motivation: 模拟器存在计算近似误差，而实验数据虽真实但观测不完整，两者之间的差距限制了科学建模的准确性。
analysis.problem: 如何利用部分观测的实验数据来校正基于完整模拟数据训练的生成模型，使其分布与真实实验分布一致。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 模拟数据虽完整但有偏差，实验数据真实但仅部分观测，两者分布不一致，且观测变量可能相关。
analysis.main_method: 提出对抗分布对齐（ADA），先对模拟数据预训练生成模型，再通过对抗学习对齐生成分布与实验观测分布。
analysis.key_experiments: 在合成数据、分子系统和实验蛋白质数据上验证，证明ADA能有效对齐多种观测变量下的分布。
analysis.contributions: 提出领域无关的分布对齐框架，理论证明可恢复目标观测分布，并在物理科学数据上实证有效。
analysis.limitations: 依赖实验观测的可获取性，且对抗训练可能不稳定；未讨论高维或复杂观测下的扩展性。

papers.title: Property-Level Flood Risk Assessment Using AI-Enabled Street-View Lowest Floor Elevation Extraction and ML Imputation Across Texas
papers.abstract: This paper argues that AI-enabled analysis of street-view imagery, complemented by performance-gated machine-learning imputation, provides a viable pathway for generating building-specific elevation data at regional scale for flood risk assessment. We develop and apply a three-stage pipeline across 18 areas of interest (AOIs) in Texas that (1) extracts LFE and the height difference between street grade and the lowest floor (HDSL) from Google Street View imagery using the Elev-Vision framework, (2) imputes missing HDSL values with Random Forest and Gradient Boosting models trained on 16 terrain, hydrologic, geographic, and flood-exposure features, and (3) integrates the resulting elevation dataset with Fathom 1-in-100 year inundation surfaces and USACE depth-damage functions to estimate property-specific interior flood depth and expected loss. Across 12,241 residential structures, street-view imagery was available for 73.4% of parcels and direct LFE/HDSL extraction was successful for 49.0% (5,992 structures). Imputation was retained for 13 AOIs where cross-validated performance was defensible, with selected models achieving R suqre values from 0.159 to 0.974; five AOIs were explicitly excluded from prediction because performance was insufficient. The results show that street-view-based elevation mapping is not universally available for every property, but it is sufficiently scalable to materially improve regional flood-risk characterization by moving beyond hazard exposure to structure-level estimates of interior inundation and expected damage. Scientifically, the study advances LFE estimation from a pilot-scale proof of concept to a regional, end-to-end workflow. Practically, it offers a replicable framework for jurisdictions that lack comprehensive Elevation Certificates but need parcel-level information to support mitigation, planning, and flood-risk management.

analysis.tldr: 利用街景图像和机器学习插值，在区域尺度上提取建筑最低楼层高程，提升洪水风险评估精度。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统洪水评估缺乏建筑级高程数据，而高程证书覆盖率低，亟需可扩展的替代方法。
analysis.problem: 如何从街景图像中提取最低楼层高程并填补缺失数据，以支持区域尺度的财产级洪水风险评估。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 街景图像覆盖率为73.4%，但直接提取成功率仅49%，表明数据稀疏性；插值模型性能差异大（R² 0.159-0.974），部分区域不可靠。
analysis.main_method: 三阶段流程：Elev-Vision提取LFE/HDSL，随机森林和梯度提升模型插补缺失值，结合淹没图和损失函数估算内部洪水深度和损失。
analysis.key_experiments: 在德克萨斯州18个区域对12,241栋住宅测试，13个区域插值有效，5个因性能不足被排除。
analysis.contributions: 将LFE估计从概念验证扩展到区域端到端工作流，提供可复制的框架用于缺乏高程证书的地区。
analysis.limitations: 街景图像覆盖和提取成功率有限，插值模型在部分区域表现差，依赖外部数据源（如Fathom）。

papers.title: Narrative Fingerprints: Multi-Scale Author Identification via Novelty Curve Dynamics
papers.abstract: We test whether authors have characteristic "fingerprints" in the information-theoretic novelty curves of their published works. Working with two corpora -- Books3 (52,796 books, 759 qualifying authors) and PG-19 (28,439 books, 1,821 qualifying authors) -- we find that authorial voice leaves measurable traces in how novelty unfolds across a text. The signal is multi-scale: at book level, scalar dynamics (mean novelty, speed, volume, circuitousness) identify 43% of authors significantly above chance; at chapter level, SAX motif patterns in sliding windows achieve 30x-above-chance attribution, far exceeding the scalar features that dominate at book level. These signals are complementary, not redundant. We show that the fingerprint is partly confounded with genre but persists within-genre for approximately one-quarter of authors. Classical authors (Twain, Austen, Kipling) show fingerprints comparable in strength to modern authors, suggesting the phenomenon is not an artifact of contemporary publishing conventions.

analysis.tldr: 通过信息论新颖性曲线发现作者具有多尺度写作指纹，章节级SAX模式可实现30倍于随机水平的归因。
analysis.research_motivation: 探索作者写作风格是否在文本信息论新颖性动态中留下可量化的独特痕迹。
analysis.problem: 现有作者识别方法多依赖词汇或句法特征，缺乏对文本信息动态结构的系统性分析。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 作者指纹在书籍级（标量动态）和章节级（SAX模式）呈现互补信号，章节级归因效果远超书籍级。
analysis.main_method: 计算文本滑动窗口的新颖性曲线，提取标量特征（均值、速度、体积、迂回度）和SAX符号化模式。
analysis.key_experiments: 在Books3（52,796本书）和PG-19（28,439本书）两个语料库上测试，书籍级识别43%作者显著高于随机，章节级达30倍。
analysis.contributions: 首次证明信息论新颖性曲线可作为多尺度作者指纹，且经典与现代作者指纹强度相当。
analysis.limitations: 指纹部分与体裁混淆，仅约1/4作者在体裁内保持稳定指纹。

papers.title: Inverse Design of Optical Multilayer Thin Films using Robust Masked Diffusion Models
papers.abstract: Inverse design of optical multilayer stacks seeks to infer layer materials, thicknesses, and ordering from a desired target spectrum. It is a long-standing challenge due to the large design space and non-unique solutions. We introduce \texttt{OptoLlama}, a masked diffusion language model for inverse thin-film design from optical spectra. Representing multilayer stacks as sequences of material-thickness tokens, \texttt{OptoLlama} conditions generation on reflectance, absorptance, and transmittance spectra and learns a probabilistic mapping from optical response to structure. Evaluated on a representative test set of 3,000 targets, \texttt{OptoLlama} reduces the mean absolute spectral error by 2.9-fold relative to a nearest-neighbor template baseline and by 3.45-fold relative to the state-of-the-art data-driven baseline, called \texttt{OptoGPT}. Case studies on designed and expert-defined targets show that the model reproduces characteristic spectral features and recovers physically meaningful stack motifs, including distributed Bragg reflectors. These results establish diffusion-based sequence modeling as a powerful framework for inverse photonic design.

analysis.tldr: 提出OptoLlama，一种掩码扩散语言模型，用于从光学光谱逆向设计多层薄膜，显著降低光谱误差。
analysis.research_motivation: 光学多层薄膜的逆向设计因设计空间大且解不唯一而长期存在挑战，现有方法性能有限。
analysis.problem: 如何从目标光谱高效、准确地推断多层薄膜的材料、厚度和顺序。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 多层薄膜的光学响应与结构之间存在复杂、非唯一的映射关系，传统方法难以捕捉。
analysis.main_method: 将多层堆栈表示为材料-厚度令牌序列，使用掩码扩散语言模型（OptoLlama）以反射率、吸收率和透射率为条件，学习从光谱到结构的概率映射。
analysis.key_experiments: 在3000个目标测试集上，OptoLlama将平均绝对光谱误差相比最近邻基线降低2.9倍，相比最优基线OptoGPT降低3.45倍；案例研究显示能复现特征光谱并恢复物理有意义的堆栈模式。
analysis.contributions: 首次将掩码扩散序列建模应用于逆向光子设计，显著提升性能并展示物理可解释性。
analysis.limitations: 论文未明确讨论模型对噪声光谱的鲁棒性及扩展到更复杂结构（如非平面层）的适用性。

papers.title: CARE: Privacy-Compliant Agentic Reasoning with Evidence Discordance
papers.abstract: Large language model (LLM) systems are increasingly used to support high-stakes decision-making, but they typically perform worse when the available evidence is internally inconsistent. Such a scenario exists in real-world healthcare settings, with patient-reported symptoms contradicting medical signs. To study this problem, we introduce MIMIC-DOS, a dataset for short-horizon organ dysfunction worsening prediction in the intensive care unit (ICU) setting. We derive this dataset from the widely recognized MIMIC-IV, a publicly available electronic health record dataset, and construct it exclusively from cases in which discordance between signs and symptoms exists. This setting poses a substantial challenge for existing LLM-based approaches, with single-pass LLMs and agentic pipelines often struggling to reconcile such conflicting signals. To address this problem, we propose CARE: a multi-stage privacy-compliant agentic reasoning framework in which a remote LLM provides guidance by generating structured categories and transitions without accessing sensitive patient data, while a local LLM uses these categories and transitions to support evidence acquisition and final decision-making. Empirically, CARE achieves stronger performance across all key metrics compared to multiple baseline settings, showing that CARE can more robustly handle conflicting clinical evidence while preserving privacy.

analysis.tldr: 提出CARE框架，通过远程LLM生成结构化类别和转换，本地LLM处理冲突证据，在ICU器官功能障碍预测中提升性能并保护隐私。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM在处理内部不一致证据时表现较差，而医疗场景中患者症状与体征矛盾常见，亟需鲁棒且隐私合规的推理方法。
analysis.problem: 解决LLM在证据冲突（如症状与体征不一致）场景下决策性能下降的问题，同时满足医疗数据的隐私保护要求。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 医疗数据中症状与体征的不一致普遍存在，单次LLM和智能体管道难以有效调和此类冲突信号，导致预测性能下降。
analysis.main_method: 提出CARE多阶段隐私合规推理框架：远程LLM生成结构化类别和转换规则（不访问敏感数据），本地LLM据此进行证据获取和最终决策。
analysis.key_experiments: 基于MIMIC-IV构建MIMIC-DOS数据集，专注于ICU短期器官功能障碍恶化预测，在多个基线设置下评估CARE的性能。
analysis.contributions: 首次系统研究证据冲突下的LLM医疗决策问题；提出隐私合规的CARE框架；构建专用数据集MIMIC-DOS。
analysis.limitations: 依赖远程LLM的类别生成质量；仅在ICU场景验证，泛化性待评估；本地LLM计算资源需求可能较高。

papers.title: EmbedPart: Embedding-Driven Graph Partitioning for Scalable Graph Neural Network Training
papers.abstract: Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) are widely used for learning on graph-structured data, but scaling GNN training to massive graphs remains challenging. To enable scalable distributed training, graphs are divided into smaller partitions that are distributed across multiple machines such that inter-machine communication is minimized and computational load is balanced. In practice, existing partitioning approaches face a fundamental trade-off between partitioning overhead and partitioning quality. We propose EmbedPart, an embedding-driven partitioning approach that achieves both speed and quality. Instead of operating directly on irregular graph structures, EmbedPart leverages node embeddings produced during the actual GNN training workload and clusters these dense embeddings to derive a partitioning. EmbedPart achieves more than 100x speedup over Metis while maintaining competitive partitioning quality and accelerating distributed GNN training. Moreover, EmbedPart naturally supports graph updates and fast repartitioning, and can be applied to graph reordering to improve data locality and accelerate single-machine GNN training. By shifting partitioning from irregular graph structures to dense embeddings, EmbedPart enables scalable and high-quality graph data optimization.

analysis.tldr: 提出 EmbedPart，利用 GNN 训练中的节点嵌入进行图划分，实现快速高质量分区，加速分布式训练。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有图划分方法在开销与质量间存在权衡，难以同时满足大规模 GNN 训练的可扩展性需求。
analysis.problem: 如何在不牺牲划分质量的前提下，实现低开销、高速度的图划分以支持分布式 GNN 训练。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: GNN 训练过程中产生的节点嵌入是稠密向量，聚类后能自然反映图结构，可用于高效划分。
analysis.main_method: 利用 GNN 训练中的节点嵌入进行聚类，将聚类结果映射为图划分，替代直接处理不规则图结构。
analysis.key_experiments: 在多个大规模图上测试，EmbedPart 相比 Metis 实现超过 100 倍加速，同时保持竞争性划分质量并加速分布式训练。
analysis.contributions: 提出嵌入驱动的图划分方法，兼顾速度与质量；支持动态图更新和重划分；可应用于图重排序加速单机训练。
analysis.limitations: 依赖 GNN 训练产生的嵌入，可能不适用于非 GNN 场景；聚类质量受嵌入质量影响。

papers.title: Model-Based Learning of Near-Optimal Finite-Window Policies in POMDPs
papers.abstract: We study model-based learning of finite-window policies in tabular partially observable Markov decision processes (POMDPs). A common approach to learning under partial observability is to approximate unbounded history dependencies using finite action-observation windows. This induces a finite-state Markov decision process (MDP) over histories, referred to as the superstate MDP. Once a model of this superstate MDP is available, standard MDP algorithms can be used to compute optimal policies, motivating the need for sample-efficient model estimation. Estimating the superstate MDP model is challenging because trajectories are generated by interaction with the original POMDP, creating a mismatch between the sampling process and target model. We propose a model estimation procedure for tabular POMDPs and analyze its sample complexity. Our analysis exploits a connection between filter stability and concentration inequalities for weakly dependent random variables. As a result, we obtain tight sample complexity guarantees for estimating the superstate MDP model from a single trajectory. Combined with value iteration, this yields approximately optimal finite-window policies for the POMDP.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种基于模型的POMDP有限窗口策略学习方法，通过估计超状态MDP模型并分析样本复杂度，实现近似最优策略。
analysis.research_motivation: 部分可观测马尔可夫决策过程（POMDP）中，有限窗口策略学习需要高效模型估计，但现有方法样本效率不足。
analysis.problem: 解决从单条轨迹估计超状态MDP模型时的样本复杂度问题，以及采样过程与目标模型不匹配的挑战。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 轨迹由原始POMDP生成，导致采样分布与超状态MDP模型存在偏差，需利用滤波器稳定性处理弱依赖随机变量。
analysis.main_method: 提出一种基于表格POMDP的模型估计流程，结合滤波器稳定性与弱依赖随机变量的集中不等式，分析样本复杂度。
analysis.key_experiments: 理论分析证明单条轨迹下超状态MDP模型估计的紧样本复杂度界，并与值迭代结合得到近似最优策略。
analysis.contributions: 首次为表格POMDP中有限窗口策略学习提供紧样本复杂度保证，并建立滤波器稳定性与模型估计的理论联系。
analysis.limitations: 仅适用于表格POMDP，未扩展到连续状态或大规模问题；依赖滤波器稳定性假设。

papers.title: Uncertainty-Aware Variational Reward Factorization via Probabilistic Preference Bases for LLM Personalization
papers.abstract: Reward factorization personalizes large language models (LLMs) by decomposing rewards into shared basis functions and user-specific weights. Yet, existing methods estimate user weights from scarce data in isolation and as deterministic points, leading to inaccurate and unreliable inference. We introduce Variational Reward Factorization (VRF), an uncertainty-aware framework that represents each user's preferences as a variational distribution in a shared preference space. VRF infers user distributions via a variational encoder, derives weights through Wasserstein distance matching with shared probabilistic bases, and downweights uncertain estimates through a variance-attenuated loss. On three benchmarks, VRF outperforms all baselines across seen and unseen users, few-shot scenarios, and varying uncertainty levels, with gains extending to downstream alignment.

analysis.tldr: 提出变分奖励分解（VRF），通过不确定性感知的变分分布表示用户偏好，提升LLM个性化效果。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有奖励分解方法将用户权重估计为孤立且确定性的点，导致推断不准确且不可靠。
analysis.problem: 如何从稀疏数据中准确推断用户偏好，并处理估计中的不确定性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 用户偏好数据稀疏且存在噪声，确定性点估计无法捕捉偏好变异性和不确定性。
analysis.main_method: VRF使用变分编码器推断用户偏好的变分分布，通过Wasserstein距离匹配共享概率基，并采用方差衰减损失降低不确定估计的权重。
analysis.key_experiments: 在三个基准上，VRF在已知/未知用户、少样本和不同不确定性水平下均优于所有基线，并提升下游对齐效果。
analysis.contributions: 首次将变分推断引入奖励分解，实现不确定性感知的个性化；提出方差衰减损失处理不确定估计。
analysis.limitations: 未明确讨论计算开销或大规模部署的可行性。

papers.title: Rapid mixing in positively weighted restricted Boltzmann machines
papers.abstract: We show polylogarithmic mixing time bounds for the alternating-scan sampler for positively weighted restricted Boltzmann machines. This is done via analysing the same chain and the Glauber dynamics for ferromagnetic two-spin systems, where we obtain new mixing time bounds up to the critical thresholds.

analysis.tldr: 证明了正权重受限玻尔兹曼机中交替扫描采样器的多对数混合时间界。
analysis.research_motivation: 受限玻尔兹曼机（RBM）在机器学习中广泛应用，但其采样效率的理论保证不足，尤其是混合时间分析。
analysis.problem: 正权重RBM中交替扫描采样器的混合时间是否具有快速（多对数）上界？
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 正权重RBM的采样过程与铁磁两自旋系统的Glauber动力学相关，其混合时间在临界阈值以下可快速收敛。
analysis.main_method: 通过分析交替扫描链和铁磁两自旋系统的Glauber动力学，推导出新的混合时间上界。
analysis.key_experiments: 未提及具体实验，主要基于理论分析，在临界阈值内给出混合时间界。
analysis.contributions: 首次为正权重RBM的交替扫描采样器提供多对数混合时间保证，并改进了铁磁系统的混合时间界。
analysis.limitations: 结果仅适用于正权重RBM，且依赖临界阈值条件，未覆盖一般情况。

papers.title: Phase transition on a context-sensitive random language model with short range interactions
papers.abstract: Since the random language model was proposed by E. DeGiuli [Phys. Rev. Lett. 122, 128301], language models have been investigated intensively from the viewpoint of statistical mechanics. Recently, the existence of a Berezinskii--Kosterlitz--Thouless transition was numerically demonstrated in models with long-range interactions between symbols. In statistical mechanics, it has long been known that long-range interactions can induce phase transitions. Therefore, it has remained unclear whether phase transitions observed in language models originate from genuinely linguistic properties that are absent in conventional spin models. In this study, we construct a random language model with short-range interactions and numerically investigate its statistical properties. Our model belongs to the class of context-sensitive grammars in the Chomsky hierarchy and allows explicit reference to contexts. We find that a phase transition occurs even when the model refers only to contexts whose length remains constant with respect to the sentence length. This result indicates that finite-temperature phase transitions in language models are genuinely induced by the intrinsic nature of language, rather than by long-range interactions.

analysis.tldr: 该研究通过构建短程交互的随机语言模型，发现相变源于语言内在特性而非长程交互。
analysis.research_motivation: 此前语言模型中的相变被认为可能由长程交互导致，需验证其是否源于语言本身的属性。
analysis.problem: 澄清语言模型中相变的根本原因——是长程交互还是语言内在特性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 长程交互在统计物理中已知可诱导相变，但语言模型中的相变可能具有不同起源。
analysis.main_method: 构建上下文敏感随机语言模型，仅包含短程交互（上下文长度恒定），并数值模拟其统计性质。
analysis.key_experiments: 通过数值模拟分析模型在不同温度下的相变行为，验证短程交互下相变的存在性。
analysis.contributions: 证明语言模型中有限温度相变由语言内在特性（如上下文敏感性）而非长程交互诱导。
analysis.limitations: 模型仅考虑短程交互，未涵盖更复杂的语言结构；数值模拟可能受限于系统规模。

papers.title: Differentially Private Manifold Denoising
papers.abstract: We introduce a differentially private manifold denoising framework that allows users to exploit sensitive reference datasets to correct noisy, non-private query points without compromising privacy. The method follows an iterative procedure that (i) privately estimates local means and tangent geometry using the reference data under calibrated sensitivity, (ii) projects query points along the privately estimated subspace toward the local mean via corrective steps at each iteration, and (iii) performs rigorous privacy accounting across iterations and queries using $(\varepsilon,\delta)$-differential privacy (DP). Conceptually, this framework brings differential privacy to manifold methods, retaining sufficient geometric signal for downstream tasks such as embedding, clustering, and visualization, while providing formal DP guarantees for the reference data. Practically, the procedure is modular and scalable, separating DP-protected local geometry (means and tangents) from budgeted query-point updates, with a simple scheduler allocating privacy budget across iterations and queries. Under standard assumptions on manifold regularity, sampling density, and measurement noise, we establish high-probability utility guarantees showing that corrected queries converge toward the manifold at a non-asymptotic rate governed by sample size, noise level, bandwidth, and the privacy budget. Simulations and case studies demonstrate accurate signal recovery under moderate privacy budgets, illustrating clear utility-privacy trade-offs and providing a deployable DP component for manifold-based workflows in regulated environments without reengineering privacy systems.

analysis.tldr: 提出差分隐私流形去噪框架，在保护参考数据隐私的同时，利用其几何结构校正噪声查询点。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有流形方法缺乏隐私保护，而直接应用差分隐私会破坏几何结构，需要一种既能利用敏感参考数据又能提供形式化隐私保证的去噪方法。
analysis.problem: 如何在差分隐私约束下，利用敏感参考数据集校正噪声查询点，同时保留流形几何信息用于下游任务。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 参考数据的局部均值和切空间几何在隐私噪声下仍能保留足够信号，通过迭代投影可逐步将查询点拉回流形。
analysis.main_method: 迭代过程：隐私估计局部均值和切空间，沿私有子空间投影查询点，并用(ε,δ)-DP进行隐私核算。
analysis.key_experiments: 在模拟和案例研究中，验证了中等隐私预算下信号恢复的准确性，展示了效用-隐私权衡。
analysis.contributions: 首次将差分隐私引入流形去噪，提供模块化可扩展框架，并建立非渐近效用保证。
analysis.limitations: 依赖流形正则性、采样密度和噪声水平的假设，实际中可能难以完全满足。

papers.title: Positional Cognitive Specialization: Where Do LLMs Learn To Comprehend and Speak Your Language?
papers.abstract: Adapting large language models (LLMs) to new languages is an expensive and opaque process. Understanding how language models acquire new languages and multilingual abilities is key to achieve efficient adaptation. Prior work on multilingual interpretability research focuses primarily on how trained models process multilingual instructions, leaving unexplored the mechanisms through which they acquire new languages during training. We investigate these training dynamics on decoder-only transformers through the lens of two functional cognitive specializations: language perception (input comprehension) and production (output generation). Through experiments on low-resource languages, we demonstrate how perceptual and productive specialization emerges in different regions of a language model by running layer ablation sweeps from the model's input and output directions. Based on the observed specialization patterns, we propose CogSym, a layer-wise heuristic that enables effective adaptation by exclusively fine-tuning a few early and late layers. We show that tuning only the 25% outermost layers achieves downstream task performance within 2-3% deviation from the full fine-tuning baseline. CogSym yields consistent performance with adapter methods such as LoRA, showcasing generalization beyond full fine-tuning. These findings provide insights to better understand how LLMs learn new languages and push toward accessible and inclusive language modeling.

analysis.tldr: 研究LLM学习新语言时，语言感知和生成能力在模型不同层中形成认知特化，并提出仅微调少数层的高效适应方法。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM适应新语言成本高且过程不透明，理解其语言习得机制对实现高效适应至关重要。
analysis.problem: 现有研究主要关注训练后模型的多语言处理，未探索训练过程中新语言习得的机制。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 在低资源语言实验中，通过从输入和输出方向进行层消融，发现语言感知和生成特化分别出现在模型的不同区域。
analysis.main_method: 提出CogSym层启发式方法，仅微调模型最外层25%的层（早期和晚期层），实现高效适应。
analysis.key_experiments: 在低资源语言上，仅微调25%最外层层的下游任务性能与全微调基线偏差在2-3%内，且与LoRA等方法一致。
analysis.contributions: 揭示了LLM学习新语言时认知特化的层分布，并提出了高效微调策略CogSym。
analysis.limitations: 实验仅针对低资源语言，未验证高资源语言或更大模型；CogSym的通用性需进一步探索。

papers.title: Orthogonal Learner for Estimating Heterogeneous Long-Term Treatment Effects
papers.abstract: Estimation of heterogeneous long-term treatment effects (HLTEs) is widely used for personalized decision-making in marketing, economics, and medicine, where short-term randomized experiments are often combined with long-term observational data. However, HLTE estimation is challenging due to limited overlap in treatment or in observing long-term outcomes for certain subpopulations, which can lead to unstable HLTE estimates with large finite-sample variance. To address this challenge, we introduce the LT-O-learners (Long-Term Orthogonal Learners), a set of novel orthogonal learners for HLTE estimation. The learners are designed for the canonical HLTE setting that combines a short-term randomized dataset $\mathcal{D}_1$ with a long-term historical dataset $\mathcal{D}_2$. The key idea of our LT-O-Learners is to retarget the learning objective by introducing custom overlap weights that downweight samples with low overlap in treatment or in long-term observation. We show that the retargeted loss is equivalent to the weighted oracle loss and satisfies Neyman-orthogonality, which means our learners are robust to errors in the nuisance estimation. We further provide a general error bound for the LT-O-Learners and give the conditions under which quasi-oracle rate can be achieved. Finally, our LT-O-learners are model-agnostic and can thus be instantiated with arbitrary machine learning models. We conduct empirical evaluations on synthetic and semi-synthetic benchmarks to confirm the theoretical properties of our LT-O-Learners, especially the robustness in low-overlap settings. To the best of our knowledge, ours are the first orthogonal learners for HLTE estimation that are robust to low overlap that is common in long-term outcomes.

analysis.tldr: 提出LT-O-Learners，通过重加权损失函数处理低重叠问题，实现稳健的异质性长期治疗效果估计。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有异质性长期治疗效果（HLTE）估计在低重叠子群体中不稳定，方差大，需要更鲁棒的方法。
analysis.problem: 解决短期随机实验与长期观测数据结合时，因治疗或长期结果观测重叠不足导致的估计不稳定问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 低重叠导致有限样本方差大，传统方法对子群体估计不可靠，影响个性化决策。
analysis.main_method: 引入自定义重叠权重重加权学习目标，使损失函数满足Neyman正交性，降低对干扰估计误差的敏感性。
analysis.key_experiments: 在合成和半合成基准上验证，重点展示低重叠场景下的鲁棒性。
analysis.contributions: 首个针对HLTE的鲁棒正交学习器，理论保证准Oracle率，模型无关可集成任意ML模型。
analysis.limitations: 依赖短期随机实验和长期观测数据的特定设定，未讨论完全观测数据或非随机实验场景。

papers.title: Generalization Bounds for Spectral GNNs via Fourier Domain Analysis
papers.abstract: Spectral graph neural networks learn graph filters, but their behavior with increasing depth and polynomial order is not well understood. We analyze these models in the graph Fourier domain, where each layer becomes an element-wise frequency update, separating the fixed spectrum from trainable parameters and making depth and order explicit. In this setting, we show that Gaussian complexity is invariant under the Graph Fourier Transform, which allows us to derive data-dependent, depth, and order-aware generalization bounds together with stability estimates. In the linear case, our bounds are tighter, and on real graphs, the data-dependent term correlates with the generalization gap across polynomial bases, highlighting practical choices that avoid frequency amplification across layers.

analysis.tldr: 通过傅里叶域分析，为谱图神经网络推导了数据依赖、深度和阶数感知的泛化界，并揭示了频率放大问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 谱图神经网络（GNNs）的深度和多项式阶数增加时行为不明确，缺乏理论理解。
analysis.problem: 现有谱GNN的泛化界未考虑深度和阶数的影响，且频率放大问题未被充分分析。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 在傅里叶域中，每层成为逐元素频率更新，分离了固定频谱与可训练参数，使深度和阶数显式化。
analysis.main_method: 利用高斯复杂度在图傅里叶变换下的不变性，推导数据依赖、深度和阶数感知的泛化界及稳定性估计。
analysis.key_experiments: 在真实图上，数据依赖项与泛化差距相关，跨多项式基验证了避免频率放大的实际选择。
analysis.contributions: 首次为谱GNN提供深度和阶数感知的泛化界，并揭示频率放大对泛化的影响。
analysis.limitations: 线性情况下的界更紧，但非线性扩展可能受限；实验仅基于真实图，未覆盖合成数据。

papers.title: Event Embedding of Protein Networks : Compositional Learning of Biological Function
papers.abstract: In this work, we study whether enforcing strict compositional structure in sequence embeddings yields meaningful geometric organization when applied to protein-protein interaction networks. Using Event2Vec, an additive sequence embedding model, we train 64-dimensional representations on random walks from the human STRING interactome, and compare against a DeepWalk baseline based on Word2Vec, trained on the same walks. We find that compositional structure substantially improves pathway coherence (30.2$\times$ vs 2.9$\times$ above random), functional analogy accuracy (mean similarity 0.966 vs 0.650), and hierarchical pathway organization, while geometric properties such as norm--degree anticorrelation are shared with or exceeded by the non-compositional baseline. These results indicate that enforced compositionality specifically benefits relational and compositional reasoning tasks in biological networks.

analysis.tldr: 通过Event2Vec在蛋白质网络中强制组合结构，显著提升通路一致性和功能类比准确性。
analysis.research_motivation: 探索序列嵌入中强制组合结构是否能带来有意义的几何组织，以改进生物网络的功能推理。
analysis.problem: 现有蛋白质网络嵌入方法缺乏组合结构，难以捕捉层次化功能关系。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 组合结构嵌入在通路一致性（30.2倍 vs 2.9倍）和功能类比（0.966 vs 0.650）上远超非组合基线，但几何属性如范数-度反相关两者共享。
analysis.main_method: 使用Event2Vec（加性序列嵌入模型）在人类STRING互作组的随机游走上训练64维表示，并与基于Word2Vec的DeepWalk基线比较。
analysis.key_experiments: 在人类蛋白质互作网络上评估通路一致性和功能类比准确性，对比组合与非组合嵌入。
analysis.contributions: 证明强制组合结构显著提升生物网络中关系推理和组合推理任务的表现。
analysis.limitations: 仅基于人类STRING网络，未验证其他物种或更大规模网络；几何属性优势不明显。

papers.title: Multi-Mode Quantum Annealing for Variational Autoencoders with General Boltzmann Priors
papers.abstract: Variational autoencoders (VAEs) learn compact latent representations of complex data, but their generative capacity is fundamentally constrained by the choice of prior distribution over the latent space. Energy-based priors offer a principled way to move beyond factorized assumptions and capture structured interactions among latent variables, yet training such priors at scale requires accurate and efficient sampling from intractable distributions. Here we present Boltzmann-machine--prior VAEs (BM-VAEs) trained using quantum annealing--based sampling in three distinct operational modes within a single generative system. During training, diabatic quantum annealing (DQA) provides unbiased Boltzmann samples for gradient estimation of the energy-based prior; for unconditional generation, slower quantum annealing (QA) concentrates samples near low-energy minima; for conditional generation, bias fields are added to direct sampling toward attribute-specific regions of the energy landscape (c-QA). Using up to 2000 qubits on a D-Wave Advantage2 processor, we demonstrate stable and efficient training across multiple datasets, with faster convergence and lower reconstruction loss than a Gaussian-prior VAE. The learned Boltzmann prior enables unconditional generation by sampling directly from the energy-based latent distribution, a capability that plain autoencoders lack, and conditional generation through latent biasing that leverages the learned pairwise interactions.

analysis.tldr: 提出BM-VAE，用量子退火三种模式训练玻尔兹曼先验，实现高效生成与条件控制。
analysis.research_motivation: 变分自编码器（VAE）的生成能力受限于先验分布的选择，能量基先验能捕捉潜变量间的结构化交互，但训练时需高效采样。
analysis.problem: 现有VAE使用因子化先验（如高斯分布），无法建模潜变量间的复杂依赖关系，且能量基先验的采样计算困难。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 量子退火在不同模式下提供不同采样特性：非绝热退火提供无偏样本用于训练，慢速退火聚焦低能区域用于无条件生成，偏置场引导采样至特定属性区域用于条件生成。
analysis.main_method: 提出BM-VAE，在单一生成系统中使用三种量子退火模式：DQA训练、QA无条件生成、c-QA条件生成，利用D-Wave Advantage2处理器（2000量子比特）进行采样。
analysis.key_experiments: 在多个数据集上训练BM-VAE，与高斯先验VAE对比，显示更快收敛和更低重建损失，并验证了无条件与条件生成能力。
analysis.contributions: 首次将量子退火三种模式集成于VAE训练与生成，实现能量基先验的高效学习与灵活生成控制。
analysis.limitations: 依赖量子硬件（D-Wave），可扩展性受限于量子比特数；未与经典采样方法（如MCMC）进行系统对比。

papers.title: GPT-NL Public Corpus: A Permissively Licensed, Dutch-First Dataset for LLM Pre-training
papers.abstract: We present the GPT-NL Public Corpus, the biggest permissively licensed corpus of Dutch language resources. The GPT-NL Public Corpus contains 21 Dutch-only collections totalling 36B preprocessed Dutch tokens not present in any other LLM pretraining corpus. Additionally, the corpus includes roughly 207B English, 232B Code, and 48B German/Danish tokens taken from existing sets which we further curated for compliance. This corpus includes curated data from large existing corpora like Common Corpus and Common Crawl, as well as newly created Dutch-specific collections. Most newly created Dutch collections consist of content collected in collaboration with organisations or synthetically augmented content. All data is collected and evaluated with the aim of facilitating the creation of (commercial) language models that are lawful, useful and non-harmful. All data included in the GPT-NL Public Corpus is sourced from datasets with permissive licensing and is curated and redistributed under a CC-BY license. The full dataset is publicly available on the Hugging Face Hub.

analysis.tldr: 发布最大规模荷兰语许可语料库GPT-NL Public Corpus，含36B荷兰语及287B多语言token，支持合规LLM预训练。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM预训练语料库缺乏荷兰语资源，且多数数据集许可限制商业使用，阻碍荷兰语模型发展。
analysis.problem: 荷兰语高质量、许可开放的预训练数据稀缺，且现有语料库多语言混合中荷兰语占比极低。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 荷兰语在主流LLM训练数据中代表性不足，导致模型对荷兰语理解与生成能力弱，且版权合规问题限制商业应用。
analysis.main_method: 整合现有许可语料库（Common Corpus、Common Crawl）并新增与机构合作收集的荷兰语专属数据，经预处理、去重和合规审查后以CC-BY许可发布。
analysis.key_experiments: 构建包含21个荷兰语子集（36B token）及英语、代码、德语/丹麦语补充数据，总规模超500B token，全部公开于Hugging Face。
analysis.contributions: 提供最大规模许可开放的荷兰语预训练语料库，填补荷兰语LLM数据空白，并建立合规数据收集与评估流程。
analysis.limitations: 荷兰语数据仅36B token，相对英语（207B）仍较小；部分数据通过合成增强，可能引入噪声。

papers.title: Accurate and Scalable Matrix Mechanisms via Divide and Conquer
papers.abstract: Matrix mechanisms are often used to provide unbiased differentially private query answers when publishing statistics or creating synthetic data. Recent work has developed matrix mechanisms, such as ResidualPlanner and Weighted Fourier Factorizations, that scale to high dimensional datasets while providing optimality guarantees for workloads such as marginals and circular product queries. They operate by adding noise to a linearly independent set of queries that can compactly represent the desired workloads. In this paper, we present QuerySmasher, an alternative scalable approach based on a divide-and-conquer strategy. Given a workload that can be answered from various data marginals, QuerySmasher splits each query into sub-queries and re-assembles the pieces into mutually orthogonal sub-workloads. These sub-workloads represent small, low-dimensional problems that can be independently and optimally answered by existing low-dimensional matrix mechanisms. QuerySmasher then stitches these solutions together to answer queries in the original workload. We show that QuerySmasher subsumes prior work, like ResidualPlanner (RP), ResidualPlanner+ (RP+), and Weighted Fourier Factorizations (WFF). We prove that it can dominate those approaches, under sum squared error, for all workloads. We also experimentally demonstrate the scalability and accuracy of QuerySmasher.

analysis.tldr: 提出 QuerySmasher，一种基于分治策略的矩阵机制，可扩展且准确，优于现有方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有矩阵机制如 ResidualPlanner 和 WFF 虽可扩展，但仍有优化空间，需更通用的方法。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种可扩展且准确的矩阵机制，以提供无偏差分隐私查询答案。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 通过将查询拆分为子查询并重组为正交子工作负载，可独立求解低维问题，提升效率。
analysis.main_method: 采用分治策略，将工作负载拆分为互正交的子工作负载，独立求解后拼接结果。
analysis.key_experiments: 实验验证了 QuerySmasher 在可扩展性和准确性上优于 ResidualPlanner、RP+ 和 WFF。
analysis.contributions: 提出 QuerySmasher，理论上可支配现有方法，实验证明其优越性。
analysis.limitations: 未讨论对非边际查询或复杂工作负载的适用性。

papers.title: Agentic Tool Use in Large Language Models
authors: Min Zhang (1) ((1) Harbin Institute of Technology Shenzhen
papers.abstract: Large language models are increasingly being deployed as autonomous agents yet their real world effectiveness depends on reliable tools for information retrieval, computation and external action. Existing studies remain fragmented across tasks, tool types, and training settings, lacking a unified view of how tool-use methods differ and evolve. This paper organizes the literature into three paradigms: prompting as plug-and-play, supervised tool learning and reward-driven tool policy learning, analyzes their methods, strengths and failure modes, reviews the evaluation landscape and highlights key challenges, aiming to address this fragmentation and provide a more structured evolutionary view of agentic tool use.

analysis.tldr: 综述大语言模型工具使用的三种范式：提示、监督学习和奖励驱动策略，分析其方法、优势与失败模式。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有研究碎片化，缺乏对工具使用方法的统一视角和演化分析。
analysis.problem: 大语言模型作为自主代理时，工具使用的方法、训练设置和评估缺乏系统整合。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 工具使用研究分散在不同任务和工具类型中，导致方法比较和进展追踪困难。
analysis.main_method: 将文献组织为三种范式：即插即用提示、监督工具学习和奖励驱动工具策略学习。
analysis.key_experiments: 综述评估景观，分析各范式的关键挑战和失败模式。
analysis.contributions: 提供结构化的工具使用演化视图，整合碎片化研究并指出关键挑战。
analysis.limitations: 未深入实验比较各范式性能，可能忽略特定任务细节。

papers.title: When Users Change Their Mind: Evaluating Interruptible Agents in Long-Horizon Web Navigation
papers.abstract: As LLM agents transition from short, static problem solving to executing complex, long-horizon tasks in dynamic environments, the ability to handle user interruptions, such as adding requirement or revising goals, during mid-task execution is becoming a core requirement for realistic deployment. However, existing benchmarks largely assume uninterrupted agent behavior or study interruptions only in short, unconstrained language tasks. In this paper, we present the first systematic study of interruptible agents in long-horizon, environmentally grounded web navigation tasks, where actions induce persistent state changes. We formalize three realistic interruption types, including addition, revision, and retraction, and introduce InterruptBench, a benchmark derived from WebArena-Lite that synthesizes high-quality interruption scenarios under strict semantic constraints. Using a unified interruption simulation framework, we evaluate six strong LLM backbones across single- and multi-turn interruption settings, analyzing both their effectiveness in adapting to updated intents and their efficiency in recovering from mid-task changes. Our results show that handling user interruptions effectively and efficiently during long-horizon agentic tasks remains challenging for powerful large-scale LLMs. Code and dataset are available at https://github.com/HenryPengZou/InterruptBench.

analysis.tldr: 首个系统研究长时域网页导航中智能体处理用户中断（添加、修改、撤回需求）的基准与评估。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基准假设智能体无中断运行，或仅在短任务中研究中断，缺乏对长时域、环境依赖任务中中断处理的系统评估。
analysis.problem: 长时域网页导航任务中，智能体如何有效且高效地应对用户中途变更需求（如添加、修改、撤回指令）。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 用户中断在真实部署中常见，但现有智能体在适应动态意图和从中间变更中恢复时表现不佳，即使强大LLM也面临挑战。
analysis.main_method: 形式化三种中断类型（添加、修改、撤回），基于WebArena-Lite构建InterruptBench基准，并设计统一中断模拟框架评估多轮设置下的智能体。
analysis.key_experiments: 在单轮和多轮中断设置下，评估六种强LLM骨干网络，分析其适应更新意图的有效性和恢复效率。
analysis.contributions: 首次系统研究长时域网页导航中的中断处理，提出InterruptBench基准和统一评估框架，揭示当前LLM的不足。
analysis.limitations: 仅基于WebArena-Lite合成场景，可能未覆盖真实中断的多样性；未探索多模态或更复杂交互。

papers.title: Optimal Brain Decomposition for Accurate LLM Low-Rank Approximation
papers.abstract: Low-rank decomposition has emerged as an important problem in Large Language Model (LLM) fine-tuning and inference. Through Singular Value Decomposition (SVD), the weight matrix can be factorized into low-rank spaces optimally. Previously, a common practice was to decompose the weight in the activation-whitened space, and then achieve satisfying results. In this work, we propose Optimal Brain Decomposition LLM (OBD-LLM), which studies the decomposition problem in the model space by utilizing second-order Hessian information. Through a rigorous Kronecker-factorization of the Hessian, we show that the decomposition needs to consider both input and output information of the layer, and achieves much better decomposition results compared to input only method. Our loss-aware decomposition method involves a bi-directional whitening on the weight matrix.
